aada: Li ñu bokk ci sunu xeet ak sunu melokan (Tradition/Custom).
aadama: Yonenti Yàlla Aadama, ku jëkk ki ci kàllaama Wolof. 'Kon nga xam lu jaadu, neex Yàllaak doom aadama.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 4)
aadawoo: jël benn mbir, def ko sa aada'aadawoo
aajo: Li nit bëgg walla li ko soxal (Need/Requirement). 'Yaakaar ju tas day jeexal xol, aajo ju faju di garab guy taxa dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 12)
aakimoo: 'aakimoo 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf, bul aakimoo suufas jirim.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 10)
aakimookat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'aakimoo' (Someone who does...).
aar: Topatoo walla fagar. 'Bul dëddu xel mu rafet, da lay aar; sopp ko, mu sàmm la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 6)
aay: Buur aayul, dag yaa aay 'Jikkoy jigéenu moykat a ngii: day lekk, wommiku, te naan: "Defuma dara lu aay!"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 20)
aayewu: Defal boppam 'aayew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
aayewunu: Defal boppam 'aayewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
aayteefu: Defal boppam 'aayteef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
abal: . Ku la abal i gët fa ko neex ngay xool mbaa mu nangu ko.  Ku la may bët, nga xool fu ko neex.
àbb: Àbb, delloo ca gën. 'Mbuusum xaalis la ŋàbb, yóbbu, du ñibbisi ndare weer wi fees dell."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 20)
àbbi: . Ñaaw a gëna gore rafet.  . Ñaaw i gonee gën àbbi ko.
àbbkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'àbb' (Someone who does...).
ablekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'able'.
àddina: Àddina du cere waaye dees na ko laalo. 'laata Yàllaa sàkk suuf aki àllam ak feppu pënd ci àddina.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 26)
àddinaa: Àddinaa neex ba ku dee, ñu bàyyi laak say gëñ.
àddinaam: 'àddinaam 'May bége wërngalu àddinaam, di bànneexoo doomi aadama.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 31)
àddoo: 'àddoo 'Su buur àddoo cib àtte, muy kàddu gu Yàlla dogal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 10)
àddu: Waxaale walla tontu ci lu ñu la laaj (To speak up/respond). 'Ku xelu àddu, xam-xam rafet; ab dof di talalali.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 2)
àddukàddu: Defal boppam 'àddukàdd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àddul: 'àddul 'Nanga àddul ku amul kàddu, ku sësul fenn, nga ñoŋal àqam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 8)
àgg: .	Guney tey ñooy dooni magi ëllëg.  .	Gunge àgg baaxu ca.
àggale: 'àggale 'Deel maye, da lay ubbil bunt, di la àggale ci boroom daraja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 16)
àggee: . Ku fecc taxa jàll dex ba àggee dinga mbabbsu.
àggewuñu: Defal boppam 'àggewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àggul: . Neex xel taxula mëna nettali sa géntu moroom.  Neexum xel àggul ci nettali sa géntug moroom.
agsiwunu: Defal boppam 'agsiwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
aji: Booy aji Màkka, dëkk boo romb am na jàkkaak yilimaan, waaye Màkka la yaakaar ja ne. 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
àjjana: Bërëbu jàmm bi Yàlla jagleel ñu baax ñi (Paradise).
àjjee: . Kulli aj, kulli àjjee ko sut.
àjjil: Kuy xaritook golo, bu sa ngemb tagee, mu àjjil la ko.  . Ku amagul ab tool, maneesu koo may ab liggéey.
aka: Ana golo aka xastey daar-daar ? (,) Ana goloo ka xastey daar-daar ?  Ana golo aka xaste ay daar-daar ? 'Aka sopplu te jekk!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 19)
aki: .	Fot-fot tàggalewul mbaam ak i noppam. (,,) Pët-pët tàggalewul mbaam ak i noppam. (,) Fóot-fóot teqalewul mbaam aki noppam.  Fëtfëtlu taggalewul mbaam aki noppam.  Fatfatlu du fasale mbaam sëf ak i noppam. (,) 'Bu ko xemmeme taaram, bumu la fiir aki lamsal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 25)
àkk: Àkk àkkum gaynde, song songum bukki
àkki: 'àkki 'Tànk ya day bartalu wuti dee, ay jéegoom àkki njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 5)
aku: Dërëm ak jabar aku jaal laa yemale (: lenn laa ci yorul.) 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
akub: Diggante bët akub nopp, sàcc xëju fa. 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
akug: 'akug 'Sama doom, saxool xelu akug foog, dee ci xool foo tollu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 21)
akum: 'akum 'Ndeke lépp a nga saxi dég, fépp fees akum ñax, tabaxu doj ba ko wër màbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 31)
alag: 'alag 'Aji Sax ji day alag kër ku bon, di barkeel waa kër ku jub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 33)
alagkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'alag' (Someone who does...).
alal: Lu bari walla li nit am (Wealth/Property). 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
alalam: .	Góncu golo mooy alalam. 'Kiy jëfe njekk jot peyam, dunde; ab soxor di bàkkaare alalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 16)
alalu: Defal boppam 'alal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Waaye bu feeñee, fey boroom juróom ñaari yoon, joxe alalu këram yépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 31)
alfa: Lu reen jan-jan, reen a nga ca suuf.  . Lu rey Maalaw, du fi bàyyi Alfa.
àll: Bu ñey dee xàll babal, doom yaa tax. (,,) Bu ñey dee xàll baabal, doom jaa tax.  Bu ñey dee xàll mbabal, doom yaa tax.  Su ñey dee xàll ab àll, doom yaa tax  Bu ñey xàllee babal, doom jaa tax.
àllam: 'àllam 'laata Yàllaa sàkk suuf aki àllam ak feppu pënd ci àddina.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 26)
àlluway: 'àlluway 'Bu la ngor ak worma dëddu, booleel takk ci sa baat, bind ko ci sa àlluway xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 3)
am-am: Bu la am-am taxa bew, ndax nàkk du wees. (,)
am-amlu: Defal boppam 'am-aml' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
am-amu: Defal boppam 'am-am' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
amagul: Kuy xaritook golo, bu sa ngemb tagee, mu àjjil la ko.  . Ku amagul ab tool, maneesu koo may ab liggéey.
amal: Boo bëggee xam luy muñ, amal jabar. (,,,,,) 'Amal xel mu rafet akug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 5)
amalatu: Defal boppam 'amalat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
amalatunu: Defal boppam 'amalatun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
amalu: Defal boppam 'amal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kàddu gu xelu ci gémmiñug dof, mooy tànki lafañ, amalu ko njariñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 7)
amalug: 'amalug 'Njàlbéenu xel mu rafet mooy sàkku ko; ak loo mana am, amalug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 7)
amati: Bu la mën-ngawar jayee ba nga mafñàndum saaw, boo fa jógee, loo amati jënde koog teg. (,)
amatu: Defal boppam 'amat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
amatunu: Defal boppam 'amatun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
amatuñu: Defal boppam 'amatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
amee: Ba feneen amee ba-tey, kenn sonnatul. 'Bu yoon amee, ku jub bég; kuy def lu bon jàq.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 15)
ameel: . Koo xeebal soxlaam, yaa ko rey.  . Koo xëy ci waaram ameel na la añ.
ami: 'ami 'Ku jub du ami ay, ab soxor du tàggook musiba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 21)
amiin: . Ku yàkkamti sa wërsëg, amiin wa ñaaw. (,)
amoo: Ku am kuddu du lakk, walla bu lakkee, di cuune.  . Ku am nit ñi, ñàkkoo dara. Ku ñàkk nit ñi, amoo dara. (,)
amoon: . La àllaaxira di am jàmm yépp, Kumbaak Sàmba fa demul woon.  . La boroom géléem bëgg ci digóorug meer, yësal a ko koy may.  . La jarag am di yuux, su ko néew amoon jël. (,) 'Man it amoon naa baay, di benn bàjjo ci saa ndey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 3)
amu: Bóli gu dog, doktoor amu ca pexe.  Bóli gu dog, tiiñ nab doktoor. (,,) Bóli gu dog tiiñ na ab doktoor.  Bóli gu dog, doktoor mënu ci dara.  Put gu dog tiiñ na doktoor.
amug: 'amug 'nga foog, fegu, amug dégg, raw,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 11)
amul: Alxamdulilaay ju àndul ak coono, amul. 'Amul lu dëng mbaa lu jekkadi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 8)
amuloo: Amuloo salaamaalekum, amuloo fanaan leen jàmm.
amulug: . Liggéey bu amulug pey, yàgg lay taawloo, caatloo bon. (,) 'Nit xeluwul, amulug dégg ak pexe, ba manal Aji Sax ji dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 30)
amunu: Defal boppam 'amun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
amuñu: Defal boppam 'amuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ana: Baat buy laaj bërëbi nit walla leneen (Where is?). 'Doom, ana looy xemmeme keneen, bay fowe céri jàmbur?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 20)
añam: 'añam 'Mbugal ak toroxte dib añam, te gàcceem du deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 33)
andaaru: Defal boppam 'andaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àndal: . Lafañ, boroomi mbaam lay faral. (,,) Làggeek boroomi mbaam ay far.  Lafañ, boroomi mbaam lay àndal. 'Àndal ak ku xelu, sam xel rafet; ku lëngookub dof, loru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 20)
àndandoo: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg. 'Barey àndandoo lor a ngi ci, waaye xarit a ngi gëna taq nit mbokkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 24)
àndandook: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg.
àndatuñu: Defal boppam 'àndatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ànde: . Sëb ak dugub ca àll ca lañu ànde woon doora daje ci cin li, ba ci ndab ci, nit ka fii la ñu fekk.
àndee: . Xoole, bu ca xef àndee du metti.
àndu: 'àndu 'Ma ngay xool la ngay lekk, nu mu tollu, naan la: "Lekkal, naanal!" Te xol ba àndu ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 7)
àndul: Alxamdulilaay ju àndul ak coono, amul.
àndumaak: Demuma Jama, dikkuma Céng, àndumaak waa Ndéem ña, waa New ña raw ma.
àndunu: Defal boppam 'àndun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ànduñu: Defal boppam 'ànduñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
añe: 'añe 'Ku njublaŋ du baaxle, kuy wax njekkar añe musiba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 20)
ankat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'an' (Someone who does...).
àntu: 'àntu 'Diisoo ñàkk, pexe sànku; digle yu takku, pexe àntu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 22)
añub: . Liggéeyu ndey mbind mu nu yaxan la doom jaay juddu maas.  . Liggéeyub ndey; añub doom. (,,,)
àppal: 'àppal 'Ma nga naan: "Moo téxét bi, foo àppal sa téxét gi?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
àqam: 'àqam 'Lu ko moy mu naan, ba fàtte lu yoon tëral, xañ néew-ji-doole ju ne àqam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 5)
àqu: 'àqu 'Boroom njekk a xam àqu néew-ji-doole, ab soxor xamu ca dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 7)
armeel: .	Gungeb néew du weesu armeel ya. (,,) .	Gutt a paf ni pàww.
armeelu: Defal boppam 'armeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
artoo: 'artoo 'Boo artoo nit, mu baaxe la ëllëg; yaa koy gënal ku ko doon jay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 23)
artookub: 'artookub 'Santaane da lay niital, ndigal leeralal la, artookub yar di yoonu dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 23)
artu: 'artu 'Déglul, waajur artu la (' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
asamaan: Kaw walla ni kaw mel (Sky). 'Aji Sax ji xel mu rafet la sose suuf, lale asamaan ag dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 19)
asamaanu: Defal boppam 'asamaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
asaru: Defal boppam 'asar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
askan: Doomu baay fu mu defe teraanga moroom ma war na ka dimmale def lu ni mel walla lu ko ëpp ngir yëkkëti seen askan. 'Ab soxor mbugalam du jaas, wóor na; te ku jëfe njekk, saw askan mucc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 21)
askanu: Defal boppam 'askan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
astamaak: . Ndegam naar bay jaay xorom laa gisul waxantu maak bay jaay laalo.  . Ndegam ña ca wolu waa daanu ca teen ba, astamaak ña ca pind ba.
astandiku: Defal boppam 'astandik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
aste: . Lekk ñax mu wow, aste lekk ngooñ ak dugub, dina làpploo fas.  . Lëkkaayu Yàlla, xalangu du ko dindi. (,,)
àttan: Asamaan lu mu taw-taw suuf àttan ko.
àttanu: Defal boppam 'àttan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àttanul: . Lëg mën naa daw, waaye àttanul teg. (,,,,,,) . Légét, bu wunnee, dana raw fa woon. 'Ñett a ngii, day yëngal suuf, ba ci ñeent yu suuf àttanul:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 21)
àttanuñu: Defal boppam 'àttanuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àtte: Àtte bor ak fey. 'Ci samay pexe la njiit di saytoo, ñook kàngam yeek ñiy àtte dëgg ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 16)
àtteb: Àtteb bor, fay. 'Àtteb dëgg day teral aw xeet, moy di gàcceel aw askan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 34)
àttee: 'àttee 'Samay pexe la buur di jiitee, kilifa di ci àttee dëgg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 15)
àtteem: 'àtteem 'Seede buy fen muccul mbugalam, kuy noyyee ay fen du rëcc àtteem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 5)
àtteesagu: Defal boppam 'àtteesag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àtteesu: Defal boppam 'àttees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àttekaayu: Defal boppam 'àttekaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àttekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'àtte' (Someone who does...).
àttekatu: Defal boppam 'àttekat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
àttelu: Defal boppam 'àttel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
awale: . Ku rey jinne wara fekke awale ba.
awe: 'awe 'Fa muy jaare yiw la, fu mu awe jàmm la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 17)
aweel: 'aweel 'Kon nag aweel mbeddum waa ju baax, toppal yoonu defkatu njekk,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 20)
awma: Awma ginaar siiru sikk ma duma ci fekk. 'Maa dofe dëgg, ba yées ci nit ñi, dég-dégu nit sax awma ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 2)
awu: . Kumpaa ngi day ni ñay.  . Kuppe : tongoo ak awu.
ayca: . Ku la ne : “mbas maa ngi ñów”, nee ko “ayca”.  . Ku la ne “sangul”, sab taar la bëgg. (,,)
aye: Ku amul ndey, nàmp maam. (,,,,) . Ku añaane say dono, sa deewin ñaaw.  . Ku aye, wol sa moome. (,)
ayib: 'ayib 'Su buur toogee di àtte, day gis, di ràññee mboolem ayib.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 8)
ayoo: 'ayoo 'Mbañeel ak ayoo; cofeel ak jéggale bépp tooñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 12)
ayu: . Mbaxana du fekke coonob boroom. (,,) Mbaxanay du fekki deewu boroomam.  Mbaxana du fekke ayu boroomam. 'Ku bon këppoo ayu ku baax, workat gàddu musibam kuy jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 18)
baa: .	Gaana day bëgg moroom.  .	Gaanaa soxorul, xol baa jeex. 'Ab soxor ay xemmem alal ju lewul, kiy jëfe njekk garab la, reen baa ko meññal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 12)
baadoolo: Baadoolo, boo ko nee kaay jël sa teraanga, mu bañ, danga koy jox toroxalam. 'Alal day aar boroom ni ab tata, ñàkk di lor baadoolo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 15)
baale: 'baale 'Baale tooñ, yokk cofeel; sulliw ay, tas xarit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 9)
baalu: Defal boppam 'baal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baamtu: Defal boppam 'baamt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baamu: Defal boppam 'baam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baane: 'baane 'Dikkal, nu baanee baane, ba bët set, te bànneexu ci mbëggeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 18)
baanee: 'baanee 'Dikkal, nu baanee baane, ba bët set, te bànneexu ci mbëggeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 18)
baaraam: Loxob nit (Finger). 'day piis, di wokkeb tànk, di waxe baaraam,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 13)
baaraamu: Defal boppam 'baaraam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baat: Li nit di waxe walla melokanu baat (Word/Voice/Neck). 'Kaala gu jekk la ci bopp, di gànjar ci baat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 9)
baatu: Defal boppam 'baat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baatub: Boroom caq war nay moytu boroom baatub neen.  Boroom caq day moytu boroom yoqeel.
baawaan: Bu ñey juree, meew baawaan. 'Xadar day ñàng, mer di wal mu baawaan, waaye fiiraange amul moroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 4)
baax: Lu rafet walla lu neex (Good/Well). 'Kon nag aweel mbeddum waa ju baax, toppal yoonu defkatu njekk,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 20)
baaxantalu: Defal boppam 'baaxantal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baaxe: 'baaxe 'Ku xeeb sa dëkkandoo, bàkkaar nga; ku baaxe ku ñàkk, mbégte ñeel la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 21)
baaxee: Boo baaxee ñépp a lay jur, 'Buur, na kanam ga leer, sa bakkan mucc, su la baaxee, mu mel ni taw bu toppum nji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 15)
baaxle: 'baaxle 'Kiy jëfe njekk baaxle, waa dëkkam bànneexu; ab saay-saay saay, mbégte dim riir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 10)
baaxoñ: 'baaxoñ 'Kuy xeelu sa baay, di siidee déggal sa ndey, baaxoñ génne ciw xur, luqi sa bët, tan ya lekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 17)
baaxu: Defal boppam 'baax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baaxul: Cof say waajur baaxul. 'Faral ku tooñ baaxul, bul xañ dëgg ku deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 5)
baay: Way-jur bu góor (Father). 'Doom, toppal yaru baay, te bul wacc ndigalu yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 8)
baayam: Bu doom yàkkamtee génn kër baayam, yaayam a yàkkamti. (,) Ku xeeb sa këru baay, sa ndey a yàkkamti.
baayu: Defal boppam 'baay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàbbeeku: Defal boppam 'bàbbeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàcc: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko.
bàccukaayu: Defal boppam 'bàccukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baddaañu: Defal boppam 'baddaañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bagaanu: Defal boppam 'bagaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bajantu: Defal boppam 'bajant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàjjo: . Xeeb, ñàkk a cay bàjjo.  . Xeeb ñàkk a cay buur. (,) 'Man it amoon naa baay, di benn bàjjo ci saa ndey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 3)
bàkkaar: 'bàkkaar 'Ku xeeb sa dëkkandoo, bàkkaar nga; ku baaxe ku ñàkk, mbégte ñeel la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 21)
bàkkaaram: 'bàkkaaram 'Jëf ju bon day fiir ka ko sàlloo, bàkkaaram di mbaal, jàpp ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 22)
bàkkaare: 'bàkkaare 'Kiy jëfe njekk jot peyam, dunde; ab soxor di bàkkaare alalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 16)
bàkkaaree: 'bàkkaaree 'Ab dof, su bàkkaaree, yoonam!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 9)
bàkkaarkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bàkkaar' (Someone who does...). 'Doom, bàkkaarkat bu la xiirtal, lànkal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 10)
bàkkaaru: Defal boppam 'bàkkaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bàkkaaru làmmiñ dugal na boroom, ku jub mucc ci njàqare.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 13)
bàkkaarunu: Defal boppam 'bàkkaarun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bakkan: Li nit di noye walla li lay tax di dund (Nose/Life). 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
bakkanam: 'bakkanam 'Njaaloo di ñàkk bopp, kuy sànk bakkanam a koy def.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 32)
bakkanu: Defal boppam 'bakkan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ñii kat seen bopp lañuy fiir, seen bakkanu bopp lañu sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 18)
bàkkoo: .	Jëm ci làmb di bàkku, jóge cay bàkkoo ko gën (,)
bàkku: Defal boppam 'bàkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bala: Bala góor a baax, biiram réy. 'Bu yàgg lañu ma dëj, ca ndoorte la, bala suuf a sosu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 23)
balaa: Bala mu ne mux-mux, ne war-war.  Balaa mu naan nux-nux, ni war-war.
bale: Bataaxal boo bëggee mu leer doo ko binde bale.
balle: 'balle 'Naanal ci sa mbalkam bopp, ndox ma balle sa teenu bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 15)
ballul: 'ballul 'Ba may dikk, géej amul, ndox ballul bay fees, di wal-wali.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 24)
bàmmeel: . Ku ne yunn ci néeg sa kanam newwi soo duggee dee.  . Ku nekk ak sa bàmmeel. 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
bàmmeelu: Defal boppam 'bàmmeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kuy wër di sos dangay wuññi sutura, ku jara wóolu dangay am bàmmeelu biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 13)
ban: .	Gone, ban la, feek mi ngi tooy : nu la neex def ko ni.  .	Gone, bu jàqee, tàllal mag ab naqam. (,,)
bañ: Baadoolo, boo ko nee kaay jël sa teraanga, mu bañ, danga koy jox toroxalam. 'Dof bi, ñaata yoon ngay bañ xam-xam?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
baña: Dégloo xel, te baña dégloo xol. 'Daa fekk nga baña xam, te ragal Yàlla du loo tànn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 29)
banaana: . Ndox mi taw ci banaana ba mu saf suukar, moo taw ci kaani ba mu wex kaani.
bañam: . Yàlla du la jox njëgu saaku ceeb, jox la doole joo ko yenoo. (,) . Yàlla du reyal nit y bañam
bañe: 'bañe 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
bañee: Baadoolo bu bañee liggéey, bañeek mbokkam. (,)
bànjóoli: . Lu sax y dung naaw gannaaw bànjóoli.  . Lu surga sañadi, sañadi sañ ne : “suur naa”.  . Lu suur bajantu ba mu desub xaal.
banku: Defal boppam 'bank' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bann: 'bann 'Lal ba, ma xeeñal, mu ne bann, di ndàbb, cuuraay ak xas mu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 17)
bànneex: Lu nit di bëgg walla lu koy neex (Pleasure/Happiness). 'Xol bu tiis, naqar wu sax; xol bu neex, bànneex bu sax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 15)
bànneexal: 'bànneexal 'man, Xel mu Rafet, maa doon ku xareñ ci wetam, di ko bànneexal bés bu ne, tey bànneexu fi kanamam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 30)
bànneexam: 'bànneexam 'Aji Sax ji bañ na njublaŋ ci nattub diisaay, ay nattukaay na mat, muy bànneexam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 1)
bànneexoo: 'bànneexoo 'Kon nga mucc ci kuy def lu bon, tey bànneexoo lu jekkadi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 14)
bànneexu: Defal boppam 'bànneex' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Dikkal, nu baanee baane, ba bët set, te bànneexu ci mbëggeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 18)
bànqaasu: Defal boppam 'bànqaas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bant: Bant bu dëng bu ko ëpp doole koy jubbënti 'Tegoo bant nit a koy def, dogal ba Aji Sax ji la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 33)
bantal: 'bantal 'Ku dul bantal sa doom, bëggoo ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 24)
bantalee: 'bantalee 'Yëfi dof daa sax ci xolu gone, boo bantalee, mu tàggook moom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 15)
bantu: Defal boppam 'bant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bañu: Bañu démb bu nangoo tey, pexeem a joyul.
bañula: . Sàmm bañ na neex baaraam.  . Sàmm bañula xam dafa fekkewul.
bañuma: Bañuma ku ma tarka, waaye kenn du ma laab.
bàq: Bu ndox tuuroo, an bàq a des. (,,,)
bar: Biir du def bar ca a ku des.
baramu: Defal boppam 'baram' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baraxu: Defal boppam 'barax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bare: Lu bari walla lu ëpp (Many/Abundant). 'Bare na ku dee, moo ko rey, maneesula waññ ñi mu rey ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 26)
baree: . Lu ñam baree-bare, mujja jeex, ndegem nëbbu la ko.  Lu ñam barey-barey, mujja jeex. 'Su mbooloo baree, buur am ndam; fu nit ña néew, kilifa du fa dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 28)
barele: . Loo barele-barele, boo génnee gis loo moomul. (,,) . Loo barile-barile, ci benn néeg ngay fanaan. 'Barkeb Aji Sax jeey maye alal, kër-këri taxula barele.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 22)
barelewuñu: Defal boppam 'barelewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
barewaayu: Defal boppam 'barewaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
barewul: 'barewul 'damanh, barewul kàttan, te day dëkk ciy doj;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 26)
barey: .	Goloo la gëna xam kër gu barey xaj. (,,) Golo xàmmee na kër gu am xaj. 'Ku ñàkk, say dëkk sax bañ la; ku barele, barey xarit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 20)
bari: Bu fukk dee gas, fukk di suul, pënd ay bari waaye pax du fa am. (,,,,,,,)
barke: Bay ci sa toolu sëriñ bu doon maye barke kon seeni doom a cay jiitu. 'Rafet xel barke la' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 20)
barkeb: 'barkeb 'Barkeb Aji Sax jeey maye alal, kër-këri taxula barele.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 22)
barkeel: Bopp bu nara barkeel, nopp ya cay sax day dégg um ndigal.  Bopp bu naree am jàmm, yàlla da cay saxal nopp yuy dégg.  Bopp bu am njeriñ, noppi moo ca sax. 'Aji Sax ji day alag kër ku bon, di barkeel waa kër ku jub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 33)
barkeelu: Defal boppam 'barkeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Jub, barkeelu; ku soxor, wax ja làq fitna.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 6)
bartalu: Defal boppam 'bartal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Tànk ya day bartalu wuti dee, ay jéegoom àkki njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 5)
bataaxal: Bataaxal boo bëggee mu leer doo ko binde bale.
bataaxalu: Defal boppam 'bataaxal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàttu: Defal boppam 'bàtt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
baw: . Ku boot bukki, xaj baw la. (,,,,,,,,,) . Ku dàq xaj ba ca këram, nga bàyyi ko.
bawoo: . Ku mënul, bawoo : lu yàqu yaw a. (,,) Ku mënul, bawul, lu yàqu yow a. 'Lal naa saab lal, ba mu jekk, di malaan yu yànj, bawoo Misra.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 16)
bawuñu: Defal boppam 'bawuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bax: Cin bax na, waaye du jikkoom, matt a ko ca jóo.
baxa: .	Gàcce giy palmaan ñey, baxa-segu la.
baxal: Ba nga déggee mbott mën nam ndox, ma ñu baxal taxul ñuy wax.  Mbott mën na ndox, waaye du mu tàng.
bay: Ana golooka sàngoo mbàjj bay taamu nimoro diis ? 'Doom, ana looy xemmeme keneen, bay fowe céri jàmbur?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 20)
bayaalu: Defal boppam 'bayaal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bayliku: Defal boppam 'baylik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàyyeeku: Defal boppam 'bàyyeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàyyeel: 'bàyyeel 'Bàyyeel ñoll kuy sànku, bàyyeel biiñ boroom naqar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 6)
bàyyeendiku: Defal boppam 'bàyyeendik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàyyi: Àddinaa neex ba ku dee, ñu bàyyi laak say gëñ. 'Wutal xel mu rafet, bàyyi wurus; taamul ag dégg, wacc xaalis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 16)
bàyyikoo: Céebo du fi bàyyikoo guufa oom.  Céebo du jóge guufooy woom.
bàyyil: Bàyyil bésub, jekkul ci nit ku yiw. 'Loo mébét, bàyyil Yàlla xel, mu xàllal la yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 6)
bàyyileen: . Kuy jéem mbànd te mënoo tabax, dangay yàq ban, rekk.  Bàyyileen jéem i mbànd ku mënula tabax doo yàq ban.  Tabaxe su jéemantoo mbànd tojle (de nga ko toj).
bàyyima: 'bàyyima 'Ku bëgga xam, bëgg ku la yedd; ku bañ ku la artu, bàyyima nga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 1)
bàyyiwu: Defal boppam 'bàyyiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàyyiwul: . Munu malaa wutal dàll war-waraan nga.  . Muñ a gën, yàgg bàyyiwul dara.
bàyyiwunu: Defal boppam 'bàyyiwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bàyyiwuñu: Defal boppam 'bàyyiwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëccëg: Bëccëg tëdd, weer wa torox la. 'Yoonu ku jub day leer, ba ne ràññ ni bëccëg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 18)
bëccëgu: Defal boppam 'bëccëg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
beddeeku: Defal boppam 'beddeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bee: 'bee 'Yaafus bee, xoolal xorondom, seetal ci moom, ba muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 6)
bees: . Loo bees-bees, dugub du ñàkk dugg.  . Loo dog mu daanu, gannaaw xaal. (,,)
beeskat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bees' (Someone who does...).
bég: 'bég 'Doom rafet xel, baay ba bég; doom dof, ndey ja tiis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 1)
bégal: 'bégal 'Deel bégal ndey ak baay, rawatina ndey ji la jur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 25)
bége: 'bége 'May bége wërngalu àddinaam, di bànneexoo doomi aadama.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 31)
bégewu: Defal boppam 'bégew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bégewuñu: Defal boppam 'bégewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëgg: Soxla walla bëgg (To want/love). 'Xel mu rafet a gën gànjar; loo mana bëgg moo ko raw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 15)
bëgg-bëgg: Bëgg-bëgg, kapitenu boroom la : fu mu ko fekk maajloo ko.
bëgg-bëggu: Defal boppam 'bëgg-bëgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëgga: Bëgga dëkkandoo mànjaago duma taxa sant gomis. 'Ku bëgga xam, bëgg ku la yedd; ku bañ ku la artu, bàyyima nga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 1)
bëggal: . Ku biiñ bëggal tuñam ngaa seete.
bëggati: Bëggati ma laax, ba sama bopp def wos. (,)
bëggatu: Defal boppam 'bëggat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëgge: Bëgge bu la xañulee, booba bëggee goo. 'Jubalal, sa jëfi njekk musal la; ab workat day bëgge, ba far keppu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 6)
bëggee: Ba mbott bëggee tollu niw ñay, daa funki ba toj te sottiwul.
bëggi: 'bëggi 'Ku bëggu ay bëggi tooñ; damu, yàqule.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 19)
bëggkatu: Defal boppam 'bëggkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëggoo: 'bëggoo 'Ku dul bantal sa doom, bëggoo ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 24)
bëggoon: . Tib bu rëy rey na boroom, te dund la ca (boroom) bëggoon. (,) . Tilim dina dem fu saabu mënula dem. (,,,,)
bëggu: Defal boppam 'bëgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ab dof du am xaalis, jënde xel mu rafet; bëggu ca dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 16)
bëggul: .	Gawar gu di dawal fasam, mbaxanaam wadd te jotu ko for ?  .	Gaynde bëggul mbuum, yàpp lay dunde. (,,,) 'Kuy ñaawle bëggul ku ko artu, te du laaji ku rafet xel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 12)
bëggum: Bëggum ñeex duma taxa dëppoo cin lu tàng. (,,)
bëgguma: “Bëgg naa la” ak “bëgguma la”, jarul soowoo.
bëggunu: Defal boppam 'bëggun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëgguñu: Defal boppam 'bëgguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
béglu: Defal boppam 'bégl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëj-gànnaaru: Defal boppam 'bëj-gànnaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëj-saalumu: Defal boppam 'bëj-saalum' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëjgànnaaru: Defal boppam 'bëjgànnaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
béjjén: Man maay béjjén, bi may déng mag ñaa ngi fi, dañu cee mënul dara.
béjjéni: Ba béjjéni kuuy di lëõaaru, mag ñaa nga fa woon, te mënu ñu ca woon dara.
béjjénu: Defal boppam 'béjjén' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëkk-néeg: Ku dëkk ci kër gën di joxe ndigal (Steward).
bëkk-néegu: Defal boppam 'bëkk-néeg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëmëx: Bu bëgg-bëgg doonoon jëmm, dina bëmëx boroomam ci kàmb. (,)
bën: Lu puso muus-muus wëñ jaar ca bën-bën ba.  . Lu reen jan-jan, reen a nga ca suufam. (,)
bëñ: Bëñ a di sakketu gëmmiñ. 'Bul wóolu workat bésub njàqare, mooy bëñ bu bon mbaa tànk bu nasax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 19)
bën-bënu: Defal boppam 'bën-bën' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
beneen: Boo yëkkëtee ab loxo ne yëguma kenn, yëkkëtil beneen bi ne kenn yëgu ma. 'Bul ne say dëkk: "Demal ba beneen, ma jox la," te fekk la yor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 28)
benn: Àddina kenn defaru ko ci benn fan. 'Dikkal nu far, mbuus miy benn, nu bokk."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 14)
bënn: . Mbuusum gone munul sol yaxi mag.  .  Mécce, mu ca bënn am njariñ.   . Meew mu wayul tuuru na. (,,,) . Meex-sedd, rey.
bënnee: 'bënnee 'Waxi nit ndox mu xóot la, bu bënnee, xelli, ñu di ca xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 4)
benneelu: Defal boppam 'benneel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bennu: Defal boppam 'benn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bënnu: Defal boppam 'bënn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëñu: Wakke, bu dajeek ub geestu.  . Wol di mëq du jikko, jamono la.  . Wommat ginaar, gàddu koo ko gën. (,) . Woññ bëñu gaynde, day fekk mu dee.  . Woote Yàllaa gën bu nit.
bépp: 'bépp 'Mbañeel ak ayoo; cofeel ak jéggale bépp tooñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 12)
ber: .	Jàng njàngaan, soo mokkalee ber sa daara.  Ku jàng, boo mokkalee, ber sa daara.
béraŋu: Defal boppam 'béraŋ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëre: Bëre bëy duma taxa ngénte doom ju ma jurul.
béreb: 'béreb 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
bérebu: Defal boppam 'béreb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bérébu: Defal boppam 'béréb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bëreek: .	Duma làngandook ñey, waxuma la bëreek moom.  .	Duma lekk ci cere ji, ba noppi xëpp ci suuf.
beref: Beref ku ko mayul diw, bàyyi kook diw sa ka yàlla jox.  Ku mayul berefus ndiw, bàyyi kookus ndiwam.
berkelle: Berkelle lu mu rëy-rëy, du ko taxa nekk naaru-góor.
bernde: 'bernde '"Tey matal naa la ma digoon Yàlla, yàppu bernde waa nga kër ga, *saraxu cant laa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 14)
berndeel: 'berndeel 'Jigéen ju Dofee ngi berndeel' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 12)
bés: Bëñ ak làmmiñ ñoo dëkk, bés bu set dañuy xuloo, waaye dañuy jubóowaat. 'man, Xel mu Rafet, maa doon ku xareñ ci wetam, di ko bànneexal bés bu ne, tey bànneexu fi kanamam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 30)
bës: .	Golo gu mënula yéeg itam, mën gu daanu nga bës ko.  .	Golo gu ne, car ba muy fanaan mooy boroom.
bésu: 'bésu 'Alal du jariñ bésu mbugal; jub, mucc ci gàtt fan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 4)
bésub: Bàyyil bésub, jekkul ci nit ku yiw. 'Nit ay takk, bésub xare, Aji Sax ji di maye ndam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 31)
bët: Li nit di gise (Eye). 'Xooleel, sa bët ne jàkk, ngay xool sa kanam màkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 25)
bëtam: . Wànnent ku mu bàyyi say bët nga bàyyiy bëtam.  Wànnent ku mu bàyyi say get nga wara bàyyi yosam.
bëti: Bëti saa-wëtë. 'Xanaa doo wasaare sa bëti ndox ca biti, mu def ay wal ca pénc ya?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 16)
bett: ak golo gi dëkk Ndakaaroo yem, Goo ci bett dóor kob yar,
bëtt: .	Janax du woo loob deram bay bëtt ñag du ñeme ndono la.  .	Janax matul mbuus, te yàq mbuus. 'Alal day aar boroom ni ab tata, mu foog ne maneesu koo bëtt.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 11)
bette: Buur, lekk ak naan, folliku day bette ! 'Kon doo ragal njàqare lu bette ak saay-saay buy songe,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 25)
bëtu: Bëtu mbëggeel du gis melo. 'Kàdduy ku jub bëtu ndox la, day naatal; waaye ku soxor, wax ja làq fitna.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 11)
bew: Bu la am-am taxa bew, ndax nàkk du wees. (,) 'Ku bew, Aji Sax ji màbb sa kër; ab jëtun, Aji Sax ji ñoŋal pàkkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 25)
bey: Basi, góor a koy bey. (,,) 'Ku néewle bey na, meññeef ne gàññ, ñu àtte ko ñàkkal, mu ñàkk ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 23)
béy: Béy, bu àndul ak béy ya, ànd ak cere ja. (,,,,)
bëy: Bëre bëy duma taxa ngénte doom ju ma jurul. 'say xar da lay amal koddaay, bëy yi génneel la njëgu tool.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 26)
beyal: 'beyal 'Beyal sab tool, sab dund doy; topp ay caaxaan ñàkk bopp la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 11)
beye: 'beye 'Su yëkk takkul, bey, sàq wéet; mu beye dooleem, meññeef ne gàññ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 4)
beykat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bey' (Someone who does...).
bëykat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bëy' (Someone who does...).
biddiiwu: Defal boppam 'biddiiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bii: . Waxkat dina wax ba làmb taatam, ni bii du sama bos.  . Waxtaan amul ub ñag.
biiñ: . Ku biiñ bëggal tuñam ngaa seete. '"Kaay, ma may la, nga lekk, xellil la biiñ bi ma njafaan, nga naan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 5)
biiñam: 'biiñam 'Mu rendi ag juram, njafaan ay biiñam, xelli, taaj ay ndabam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 2)
biiñu: Defal boppam 'biiñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
biir: Biiri nit walla biiri kër (Stomach/Inside). 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
biiram: Àddina ak li ci biiram jarula xiirook a õaayoo. 'Deesul sikk ku sàcc aw ñam, def ci biiram ndax xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 30)
biiri: .	Gëja gis sa màgget, bu mu tax nga defe ne sax na ay bëñ. (,) .	Géléem bu ñemeñee fanaan biti, bu ragalee fanaan biti.  .	Géléem ci biiri béy. 'seede buy fen rekk, rawatina kuy yokku ay ci biiri bokk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 19)
biiru: Defal boppam 'biir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Làmmiñ feesal na biiru boroom, yoolu kàddu suur na boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 20)
bijjaaw: 'bijjaaw 'Sagu ndaw, doole ja; gànjaru mag, bijjaaw ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 29)
bind: Bind walla sàkk (To write/create). 'Bu la ngor ak worma dëddu, booleel takk ci sa baat, bind ko ci sa àlluway xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 3)
bindal: 'bindal 'Dama laa bindal fanweeri dénkaane, ci wàllu ndigal ak xam-xam,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 20)
bindantu: Defal boppam 'bindant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
binde: Bataaxal boo bëggee mu leer doo ko binde bale.
bindeesu: Defal boppam 'bindees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bindkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bind' (Someone who does...).
bindkatu: Defal boppam 'bindkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bindlu: Defal boppam 'bindl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bindoo: . Ku bindoo ni tama, ñu tëgge la ni tama.
bindu: Defal boppam 'bind' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bindul: . Yàlla amul palanteer bu mu naan la tollu ma foofu ma jox la.  . Yàlla bindul ku mu dul rey waaye am na ñu mu dul toroxal.  . Yàlla bu mbootu di menn.
bineegaru: Defal boppam 'bineegar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
binit: . Mbaam ma ñu sang ba mu set wecc anga xalangu ca binit. . Mbaam mu, bu wéqee màtt, def na xeexu baayam. (,)
binni: 'binni 'Kuy jëfe njekk falu, baadoolo bég; ab soxor jiite, baadoolo binni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 2)
bir: Lii guddi aay-aay bir set. 'Su la nëbbalee mbañeel, di la nax it, ag mbonam mujj bir ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 26)
biralal: 'biralal 'Artu yu ñu la biralal moo gën cofeel gu la boroom ñooru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 5)
biraluñu: Defal boppam 'biraluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
biti: Àddina ñett a ci gën : àjjana biti, ak weerteewlu ak mëneek say dëkk, ak ku la gis bëgg la. 'Xanaa doo wasaare sa bëti ndox ca biti, mu def ay wal ca pénc ya?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 16)
biy: . Ñaq yiy daw ci yaramu doomu Aadama yépp dañoo saf xorom, benn rekk a ci saf suukar, mooy biy daw ci sab jë. 'Ngoonug suuf la, jant biy lang, muy lëndëm di gëna guddi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 9)
bocciku: Defal boppam 'boccik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bojj: .	Ginaar bu toppee ñii taxani dafa gisul ñii bojj.  .	Ginaar dëgg na doom ja, waaye bañu ko. (,)
bojju: Defal boppam 'bojj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bokk: Bokk meen, taxul bokk jikko. 'Dikkal nu far, mbuus miy benn, nu bokk."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 14)
bokkaalekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bokkaale' (Someone who does...).
bokkal: Bu tey xamoon ku nga bokkal bakkan, mu di sa ànd ci àddina.
bokkam: Lu juddoo cim tàgg naaw, mbaa mu jaaxal ay bokkam. (,)
bokkeek: 'bokkeek 'Soo bokkeek kilifa ndab, xamal bu baax ni ngay lekke.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 1)
bokku: Defal boppam 'bokk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Tiisu xol, boroom a ko xam; mbégte ma it jàmbur bokku ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 10)
bokkul: Cin bokkul i safiin. 'Nay sa alal, yaw doŋŋ, ku bokk feneen bokkul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 17)
bokkuma: .	Du man rekk, bokkuma cee ko gën.
bokkunu: Defal boppam 'bokkun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bokkuñu: Defal boppam 'bokkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bóli: Bóli gu dog, doktoor amu ca pexe.  Bóli gu dog, tiiñ nab doktoor. (,,) Bóli gu dog tiiñ na ab doktoor.  Bóli gu dog, doktoor mënu ci dara.  Put gu dog tiiñ na doktoor.
bon: Baax ak bon, loo ca mana nëbb dafa wóorul. (,,) 'mucc ci yoonu ku bon ak kuy wax lu jekkadi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 12)
bonee: Boo bonee sa yaay dugg coono.
boo: Àddiya ak moyaal, loo ci lekk, boo géexee, mu rees. 'Kon boo sëngéemee, man it ma ree, njàqare dab la, may tex-texi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 26)
booba: Ab yeel bu ëppee ab lupp booba jàngoro rax na ca.
boobu: Defal boppam 'boob' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bóof: Cetug ginaar : bu ko fekk fa muy bóof.
boole: Boo déggee “jaar bëgg naw sëb”, newul ñu boole kook moom togg. 'Réy, xeebaate, yoonu mbon, ak wax ju jekkadi, ma boole bañ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 13)
booleek: 'booleek 'Soo jëloonub dof, yeb ci gënn, booleek pepp, wol, du tax ndof ga deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 22)
booleel: 'booleel 'Bu la ngor ak worma dëddu, booleel takk ci sa baat, bind ko ci sa àlluway xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 3)
booleesu: Defal boppam 'boolees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
boolewu: Defal boppam 'boolew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
boom: .	Jaan du tuut, saayu mattee boom.
bóom: 'bóom 'Kon nga ñàkk daraja, keneen jagoo; ku néeg bóom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 9)
bóomkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bóom' (Someone who does...). 'Ab bóomkat day sib ku mat, di wuta bóom kuy jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 10)
bóomu: Defal boppam 'bóom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bóomuñu: Defal boppam 'bóomuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
boor: .  Tàgge boo gis, am na jàppal diw. (,) . Taluma ndajem ndetteelu xott laa woddoo.  . Tama ñaari boor.
booru: Defal boppam 'boor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
boot: Bu ñalingaanee, Ngoy a ngay boot doomam.
boote: Noppalu, noppee ko gën.  . Noppi sëllu mag bejjenam. (,) . Nox gaynde matula wooye sa baay.  . Nu golo xam, na ko boote doomam.
bootu: Defal boppam 'boot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
booy: Booy aji Màkka, dëkk boo romb am na jàkkaak yilimaan, waaye Màkka la yaakaar ja ne. 'Booy dox mu di la jiite, nga tëdd, mu di la sàmm, nga yewwu, mu di la waxal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 22)
bopp: Toppu nit walla boppu nit (Head/Self). 'Kaala gu jekk la ci bopp, di gànjar ci baat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 9)
boppam: Bu mag amee sutura moo ko may boppam. 'Ku baax, boppam; ku bon, boppam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 17)
boppu: Defal boppam 'bopp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
boppub: Ay du yem ci boppub boroom. (,,,,) Ay du yem ci boppu boroomam. (,) Musiba du yem ci boppu boroom.
boqal: 'boqal 'Ku mer, may ko ci sutura, mu giif; boroom xadar, boqal ko neexal, mu dal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 14)
bor: Àtte bor ak fey. 'Doom, dangaa gàddul nit bor, dige feyal jàmbur,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 1)
boram: 'boram 'Ku ñàkk bopp ay dige feyal jàmbur, di ko gàddul boram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 18)
boroom: Ay du yem ci boppub boroom. (,,,,) Ay du yem ci boppu boroomam. (,) Musiba du yem ci boppu boroom. 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
boroomam: Ay du yem ci boppub boroom. (,,,,) Ay du yem ci boppu boroomam. (,) Musiba du yem ci boppu boroom.
boroomi: . Lafañ, boroomi mbaam lay faral. (,,) Làggeek boroomi mbaam ay far.  Lafañ, boroomi mbaam lay àndal. 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
boroomu: Defal boppam 'boroom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
borosu: Defal boppam 'boros' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bos: Bu sikkim lakkandoo, ku ne sa bos ngay fey.
boyetu: Defal boppam 'boyet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buddeeku: Defal boppam 'buddeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buddi: .	Jabar ju bon ak bëñ buy mettee yem (buddi rekk.) 'Ku bon, ñu génne réew mi; kuy fecci worma, ñu buddi, sànni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 22)
buddiku: Defal boppam 'buddik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bugguñu: Defal boppam 'bugguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
bukki: Àkk àkkum gaynde, song songum bukki
bul: Bëggul walla waxul (Do not). 'Doom, toppal yaru baay, te bul wacc ndigalu yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 8)
buleen: Buleen xeeb bataaxal, lu mu tuut tuut wax lay indi. (,) 'Maa ngi leen di jàngal lu baax, buleen fàtte sama njàngale.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 2)
buma: Buma naanatul ñeex, ñeex duma naan.
bummi: . Momar ay Mëló, Ndiix ay Ndaax, Sàmbaay Bàcc.  . Moo juddu ciy géléem nàmp ciy mbaam. (,,) . Mooy buur, mooy bummi.
bumu: . Neex i tànk, bumu la yóbbu ci sàq moo beyul woon.  Neex i tànk bumu la yóbbu ci sàq moo beyutoon. 'Bu ko xemmeme taaram, bumu la fiir aki lamsal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 25)
bunduxataalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'bunduxataal' (Someone who does...).
bunt: . Kuy def bunt boo gis ubbi ko daa mës ubbi tisóoli. 'Soreel ndaw soosu, bul jege bunt këram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 8)
buntu: Defal boppam 'bunt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
butéel: Ñaari bët danañu gëna gis as benn.  . Ñaari gët du yër butéel.
butitu: Defal boppam 'butit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
butoõu: Defal boppam 'butoõ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buub: Buub ëtt bàyyib ruum. 'Njàqare di ngëlén, dab la, sa musiba def callweer, buub la, njekkar ak fitna dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 27)
buubu: Defal boppam 'buub' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buum: Déggadi ñett la jur : buum ci baat ; — xeej ci koll ; — ak gis ku ne : « Ki diw ma woon am ? »
buumam: . Léegi, lu lëndëmoon leer, lu soriwoon jégé.  . Leemkat boo gis, day mujj roccig buumam dem.  . Lëf lu la Yàlla teg kenn mënu ko dindi.
buumi: Boo doon góor dangay sol màntó di war naaru góor, di dañal; bi ngay jigéen yaa ngi dog buumi gàcce, di bëgg lu baax, di bañ lu bon.
buumu: Defal boppam 'buum' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buur: Ku rëy walla njiit (King/Leader). 'Da lay takkal kaala gu jekk, solal la mbaxanam buur." Moytul yoonu ku bon' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 9)
buur-buurlu: Defal boppam 'buur-buurl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buuru: Defal boppam 'buur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'gaynde, mooy buuru rab yi, ragalul kenn;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 30)
buurub: 'buurub 'Kàddu yu xelu yu Suleymaan buurub Israayil, di doomu Daawuda.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 1)
buusu: Defal boppam 'buus' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buwaatu: Defal boppam 'buwaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
buy: Àddina, ndoxum joor la ; buy taa, mu ngay õiis (,) 'Kon doo ragal njàqare lu bette ak saay-saay buy songe,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 25)
caa: Du man doõõ, bokkuma caa ko gën.  .	Du xamum nganj, yàgg a suub la. 'Xellil xaalis, tonni lu ca rax, ba ab tëgg man caa am ndab.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 4)
caageenu: Defal boppam 'caageen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
caat: . Waxi dof, taaw baay gën caat ma. (,) . Waxi mag “waaw” la sant.
caax: 'caax 'Doo firib caax, ba jàpp njanaaw luy xoole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 17)
caaxaan: Bu caaxaan wéyee, dëgg a des. 'Beyal sab tool, sab dund doy; topp ay caaxaan ñàkk bopp la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 11)
caaxu: Defal boppam 'caax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cab: Lu waay rendi, ca suba, ba ngoon ci yoxoom lay nàcc.  . Lu waay wax cib nawet, cab toolam la ko gise. (,)
cabbu: Defal boppam 'cabb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cag: . Suuxlu mbër, làng ak moom a ko gën, muy bëre di daan ngay ree.  . Taal bu Yàlla taal, sànni cag matt a gën fey ko. (,,,)
caga: Caga, benn yoon la ñu koy nax.
càkkéefu: Defal boppam 'càkkéef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
càkktéefu: Defal boppam 'càkktéef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
callweer: 'callweer 'Njàqare di ngëlén, dab la, sa musiba def callweer, buub la, njekkar ak fitna dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 27)
càmmiñ: . Ku ñuy dàq ngay daw, di jàppi ween, sa càmmiñ a lay dàq.  . Ku ñuy jàppub jaam ngay seetub surga.
càmmiñu: Defal boppam 'càmmiñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
càmmoñ: 'càmmoñ 'Gudd fan, mu joxee ndijoor; càmmoñ ba, alal ak teraanga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 16)
càmmoñu: Defal boppam 'càmmoñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cangaay: Bu sedd jamee ku amul cangaay dangay banku.
càngaay: . Noppal na baay Diba dee na guddi amul càngaay.  . Noppaliku, noppee ci gën.
cangaayu: Defal boppam 'cangaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cant: 'cant '"Tey matal naa la ma digoon Yàlla, yàppu bernde waa nga kër ga, *saraxu cant laa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 14)
cantu: Defal boppam 'cant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
càppit: 'càppit 'Bu weesoo mu màtt la ni jaan, ne la càppit ni ñàngóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 32)
caq: Boroom caq war nay moytu boroom baatub neen.  Boroom caq day moytu boroom yoqeel.
car: Car bu fàq moo gën garab gu daanu. 'Kàddu gu xelu ci gémmiñug dof mooy car aki dégam, màndikat xàcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 9)
caraxu: Defal boppam 'carax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cas: 'cas 'Te ku ne sawara cas, tafoo, lakk say yére.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 27)
cat: Cat, bu la reyul, semmal la.  Cat du reyul sembal.
caw: Bu guney yéeg, du tàggoo, waaye bu daanoo ñu yëg ko. (,) Gone, bu dee yéeg du taggoo, waaye bés bu daanoo mag am caw yoon.
cawarte: 'cawarte 'Ab yaafus bu rëbbee, sooy; cawarte koom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 27)
cawlu: Defal boppam 'cawl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cax: 'cax 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
cay: Bay ci sa toolu sëriñ bu doon maye barke kon seeni doom a cay jiitu. 'Ay sos la yéefar di loree dëkkandoom, waaye kiy jëfe njekk, xam-xam la cay mucce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 9)
caytu: Defal boppam 'cayt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cee: Man maay béjjén, bi may déng mag ñaa ngi fi, dañu cee mënul dara.
ceeb: . Man aréen, pepp mënu maa yey, su dul woon man, ceeb du niin.  . Man de, jab laa : sama taat a ma téyé !
céebo: Céebo du fi bàyyikoo guufa oom.  Céebo du jóge guufooy woom.
ceebu: Defal boppam 'ceeb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ceek: . “Sotti ceek def ci”, dara du ci moy ndab il.  . Soxla ku ca dul faj dara, léegi dootoo ko yëg.  . Soxmaat day yab ndox ma mu dëkkal.
céeli: .	Jigéen ñatt la: jigéenu xaj, jigéenu suñéel, jigéenu céeli.  .	Jigéen, soppal te bul wóolu. (,,,)
ceen: . Ñàkk buubu, ñàkk ceen ga, ñàkk xer ba ñu ko yeewoon.  . Ñàkk dayul ni am.
ceeñeeru: Defal boppam 'ceeñeer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
céetu: Defal boppam 'céet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cell: 'cell 'Ku rafet xel day xam, ne cell; bu dof noppiwul, yàqule teew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 14)
cëpp: . Lay yóbbu nag busëri, moo ko fay yóbbu.  . Làyy-làyy joo gis mujjam cëpp.
cér: 'cér 'sa yaram wér, say cér naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 8)
céram: 'céram 'Na lay céram doy foo tollu, na la xañ sago saa su ne.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 19)
cere: Àddina du cere, waaye dañu koy laalo. (,,,,,,,,) Àddina du cere waaye lu mata laalo la.
céri: 'céri 'Doom, ana looy xemmeme keneen, bay fowe céri jàmbur?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 20)
céru: 'céru 'Teraanga di céru ku rafet xel, ab dof gàccoo gàcce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 35)
cérub: Cérub Ma-xejj, Ma-xojj a koy jël.
cëslaayu: Defal boppam 'cëslaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cetug: Cetug ginaar : bu ko fekk fa muy bóof.
cib: Boo amee xaritub gunóor, bu ko tas cib kekk. 'Ŋoyal cib yar, bul yoqi, sàmm ko, moo yor sa bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 13)
cig: Bant, lu mu yàgg yàgg cig dex, du tax mu soppiku jasig. (,,,) Yàggaayu bantu ron ci ndox, du ko taxa doon jasig (,) Bant, lu mu yàgg, yàgg ci dex, du ko taxa soppaliku jasig 'ndax Aji Sax ji da lay yiir, di la musal cig fiir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 26)
ciipatu: Defal boppam 'ciipat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ciipu: Defal boppam 'ciip' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cim: Aw fas, manees na koo wommat ba cim ndox, waaye naanloo ko te marul, maneesu ko 'saw làmmiñ yeb la cim pax, nga keppu?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 2)
cin: Bëggum ñeex duma taxa dëppoo cin lu tàng. (,,)
ciw: Jaan tuuti na waaye daõar jaõ ca biir.  .	Jaaxaan ciw naaj ne gisoob jant. 'Doom, bul ànd ak ñoom ciw yoon, bul jaare fa ñuy jaar,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 15)
ciy: Am joo gis, indee ciy tegu. 'Ku dox ciy xal it, say tànk ñor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 28)
cofeel: 'cofeel 'Mbañeel ak ayoo; cofeel ak jéggale bépp tooñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 12)
cofeelu: Defal boppam 'cofeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
coggalu: Defal boppam 'coggal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cokkeer: Cokkeer a dim limb, ku weddi laajal baag.
colal: . Ku jaaxaan di saw, balaa kenn a tooy nga lóor. (,,,) Ku jaaxaan di colal, ci sa kaw lay dellusi.
coll: Coll ju nuuru ci gannaawu moroomam du oomle.
collu: Defal boppam 'coll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
conco: Conco, boroom rekk a ko àttan.
concu: Defal boppam 'conc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
coocu: Defal boppam 'cooc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cóolóol: 'cóolóol 'Alal ju la fen may, cóolóol la, day naaw, wut ko xaru la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 6)
cóolóolu: Defal boppam 'cóolóol' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
coono: Alxamdulilaay ju àndul ak coono, amul. 'Xarit du bëgg, di bañ; mbokk day bokk ak yaw say coono.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 17)
coonob: . Mbaxana du fekke coonob boroom. (,,) Mbaxanay du fekki deewu boroomam.  Mbaxana du fekke ayu boroomam.
coonooku: Defal boppam 'coonook' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
coow: Coow la ca teen ba, ña amul baag a ko waral. (,,,) Xuloo ba ca teen ba ña amul baaga
coowal: Coowal mbott, terewul nag naan cib déeg. (,)
cosaan: 'cosaan 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf te say maam tegoon ko fa démb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 28)
cosaanoo: Wax ju ñaaw dëkkul fa mu jëm, fa mu jóge la cosaanoo.  . Wax ma sa ànd ma wax la sa jikko.
cosaanu: Defal boppam 'cosaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
coxor: 'coxor 'Kàddug boroom njekk di ngën-gi-xaalis, xelum coxor amul solo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 20)
coxoram: 'coxoram 'Daa bon, def ko lekk, di màndee coxoram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 17)
coxoru: Defal boppam 'coxor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
coy: Bu lëg lekkee aloom, na ko gërëme coy (,,,,,) Lëg su lekkee aloom war na koo gërëme coy. (,) Bu lëg mosee aloom, na ko gërëme coy.
curr: 'curr 'Ana kuy tiislu, naan: "Wóoy, ngalla man!" Ana kuy xulooka jàmbat, di gaañu ci dara, bët ya xonq curr?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 29)
cususu: Defal boppam 'cusus' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cuubu: Defal boppam 'cuub' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cuuj: Bu cuuj màggee, ñu bàyyi ginaar.
cuuju: Defal boppam 'cuuj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
cuune: Ku am kuddu du lakk, walla bu lakkee, di cuune.  . Ku am nit ñi, ñàkkoo dara. Ku ñàkk nit ñi, amoo dara. (,)
cuuraay: 'cuuraay 'Lal ba, ma xeeñal, mu ne bann, di ndàbb, cuuraay ak xas mu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 17)
cuuraayu: Defal boppam 'cuuraay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daa: “Am léegi” a gën “daa am ci kanam”. 'Daa fekk nga baña xam, te ragal Yàlla du loo tànn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 29)
daagu: Defal boppam 'daag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'séq daagu, jekk taxawaay; ab sikket, ak buur ci biiri dagam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 31)
daan: Mbaam du daan, Dax du jaaru, Nen du maaj 'Ku baax, Aji Sax ji bége la; kuy fexe lu bon, mu daan la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 2)
daan-kat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'daan-' (Someone who does...).
daanee: Bukki bu daanee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bukki, bu songee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bu bukki dabee gaynde, ca doxin wa la.  Bukki su yabee gaynde ca doxin wa la.
daaneel: Dogu, lu mu song dagg la, mbaa daaneel la. 'Kiy def njekk deesu ko daaneel mukk, ku soxor du yàgg cim réew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 30)
daanlu: Defal boppam 'daanl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daanoo: Bu guney yéeg, du tàggoo, waaye bu daanoo ñu yëg ko. (,) Gone, bu dee yéeg du taggoo, waaye bés bu daanoo mag am caw yoon. 'Ab soxor bu daanoo, jeex na; ku jub, sa kër taxaw, ne këcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 7)
daanu: Defal boppam 'daan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Boroom njekk day daanu juróom ñaari yoon, jógaat, ab soxor sërëx ci njekkar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 16)
daara: .	Jàng njàngaan, soo mokkalee ber sa daara.  Ku jàng, boo mokkalee, ber sa daara.
daas: Damay daas fanaanal ndax rendi day bette.  Daasal sa paaka fanaanal rendi day bette.
daasal: Damay daas fanaanal ndax rendi day bette.  Daasal sa paaka fanaanal rendi day bette.
daaslu: Defal boppam 'daasl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daaw: Bañi daaw su bëggee ren, pexeem a joy.
daawu: Defal boppam 'daaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daawuñu: Defal boppam 'daawuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daay: Bu daay tàkkee, gisoo bàqaar, am na lu ko téye.
daayaarlu: Defal boppam 'daayaarl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dab: Doom danga doon dem mu dab la, mënu laa yàqal saw yoon. Ki la fekk ci saw yoon, bu mu la yàqal saw yoon. 'Kon boo sëngéemee, man it ma ree, njàqare dab la, may tex-texi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 26)
dabagu: Defal boppam 'dabag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dàbbaliku: Defal boppam 'dàbbalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dabee: Bukki bu daanee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bukki, bu songee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bu bukki dabee gaynde, ca doxin wa la.  Bukki su yabee gaynde ca doxin wa la.
dabi: . La ngeen tàyyi toppleen ko, la ngeen sawar bàyyileen ko. (,,,) . La tee nag waa dabi nag ya tee ñeex maa neex.
dabu: . Wax, soxu fetal la, su rëccee, dabu ko wees. (,,,) . Wax, su guddee, ñaar a ko guddal.
daf: . Ku sa weeru baay doy, doo xaaraani bay tala fande.  .  Ku sa yaay tuur sam ñeex, nga mëq sa cere. (,)  . Ku sàcc lëf, boroomam daf ko fekkul.
dafa: Baax ak bon, loo ca mana nëbb dafa wóorul. (,,)
dag: Ab dag du bëgg moroom ma.
dagaan: .  Kër, ñaari wax a koy tas : “su doon man” ak “su ma doon yow”.   . Kër waay, ku ca dikk ak dagaan, yaa tooñ ; boroom da di kër-këri bay am
dagaanu: Defal boppam 'dagaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dagam: 'dagam 'séq daagu, jekk taxawaay; ab sikket, ak buur ci biiri dagam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 31)
dagan: .	Kenn gisul fu ñuy tabaskee xaj te naa dagan na.  .	Kenn mënula jàppandoo ñaari jaar.
daganal: Sopp buur aayul, wànte buur bu la sopp a ko gën.  . Sopp, daganal.
daganu: Defal boppam 'dagan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dagg: Bakkan waruw dàll la : fa muy dagge doo ko yëg. (,,) Bakkan waru dàll la, buy dagg boroom du ko yëg. 'Ku barele, barey xarit; ku ñàkk, sab xarit dagg la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 4)
dàgg: . Nit men naa xeteñ, waaye Yàllaay dàgg.
dàgga: . Séddale, ca kuddu yu jëkk ya.  . Seedes mbey dàgga. (,,)
daggalu: Defal boppam 'daggal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dagge: Bakkan waruw dàll la : fa muy dagge doo ko yëg. (,,) Bakkan waru dàll la, buy dagg boroom du ko yëg.
daggee: .	Janax, bu daggee caqub muus, ñag baa jege. (,) Bu janax dogee caqub muus, nag baa jigéo
daggitu: Defal boppam 'daggit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daj: . Làmb daj, gis gënu koo wóor. 'Mbégtee ñeel ku daj xel mu rafet ak ku amug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 13)
dajale: 'dajale 'Gannaaw bu ñu gubee, ba ñax saxaat, ñu dajale ngooñ ma ca tund yac,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 25)
daje: Bëñ ak làmmiñ a dëkk, waaye danuy daje.
dajeek: . Ku bañ ku la ñafale, dangay tooñ koo mën. (,) . Ku bañ ku saw ub lal, dajeek kuy yàq ub lal.  . Ku bañ lu baax, lu bon nga bëgg. 'Ndaw si jekki dajeek moom, sol yérey gànc, lal pexeem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 10)
dajewuñu: Defal boppam 'dajewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dajjant: 'dajjant 'Ku bon du nelaw te lorewul, du dajjant ba kera muy téqe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 16)
dàjjiku: Defal boppam 'dàjjik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dakk: 'dakk 'Dàqal kuy ñaawle, ay jeex; xulooki saaga dakk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 10)
dàkk: 'dàkk 'Kàdduy dëgg, day sax dàkk; fen, xef-xippi, mu wéy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 19)
dakkul: Boroom õàdd wu dakkul yëgul boroom pane. 'Doom ju dof naqaru baay baa, te jabar ju pànk mooy senn bu dakkul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 13)
dal: Bala ngaa gësu, dal. 'Njàqare di ngëlén, dab la, sa musiba def callweer, buub la, njekkar ak fitna dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 27)
dalalu: Defal boppam 'dalal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dalaluñu: Defal boppam 'dalaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dalamu: Defal boppam 'dalam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daldi: 'daldi 'Muy dem ba fa ndaw say taxaw, ca selebe yoon wa, daldi wuti kër ndaw sa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 8)
dale: Doomu gaynde, bu dale ci gétt, jàmm jeex fa.  Gaynde bu duggee ci gétt, jàmm jeex na.
dalee: Cokkeer loo naaw di gës su dalee duppe jànj.
dalinu: Defal boppam 'dalin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dàll: Bakkan waruw dàll la : fa muy dagge doo ko yëg. (,,) Bakkan waru dàll la, buy dagg boroom du ko yëg. 'Mat, mucc; dëng, dàll daanu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 18)
dallu: Defal boppam 'dall' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dàllu: Defal boppam 'dàll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dalluwaayu: Defal boppam 'dalluwaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
daloo: Am na baat bu doonte xexer, nga daloo ko.
daloogu: Defal boppam 'daloog' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dalukaayu: Defal boppam 'dalukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dalul: . Li la dal, dalul galo, mi am ñeenti jabar, ba noppi di raasi ndéem.  . Li la wokk a ma xuri. (,)
daluwaayu: Defal boppam 'daluwaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dama: . Ku ne dama ne, raw nga say buum. Buñ la yeewee, du kenn yow a  Ku ne dama ni raw nga say buum, boo waxeeg njaaxum yaa yeew sa bopp, kenn yeewu la. 'Dama laa bindal fanweeri dénkaane, ci wàllu ndigal ak xam-xam,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 20)
damaa: Damaa boot rogganti. 'Damaa woote, nga gàntal, ma tàllal loxo, faaleesu ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 24)
damay: Damay daas fanaanal ndax rendi day bette.  Daasal sa paaka fanaanal rendi day bette. 'Bul ne: "Li mu ma def laa koy def, damay feyu li mu ma def." Yaafus amul njariñ' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 29)
dàmbu: Defal boppam 'dàmb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
damm: .	Jabar, doonte ne yeena jéllooy sàkket, ab xer damm. (,) .	Jabar-goro. 'Ku ji njubadi, góob fitna, yet wa muy dóore, damm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 8)
damm-dammu: Defal boppam 'damm-damm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
damme: Àddina, reenub ñàmbi la, kenn xamul fu muy damme.
dammee: . Tarxiis bu dammee baatub mbonaat boroom géléem war naa jaari ca joor ga.
dammitu: Defal boppam 'dammit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dammlu: Defal boppam 'damml' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dammuñu: Defal boppam 'dammuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
damoo: Leketu neen du naxu béy. (,) . Lekk ci ndab ba noppi xëpp ca suuf.  . Lekk, jarul damoo. 'Ku xam lu jaadu, muñ mer, tanqamlu ku la tooñ ngay damoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 11)
dàmp: Saatu ku ko log yàbbi dàmp.
damu: Bu sëkk amee, damu taxaw. 'Ku bëggu ay bëggi tooñ; damu, yàqule.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 19)
damukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'damu' (Someone who does...).
dan: Béjjénum xaaf ba muy woñaaru, mag ñaa ngi fi dan cee mënul dara.
dañ: .	Jabar, deesu ko mat, dañ(u) koy mën.
dana: Bés bu tawee, lay teg ca, lu ñu jiwoon dana sax, ku ko fekke doo né suuy.
dànd: 'dànd 'Dàqal wor, mu sore la; kàdduy naxe, na la dànd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 24)
danga: Baadoolo, boo ko nee kaay jël sa teraanga, mu bañ, danga koy jox toroxalam.
dangaa: . Ku ji buuse dangaa amul kemb.  . Ku jommi jonkan. 'Doom, dangaa gàddul nit bor, dige feyal jàmbur,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 1)
dangay: Bala ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm dangay xam la mu waliis.  Bala ngay fél gémmiñu sàmm, nga xam lu mu waliis.  Bul fél gémmiñug sàmm te xamoo la muy waliis. 'Kuy wër di sos dangay wuññi sutura, ku jara wóolu dangay am bàmmeelu biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 13)
dangeen: Dangeen di jay dëru ba muy jóg di daw.
dàngin: . Màggatum pël : nañ màngi i yóo, bu nu màngi i yóo.  . Màggetum dàngin, cuqtaan yóbbuwul ub lancam.  . Màggetum golo kenn du ko jàngal õeleju.
danku: Defal boppam 'dank' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dañoo: . Ñaq yiy daw ci yaramu doomu Aadama yépp dañoo saf xorom, benn rekk a ci saf suukar, mooy biy daw ci sab jë.
danu: . Mbër danu koy donn waaye nguur danu koy jënd.  . Mbër : doole doolee mën dëgg, waaye dëgg ay mujj.  . Mbër du lëlu, day màgg daan.
dañu: Àddina du cere, waaye dañu koy laalo. (,,,,,,,,) Àddina du cere waaye lu mata laalo la. 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
danuy: Bëñ ak làmmiñ a dëkk, waaye danuy daje.
dañuy: Bëñ ak làmmiñ ñoo dëkk, bés bu set dañuy xuloo, waaye dañuy jubóowaat. 'ngir dañuy xélu, nar musiba, di gaawtuy sànk bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 16)
daŋaru: Defal boppam 'daŋar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dàq: Ag roy-dàq a fi yées. 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
dàqal: “Dàqal mu ñów naan” marul, “dàqal ma ngay naan” a mar. 'Dàqal wor, mu sore la; kàdduy naxe, na la dànd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 24)
dàqandoo: Ku dàqandoo ñaari jaar jenn ja raw la.  Kenn mënula nappandoo ñaari jaar.
dàqati: 'dàqati '"Ndox mu lewul a neex, ñamu làqu-lekk dàqati."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 17)
dàqe: Cere ju neex ca la diw dàqe.
dàqee: Bu bëy dàqee ab sàcc ci kër, xaj war naa rus. (,) Bu bëy dàqeeb sàcc ci kër, xaj war naa rus.
dàqeesu: Defal boppam 'dàqees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku bon daw na te dàqeesu ko, ku jub ñeme ni gaynde.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 1)
dàqlu: Defal boppam 'dàql' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dàqul: .	Geenub géléem sàngul uw taat te dàqul i weñ. (,,)
dàquñu: Defal boppam 'dàquñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dar: Dar jant du ko teree fenk. (,)
dara: Àddina du dara. 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
daraam: 'daraam 'Bul xemmem daraam lu neex, ñam woowu la lay naxe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 3)
daraja: Bu sol mànto doon maye daraja, kon géléem du tëdd biti. 'Kon nga ñàkk daraja, keneen jagoo; ku néeg bóom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 9)
darajaal: 'darajaal 'Nawal xel mu rafet, mu darajaal la; tafoo ko, mu teral la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 8)
darajaam: .  Ku xeeb juddoom wàññi darajaam. (,) . Ku xeeb laaxi ndékki bu ko def ci noppam.
darajawu: Defal boppam 'darajaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
darajay: 'darajay 'Màggug Yàllaa ngi ci li mu làq, darajay buur a ngi ci li mu feeñal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 2)
daw: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko. 'Doo dox ba tërëf, doo daw, téqtalu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 12)
daw-làqu: Defal boppam 'daw-làq' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dawal: Dawal daanu ku ne man na ko. 'Dawal ni kéwél gu rëccub rëbb, ne fërr ni picc mu raw ab fiirkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
dawalinu: Defal boppam 'dawalin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dawalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'dawal' (Someone who does...).
dawalkatu: Defal boppam 'dawalkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dawee: . Werante xuuxaan, tekki tubéy. (,,) .  Wërsëg dina jóge ci njoñ. (,) . Wërsëg, soo dawee mu daagu.
dawinu: Defal boppam 'dawin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dawkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'daw' (Someone who does...).
dawloowu: Defal boppam 'dawloow' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dawlu: Defal boppam 'dawl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dawul: Booy gunge boroom biir buy daw, bu dawul, bul daw.
dax: Mbaam du daan, Dax du jaaru, Nen du maaj 'Ndax ku ruux soow, am ca dax, ku wañaar bakkan, mu nàcc, te lu jógal xol, indiw ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 33)
day: Bés boo gis, day leb walla muy fey. (,) 'Day dencalal ndam kiy jubal, di yiir ku mat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 7)
dayo: 'dayo 'Ku réy te bew, mooy ñaawle, day reew, ba jéggi dayo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 24)
dédd: Cokkeer mënula réer moroom ma ci mboob. (,,) Cokkeer mënula réer moroomam ci ngeer.  Cokkeer, mënta réer moroom ma ci dédd
dëddu: Defal boppam 'dëdd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Day dëddu wóllëreem, ba muy ndaw, fàtte *kóllëreem ak Yàllaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 17)
dëddul: 'dëddul 'Dëddul jëfi téxét ba dund, di jubal ci yoonu dégg." Kuy xeloo ngii ak kuy ñaawle' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 6)
dëdduwu: Defal boppam 'dëdduw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëdduwuñu: Defal boppam 'dëdduwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dee: Àddina du kër, xaarukaayu dee la. 'Këram day joy wuti dee, ay jaaruwaayam jëm njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 18)
dee-deelu: Defal boppam 'dee-deel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deeb: 'deeb 'Jigéen, rafet xel, dimbali waa këram, su deeb dof, tas këram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 1)
déeg: Coowal mbott, terewul nag naan cib déeg. (,)
déegu: Defal boppam 'déeg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déegub: Déegub poot, ay xam du ko naan, ay xamul a koy naan. (,,) Déegub póot, xam du ko naan, xamul a koy naan.
deel: Deel teggi sa loxo bi ci taati kiy dem. 'Téxét bi, deel foog, dof bi, déggal ndéey lu xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 5)
déem: Béy wu ne, am nag déem. (,)
dees: Àddina du cere waaye dees na ko laalo. 'Dees na ràññee jëkkëram ca pénc ma, fa muy toog ca magi réew ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 23)
deesatu: Defal boppam 'deesat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deesu: Defal boppam 'dees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kiy def njekk deesu ko daaneel mukk, ku soxor du yàgg cim réew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 30)
deesul: Bu dul woon benn, deesul xam ñaar. 'Deesul sikk ku sàcc aw ñam, def ci biiram ndax xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 30)
deeti: 'deeti 'Loo deeti xaar ci yewwu?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 9)
deewe: Garab la ñu ca gajj lay meññ.  .	Garab, fa mu juddoo lay deewe. 'Jaaral ci njub, ba gudd fan; yoon wu baax deesu fa deewe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 28)
deewee: . Kuy aaye xobu màngo, doo ca mayeeb doom. (,) . Kuy bëgg i nelaw, boo deewee mu faju.
deewin: Ku amul ndey, nàmp maam. (,,,,) . Ku añaane say dono, sa deewin ñaaw.  . Ku aye, wol sa moome. (,)
deewinu: Defal boppam 'deewin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deewu: Defal boppam 'deew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deewug: .	Doxkat du fekke deewug baay ba. (,,) .	Du bés bu nekk baay rey gaynde.
deewuñu: Defal boppam 'deewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déey: Ku ñaan ñàkk, boo jëndee moom. (,) . Ku ñàkk taxa ñaaw, boo amee du la tee ñaaw.  . Ku ñeme dañu laa déey. (,)
déeyook: 'déeyook 'Kuy wër di jëw, wuññi sutura; ku réy làmmiñ, bul déeyook moom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 19)
déeyu: Defal boppam 'déey' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
def: Balaa def tem-tem ne war-war 'Njàqare di ngëlén, dab la, sa musiba def callweer, buub la, njekkar ak fitna dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 27)
defaguñu: Defal boppam 'defaguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defal: . Maa la men deesu ko wax, dees koy jëf. (,) . “Maa mën” : defal ñu gis. 'Doom, bul fàtte sama njàngale, defal sa xel ci saay santaane,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 1)
defalu: Defal boppam 'defal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëfalu: Defal boppam 'dëfal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defar: Fen wuy defarug mbokk a gën dëgg gu koy yàq. (,,,) Fen wuy defar moo gën dëgg guy yàq. (,)
defaraluñu: Defal boppam 'defaraluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defarkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'defar' (Someone who does...).
defarkatu: Defal boppam 'defarkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defarlu: Defal boppam 'defarl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defaru: Defal boppam 'defar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defarukaayu: Defal boppam 'defarukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defarul: . Lijjanti faj na aajo, waaye defarul am réew.  . Li ñu men ci ab ànk maneesu ko ci ab loot.
defati: Bu ko defati wóorul, dootu ma ko defa wóor.
defatuñu: Defal boppam 'defatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defe: Bés a nga di déwén : boo ko waxee gone, mu foog ne tabaski la.  Xale boo ci ni ba déwén, mu defe ni Tabaskee tax ngay wax. 'Yoon a ngii, nit defe ne jub na, te mu jëme ko ci dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 12)
defee: .  Ñiy gàmmu ak ñiy raas déem bokkuñu.   . Ñoõali neexul beykat, bu ko defee daa jekkul.  . Ñoxar a neexa ñoqali.
dëféenu: Defal boppam 'dëféen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defewu: Defal boppam 'defew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defi: 'defi 'Këriñ defi xal, matt xambub taal, ab xulookat di xambu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 21)
defin: . Réy i nopp, mëna dégg a ko gën.  . Réy jëf tuuti defin.
defkatu: Defal boppam 'defkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kon nag aweel mbeddum waa ju baax, toppal yoonu defkatu njekk,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 20)
defoo: Ku mën te defoo lu yàqu yaw a. (,) . Ku mëna nodd, jàkkaa ngoog.
defoon: Dindi, loo fa defoon a ca gën.  Dindi, la nga defoon a ca gën.
defu: . Lu defu, waxu, te lu aay di njàmbat.  Lu defu waxu.
defukaayu: Defal boppam 'defukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deful: Mburu su amoon gàllaaj gu muy digle suy dem ci taal ba takk ko.  . Mbuus deful lu gën pepp. 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
defuma: 'defuma 'Jikkoy jigéenu moykat a ngii: day lekk, wommiku, te naan: "Defuma dara lu aay!"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 20)
defunu: Defal boppam 'defun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
defuñu: Defal boppam 'defuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dég: Am nopp yu firéeku, taxula am dég-dég. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
dég-dég: Am nopp yu firéeku, taxula am dég-dég.
dég-dégu: Defal boppam 'dég-dég' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dégam: 'dégam 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
dëgër: Bala ngaa yóotu, fa nga dëgg dëgër. (,,,) 'Mbégte ñeel na ku saxoo ragal Yàlla, waaye ku dëgër bopp tàbbi ci njekkar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 14)
dëgëraayu: Defal boppam 'dëgëraay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëgëral: 'dëgëral 'Buur daa sib kuy def lu bon, ndax njub mooy dëgëral nguuram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 12)
dëgërlu: Defal boppam 'dëgërl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëgëru: Defal boppam 'dëgër' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dégg: Bala nga tontu, jëkkala dégg. 'Teewlul xel mu rafet, sam xel di dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 2)
dëgg: Ak lu nar teela xéy, bu dëgg gontee, jot ko. (,,) 'Dëgg laay wax, di bañ wax ju bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 7)
déggadi: Déggadi ñett la jur : buum ci baat ; — xeej ci koll ; — ak gis ku ne : « Ki diw ma woon am ? » 'Déggadi sànk ab téxét, naagu rey ab dof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 32)
déggagoo: 'déggagoo 'Tontu te déggagoo, ndof la, ak ñàkk kersa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 13)
déggal: Déggal ndigal i ñett, bàyyil ndigal i ñett. 'Waaye déggal ma, dëkke jàmm, tàggook njekkar ak safaan."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 33)
dëggal: 'dëggal 'Dëggal ku sikk, daan ku jub, Aji Sax ji sib na yooyu ñaar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 15)
déggalu: Defal boppam 'déggal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déggalunu: Defal boppam 'déggalun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déggaluñu: Defal boppam 'déggaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déggatuñu: Defal boppam 'déggatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dégge: Doom ju amul nijaay ci mbedd lay dégge. (,) Doom ju amul nijaay ci mbedd lay yaroo.
déggee: Ba nga déggee mbott mën nam ndox, ma ñu baxal taxul ñuy wax.  Mbott mën na ndox, waaye du mu tàng.
déggeesu: Defal boppam 'déggees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déggi: Ku déggi Lawbe neexa jangali pël.  . Lawoon wonni na. 'Ku sàggane yoonu yar, séddoo ñàkk ak gàcce; kuy déggi artu, am teraanga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 18)
déggin: . Waxin la déggin la laaj. 'Nanga wóoloo Aji Sax ji sa léppi xol, te bul wéeru ci saw déggin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 5)
dégginu: Defal boppam 'déggin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déggluwuñu: Defal boppam 'déggluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
déggoo: Ñàkka déggoo amul, ñàkk waxtaan a am.  . Reew làmmiñ gàtt gànnaay. (,)
déggoon: . Naaru-góor, bu déggoon i tëggoon mallu.
déggu: Defal boppam 'dégg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëggu: Defal boppam 'dëgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Lépp a dëggu ci ku amug dégg, te jub ci ku for xam-xam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 9)
dégguli: .	Gaynde ku tëx dégguli jat.  .	Gaynde waaf na ca déeg ba.
dégguñu: Defal boppam 'dégguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëgguwul: 'dëgguwul 'Seede bu dëggu, dëgg rekk, seede bu dëgguwul, fen rekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 5)
dégi: 'dégi 'Yoonu yaafus, dégi neen; kuy jubal, saw xàll yaa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 19)
dégloo: Dégloo xel, te baña dégloo xol.
déglu: Defal boppam 'dégl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
déglukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'déglu' (Someone who does...).
déglul: 'déglul 'Déglul, waajur artu la (' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
dégluleen: 'dégluleen 'Kon, samay doom, dégluleen ma, buleen wacc samay kàddu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 7)
dégluwoo: 'dégluwoo 'Dégluwoo samay digle it, xanaa xeeb samay artu yépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 30)
dégluwu: Defal boppam 'dégluw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dégluwuñu: Defal boppam 'dégluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dégluy: 'dégluy 'Kilifa dégluy fen, jawriñ yépp di ñu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 12)
dëgmal: . Tàbbi ca teen matula jéemantu ; soo weesoo dëgmal bi léegi nga dem. (,) . Tàgg, lu ca jóge naaw, mbaa doo boroom.
dégtal: 'dégtal 'Déglul, ma wax la lu am solo, dégtal la njub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 6)
dégtaley: 'dégtaley 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
dégtu: Defal boppam 'dégt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëj: Boroom dëj mën naa jooy ab dëjam.  Boroom dëj bi mën naa jooyub dëjam. 'Bu yàgg lañu ma dëj, ca ndoorte la, bala suuf a sosu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 23)
déjjatiku: Defal boppam 'déjjatik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëju: .	Fàkk taal dëju ca ku ca ragalul yàlla it war caa ragal taat wu làkk.  .	Falleen bët, folli nopp. (,)
dékk: . Mbër a may dékk, mag a may daan.
dëkk: Bërëb walla dëkk (Town/To live). 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
dëkkaale: .	Jàngora du bàyyi xeet topp dëkkaale yiy faat.
dëkkal: Ku bëgga dee, ak ku bëgga toxu, kenn mënu leena dëkkal.
dekkalu: Defal boppam 'dekkal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëkkam: 'dëkkam 'Kiy jëfe njekk baaxle, waa dëkkam bànneexu; ab saay-saay saay, mbégte dim riir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 10)
dëkkandoo: Bëgga dëkkandoo mànjaago duma taxa sant gomis. 'Bul fexeel dëkkandoo bu dëkk ak yaw ci kóolute.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 29)
dëkkandoom: 'dëkkandoom 'Ay sos la yéefar di loree dëkkandoom, waaye kiy jëfe njekk, xam-xam la cay mucce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 9)
dëkkatu: Defal boppam 'dëkkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
