dëkke: . Kuy jooy ku ko watat, dafa amul ku ko boot. (,,,) . Kuy juutu, sàkkaraa la ko dàq moom mi ko dëkke.  . Kuy kuppeek Yàlla foo làqu të la. 'Waaye déggal ma, dëkke jàmm, tàggook njekkar ak safaan."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 33)
dekkee: . Lu waay def dee, su dekkee du ca dellu.
dëkkeesu: Defal boppam 'dëkkees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dékku: Defal boppam 'dékk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku bëgga dund, dékku woppi yaram, waaye xol bu jeex maneesu koo wéye.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 14)
dëkku: Defal boppam 'dëkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëkkub: Dëkkub gumba, patt a fay buur.  Dëkkub gumba, patt a fay njiit.
dëkkukaayu: Defal boppam 'dëkkukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëkkul: . Loo duuf-duuf bajantu gannaaw xat (waru la)  . Loo faxas mu rot, dafaa dëkkul.
dëkkuñu: Defal boppam 'dëkkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëkkuwaayam: 'dëkkuwaayam 'Soxor bi, bul tëru boroom njekk ci këram, bul yàq dëkkuwaayam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 15)
dëkkuwaayu: Defal boppam 'dëkkuwaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dell: 'dell 'Mbuusum xaalis la ŋàbb, yóbbu, du ñibbisi ndare weer wi fees dell."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 20)
dëllaayu: Defal boppam 'dëllaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëllooñu: Defal boppam 'dëllooñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
delloowu: Defal boppam 'delloow' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dellu: Defal boppam 'dell' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Dof day def jëfi dof, dellu ca, mooy xaj, bu waccoo, lekkaat ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 11)
dëllu: Defal boppam 'dëll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
delluseem: Jaam xam na demam, waaye xamul delluseem.  . Nit xam nga fooy yenoo waaye xamoo fooy yenneekoo.
dellusi: .	Fitt, boo ko sànnee, du dellusi. (,)
delluwuñu: Defal boppam 'delluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
délsi: .	Jikko kawar la, boo ko watee mu délsi.  .	Jikko laago la. 'Ku dem ca moom dootoo délsi, doo gisati yoonu dund mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 19)
deltu: Defal boppam 'delt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dem: Dem walla jóg (To go). 'Ku dem ca moom dootoo délsi, doo gisati yoonu dund mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 19)
demal: Dara jariñul mëna daw, demal ba dem jotee. 'Bul ne say dëkk: "Demal ba beneen, ma jox la," te fekk la yor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 28)
demam: . Nit xam na demam, waaye xamul dikkam.
démb: Àddina ñetti fan la, démb ñoom baay, tey ñun, ëllëg sunuy doom. 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf te say maam tegoon ko fa démb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 28)
dëmbéenu: Defal boppam 'dëmbéen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deme: Bu sëllu yooy, bu giir deme neen.
demee: Bu nu demee ba ca cippaa ndaw ja, yuux dina jibe fu ñu ko foogewul.
demewu: Defal boppam 'demew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
demin: 'demin 'Ku def njekkar sab añ mat, ku baax gën law demin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 14)
deminu: Defal boppam 'demin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëmm: Dëmm rey la, jaale la. (,,,,,). Dëmm rey la ba noppi jaale la.
demoon: . Xaju cokkeer ak séenam, ku ca fàtte gësi, om. (,) . Xalam demoon na bay neex, buum ya dog.
demul: . Ku dem mbaar um Macaam Macaam teg lab tànk.  . Ku demul àllarbay sëriñ bi dem dibéeri Firawna. 'Ab yaafus day tëdd aka walbatiku, mooy bunt, day jaayu, demul fenn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 14)
demuma: Demuma Jama, dikkuma Céng, àndumaak waa Ndéem ña, waa New ña raw ma.
demuñu: Defal boppam 'demuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deñ: Top walla ne ci (To stop/cease). 'Mbugal ak toroxte dib añam, te gàcceem du deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 33)
denc: . Ku denc ci ron lal a gëna bañ ku dëféenu cib ruum. 'Bu jotee mu denc ab dundam, mu jot, mu for lekkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 8)
dencal: 'dencal 'Kiy leble di tege, ba barele, kay yéwéne néew-ji-doole lay dencal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 8)
dencalal: 'dencalal 'Day dencalal ndam kiy jubal, di yiir ku mat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 7)
dencalu: Defal boppam 'dencal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
denceesu: Defal boppam 'dencees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dencu: Defal boppam 'denc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dencukaayu: Defal boppam 'dencukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dencuñu: Defal boppam 'dencuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dendale: Dendaale bu doon jariñ, dugub, xob yaa koy laalo. (,) Su dendale doon jariñ, dugub, xob yaa koy laalo.
déndu: Defal boppam 'dénd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëng: Bant bu dëng bu ko ëpp doole koy jubbënti 'Yoonu ku ni mel day lunk, jaaruwaayam dëng.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 15)
dëngal: 'dëngal 'Ab saay-saay day dëngal, nit ku dëggu di jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 8)
dënglu: Defal boppam 'dëngl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dénk: Bukki, kenn du ko dénk ay seel. (,) Kenn du dénk Bukki ay seel.
dénkaane: 'dénkaane 'Xel mu Rafet dénkaane na' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 31)
denku: Defal boppam 'denk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dénku: Defal boppam 'dénk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dénkul: 'dénkul 'Bul feyantook ku la tooñ; dénkul ci Aji Sax ji, mu wallu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 22)
dënn: Bëgg jiba, duma taxa gaar sama dënn. (,,) Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,) Bëgg xaritu pël du ma taxa booti sëllu.   Bëggu yàpp, bu mu la taxa lekk médd.
dënnu: Defal boppam 'dënn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëpp: Ku dem ba xamatuloo fa nga jëm, nga dellu fa nga jóge.  Soo dee dem ba xamatoo foo jëm ; dangay dëpp dellu fa nga jógéwoon.
dëppe: Lu ñor tàbbi, gajen baay bañ.  . Lu ñu dëppe sendal, aayewuñu ko weñ.  . Lu picc bare-bare, du teree ji dugub. (,) . Lu picc dégg, sabe.
dëppee: 'dëppee 'Soo dëppee ba déglu, ma artu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 23)
dëppoo: Bëggum ñeex duma taxa dëppoo cin lu tàng. (,,)
dëppu: Defal boppam 'dëpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
der: Bul xolli gunóor, ndax wenn der la. 'Lu ko moy ñu dégg ko, rusloo la, sab der yàqu yaxeet.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 10)
dër: . Su sàngoo dër, na wottu jége safara. (,) . Su sippu õàbboo gëntee paat. (,)
deram: .	Janax du woo loob deram bay bëtt ñag du ñeme ndono la.  .	Janax matul mbuus, te yàq mbuus.
dërëm: Dërëm ak dërëm, ngalam ak ngalam.
deret: Bëñ weex na, waaye deret a ko lal. (,,,) 'Naqari deret, taalu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 18)
dereti: Deretu bopp, du moy mbagg moy baat.  Dereti bopp du moy mbaggum boroom. (,)
deretu: Defal boppam 'deret' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dërlewu: Defal boppam 'dërlew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
deru: Deru sëllu wëgg na ndeyam ci teen.  Deru sëllu wëgg na ndeyam.
dëru: Dangeen di jay dëru ba muy jóg di daw.
dërukaayu: Defal boppam 'dërukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
des: Biir du def bar ca a ku des. 'ndax kuy jubal ay dëkke réew mi, te ku mat a fiy des.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 21)
desal: 'desal 'Bul bëggi nelaw, ba ñàkk dab la; boo njaxlafee, lekk ba desal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 13)
desatu: Defal boppam 'desat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dese: . Ku tëb dal cib taal, dese nga weneen tëbin. (,,) Ku tëb dal ca safara, dese na beneen tëbin.
desewuñu: Defal boppam 'desewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
desey: 'desey 'Ngay mujje onk, desey yax, jeex tàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 11)
deslewuñu: Defal boppam 'deslewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dëtëmu: Defal boppam 'dëtëm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
detteel: 'detteel 'Coxor detteel boroom; ku jub fegoo mànduteem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 32)
detteelu: Defal boppam 'detteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Njublaŋ ak wor, detteelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 3)
déwén: Bare dugub, fekke déwén a ko gën. (,,,)
dex: Bant, lu mu yàgg yàgg cig dex, du tax mu soppiku jasig. (,,,) Yàggaayu bantu ron ci ndox, du ko taxa doon jasig (,) Bant, lu mu yàgg, yàgg ci dex, du ko taxa soppaliku jasig
déy: . Yor jikkoy géléem baaxul buy for ci gi garab di xool ca gee.  . Yuqamtiku, baaraamub déy, waaye ndaagum tëstën.
dib: Bérab bu nekk, la fay ñuul, moo fa dib ñag. (,,,) Bérab, la fay ñuul a fa dib ñag. 'Mbugal ak toroxte dib añam, te gàcceem du deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 33)
dig-digalu: Defal boppam 'dig-digal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
digal: Caq dafay am digal. 'Baay digal ma, ne ma: "Jàppal samay wax ci sam xel, di jëfe samay santaane, ba dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 4)
digale: 'digale 'Diwook suuru day naatal xol; waaye li neex cib xarit, xol la lay digale.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 9)
dige: Dige bor la. 'Doom, dangaa gàddul nit bor, dige feyal jàmbur,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 1)
digeek: . Ku digeek gaana mbëkkante wara õëb fanaanal. 'Bul gaawtuy digeek Yàlla, di dugal sa bopp; bul giñ, di réccu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 25)
digg-dóomu: Defal boppam 'digg-dóom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
diggante: Diggante bët akub nopp, sàcc xëju fa.
diggu: Defal boppam 'digg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'yoonu jaxaay ci asamaan, yoonu jaan ci kawi doj, yoonu gaal ci diggu géej, yoon wi góor di jaar as ndaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 19)
digle: Mburu su amoon gàllaaj gu muy digle suy dem ci taal ba takk ko.  . Mbuus deful lu gën pepp. 'Sofental nga samay digle, nanguwoo samay artu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 25)
digoon: 'digoon '"Tey matal naa la ma digoon Yàlla, yàppu bernde waa nga kër ga, *saraxu cant laa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 14)
diiju: Defal boppam 'diij' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
diiŋatkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'diiŋat' (Someone who does...).
diiŋatu: Defal boppam 'diiŋat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
diir: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg.
diirook: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg.
diiru: Defal boppam 'diir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
diis: Ana golooka sàngoo mbàjj bay taamu nimoro diis ? 'Loo bëgga def, diis ko Aji Sax ji, say mébét sotti.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 3)
diisaay: 'diisaay 'Aji Sax ji bañ na njublaŋ ci nattub diisaay, ay nattukaay na mat, muy bànneexam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 1)
diisaayu: Defal boppam 'diisaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
diisoo: 'diisoo 'Diisoo ñàkk, pexe sànku; digle yu takku, pexe àntu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 22)
diisu: Defal boppam 'diis' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
diisul: . “Yenni ma ! Yenni ma !” diisul, nde kon da koy mbas.  . Yenukati xëddéen, dañuy yëgoo bala ñoo jóg.
diiwaanu: Defal boppam 'diiwaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dikk: .  Kër, ñaari wax a koy tas : “su doon man” ak “su ma doon yow”.   . Kër waay, ku ca dikk ak dagaan, yaa tooñ ; boroom da di kër-këri bay am 'Moo ma taxa dikk dajeek yaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 15)
dikkagunu: Defal boppam 'dikkagun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dikkal: 'dikkal 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
dikkalagu: Defal boppam 'dikkalag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dikkam: . Nit xam na demam, waaye xamul dikkam.
dikkatu: Defal boppam 'dikkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dikkatuñu: Defal boppam 'dikkatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dikkee: .	Gan su dikkee silmaxa la, su dee ñibbi, géwël la. (,) .	Gan yomb naa muñal.
dikkewu: Defal boppam 'dikkew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dikkoon: Fii, kekk la, golo du fi raweeb xaj. (,,) .	“Fii laa dikkoon” du tere réerle. (,)
dim: Cokkeer a dim limb, ku weddi laajal baag. 'Kiy jëfe njekk baaxle, waa dëkkam bànneexu; ab saay-saay saay, mbégte dim riir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 10)
dimaasu: Defal boppam 'dimaas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dimb: . Maccaatum nen, kenn du ca fot te du xotti bóli.  . Maccinu dimb dina tax dimb a wex.
dimbali: 'dimbali 'Jigéen, rafet xel, dimbali waa këram, su deeb dof, tas këram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 1)
dina: Am soow dina ëppela bare, wande du ëppela weex. 'Dina la aar ci jigéenu njaalookat, bokk feneen, di wax lu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 5)
dinanu: Defal boppam 'dinan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dinañu: Defal boppam 'dinañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dindi: Dindi, loo fa defoon a ca gën.  Dindi, la nga defoon a ca gën.
dindiwu: Defal boppam 'dindiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dinga: Boroom ndékki, ku ko jëkka yeewu tëddaat. (,,,,,) Boroom-kër, ku ko jëkka jog, dinga tëddaat. (,) Boroom ndéegó, ku ko jëkka yeewu tëddaat.
direeku: Defal boppam 'direek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
diri: Nit ay bëgg-bëggam, Yàlla ak dogalam.  .	Jaambur, foo tollu naan da laa  jàmbu.   .	Jaan amul tànk waaye Yàllaa ngi koy diri.
diw: Beref ku ko mayul diw, bàyyi kook diw sa ka yàlla jox.  Ku mayul berefus ndiw, bàyyi kookus ndiwam. 'Lu mel ni lem la jigéenu njaalookat di wax, làmmiñ wa ni diw gu ñu lay raay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 3)
diwoo: . Na sànqaleñ topp ña diwoo suukar.  . Naa, ku bàyyi xët mu nàcc !
diy: 'diy 'soccet, amul buur, teewul ñuy àndandoo, diy gàngoor;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 27)
dof: Dof amul, muusin a wuute. 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
dof-doflu: Defal boppam 'dof-dofl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dofam: 'dofam 'Nit ku ñaw day xam, ba ca; ab dof siiwal waxi dofam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 23)
dofdoflu: Defal boppam 'dofdofl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dofe: 'dofe 'Maa dofe dëgg, ba yées ci nit ñi, dég-dégu nit sax awma ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 2)
dofloo: . Ku xam-xam dofloo ngalla ña la xamal.
dog: Bóli gu dog, doktoor amu ca pexe.  Bóli gu dog, tiiñ nab doktoor. (,,) Bóli gu dog tiiñ na ab doktoor.  Bóli gu dog, doktoor mënu ci dara.  Put gu dog tiiñ na doktoor.
dogal: . Niti téyé, ku ñu dogal tubéy itam, ngemb laa nga ca wet ga di la xaar.  . Njaay mu xajam lamb. 'Nit ay dogu ci xolam, Aji Sax ji dogal, mu sotti.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 1)
dogalam: .	Jaam ak pexeem, Yàllaak dogalam.   Jaam ak yéeneem, Yàlla ak dogalam.
dogalu: Defal boppam 'dogal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dogee: Bu ñigg dogee weñ, tëgg yaa ca wax. (,)
dogitu: Defal boppam 'dogit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doglu: Defal boppam 'dogl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dogoon: . Ñax mi ñu dogoon anga saxaat.  . Ñebbe ji rax na cocc.
dogu: Dogu, lu mu song dagg la, mbaa daaneel la. 'Dogu mburu fey nab gànc; waaye jabaru jàmbur, bakkanu lëmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 26)
doj: Aw doj du yàgg géej ba tax mu doon aw jën. 'Ndeke lépp a nga saxi dég, fépp fees akum ñax, tabaxu doj ba ko wër màbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 31)
doktoor: Bóli gu dog, doktoor amu ca pexe.  Bóli gu dog, tiiñ nab doktoor. (,,) Bóli gu dog tiiñ na ab doktoor.  Bóli gu dog, doktoor mënu ci dara.  Put gu dog tiiñ na doktoor.
dolliku: Defal boppam 'dollik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
domm: . Li gëna jafe ci àddina mooy am alal ju ne gàññ, lew domm.  . Li jig mbëtt jigul bar.
domp: .	Fu nag nekk, bukki dee fa. (,,,) .	Fu nuy feese, kenn du fa jooy domp.  .	Fu ñépp di say, ku sayul, yaa dof.
donale: 'donale 'Ku baax, donale ba cay sëtam; alalu moykat, muuru ku jub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 22)
dongo: . Sàkketu boõ-boõ, xer ba ko téyé di suukar, kenn du ko dénk ab dongo.  . Salaan gaaw naa jooy, waaye ku ko laalul du jooy.
donju: Defal boppam 'donj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
donn: Donn sa tabaxub baay, donn ngërëmam a ko gën. 'Kuy fitnaal sa waa kër doo donn dara, ku dof, boroom xel yilif la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 29)
donne: 'donne 'Kër ak alal ngay donne ci baay; jabar ju xelu, Aji Sax jee koy maye.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 14)
donnu: Defal boppam 'donn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dono: Dono du gërëm kenn gaawa dee a ko may.  Dono gërëmul kenn gaawa dee a ko may.
doo: Am réew, su fa lingeer dee fecc, ku fay woyaan doo rusa yaõas. (,,) 'Doo firib caax, ba jàpp njanaaw luy xoole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 17)
doole: Bant bu dëng bu ko ëpp doole koy jubbënti 'Jàmbur jariñoo sa doole, doxandéem jagoo saw ñaq.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 10)
doolee: . Mbër danu koy donn waaye nguur danu koy jënd.  . Mbër : doole doolee mën dëgg, waaye dëgg ay mujj.  . Mbër du lëlu, day màgg daan. 'Bu mettee, nga yoqi, sa doolee néew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 10)
dooleel: 'dooleel 'ak ba muy teg niir ya fa kaw, ak ba muy dooleel ndoxi xóotey géej,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 28)
dooleelsiwu: Defal boppam 'dooleelsiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dooleem: . Teraanga mën naa gor guy te fekk du dooleem. 'Su yëkk takkul, bey, sàq wéet; mu beye dooleem, meññeef ne gàññ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 4)
dooley: Doo Yoro, wànte ci pël yi nga.  .	Dooley jën, ndox. (,,,,,,)
doom: Àddina ñetti fan la, démb ñoom baay, tey ñun, ëllëg sunuy doom. 'Doom, toppal yaru baay, te bul wacc ndigalu yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 8)
doomam: Bu ñalingaanee, Ngoy a ngay boot doomam. 'Ragal Aji Sax ji kaaraange gu wér la ci nit, di rawtu ciy doomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 26)
doomi: Doom su tékkiwul doomiy waajuram kese la, waaye su tékkee di doomi ñépp. 'May bége wërngalu àddinaam, di bànneexoo doomi aadama.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 31)
doomu: Defal boppam 'doom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kàddu yu xelu yu Suleymaan buurub Israayil, di doomu Daawuda.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 1)
dóomu: Defal boppam 'dóom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doon: Aw doj du yàgg géej ba tax mu doon aw jën. 'man, Xel mu Rafet, maa doon ku xareñ ci wetam, di ko bànneexal bés bu ne, tey bànneexu fi kanamam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 30)
dooñ: .	Gune du të, te ña ko doon dooñ raxasooguñu. (,) .	Gune gu yàgga dox wecci na mag.
doonatul: . Man suma doonatul baay kenn du ma miraasaale.  . Man, taxas laa, ku ma lonk nga sëgg.
doone: .	Fu ma war a doone mbubb, duma fa doon jiba.  .	Fu mag newul lu fa yobbu turam.
dooñeesu: Defal boppam 'dooñees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dooni: .	Guney tey ñooy dooni magi ëllëg.  .	Gunge àgg baaxu ca.
doonoon: Bu bëgg-bëgg doonoon jëmm, dina bëmëx boroomam ci kàmb. (,)
doonte: Am na baat bu doonte xexer, nga daloo ko.
doonul: . Loo doonul ndongoom doo doon ub sëriñam. (,,) Loo nekkul taalibeem doo nekkub sëriñam.
dóor: Bu gudd nopp doon taxa dégg, kon mbaam kenn du ko dóor. 'Ku deful dara, feyloo kob daan, dug njub; dóor as gor du yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 26)
doora: . Sëb ak dugub ca àll ca lañu ànde woon doora daje ci cin li, ba ci ndab ci, nit ka fii la ñu fekk. 'Ruujal sab tool, ji ko, doora tabax sa kër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 27)
doore: Kaala du jëkké ci bopp, ci ndigg lay doore.   .	“Kaay ma wax laa” gëna yomb “kaay ma jox la”. (,) .	Kàkkatar du doon fasu kurs.
dóore: 'dóore 'Ku ji njubadi, góob fitna, yet wa muy dóore, damm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 8)
dóoree: . Su ñu la dóoree ca bérab, beneen yoon doo fa dem.  Su ñu la ittee ci bérab, beneen yoon doo fa dem.
dooreesu: Defal boppam 'doorees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dóorlu: Defal boppam 'dóorl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doorukaayu: Defal boppam 'doorukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dootoo: . Liggéeyal àddina ja mu mel ni dootoo dee, liggéeyal allaaxira ja mu mel ni suba ngay dee. 'Ku dem ca moom dootoo délsi, doo gisati yoonu dund mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 19)
dootu: Defal boppam 'doot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Lu ko moy Aji Sax ji gis la, ñaawlu ko, daldi giif, dootu ko mbugal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 18)
dootul: . Néew, bu rombeey armeel, robam dootul neex. (,,) . Néew na a gëna na ñu ko bàyyi. (,)
dootunu: Defal boppam 'dootun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dootuñu: Defal boppam 'dootuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bu ñu naanee, fàtte seen néewle, ba dootuñu fàttaliku seenu tiis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 7)
dox: Ag mbokk, dañu koy dox, mbaa ñu wax ko. 'Kon sab dox wóor, doo fakkastalu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 23)
doxal: 'doxal 'Yaa ngi ci sa loxoy moroom, kon defal nii, doom, ba rëcc: doxal tinuji ko, raamali ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 3)
doxalinu: Defal boppam 'doxalin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doxaluñu: Defal boppam 'doxaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doxandéem: .	Dox sag ndaw aayul, waaye dëkk cee bon.  .	Doxandéem nelawul ba yàndoor. 'Jàmbur jariñoo sa doole, doxandéem jagoo saw ñaq.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 10)
doxantu: Defal boppam 'doxant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doxewunu: Defal boppam 'doxewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doxewuñu: Defal boppam 'doxewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doxi: . Reer tëdd mooy wallu reer doxi.  Reer tëdd mooy wallu reer jog.
doxin: Bukki bu daanee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bukki, bu songee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bu bukki dabee gaynde, ca doxin wa la.  Bukki su yabee gaynde ca doxin wa la. 'Ñett a ngii, ñu jekkum ndaag, ba ci ñeent ñu jekk doxin:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 29)
doxub: Àllaaxira bopp du fa doxub joor.
doy: Bu reer doon doy, reeri daaw ya doy. (,) 'Na lay céram doy foo tollu, na la xañ sago saa su ne.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 19)
doyal: 'doyal 'Beyal sab tool, sab dund doy; topp ay caaxaan, ndóol ba doyal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 19)
doyaluñu: Defal boppam 'doyaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doyatu: Defal boppam 'doyat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doye: . Metitu xol su nekkoon ci tànk ñu soox ko.  . Miin day tax nga yab loo warula yab. (,) . Miineef laago la, suy ñëw du tàggu boroom.  . Mo, ku sa biir xottiku, looy doye dugub ?
doyloo: 'doyloo 'Bul doyloo sa xel mu rafet, ragalal Aji Sax ji, dëddu mbon;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 7)
doyloowuñu: Defal boppam 'doyloowuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
doylu: Defal boppam 'doyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Njaniiw ak biir suuf du fees, bët it du doylu mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 20)
doyuñu: Defal boppam 'doyuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dub: . Lem gi ci taatu mag, gat sa gat sa, du ko lemmi.  . Lem neex na, waaye dub dund.
dug: Biir dug pal. (,) 'Ku deful dara, feyloo kob daan, dug njub; dóor as gor du yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 26)
dugal: Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci galgal aw ñey.  Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci wonnub suññéel.  Namm yàpp du ma taxa lekk war-waraan. 'Bàkkaaru làmmiñ dugal na boroom, ku jub mucc ci njàqare.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 13)
dugg: As gor dina dugg ciy naxam.
duggati: Balaa ginaar a duggati ci ngunu, yër ko.
dugge: . Naan du dul faj mar, loo ca mos mu doy.  . Naanu rafetal soow mi nu dugge ko ja ba.  . Naar ba fa Gànnaar boppam la fa nekkal.
duggee: Doomu gaynde, bu dale ci gétt, jàmm jeex fa.  Gaynde bu duggee ci gétt, jàmm jeex na.
duggi: . Mademmba Jóob Yatma Soog sëriñ bi ci Ñomre.  . Mag a moom xamam, su ko neexee làl ko toog.  . Mag ay duggi Ndóob.
duggul: . Néegub jargoñ la, du la fegalub sedd, du la fegalu tàngoor.  . Néegub ngor, kenn terewu ko, ku ci duggul ci yow la. (,) . Neenug neen, du rey bukki. (,)
dugguñu: Defal boppam 'dugguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dugub: Baax sabaarub dugub la ; fu ñu ko fabe, ay fepp ruus fa. 'Feppu dugub wu ànd ak dal moo gën lu ne gàññ kërug ayoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 1)
dukkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'duk' (Someone who does...).
dul: Bu dul wonteek benn kenn du ni ñaar 'Ku dul bantal sa doom, bëggoo ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 24)
dum: . Ñu bokk teen ñooy laxasooy goj. (,,,,) .  Ñu ma doon wax baay, juruma leen.  . Ñu may la lépp, nga jël lépp, dum xel. (,)
duma: Awma ginaar siiru sikk ma duma ci fekk. '"Keroog nga woo ma wall, duma wuyu, nga seet ma, seet, doo ma gis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 28)
dumaal: Bu la bukki tooñee dumaal gaynde.
dumalu: Defal boppam 'dumal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dummóoyu: Defal boppam 'dummóoy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
duñ: .	Jëndle la fas wu yaa-biir te duñ(u) la ko gubleel.  .	Jigéen naka takkaayam day, la jikkoom day.  .	Jigéen ay jur lu ne.
dund: Àddina weeru koor la ; feek jant sowul, juubu du wees. (,) Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) Koor gu jant sowagul, juubu weesoogu ca. 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
dundal: Balaa ngaa dundal ña ca mbedd ma nga dundal ña ca kër ga.
dundam: 'dundam 'Bu jotee mu denc ab dundam, mu jot, mu for lekkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 8)
dundati: 'dundati 'Maay Xel mu Rafet, ku ma topp gudd fan, dund, dundati.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 11)
dunde: .	Gawar gu di dawal fasam, mbaxanaam wadd te jotu ko for ?  .	Gaynde bëggul mbuum, yàpp lay dunde. (,,,) 'Kiy jëfe njekk jot peyam, dunde; ab soxor di bàkkaare alalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 16)
dundinu: Defal boppam 'dundin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dundloo: 'dundloo 'Mooy dundloo ku ci jàpp, di wéral jëmmam jépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 22)
dundu: Defal boppam 'dund' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
dung: . Lu sax y dung naaw gannaaw bànjóoli.  . Lu surga sañadi, sañadi sañ ne : “suur naa”.  . Lu suur bajantu ba mu desub xaal.
dunq: Kuy naaw, say dunq di ruus, fa nga jëm sorewul.  Kuy naaw sab geen di buubu, fa ngay dal du sori.
duñu: .	Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) .	Duñu lekkloo nit su suure.
duñuy: . Laaxub daaw, bu ñ(u) ko dee nettali cafaay laa taxe.  Laaxub daaw, bu ñu koy nettali, cifaay laa tax. (,) Duñuy fàttaliku laaxu daaw/démb, cifaay ba tax.
duuf: . Ku bëgg ñeex mu saf, dangay togg yàpp wu duuf. 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
duunle: . Ku ñeme yamb, lekk lem. (,,,) . Ku ñemewul guddi, du rañaan.  . Ku ñépp sompal nga duunle.  . Ku ñépp tëfli nga tooy. (,,,)
duusu: Defal boppam 'duus' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
duye: Barigó yëgul damsaan, ca la ñ(u) ko duye.
ëcc: 'ëcc 'Ma ngay yor poqe ak këccu, di ëcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 19)
ëccuñu: Defal boppam 'ëccuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
egg: .	Fa yëngu-yëngu tubay egg taatu boroom eggu fa.  .	Faalewuma baaraam bu amul we.
ëkk: .	Duñu teqale ñaari nag yu mbëkkante. (,) .	Ëkk nit la.
ëlëmu: Defal boppam 'ëlëm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ëllëg: Àddina ñetti fan la, démb ñoom baay, tey ñun, ëllëg sunuy doom. 'Déggal ndigal te yaru, ndax ëllëg nga xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 20)
ëllëgee: .	Garab gu romb, mu sànni la mburu, su ëllëgee nga rombaati fa. (,) Garab gu nga romb mu sànni la i mburu su ca ëllëg sa, nga romb fa. 'Ku yàq sab surga ba muy ndaw, bu ëllëgee mu defe ne doom lad.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 21)
ëllëgu: Defal boppam 'ëllëg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ëmb: Àddina jigéen la, ju fu mu tollu, mu ngi ëmb te kenn xamul lu muy jur. 'Ana ku masa ëmb ndox ci ndimo?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 4)
ëmbuñu: Defal boppam 'ëmbuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
̃enteelu: Defal boppam '̃enteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ëpp: Àddina li muy yaatu-yaatu, ñaawaay a ëpp wóllare taar. 'Bul bokk ci ñiy lekk lu ëpp aka màndi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 20)
ëppee: Ab yeel bu ëppee ab lupp booba jàngoro rax na ca. 'Boo gisee lem, lekkal lu yem; bu ëppee, nga waccu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 16)
ëpplewu: Defal boppam 'ëpplew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
esawu: Defal boppam 'esaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
etaseeru: Defal boppam 'etaseer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faa: .	Fekk baax cib dëkk, baax fekk la faa ko gën.  .	Fekke am na cër.
faagaagalu: Defal boppam 'faagaagal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faagaagaluñu: Defal boppam 'faagaagaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faale: 'faale 'Du faale ndàmpaay, loo ko may, may, du giif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 35)
faaleesu: Defal boppam 'faalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Damaa woote, nga gàntal, ma tàllal loxo, faaleesu ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 24)
faaleetu: Defal boppam 'faaleet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faaleetuñu: Defal boppam 'faaleetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faalewu: Defal boppam 'faalew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faalewul: Boroom õàdd yëgul boroom pañe. (,,,) Boroom õàdd faalewul boroom pane. 'Seedeb naaféq faalewul yoon, ab soxor lu bon lay tàqamtikoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 28)
faalewuli: 'faalewuli 'Doom ju xelu dégg yaru baay, kuy ñaawle faalewuli artu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 1)
faalewuma: .	Fa yëngu-yëngu tubay egg taatu boroom eggu fa.  .	Faalewuma baaraam bu amul we.
faalewunu: Defal boppam 'faalewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faalewuñu: Defal boppam 'faalewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faaru: Defal boppam 'faar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faat: .	Jàngora du bàyyi xeet topp dëkkaale yiy faat.  .	Jàngul tari fen la.
faatu: Defal boppam 'faat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fab: . Ku mënoona dog sa bopp, su dogee sa baaraam rekk, na nga fab sa baaraam, daw te gërëm Yàlla.
fabe: Baax sabaarub dugub la ; fu ñu ko fabe, ay fepp ruus fa.
faf: . Lu waay giirook yaw, di la may, mu faf ko ba ca ndab la ngeen bokk.
fagaru: Defal boppam 'fagar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fàggandiku: Defal boppam 'fàggandik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fàggoo: Fàggoo gën faju. (,) Fàggandiku moo gëna faju.  Fagaru moo gën faju
fàggu: Defal boppam 'fàgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faj: ﻿Aar moo gën faj. 'Ku bëgg lu neex, liggéey; ku bëgga faj sab xiif, njaxlaf.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 26)
fajal: Bala nga fajaan, fajal sa bopp.
fajar: . Loo mel ni kuy xëddé pepp, te fajar giy niit.  . Loo mën-mën biiru waay, mu def ca loo yëgul. (,) . Loo muus-muus, sab goro gën laa muus.
fajeesu: Defal boppam 'fajees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fajkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'faj' (Someone who does...).
fajkatu: Defal boppam 'fajkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faju: .	Fëfëlaan du jël wërsëgu kàkkatar.  .	Fegoo gën faju. (,,,) 'Yaakaar ju tas day jeexal xol, aajo ju faju di garab guy taxa dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 12)
fajul: Alal fajul dee, gàcce lay faj. (,,,) Alal du faj dee, gàcce lay faj. (,,,)
fajunu: Defal boppam 'fajun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fàkk: .	Fàkk taal dëju ca ku ca ragalul yàlla it war caa ragal taat wu làkk.  .	Falleen bët, folli nopp. (,)
fakkastalu: Defal boppam 'fakkastal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kon sab dox wóor, doo fakkastalu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 23)
fakkatalu: Defal boppam 'fakkatal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fal: Kilifa day folliy noppam fal ay gëtam.
faloo: 'faloo 'Bu ab soxor faloo, ñépp làquji, bu daanoo, kuy jëfe njekk teg tànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 28)
falu: Bu loos wu gudd doon taxa falu, kon giléem du fanaan biti. 'Bu kuy jëfe njekk amee ndam, mbégte mu réy la; ab soxor falu, ñépp làquji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 12)
fan: Àddina kenn defaru ko ci benn fan. 'ngir fan wi gudd lool, nga gëna am jàmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 2)
fanaan: Amuloo salaamaalekum, amuloo fanaan leen jàmm.
fanaanal: Damay daas fanaanal ndax rendi day bette.  Daasal sa paaka fanaanal rendi day bette.
fanaane: . Ku Faat Caam létt, nga gis i sët, booba jig na la.  . Ku fanaane def wara yendoo déglu.
fanaanee: . Neexum ngont, xam fooy fanaanee ko gën. (,,) . Nég ba jaan dem, nga topp ca watit way dóor. (,,)
fanaanoo: Ku digaaleek gaana xeex dangay kurpañ fanaanal.  Ku dige gaana, rëkkante, na nga õëb, fanaanoo.
fanqul: . Kiñaan fanqul muur, Yàllaay maye. (,) Añaan fankul muur Yàlla moo la may.
fanweereelu: Defal boppam 'fanweereel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fanweeri: 'fanweeri 'Fanweeri tegtal a ngii' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 16)
fanweeru: Defal boppam 'fanweer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fàq: Car bu fàq moo gën garab gu daanu.
far: . Ku ñu yónni jëkkër, nga indiw far. 'Dikkal nu far, mbuus miy benn, nu bokk."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 14)
faral: . Lafañ, boroomi mbaam lay faral. (,,) Làggeek boroomi mbaam ay far.  Lafañ, boroomi mbaam lay àndal. 'Faral ku tooñ baaxul, bul xañ dëgg ku deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 5)
farala: .	Farala liggéey dina sawarloo.  .	Faru lawbe gën ug neen. (,)
fare: Loxool Kajoor-kajoor di weesaloo.  . Lu àll ay-ay taat fare gannaaw.
faree: . Su nga fekkee ñu di xuloo, su nga ca faree, waxete dëgg ga.  . Su nga njëloo, lay laal la.
farlu: Defal boppam 'farl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Yaafus, walaakaana; farlu, woomle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 4)
farmàngu: Defal boppam 'farmàng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
faru: .	Farala liggéey dina sawarloo.  .	Faru lawbe gën ug neen. (,)
fas: Aw fas, manees na koo wommat ba cim ndox, waaye naanloo ko te marul, maneesu ko 'Takkal foo tollu, taf ci sa xol, fas ko ci sa baat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 21)
fasal: . Ku sam xéy neexul, fasal jom ca ngont la ndegem xéyaat amul.  . Ku sañatula bañ, saña nangu.
fasam: .	Gawar gu di dawal fasam, mbaxanaam wadd te jotu ko for ?  .	Gaynde bëggul mbuum, yàpp lay dunde. (,,,)
fasu: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko.
fateesu: Defal boppam 'fatees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fatt: Bët du gis la koy fatt. (,,)
fàttali: . Ku la màtt fàttali la say bëñ.
fàttalikoo: Baayo bu fattalikoo soxor.  Jirim, bu fàttalikoo, soxar.
fàttaliku: Defal boppam 'fàttalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bu ñu naanee, fàtte seen néewle, ba dootuñu fàttaliku seenu tiis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 7)
fàttalikuwuñu: Defal boppam 'fàttalikuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fàtte: . Ku nekk war nga fajal sa moroom gàcce ba gar ci sa bakkan.  . Ku nelaw fàtte say bor. 'Day dëddu wóllëreem, ba muy ndaw, fàtte *kóllëreem ak Yàllaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 17)
fàttewunu: Defal boppam 'fàttewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fattu: Defal boppam 'fatt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fatu: . Lu ndaw fatu-fatu, bàyyi fa ëtt ba.
fàww: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko. 'Bu ngëlén walee, ab soxor ne mes; kiy def njekk, sab reen sax ba fàww.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 25)
faxas: . Loo duuf-duuf bajantu gannaaw xat (waru la)  . Loo faxas mu rot, dafaa dëkkul.
fay: Am réew, su fa lingeer dee fecc, ku fay woyaan doo rusa yaõas. (,,) 'di woo ña fay jaare te jubal seenu yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 15)
fecc: Am réew, su fa lingeer dee fecc, ku fay woyaan doo rusa yaõas. (,,)
fecci: Pàq bi ñu la xame, boo ko watee ñu bàyyi la.  . Pas-pas ba Yàlla fas, kenn mënu ko fecci. 'Ku bon, ñu génne réew mi; kuy fecci worma, ñu buddi, sànni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 22)
fecciku: Defal boppam 'feccik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fecciloo: 'fecciloo 'Ma ngay tëroo nib sàcc, góor ñu bare lay fecciloo worma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 28)
fecciwunu: Defal boppam 'fecciwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feddaliku: Defal boppam 'feddalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feebar: Fayoo Naar ba xorom sa.  .	Fecckat mënula muñ i ndënd.  .	Feebar su newwee feeñ.
feek: Àddina weeru koor la ; feek jant sowul, juubu du wees. (,) Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) Koor gu jant sowagul, juubu weesoogu ca.
feelu: Defal boppam 'feel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feeñ: Bu njaab yàggee gawar feeñ. (,) 'Ab dof bu meree, mu gaawa feeñ; ku teey, tanqamlu saaga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 16)
feeñal: 'feeñal 'Màggug Yàllaa ngi ci li mu làq, darajay buur a ngi ci li mu feeñal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 2)
feeñaluñu: Defal boppam 'feeñaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feeñe: Bëgg ju sañul feeñe, mook bañaalé yem.
feeñee: 'feeñee 'Waaye bu feeñee, fey boroom juróom ñaari yoon, joxe alalu këram yépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 31)
feeñoowul: 'feeñoowul 'Fu Yàlla feeñoowul, nit ña fétteeral, waaye ku topp yoon, am mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 18)
feeñu: Defal boppam 'feeñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feeñuwu: Defal boppam 'feeñuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fees: Gaal, lu mu fees fees mëna yóbbaale benn bataaxal.  .	Gaalug dof du teer fu neex bokk ya. (,,) 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
feesal: . Ndaa, feesal mbaa nga toj ! 'Fiiraange day feesal xolu góor, te du ñéeblu buy feyu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 34)
feese: .	Fu nag nekk, bukki dee fa. (,,,) .	Fu nuy feese, kenn du fa jooy domp.  .	Fu ñépp di say, ku sayul, yaa dof.
féete: Fi la dikkoon, du tere réeral.  .	Fii la fuuta féete mënula boyali lex.
féetee: .	Dugal ginaar ci ngunu laa mën, waaye xawma fu geen gay féetee.  .	Dukk-dukk ak yoll-yoll, yépp ci xél yi la, waaye wégét ay seen baay.  .	Duma bëgg lu la neex ba ne la Yàllaa ngi lay nuyu. (,) 'Bu ku bon féetee kaw, ag moy law, waaye kiy jëfe njekk ay fekke jéllam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 16)
féeteek: . Kon, daanu toggoo jiit, waaye xawma kuy féeteek fett ga.  . Kon loxo dem ci gémmiñ, te du ànd akub tib.
féewalekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'féewale' (Someone who does...).
féewaley: 'féewaley 'Nitu njekkar day yokk réeroo, ab soskat di féewaley xarit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 28)
féewaloo: . Loxo lu nekk, biir ba muy riisoo ko tax di sonn.  . Loxoy Kajoor dañuy féewaloo.
féey: . Ku mana féey du xaru ci ndox. (,)
fegoo: .	Fëfëlaan du jël wërsëgu kàkkatar.  .	Fegoo gën faju. (,,,) 'Coxor detteel boroom; ku jub fegoo mànduteem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 32)
fëgtu: Defal boppam 'fëgt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fegu: . Ku Yàlla sànni fitt, doo ko mëna fegu. 'nga foog, fegu, amug dégg, raw,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 11)
fekk: Awma ginaar siiru sikk ma duma ci fekk. 'Daa fekk nga baña xam, te ragal Yàlla du loo tànn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 29)
fekke: Bare dugub, fekke déwén a ko gën. (,,,) 'Bu ku bon féetee kaw, ag moy law, waaye kiy jëfe njekk ay fekke jéllam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 16)
fekkee: Bukki nee na, ab reer taxumaa jóg, waaye bu ma ko fa fekkee sant.
fekkeesu: Defal boppam 'fekkees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fekki: . Mbaxana du fekke coonob boroom. (,,) Mbaxanay du fekki deewu boroomam.  Mbaxana du fekke ayu boroomam.
fekkoon: .	“Gëmmal” matula wax gumba, fekkoon na kooy patamtiku.  Gëmmal, matula wax gumba. (,,)
fekksi: . Soo demee dëkk, fekk ñépp di fecce benn tànk, defal na ñoom.  . Soo éggul fekki golo gi, golo gi wàcc fekksi la.
fekku: Defal boppam 'fekk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fekkul: . Ku dëgg watitu jaan boroom anga fa fekkul.
fekkunu: Defal boppam 'fekkun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fekkuñu: Defal boppam 'fekkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fél: Bala ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm dangay xam la mu waliis.  Bala ngay fél gémmiñu sàmm, nga xam lu mu waliis.  Bul fél gémmiñug sàmm te xamoo la muy waliis.
fëlëñu: Defal boppam 'fëlëñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
femmu: Defal boppam 'femm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fen: Fen terloo soxla te fajuwul jar na ko. 'Ku tekkeedi te bon, day wër di fen,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 12)
fen-kat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'fen-' (Someone who does...).
fenal: 'fenal 'Kuy fen, dangaa bañ ka nga fenal, te boroom làmmiñ wu neex day sànke.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 28)
feneen: Ba feneen amee ba-tey, kenn sonnatul. 'Xel mu rafet da lay musal ci jigéenu njaalookat, bokk feneen, di wax lu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 16)
fenk: Dar jant du ko teree fenk. (,)
fenkalu: Defal boppam 'fenkal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fenn: . Sanqaleñ yu bari men nañoo watat janax ju dee.  . Sant dëkkul fenn. (,,) 'Bul ñee ku néeg, te bu ko roy fenn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 31)
fent: Boo yaroo macc tàngal, yëy sa goney-Ngaay.  .	Gone du fent, dafay toppandoo.
fepp: Baax sabaarub dugub la ; fu ñu ko fabe, ay fepp ruus fa. 'Ku ñàkk, su jekkoo ab ndóol, du ko bàyyil fepp, day mel ni waame.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 3)
fépp: Daanu dajul fépp. 'Ndeke lépp a nga saxi dég, fépp fees akum ñax, tabaxu doj ba ko wër màbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 31)
feppu: Defal boppam 'fepp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'laata Yàllaa sàkk suuf aki àllam ak feppu pënd ci àddina.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 26)
fereenu: Defal boppam 'fereen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feresu: Defal boppam 'feres' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fërr: 'fërr 'Dawal ni kéwél gu rëccub rëbb, ne fërr ni picc mu raw ab fiirkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
fett: . Kon, daanu toggoo jiit, waaye xawma kuy féeteek fett ga.  . Kon loxo dem ci gémmiñ, te du ànd akub tib.
fettaxu: Defal boppam 'fettax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fétteeral: 'fétteeral 'Fu Yàlla feeñoowul, nit ña fétteeral, waaye ku topp yoon, am mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 18)
fexe: . Na nga fexe ba ku Tabaski jox la pooj, foo Tamxarite, jox ko këllu cere.  . Na ñu bàyyi wànneen ba xam nu muy mujjeek i gëtam. 'kuy fexe lu bon ci xolam, kuy gaawtuy def lu ñaaw,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 18)
fexeel: Bu la asamaan jegee, fexeel ba laal ko. 'Bul fexeel dëkkandoo bu dëkk ak yaw ci kóolute.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 29)
fey: Àtte bor ak fey. 'Dogu mburu fey nab gànc; waaye jabaru jàmbur, bakkanu lëmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 26)
feyal: 'feyal 'Doom, dangaa gàddul nit bor, dige feyal jàmbur,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 1)
feyale: 'feyale 'Soo amul loo ko feyale, ñu yékkatee la sab lal, nangu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 27)
feyantook: 'feyantook 'Bul feyantook ku la tooñ; dénkul ci Aji Sax ji, mu wallu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 22)
feye: 'feye 'Ku am ay feye alalam, ba mucc; ku amul deesu ko tëkku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 8)
feyeeku: Defal boppam 'feyeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feyeesu: Defal boppam 'feyees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feyewuñu: Defal boppam 'feyewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feykatu: Defal boppam 'feykat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feyloo: 'feyloo 'Ku deful dara, feyloo kob daan, dug njub; dóor as gor du yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 26)
feyoo: 'feyoo 'Artu kuy ñaawle, feyoo saaga rekk, yedd ab soxor, yooloo loraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 7)
feyu: 'feyu 'Fiiraange day feesal xolu góor, te du ñéeblu buy feyu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 34)
feyukaayu: Defal boppam 'feyukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
feyukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'feyu' (Someone who does...).
feyul: . Xàll yoon yomb na, jaar ca xàll waa jafe.  . Xalu ndéef gëmm na, waaye feyul. (,) 'Coxor feyul boroom, day naxe; deel def njekk, sag pey wóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 18)
feyuñu: Defal boppam 'feyuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fëyy: 'fëyy 'Ndax xef ak xippi mu wéy, mel ni lu saxi laaf, ne fëyy, naaw ni jaxaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 5)
fii: Fii, kekk la, golo du fi raweeb xaj. (,,) .	“Fii laa dikkoon” du tere réerle. (,) 'naan: "Képp ku téxét, jàddal ba fii!" Ku ñàkk bopp, mu ne ko:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 4)
fiilu: Defal boppam 'fiil' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fiir: 'fiir 'Ñii kat seen bopp lañuy fiir, seen bakkanu bopp lañu sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 18)
fiiraange: 'fiiraange 'Fiiraange day feesal xolu góor, te du ñéeblu buy feyu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 34)
fiireesu: Defal boppam 'fiirees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fiiri: 'fiiri 'Njàngale mu xelu day suuxat bakkan, ba boroom du tàbbi ci fiiri dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 14)
fiirkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'fiir' (Someone who does...). 'Dawal ni kéwél gu rëccub rëbb, ne fërr ni picc mu raw ab fiirkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
fiiru: Defal boppam 'fiir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fippu: Defal boppam 'fipp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku bon fippu doŋŋ lay jéem, te musibaa koy dikkal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 11)
fippukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'fippu' (Someone who does...).
fireeku: Defal boppam 'fireek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
firib: . Man firib man fàpp. 'Doo firib caax, ba jàpp njanaaw luy xoole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 17)
firikatu: Defal boppam 'firikat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
firiku: Defal boppam 'firik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
firilu: Defal boppam 'firil' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
firndewu: Defal boppam 'firndew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fit: . Saaga ku la man duw fit ñàkk jom la.  . Saajo yàgg naak Jaar.
fital: . Kuy xool la ca ginnaaw sox bu tàkk, doo fital.  . Kuy yiit di të doo woccu.
fitna: . Yàlla rëbb na képp kuy yee fitna.  . Yàlla rekk moo moom baax. 'Njàqare di ngëlén, dab la, sa musiba def callweer, buub la, njekkar ak fitna dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 27)
fitnaal: 'fitnaal 'Kuy fitnaal sa waa kër doo donn dara, ku dof, boroom xel yilif la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 29)
fitnaalkatu: Defal boppam 'fitnaalkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fitnay: 'fitnay 'Doj diis na, suuf dib sëf, waaye fitnay dof a ko raw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 3)
fitt: .	Fitt, boo ko sànnee, du dellusi. (,) 'Du xam ne day dee, ba keroog fitt jam ko ci xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 23)
fitteeka: 'fitteeka '18-19 Nit kuy naxe, naan: "Damay fo!" yaay dof buy sànniy jum, di fitteeka reye.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 17)
fittkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'fitt' (Someone who does...). 'Njaatige luy liggéeyloo ab dof ak kuy romb, daa mel ni fittkat buy gaañ ku ne.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 10)
fittu: Defal boppam 'fitt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fiy: . Kilifaay ki fiy faj. 'ndax kuy jubal ay dëkke réew mi, te ku mat a fiy des.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 21)
focci: . Lu jarul dem ndaam di wuti sëriñ.  . Lu jebbi ci xol, focci ci jë.
fokat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'fo' (Someone who does...).
folli: .	Fàkk taal dëju ca ku ca ragalul yàlla it war caa ragal taat wu làkk.  .	Falleen bët, folli nopp. (,)
fomp: . Wërsëgu jë, fomp du ko dindi. (,) . Wësin mbaa dem tool.
fompu: Defal boppam 'fomp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fonk: 'fonk 'Sama doom, déggal samay wax, fonk samay santaane.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 1)
fonkeesu: Defal boppam 'fonkees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fonkuñu: Defal boppam 'fonkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
foo: Bët yu naqaree gën foo fi nekke. 'Ma nga naan: "Moo téxét bi, foo àppal sa téxét gi?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
foofu: Defal boppam 'foof' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
foog: Bés a nga di déwén : boo ko waxee gone, mu foog ne tabaski la.  Xale boo ci ni ba déwén, mu defe ni Tabaskee tax ngay wax. 'ndax ab téxét di foog, ndaw li it xam tey xalaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 4)
fooge: 'fooge 'Ab dof sax bu noppee, nirook boroom xel; ku ne cell, ñu fooge lag muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 28)
fooguñu: Defal boppam 'fooguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fóon: . Ku fecc ba génn ub géew, kenn du la seetaan. (,,) . Ku fecc taxa jàll dex ba àggee dinga mbabbsu.  . Ku fóon sa ngemb yab la. 'Ndaw sa ne ko katam, fóon, ne wajj, ne ko:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 13)
fóonante: . Ñaar ñu gudd-bakkan duñu mëna fóonante. (,,,) . Ñaar xam nañ, ñett a xamul.
foontukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'foontu' (Someone who does...).
fóot: .	Fot-fot tàggalewul mbaam ak i noppam. (,,) Pët-pët tàggalewul mbaam ak i noppam. (,) Fóot-fóot teqalewul mbaam aki noppam.  Fëtfëtlu taggalewul mbaam aki noppam.  Fatfatlu du fasale mbaam sëf ak i noppam. (,) 'Ana ku man ne fóot na xolam, ba tàggook bàkkaar?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 9)
fóotal: . Ku fóotal mbëtt, roccil bar. (,,,) .  Ku for sa pénc, yenduwaani.  . Ku gedd, sa ndey a togg. (,)
fóotkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'fóot' (Someone who does...).
fooy: .	Kendal lu neex, xam fooy fanaan a ko dàq.
foqati: 'foqati 'Kilifa gu amulug dégg, day foqati rekk, waaye ku bañ lu lewul, gudd fan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 16)
foqatikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'foqati' (Someone who does...).
foqatiku: Defal boppam 'foqatik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
foqatiwu: Defal boppam 'foqatiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
for: Bu for yombee, sëgg jafe. (,,) 'Bu jotee mu denc ab dundam, mu jot, mu for lekkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 8)
foraatu: Defal boppam 'foraat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
foral: 'foral 'Alal ju lewul day naaw; foral benn-benn, ba barele.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 11)
fori: . Looy ñut-ñuti na sàcc bu ànd ak narkat.  . Looy tendeefal, ne patt bu fori gët.  . Looy yóotu, jotoo ko.
formaasu: Defal boppam 'formaas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
forox: . Ndoxum kese du forox. (,,,,) 'Ndaw lu tayel ca ka yónnee daa mel ni lu forox ciy gëñ mbaa saxaar ciy gët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 26)
fortaatu: Defal boppam 'fortaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fotokat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'foto' (Someone who does...).
fowe: .	Foye sa ndaw du jur ludul réccu ëllëg.  Fowe sag ndaw, yalwaani sag mag. 'Doom, ana looy xemmeme keneen, bay fowe céri jàmbur?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 20)
foyfoy: 'foyfoy 'Dëkke ndànd-foyfoy moo gën jabar ju tàng, bare ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 19)
fuddu: Defal boppam 'fudd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fukk: Bu fukk dee gas, fukk di suul, pënd ay bari waaye pax du fa am. (,,,,,,,)
fukkeelu: Defal boppam 'fukkeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fukki: .	Fukk ñuy ñaan, kenn kuy gàntoo leen mën.  .	Fukki nit mënuñoo bokk fen. 'Jëfeel samay santaane, ba dund, jàppal samay ndigal sa fukki loxo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 2)
fulandiwu: Defal boppam 'fulandiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fulla: . Ñag, dabas baax na ca lee-léeg.  . Ñàkk kilifa baayam amul fulla
funki: Ba mbott bëggee tollu niw ñay, daa funki ba toj te sottiwul.
futbalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'futbal' (Someone who does...).
futteeku: Defal boppam 'futteek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
futti: 'futti 'Kuy woy, boroom tiisu xol di dégg, yaa futti mbubbam cib sedd, mbaa nga jonj xorom ci góomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 20)
futtikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'futti' (Someone who does...).
fuuftandiku: Defal boppam 'fuuftandik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fuuylu: Defal boppam 'fuuyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
fuuyu: Defal boppam 'fuuy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gaa: Bu dee ku ñëw nga ni du waa ji, léegi waa ji romb la ànd ak gaa ña, te doo xam ni waa jaa. 'Bu am réew dee fippu, kilifa ya bare; réew mu jàmm sax, kilifa gaa am déggin ak xam-xam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 2)
gaal: Dërëm bi génnul gaal gi. (,,) 'Nga mel ni ku tëdd biir géej, di jaayu ca biir gaal ga,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 34)
gaalu: Defal boppam 'gaal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Day mel ni gaalu jula, di jëli dundam fu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 14)
gaañ: Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa rey. (,,,,) Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa gaañ. (,,) Bala ngay xam, xamadi rey la. 'Dóor yu la gaañ faj na sag mbon, ay yar fóot na xolu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 30)
gaana: Bu ndab xatee, gaana jooy, Xulóol du màtt saamaan, Nag du màtt
gaañe: 'gaañe 'Muj ga mu wex xàtt, di gaañe ni ñawkay saamar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 4)
gaañu: Defal boppam 'gaañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ana kuy tiislu, naan: "Wóoy, ngalla man!" Ana kuy xulooka jàmbat, di gaañu ci dara, bët ya xonq curr?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 29)
gaañu-gaañu: Defal boppam 'gaañu-gaañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gaañugaañu: Defal boppam 'gaañugaañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gaañuwuma: 'gaañuwuma 'nga naan: "Dañu maa dóor te gaañuwuma, duma ma te yéguma ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 35)
gaar: Bëgg jiba, duma taxa gaar sama dënn. (,,) Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,) Bëgg xaritu pël du ma taxa booti sëllu.   Bëggu yàpp, bu mu la taxa lekk médd.
gaaw: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko. 'Alal ju gaaw du mujje barkeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 21)
gaawa: Dono du gërëm kenn gaawa dee a ko may.  Dono gërëmul kenn gaawa dee a ko may. 'Ab dof bu meree, mu gaawa feeñ; ku teey, tanqamlu saaga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 16)
gaawtu: Defal boppam 'gaawt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Farlu, woomle; ku gaawtu, mujj néewle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 5)
gaawtuy: 'gaawtuy 'ngir dañuy xélu, nar musiba, di gaawtuy sànk bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 16)
gaawu: Defal boppam 'gaaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gaay: Buur bu amul ay gaay, jendi du ko daw.
gàbb: 'gàbb 'Ab yaafus du gàbb ba mu jotee, day wut am ngóob, du am dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 4)
gàcce: Alal fajul dee, gàcce lay faj. (,,,) Alal du faj dee, gàcce lay faj. (,,,) 'Teraanga di céru ku rafet xel, ab dof gàccoo gàcce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 35)
gàccee: . “Sama waa ja, sama waa ja”, ndam a nga ca, gàccee nga ca.  “Saa waa ji, saa waa ji”, ndam a nga ca, gàccee nga ca.
gàcceek: 'gàcceek 'Ku jub bañ na ay fen, ku soxor di indi gàcceek yeraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 5)
gàcceel: 'gàcceel 'Àtteb dëgg day teral aw xeet, moy di gàcceel aw askan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 34)
gàcceelu: Defal boppam 'gàcceel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàcceem: 'gàcceem 'Mbugal ak toroxte dib añam, te gàcceem du deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 33)
gàcceg: .	Gàcceg may ma, bu doon ray, kon ki ñàkk bay ñaani mooy jëkka dee.  .	Gajànga, kenn du ko ràkkal.
gàccelu: Defal boppam 'gàccel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàccoo: 'gàccoo 'Teraanga di céru ku rafet xel, ab dof gàccoo gàcce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 35)
gàddu: Defal boppam 'gàdd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku bon këppoo ayu ku baax, workat gàddu musibam kuy jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 18)
gàddukatu: Defal boppam 'gàddukat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàddul: 'gàddul 'Doom, dangaa gàddul nit bor, dige feyal jàmbur,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 1)
gajfaleesu: Defal boppam 'gajfalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gajj: .	Gajj ndox, sa dënn a cay metti, ndege du ko taxa dog. (,) Gajj ndox, sa dënn a cay metti.
gajju: Defal boppam 'gajj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gajjug: .	Gajjug xuloo, dëkk bu mu sax, sémmiñu waxtaan a koy gor.  .	Galgal, su ko ngelaw uppee, saymi na.
gàkk: Bëtub mbëggeel, jéll nab gàkk. (,,,,) Bëtu mbëggeel jéll na ab gàkk.
galag: 'galag 'Buur jub, am réew dëgër; mu bëggi galag, réew ma sànku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 4)
galagu: Defal boppam 'galag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
galanu: Defal boppam 'galan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
galgal: Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci galgal aw ñey.  Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci wonnub suññéel.  Namm yàpp du ma taxa lekk war-waraan.
gàllaaj: .  Mburu, su amoon gàllaaj takkal ko boppam.
gàllaaju: Defal boppam 'gàllaaj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàllu: Defal boppam 'gàll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gamb: Ku woddu jotul, doo boot i gamb. (,,) Kuy boot jotul, ngay dolliy gamb.
gan: Cerey wottaj, su ko gan xamee, dëkk yaa ko ko wax.
gañaay: 'gañaay 'Ndaw su ni mel day ràbb ay yére, di jaay, aki gañaay, di jox jaaykat yi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 24)
gànc: 'gànc 'Dogu mburu fey nab gànc; waaye jabaru jàmbur, bakkanu lëmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 26)
gàncax: 'gàncax 'Ku yaakaar sa alal sab jéll a ngi ñëw, ku jub day juble ni gàncax gu naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 28)
gàncaxu: Defal boppam 'gàncax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gànctu: Defal boppam 'gànct' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gane: . Lu feeñ cib sëy, nuyoo woon na ca ngoro ga, dañu koo fayul.  Lu gane cib séy nuyoo na ci ngoro dañu koo fayul.
ganeyaan: .	Jikko dana soppiku jaan walbatiku màtt boroom ba. (,,,) .	Jikko du ganeyaan.
gàngoor: 'gàngoor 'soccet, amul buur, teewul ñuy àndandoo, diy gàngoor;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 27)
gàngooru: Defal boppam 'gàngoor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gànjar: 'gànjar 'Kaala gu jekk la ci bopp, di gànjar ci baat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 9)
gànjaru: Defal boppam 'gànjar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Sagu ndaw, doole ja; gànjaru mag, bijjaaw ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 29)
gàññ: . Li gëna jafe ci àddina mooy am alal ju ne gàññ, lew domm.  . Li jig mbëtt jigul bar. 'Ku néewle bey na, meññeef ne gàññ, ñu àtte ko ñàkkal, mu ñàkk ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 23)
gannaaw: Bon a gën gannaaw baax ; baax a yées gannaaw bon. 'Kuy dégg, say wax rafet; te ku ñàkk bopp, yelloo yetu gannaaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 13)
gannaawu: Defal boppam 'gannaaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gànnaay: Ñàkka déggoo amul, ñàkk waxtaan a am.  . Reew làmmiñ gàtt gànnaay. (,)
gànnaayu: Defal boppam 'gànnaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gànnaayul: 'gànnaayul 'Néewlee ngi lay dikkal nib sàcc, ñàkk gànnaayul la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 11)
gannaxu: Defal boppam 'gannax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gaññaxu: Defal boppam 'gaññax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàntal: 'gàntal 'Damaa woote, nga gàntal, ma tàllal loxo, faaleesu ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 24)
gàntalu: Defal boppam 'gàntal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàntaluñu: Defal boppam 'gàntaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàntu: Defal boppam 'gànt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gañu: 'gañu 'Day gañu di góor-góorlu aka dëgëral përëg ya.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 17)
gapparu: Defal boppam 'gappar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gar: . Ku guux peterol di wólub taal, loo ca góobe gar ko.  . Ku iñaanul ne Yàllaak diw. 'Waaye loo ci góobe, gar ko, say pexe suur la këll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 31)
garab: Àddina njoowaanu golo la, garab gu nekk lay wékku. (,) 'Mooy garab giy taxa dund ci ku ko jàpp, di mbégtey ku ca ŋoy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 18)
garabal: 'garabal 'Xol bu sedd day garabal, xol bu tiis day semmal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 22)
garabu: Defal boppam 'garab' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gas: Bu fukk dee gas, fukk di suul, pënd ay bari waaye pax du fa am. (,,,,,,,) 'Ku yóbbe bàkkaar nit kuy jubal, yeer ma nga gas, yaa cay tàbbi, waaye ku mat di jagoo ngëneel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 10)
gasal: 'gasal 'Ku gasal nit am yeer, yaa cay daanu; ku béraŋu doj, ngir tance, yaay tancu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 27)
gase: . Xel mi nga gase teen bi, la ci keneen di naane. (,,,) Xel mi nga gase teen bi la ci sa moroom di duye.
gaslu: Defal boppam 'gasl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gatandu: Defal boppam 'gatand' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàtt: Dibtóon gàtt na, waaye peram kenn du ko yéeg. 'Alal ju lewul du jariñ; jub, mucc ci gàtt fan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 2)
gàttalu: Defal boppam 'gàttal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàttañlu: Defal boppam 'gàttañl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gattax: . Wàññil sa gàllaaj, ñu jam la. (,) . War fasu gattax ba am fasu weñ. (,)
gattaxu: Defal boppam 'gattax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàtteñlu: Defal boppam 'gàtteñl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gàttu: Defal boppam 'gàtt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gay: .	Dugal ginaar ci ngunu laa mën, waaye xawma fu geen gay féetee.  .	Dukk-dukk ak yoll-yoll, yépp ci xél yi la, waaye wégét ay seen baay.  .	Duma bëgg lu la neex ba ne la Yàllaa ngi lay nuyu. (,) 'Lii waxi Agur la, góor gay doomu Yake mu Maasaf.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 1)
gaynde: Àkk àkkum gaynde, song songum bukki 'Taseek gaynde gu ñàkki doomam moo gën taseek dof ak yëfi dofam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 12)
gayndee: . Su may dee, ci àll, gayndee may rey ! (,,,,) Kuy dee ci àll na la gaynde rey. 'Buur mer lool, mel ni gayndee ŋar; boo ko merloo, dangay xaru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 2)
gayndeg: .	Gayndeg sibi du xaritook u loo.
gedd: Bu ñépp yemee, am ñu gedd seen cër. (,)
gëdd: . Nit ku nekk, juddoom a ko mag.  . Nit ku nekk nu la neex nga mel.  . Nit ku saay-saay a bañ ku ko gëdd.  . Nit ku wóor te doon gor du bari bor.  . Nit la mu jëf la du la mu wax.
gee: . “Maay taawu boroom kër gi”, tekki dara ci kër gee ko gën.  . Macc buy : ay lor.
géej: Aw doj du yàgg géej ba tax mu doon aw jën. 'Ba may dikk, géej amul, ndox ballul bay fees, di wal-wali.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 24)
géeju: Defal boppam 'géej' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
geenu: Defal boppam 'geen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
geer: .  Sori Sañaxóor taxul ron doon ngeer.   Sori Sañaxóor taxul ron a doon geer.
geestoo: Boo jaayee juróom ñaari màgget, boo geestoo yem ci sa maam, xam njëgam.
geestu: Defal boppam 'geest' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
geesu: Defal boppam 'gees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
geesuwuñu: Defal boppam 'geesuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
géew: .	Jëkka fecc taxula mujjeb géew. (,,,,) .	Jëkk cim pax, sab geen nekk ci biti. (,,,) .	Jëkka laye taxula ey. (,,)
gegenu: Defal boppam 'gegen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gëj: 'gëj 'Na sa tànk di gëj kër dëkkandoo; boo ko sàppee, mu jéppi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 17)
gëléemu: Defal boppam 'gëléem' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gëm: .	Gëm naa dee, ndege yax. (,) 'Ab téxét, loo wax mu gëm; ku ñaw xam fi ngay jaare.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 15)
gëmadikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'gëmadi' (Someone who does...).
gëmeesu: Defal boppam 'gëmees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gëmkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'gëm' (Someone who does...).
gëmkatu: Defal boppam 'gëmkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gëmm: Bàyyil xal, mu gëmm. 'Bul gëmm, bul nelaw!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 4)
gëmmeentu: Defal boppam 'gëmmeent' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gémmiñ: Bala nga lekk ubbil sa gémmiñ. 'Kàddug boroom njekk day jur xel mu rafet, ku wax njekkar ñu tëj sa gémmiñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 31)
gémmiñam: Am na i bët yu gëna réy as gémmiñam.
gémmiñu: Defal boppam 'gémmiñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gémmiñug: Bala ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm dangay xam la mu waliis.  Bala ngay fél gémmiñu sàmm, nga xam lu mu waliis.  Bul fél gémmiñug sàmm te xamoo la muy waliis. 'Kàddu gu xelu ci gémmiñug dof, mooy tànki lafañ, amalu ko njariñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 7)
gëmuñu: Defal boppam 'gëmuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gën: ﻿Aar moo gën faj. 'Am koo gën am xaalis, te njariñ laa raw wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 14)
gëñ: Àddinaa neex ba ku dee, ñu bàyyi laak say gëñ. 'Ndaw lu tayel ca ka yónnee daa mel ni lu forox ciy gëñ mbaa saxaar ciy gët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 26)
gëna: Am na i bët yu gëna réy as gémmiñam. 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
gënal: Jàpp sama loxoo ma gënal naan yoon waa ngee.  .	Jarag moo di sàqam jabaraankat. 'Na la samab yar gënal xaalis, xam-xam dàqal la ngën-gi-wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 10)
gënatee: 'gënatee 'Muñ mer, déggin wu yaa; gaawa tàng, gënatee dof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 29)
gëne: . Nit ki, li muy gëne moroomam, buy sangu, du ko summi.  La nit di gëne moroom ma, buy sangu, du ko summi.
genn: .	Gémmiñ waccootul, xanaa taat di waccu.  .	Gémmiñu may ma su yàggee xasaw.  .	Genn gaal du yeb moroomam.
génn: Bu doom yàkkamtee génn kër baayam, yaayam a yàkkamti. (,) Ku xeeb sa këru baay, sa ndey a yàkkamti.
gënn: Béy du gëmal gënn. (,,,,) 'Soo jëloonub dof, yeb ci gënn, booleek pepp, wol, du tax ndof ga deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 22)
genn-wàllu: Defal boppam 'genn-wàll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
génne: . Ku nuy bëgga ray, nga génne mbuurunke dafa fekk koon nga denc ko.  Ku ñuy bëgga ray, nga génne mburunké dafa fekkoon nga denc ko. 'Ku bon, ñu génne réew mi; kuy fecci worma, ñu buddi, sànni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 22)
génnee: . Loo barele-barele, boo génnee gis loo moomul. (,,) . Loo barile-barile, ci benn néeg ngay fanaan.
génneel: 'génneel 'say xar da lay amal koddaay, bëy yi génneel la njëgu tool.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 26)
génnliku: Defal boppam 'génnlik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
génnul: Bu ñu dee wax leeraayu weer, booba jant a génnul.
génnuñu: Defal boppam 'génnuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gënoonu: Defal boppam 'gënoon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gént: Bëgga nettali sa gént, nettali sa géntug moroom.
gentu: Defal boppam 'gent' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
géntu: Defal boppam 'gént' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
géntug: Bëgga nettali sa gént, nettali sa géntug moroom.
gënu: . Làmb daj, gis gënu koo wóor.
gënul: Dëkk ba nga juddoo, bu la fa kenn gënul, sa ndey ak sa baay wàcc nañu.
gënuñu: Defal boppam 'gënuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ger: 'ger 'Wutin wu lewul, sonal sa waa kër; ku bañ alalu ger gudd fan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 27)
gërëm: Dono du gërëm kenn gaawa dee a ko may.  Dono gërëmul kenn gaawa dee a ko may. 'Nit a ngi móolu kuy denc pepp, ba mu ñàkkee, di gërëm ka koy jaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 26)
gërëme: Bu lëg lekkee aloom, na ko gërëme coy (,,,,,) Lëg su lekkee aloom war na koo gërëme coy. (,) Bu lëg mosee aloom, na ko gërëme coy.
gërëmul: Dono du gërëm kenn gaawa dee a ko may.  Dono gërëmul kenn gaawa dee a ko may.
gerte: . Lu rey mbuum, dee ca, ku weddi laaj gerte.  Lu rey mbuum, dee ca. (,,)
gësëm: . Ñettiku ca ba muy tooy, ndax bu wowee kadadaan.  . Ñey mënul ci daqaar dara, xanaa gësëm-gësëm bàyyi. (,) . Ñey wu dox njolloor moo lu njiinam sakku.
gëstu: Defal boppam 'gëst' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gët: Àddinam xel, jam na gët. 'Ndaw lu tayel ca ka yónnee daa mel ni lu forox ciy gëñ mbaa saxaar ciy gët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 26)
gëtam: Kilifa day folliy noppam fal ay gëtam.
gëti: . Mëna làyyi taxul nga bëgg sa kenn di tooñ.  . Mënaatoo yàqoon gëti golo.
gétt: Di raam, di sàcc, su màggee jël i gétt. (,) 'Xamal bu baax lu say gàtt nekke, te def sa xel ci say gétt,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 23)
géttu: Defal boppam 'gétt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ggalukaayu: Defal boppam 'ggalukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
giif: 'giif 'Du faale ndàmpaay, loo ko may, may, du giif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 35)
giifal: 'giifal 'Tont lu neex day giifal, baat bu ñagas di jógal xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 1)
giir: Baroom jur ci sa tool taxul nga yett giir.
giiroo: . Ku giiroo koon may la, def ca ndab la ngeen bokk.  Ku giiroo may la, dee ngeen bokk ndab.
giiru: Defal boppam 'giir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Éy Yàlla, ñaar laa la ñaan, ngalla may ma ko sama giiru dund:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 7)
giiruñu: Defal boppam 'giiruñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
giléem: Bu loos wu gudd doon taxa falu, kon giléem du fanaan biti.
giñ: 'giñ 'Bul gaawtuy digeek Yàlla, di dugal sa bopp; bul giñ, di réccu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 25)
ginaar: Awma ginaar siiru sikk ma duma ci fekk.
gindi: .	Janax yu bari duñu gas menn pax.  .	Jàng dey gindi jëme ci jëf.
gindiku: Defal boppam 'gindik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gis: Àddina ñett a ci gën : àjjana biti, ak weerteewlu ak mëneek say dëkk, ak ku la gis bëgg la. '"Keroog nga woo ma wall, duma wuyu, nga seet ma, seet, doo ma gis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 28)
gis-gisu: Defal boppam 'gis-gis' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gisaanekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'gisaane' (Someone who does...).
gisagunu: Defal boppam 'gisagun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gisalee: 'gisalee 'Boo gisalee sa bopp it,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 7)
gisati: 'gisati 'Ku dem ca moom dootoo délsi, doo gisati yoonu dund mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 19)
gisatu: Defal boppam 'gisat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gisatul: . Ku gisatul kenn, di sa magum bopp.
gisatuñu: Defal boppam 'gisatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gise: Bakkan jekk na ci xar-kanam, ndaxub gise.
gisee: Boo gisee ku def lu mu warula def, bu ko farfarle. 'Boo gisee lem, lekkal lu yem; bu ëppee, nga waccu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 16)
giseesatu: Defal boppam 'giseesat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
giseesu: Defal boppam 'gisees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gisewu: Defal boppam 'gisew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gisoo: Bu daay tàkkee, gisoo bàqaar, am na lu ko téye. 'Kuy jox néew-ji-doole, doo ñàkk; nga gëmm ne gisoo, bare ku la móolu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 27)
gisu: .	Foo gisu yàpp, bakkan a dee.  .	Foo ko fekk muy fenk nib jant. 'Kuy foog, gisu ay, làqu; ab téxét ne ca tëñëx, loru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 3)
gisul: .	Ginaar bu toppee ñii taxani dafa gisul ñii bojj.  .	Ginaar dëgg na doom ja, waaye bañu ko. (,)
gisuma: . Mag bu gëmmee, ne, gisuma jant bi, kenn mënu ci dara.  . Mag bu rusee, ne “maa tey”.
gisunu: Defal boppam 'gisun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gisuñu: Defal boppam 'gisuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gittax: Jàpp ci gittax ba for yat.
giy: .	Gàcce giy palmaan ñey, baxa-segu la. 'Mooy garab giy taxa dund ci ku ko jàpp, di mbégtey ku ca ŋoy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 18)
goj: . Kuy reere pann, boo woppee fande. (,,) . Kuy rootaani, seetil boroom goj ak baag.  . Kuy rooteek sendal, doo yóbbum ndox.  . Kuy sàkki ron, ku ko abal kàndaama bañu ko.  . Kuy sàngoo làmmiñ boo noppee rafle.
golo: Àddina njoowaanu golo la, garab gu nekk lay wékku. (,)
gone: Bés a nga di déwén : boo ko waxee gone, mu foog ne tabaski la.  Xale boo ci ni ba déwén, mu defe ni Tabaskee tax ngay wax. 'Gone yi, tee ngeena dégg yaru baay, te déglu, ba amug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 1)
gonee: .	Gonee may dëkk, waaye mag a may daan !  .	Gonee nga daan sakkane ca lalu ndeyam.  .	Goneey doon mag.
goneg: .	Goneg mbóoyo gu reew, xaar ko ca taatu ndaa la. (,,,) .	Gont taxani for aw ñey, muur a koy maye.
goney: .	Gone bu téyee ci loxoob baayam, ku mu gis defe ne baayam a la mën.  .	Gone, bu yaroo macc tàngal, yëy goney Ngaayam.
gont: .	Goneg mbóoyo gu reew, xaar ko ca taatu ndaa la. (,,,) .	Gont taxani for aw ñey, muur a koy maye.
goo: Bëgge bu la xañulee, booba bëggee goo. 'Deel bantal aka yedde, day rafetal xel; gone goo bay-bayal, mu gàcceel ndeyam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 15)
góob: Déegug jànj du tee bare dugub. (,) Déegub jànj du tee góob. (,) 'Ku ngóob jot, nga góob, xelu nga; ngóob taxaw, ngay nelaw, gàcce la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 5)
góobe: . Ku guux peterol di wólub taal, loo ca góobe gar ko.  . Ku iñaanul ne Yàllaak diw. 'Waaye loo ci góobe, gar ko, say pexe suur la këll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 31)
góobkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'góob' (Someone who does...).
googu: Defal boppam 'goog' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
góom: .	Fu ñuy feese, kenn du fa jooyub góom. (,) Fu ñuy feese, kenn du fa jàmbatub góom.
góomam: 'góomam 'Kuy woy, boroom tiisu xol di dégg, yaa futti mbubbam cib sedd, mbaa nga jonj xorom ci góomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 20)
goor: Bala ngaa gore, goor ci dara. .
góor: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko. 'Fiiraange day feesal xolu góor, te du ñéeblu buy feyu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 34)
góor-góorlu: Defal boppam 'góor-góorl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
góoru: Defal boppam 'góor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
góorug: .	Góorug “yaay may ma ñeex/wogg” amul jom.  .	Góorug wat baõ du faj gàcce.
goorukaayu: Defal boppam 'goorukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gor: As gor dina dugg ciy naxam. 'Waxi teggin jekkul cib dof, ay fen ci as gor waxi noppi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 7)
gore: Am : gore, ñàkk : gore. 'Ñu baree ngi naa: "Gore naa," waaye kuy boroom kóllëre dëgg?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 6)
goreeleesu: Defal boppam 'goreelees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
goreelu: Defal boppam 'goreel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
gorkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'gor' (Someone who does...).
goro: Bala nga wuti jabar, wutal goro.
gub: Àddina ñett a ko jàpp : saxle, gub sax bi, ak sax mi. (,)
gubee: 'gubee 'Gannaaw bu ñu gubee, ba ñax saxaat, ñu dajale ngooñ ma ca tund yac,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 25)
gudd: Àddina gudd nab tank. 'ngir fan wi gudd lool, nga gëna am jàmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 2)
guddaay: .	Goro, deesu ko wax dëgg.  .	Guddaay taxul ñemeñ.
guddaayu: Defal boppam 'guddaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
guddal: . Wax, soxu fetal la, su rëccee, dabu ko wees. (,,,) . Wax, su guddee, ñaar a ko guddal. 'Day guddal saw fan, di rafetal sa jikko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 22)
guddee: .	Guddee àll duma taxa war mbaam.
guddi: Béy du raas déemi guddi. (,) 'Ngoonug suuf la, jant biy lang, muy lëndëm di gëna guddi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 9)
gumba: Bu la gumba wooyee ci galle, booba dafa dëgg ciy doj.
gumbaak: .	Golo xàmmeewul xaj bu gumbaak bu lafañ.
gunge: Booy gunge boroom biir buy daw, bu dawul, bul daw.
gunóor: Boo amee xaritub gunóor, bu ko tas cib kekk.
gunóoru: Defal boppam 'gunóor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
guux: . Ku guux peterol di wólub taal, loo ca góobe gar ko.  . Ku iñaanul ne Yàllaak diw.
guy: Bu ñ(u) nee “guy ga”, na ne “daqaar ga”. 'Kuy jëfe njekk mbete garab guy taxa dund, ku rafet xel am nit ñi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 30)
hébreu: Defal boppam 'hébre' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
iñaan: .	Guy gu daar a yées cib gént ; ca la gone yépp di jàngeb yéeg.  .	Iñaan, mooy jëkkëri wërsëg, da koy tëb mu jur doom.
indaalewunu: Defal boppam 'indaalewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
indee: Am joo gis, indee ciy tegu.
indi: Buleen xeeb bataaxal, lu mu tuut tuut wax lay indi. (,) 'Ku jub bañ na ay fen, ku soxor di indi gàcceek yeraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 5)
indib: 'indib 'Ndoortel ay di wal mu tàmbali, luy indib xuloo, bàyyil.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 14)
indilu: Defal boppam 'indil' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
indiw: . Ku ñu yónni jëkkër, nga indiw far. 'Ndax ku ruux soow, am ca dax, ku wañaar bakkan, mu nàcc, te lu jógal xol, indiw ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 33)
indiwu: Defal boppam 'indiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
israayil: 'israayil 'Kàddu yu xelu yu Suleymaan buurub Israayil, di doomu Daawuda.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 1)
itam: Bu dee bala ngaa xam ñu wax la, bu ñu la waxee itam doo xam.
jaa: Bu dee ku ñëw nga ni du waa ji, léegi waa ji romb la ànd ak gaa ña, te doo xam ni waa jaa.
jaab: . Xaj baw na, golo yendoo jaab.  . Xaj bi dina raastu ci wetu waañ.
jaadu: Defal boppam 'jaad' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kon nga xam lu jaadu, neex Yàllaak doom aadama.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 4)
jaal: Dërëm ak jabar aku jaal laa yemale (: lenn laa ci yorul.)
jaale: Dëmm rey la, jaale la. (,,,,,). Dëmm rey la ba noppi jaale la.
jaam: .	Jaam ak pexeem, Yàllaak dogalam.   Jaam ak yéeneem, Yàlla ak dogalam. 'Jéegoy jaam Aji Sax jee ko yor, kenn xamul foo jëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 24)
jaamookaayu: Defal boppam 'jaamookaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaamootuñu: Defal boppam 'jaamootuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaamu: Defal boppam 'jaam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaamukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jaamu' (Someone who does...).
jaamukatu: Defal boppam 'jaamukat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaamuwuñu: Defal boppam 'jaamuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaan: Bu xulóol dofee, jaan mbokk ma doful. (,) 'Bu weesoo mu màtt la ni jaan, ne la càppit ni ñàngóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 32)
jaani: . Mag, jaani ñàngóor la : bu la riisoo, bàyyil la daõar, boo ko riisoo mu bàyyil la daõar.
jaanu: Defal boppam 'jaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaar: Bala ngaa dem lii moo neex, fàww nga jaar ci sonnoneen. 'Doom, bul ànd ak ñoom ciw yoon, bul jaare fa ñuy jaar,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 15)
jaarale: Ku ñuy diri, doo taamu fu nu lay jaarale. (,,) . Ku la bëgg a lay sonal, waaye ki la baña lay noppal.  . Ku la bëggati, bëgg ko ngir ka la bañ.
jaaralewu: Defal boppam 'jaaralew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaare: 'jaare 'Doom, bul ànd ak ñoom ciw yoon, bul jaare fa ñuy jaar,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 15)
jaaree: Tarxiis su dammee loosu mbonaat, ku yor géléem, war ngaa yësal.  Fu mbott tarxiise ba damm, bu fa géléem jaaree wara def ndànk.    Fu mbott tarxiise ba damm, géléem war na fa teggi.
jaareesu: Defal boppam 'jaarees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaareetu: Defal boppam 'jaareet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaarewu: Defal boppam 'jaarew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaarewuñu: Defal boppam 'jaarewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaarloo: 'jaarloo 'Yoon wu xelu laa la teg, jaarloo la yoonu njub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 11)
jaaro: 'jaaro 'Taaru jongama ju xel maa gàtt, mooy jaaro wurus ci noppu mbaam-xuux.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 22)
jaarob: 'jaarob 'Kàddu yu lay yedd ci kuy dégg, jaarob wurus la mbaa gànjaru ngalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 12)
jaaroo: Dara yéesul taxan, di loob matt moo xamul ëllëg ku koy jaaroo : lu ñ(u) taxanati, na ñ(u) ci jaaru.
jaaru: Defal boppam 'jaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaarukaayu: Defal boppam 'jaarukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaaruñu: Defal boppam 'jaaruñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaaruwaayam: 'jaaruwaayam 'Yoonu ku ni mel day lunk, jaaruwaayam dëng.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 15)
jaas: Dee du jaas. (,,) 'Ab soxor mbugalam du jaas, wóor na; te ku jëfe njekk, saw askan mucc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 21)
jaasi: Kenn di jiitu jaasi ci mbaram. 'Làmmiñu waxkat, jam-jami jaasi; kàddu gu xelu, garab la ci.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 18)
jaasir: 'jaasir 'njaniiw, jigéen ju jaasir, suuf, du màndi ndox, sawara, du ne doy na mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 16)
jaaxaan: Jaan tuuti na waaye daõar jaõ ca biir.  .	Jaaxaan ciw naaj ne gisoob jant. 'Ngay dajjant aka for bët, di tegley loxooka jaaxaan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 10)
jaaxal: Cerey puso, ku ko soq, wol ko, mooñ ko du la jaaxal. (,)
jaaxalu: Defal boppam 'jaaxal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaaxle: .	Jaaxle, jaaxaan faju ko.  .	Jaay poon ak làqarcee ànd.
jaay: Bakkan du jaay. 'Nit a ngi móolu kuy denc pepp, ba mu ñàkkee, di gërëm ka koy jaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 26)
jaayaatu: Defal boppam 'jaayaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
