jaaye: . Ku jaay juróom-ñaari màggat wara xam lu sa maam di jar.  Ku jaay màggat war ngaa xam looy jaaye sa maam.
jaayee: Boo jaayee juróom ñaari màgget, boo geestoo yem ci sa maam, xam njëgam.
jaaykat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jaay' (Someone who does...). 'Ndaw su ni mel day ràbb ay yére, di jaay, aki gañaay, di jox jaaykat yi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 24)
jaayu: Defal boppam 'jaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Nga mel ni ku tëdd biir géej, di jaayu ca biir gaal ga,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 34)
jaayuñu: Defal boppam 'jaayuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jabar: Bala nga wuti jabar, wutal goro. 'Tuuti ma yàqu yaxeet fi kanam ñépp!" Yemal ci sa jabar' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 14)
jabari: . Ku reere cerey dëj, fanaane jabari dono, boo bindantee, amoo ngor.  . Ku reew, amul saans...
jabarkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jabar' (Someone who does...).
jabaru: Defal boppam 'jabar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Da lay aar ci ndaw su bon ak jabaru jàmbur ak làmmiñam wu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 24)
jaboot: .	Jaboot day boot ñépp, te du wàcce kenn. (,,,)
jabootuñu: Defal boppam 'jabootuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàdd: .	Jàdd, buur-fari la. 'Bul jàdd, ndijoor mbaa càmmoñ, na sa tànk moyu lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 27)
jàddal: 'jàddal 'naan: "Képp ku téxét, jàddal ba fii!" Ku ñàkk bopp, mu ne ko:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 4)
jàddee: . Tànk, bu jàddee yoon, dég jam ko.  . Tànk bu toogul dëgg day.
jàddkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jàdd' (Someone who does...).
jàdduñu: Defal boppam 'jàdduñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jafandu: Defal boppam 'jafand' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jafe: Am bukki yomb na, waaye bukki buy xalam a jafe. (,) 'Wurus am na ak gànjar yu bare, waaye kàdduy xam-xam a gën per yu jafe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 15)
jagal: .  Sikkét ba ca Jàjj ak jagal ba ca Njaañ,  Réex, ma né jédd fii ba ca kolobaan.
jagalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jagal' (Someone who does...).
jagalkatu: Defal boppam 'jagalkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jagoo: 'jagoo 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
jagul: Ku ñu fey sa bor nga mer, la nga leblewoon baaxul.  Ku ñu fey sa bor nga mer, la nga leble woon a jagul.
jàkk: 'jàkk 'Bu ci noppee ja jàkk, te jàpp ko ci sa biir xel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 21)
jal: . Mbojj, boo bëggee xam ni saw jal di tollu, dangay fekke mbees ma.  . Mbokk : dox ak wax la, suñu ko noppee dox, noppi koo wax, dara desatu
jalam: . Soo bëgg loo lekk nawet na nga di sakkantal ci noor.  .  Soo dee jéem õampat jalam mbool nga amul. (,)  . Soo deetee dox ba ëkk fël la, danga koy gor. 'Ngor ak worma day aar buur, ngor ay saxal ab jalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 28)
jalgati: 'jalgati 'Ku bon day nangu alalu ger ca suuf, nara jalgati yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 23)
jalgatiku: Defal boppam 'jalgatik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàll: Dég-dég amul i tànk, waaye jàll nam ndox. (,,,) Dég-dég amul i tànk, waaye dina jàll dex. 'ak ba muy sàkkal géej kemoom, ba du jàll fa mu wax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 29)
jàllarbiku: Defal boppam 'jàllarbik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàllukaayu: Defal boppam 'jàllukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jalu: .	Jakkarloo ku ko mos xam ne jëw a dàq.  .	Jàkkay xobbat jombul ilimaani wunk. (,,) .	Jalu muus janax du ko yër.
jalub: .	Jalub muus la, ku ko sulli fekk fa dara.  .	Jam sakket du ndann.
jam: Àddinam xel, jam na gët. 'Du xam ne day dee, ba keroog fitt jam ko ci xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 23)
jam-jamu: Defal boppam 'jam-jam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàmbaar: .	Jàmbaar su daanoo, Yàllaa ca jàpp.  .	Jàmbaaru fàkk tëdd.
jàmbaare: 'jàmbaare 'Jeeg bu jàmbaare day teral jëkkër ja, jeeg buy rusloo day semmal jëkkër ja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 4)
jàmbaari: 'jàmbaari 'Ku ñaw mana daan jàmbaari dëkk bu mag, ba màbb tata ja ñu yaakaaroon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 22)
jàmbaaru: Defal boppam 'jàmbaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàmbat: Fekkee waral jàmbat. (,) 'Ana kuy tiislu, naan: "Wóoy, ngalla man!" Ana kuy xulooka jàmbat, di gaañu ci dara, bët ya xonq curr?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 29)
jàmbu: Defal boppam 'jàmb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàmbur: Wërsëgu jàmbur ku cay wayaseer War koo gërëm. 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
jàmburu: Defal boppam 'jàmbur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jamee: Bu sedd jamee ku amul cangaay dangay banku.
jamkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jam' (Someone who does...).
jàmm: Amuloo salaamaalekum, amuloo fanaan leen jàmm. 'Waaye déggal ma, dëkke jàmm, tàggook njekkar ak safaan."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 33)
jàmmi: Ayi waay jàmmi waay. 'Wax ju yiw di lem juy xelli, neexa ñam, di jàmmi yaram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 24)
jàmmu: Defal boppam 'jàmm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kanam gu leer day seral xol; xibaaru jàmm, jàmmu yaram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 30)
jamono: Wakke, bu dajeek ub geestu.  . Wol di mëq du jikko, jamono la.  . Wommat ginaar, gàddu koo ko gën. (,) . Woññ bëñu gaynde, day fekk mu dee.  . Woote Yàllaa gën bu nit.
jan: Lu puso muus-muus wëñ jaar ca bën-bën ba.  . Lu reen jan-jan, reen a nga ca suufam. (,)
janax: Bu janax doon xumbal, ñag boo séen muy xóoy.
janaxi: Duma jënd jaanum pax. (,) Duma jënd jaar ci pax. (,,) Duma jënd janaxi pax.
jàng: Dof, kenn du ko ne : “yaa moom jàng yi”, waaye danga naan ko : “ci nga bokk !”
jàngal: . Ku la jàngal pes nëbb la kuntaaba. 'Maa ngi leen di jàngal lu baax, buleen fàtte sama njàngale.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 2)
jàngale: . Lu la waay maye kon jën, na la ko jàngale napp moo gën.  . Lu la waay wàll ëppale la ca.
jàngalekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jàngale' (Someone who does...).
jàngalekatu: Defal boppam 'jàngalekat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jànge: 'jànge 'Boo ñefee ab ñaawlekat, téxét ba jànge ca; nga yedd kuy dégg, mu xame ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 25)
jàngekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jànge' (Someone who does...).
jàngkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jàng' (Someone who does...).
jàngoo: Boroom tubéy, bu jàngoo, sol. (,,) Boroom tubéy saayu jàngoo sol. (,)
jàngoro: Ab yeel bu ëppee ab lupp booba jàngoro rax na ca.
jàngu: Defal boppam 'jàng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàngul: .	Jàngora du bàyyi xeet topp dëkkaale yiy faat.  .	Jàngul tari fen la.
jànj: Cokkeer loo naaw di gës su dalee duppe jànj.
jánju: Defal boppam 'jánj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jànkalaar: . Man gan, man sa bopp la.  . Man jiit, man jànkalaar.
jànkoonteek: 'jànkoonteek 'Ku wacc yoon, gërëm ku bon; ku wormaal yoon, jànkoonteek ku bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 4)
jànni: 'jànni 'Ku ñàkk a ngi leewaayu, boroom alal di ko jànni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 23)
janqam: 'janqam 'Xel mu Rafet yónni ay janqam, di wootee fu kawee kawe ca dëkk ba,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 3)
janqu: Defal boppam 'janq' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jant: Àddina weeru koor la ; feek jant sowul, juubu du wees. (,) Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) Koor gu jant sowagul, juubu weesoogu ca. 'Ngoonug suuf la, jant biy lang, muy lëndëm di gëna guddi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 9)
jàpp: Àddina ñett a ko jàpp : saxle, gub sax bi, ak sax mi. (,) 'Doo firib caax, ba jàpp njanaaw luy xoole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 17)
jàppal: “Jàppal, ma yenni la”, du sawar laa yenni, waaye bëgga xam la nga yenu la. 'Baay digal ma, ne ma: "Jàppal samay wax ci sam xel, di jëfe samay santaane, ba dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 4)
jàppalekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jàppale' (Someone who does...).
jàppalewu: Defal boppam 'jàppalew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàppee: Boo ma jàppee fu Yàlla nekkul, rey ma.
jàppeesu: Defal boppam 'jàppees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàppewu: Defal boppam 'jàppew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàppi: . Ku ñuy dàq ngay daw, di jàppi ween, sa càmmiñ a lay dàq.  . Ku ñuy jàppub jaam ngay seetub surga.
jàppkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jàpp' (Someone who does...).
jàpplu: Defal boppam 'jàppl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàppu: Defal boppam 'jàpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàppunu: Defal boppam 'jàppun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàppuñu: Defal boppam 'jàppuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jàq: 'jàq 'Kuy ñaawal ku ñàkk, tooñ nga Ka ko sàkk; kuy reetaan ku jàq, mbugalam du jaas.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 5)
jàqee: .	Gone, ban la, feek mi ngi tooy : nu la neex def ko ni.  .	Gone, bu jàqee, tàllal mag ab naqam. (,,) 'Bul fàtte sab xarit mbaa sa xaritu baay, boo jàqee, bul seeti sa mbokk; dëkkandoo bu jegee gën mbokk mu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 10)
jar: Bëgg-bëgg yee wuute, moo tax njaay may jar ca ja ba. (,) 'Kuy waxaalee ngi naan: "Baaxul de!" Bu nee wërëñ, di damu naan: "Aka jar!"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 14)
jara: Doom a jara jooy, waaye du mbootu. 'Kuy wër di sos dangay wuññi sutura, ku jara wóolu dangay am bàmmeelu biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 13)
jaraafu: Defal boppam 'jaraaf' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jarag: Jàpp sama loxoo ma gënal naan yoon waa ngee.  .	Jarag moo di sàqam jabaraankat.
jaralu: Defal boppam 'jaral' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jargandalu: Defal boppam 'jargandal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jargoñ: . Néegub jargoñ la, du la fegalub sedd, du la fegalu tàngoor.  . Néegub ngor, kenn terewu ko, ku ci duggul ci yow la. (,) . Neenug neen, du rey bukki. (,)
jariñ: Bala ngaa xam luw taat di jëriñ, mbate toog jotee. (,) Bala ngay xam li taat di jariñ, toog jot. (,) 'Li xel mu rafet di jariñ' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 12)
jariñoo: Alalu ku sàggan, ku farlu moo koy jariñoo. 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
jariñoogu: Defal boppam 'jariñoog' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jariñoowunu: Defal boppam 'jariñoowun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jariñu: Defal boppam 'jariñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Rafet xel, jariñu, kuy kókkalee, wéetook sa añ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 12)
jariñul: Dara jariñul mëna daw, demal ba dem jotee.
jartu: Defal boppam 'jart' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaru: . Ku say moroom jaru bëy, boo jarul bëy it njëngu bëy nga.
jarul: “Bëgg naa la” ak “bëgguma la”, jarul soowoo.
jarula: Àddina ak li ci biiram jarula xiirook a õaayoo.
jasig: Bant, lu mu yàgg yàgg cig dex, du tax mu soppiku jasig. (,,,) Yàggaayu bantu ron ci ndox, du ko taxa doon jasig (,) Bant, lu mu yàgg, yàgg ci dex, du ko taxa soppaliku jasig
jat: Bu dul woon tubéy, julli ñaaw. (,,,) Su dul koon jat, julli aay. (,)
jataayu: Defal boppam 'jataay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Wax ju xelu sut nab dof, jataayu pénc du fa àddoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 7)
jatkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jat' (Someone who does...).
jawriñ: 'jawriñ 'Buur day bége jawriñ ju xelu, di mbugal nitu gàcce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 35)
jawriñu: Defal boppam 'jawriñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jaxaay: . Soq a gajaf, waaye pepp a ngi ci yéer.  . Soq a sàkkan, waaye pepp a wax.  . Sori kaw a tax jaxaay di saw bukki. (,) 'Ndax xef ak xippi mu wéy, mel ni lu saxi laaf, ne fëyy, naaw ni jaxaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 5)
jaxasu: Defal boppam 'jaxas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jay: Dangeen di jay dëru ba muy jóg di daw. 'Boo artoo nit, mu baaxe la ëllëg; yaa koy gënal ku ko doon jay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 23)
jàyy: 'jàyy 'Ci xam-xamam la ndoxi xóote ya ne jàyy, ay niir di lay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 20)
jébbalee: .	For nëbb du xeloo jébbalee.  For, ne ndokk, jébbaletil.
jebbi: Boo gajjee am ngeer, ngeer rekk a fay jebbi.
jee: Boo xejjatee ci péey ba fa jee ja. 'Xaalis ak wurus sawaraa koy xelli, waaye nit, ab xolam, Aji Sax jee koy nattu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 3)
jéebaane: 'jéebaane 'Ñaarool ak ki nga joteel, te bul jéebaane jàmbur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 9)
jeeg: . Rafet perantal, jarula ñeewe sa moroomum jeeg, bu doom ya màggee, àtte. 'Jeeg bu jàmbaare day teral jëkkër ja, jeeg buy rusloo day semmal jëkkër ja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 4)
jéegoom: 'jéegoom 'Tànk ya day bartalu wuti dee, ay jéegoom àkki njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 5)
jéegoy: 'jéegoy 'Jéegoy jaam Aji Sax jee ko yor, kenn xamul foo jëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 24)
jeegu: Defal boppam 'jeeg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jeeki: 'jeeki 'Aji Sax jeeki nammeelam rawtu la ci ku mat, di sànkute ci kuy def lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 29)
jéem: .	Jéem, tële, bàyyi, gàcce nekku ca.  .	Jëf du fi jóg, nettali du màgget.  .	Jëf ñatt la: Jëf, jëfantu, jëfandoo.  .	Jëf yóbbaale na wax ba noppi.  .	Jege attayakat taxuta jëkka naan.  .	Jege buur, jege xol baa ko gën.  .	Jege te sori, sori te jege. 'Ku bon fippu doŋŋ lay jéem, te musibaa koy dikkal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 11)
jéema: . Ndab ku ca mënuta sukk sukkin wu jekk, waru caa jéema lekk. (,) . Ndànk-ndànk mooy jàpp golo cib ñaay. (,,,,,,,,)
jeex: Bési Yàlla yi du (ñu) jeex. 'Ngay mujje onk, desey yax, jeex tàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 11)
jeexagul: Àddina weeru koor la ; feek jant sowul, juubu du wees. (,) Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) Koor gu jant sowagul, juubu weesoogu ca.
jeexal: Fullaay jaay daqaar, (mbaa “ma ñam” jeexal ko). (,) Fullaay jaay daqaar mbaa ma macc jeexal ko.  Fullaay jaay daqaar, mbaa – ma mos – jeexal ko.  Fullaay jaay keccax. 'Njàqare day jeexal xolu boroom, wax ju neex di tooyal xolam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 25)
jeexe: .	Fa bon jeexe, la tàmbalee (di bon).
jeexlee: . Yàqkatub marse bu jeexlee toog.  . Yar sa doom taxul nga bañ ko.  . Yar xaj a gën yar nit.
jeexul: Bu worma jeexul woon, kon ndox du togg jën.
jeey: .	Jabar jeey takk tubéy, jëkkër jeey woddu. 'ndax Aji Sax jeey maye xel mu rafet, kàddoom di taxa xam, di dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 6)
jëf: .	Janax yu bari duñu gas menn pax.  .	Jàng dey gindi jëme ci jëf. 'Lu waay jëf, Aji Sax ji gis, di xool mboolem fu mu jaare.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 21)
jëfam: 'jëfam 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet nee na: "Aji Sax ji jagoo na ma ca njàlbéen, ma jiitu ca jëfam ya woon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 22)
jëfandikukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jëfandiku' (Someone who does...).
jëfe: . Xam-xam ñeent a koy kulóor : di ko bind, di ko jàngale, di ko waxtaane, mbaa di ko jëfe. (,) 'ngir yaru ci  jëfe xel ak njub ak yoon, di jubal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 3)
jëfeel: 'jëfeel 'Jëfeel samay santaane, ba dund, jàppal samay ndigal sa fukki loxo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 2)
jëfeg: 'jëfeg 'Ku jub, di jëfeg mat, doom ju la wuutu bég na.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 7)
jëfewu: Defal boppam 'jëfew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëfewunu: Defal boppam 'jëfewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëfewuñu: Defal boppam 'jëfewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëfi: 'jëfi 'Dëddul jëfi téxét ba dund, di jubal ci yoonu dégg." Kuy xeloo ngii ak kuy ñaawle' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 6)
jëfin: 'jëfin 'Yoonu kuy jubal day moyu lu bon, ku teeylu sa jëfin, sàmm sa bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 17)
jëfinu: Defal boppam 'jëfin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jege: Dëgmël lu ko gëna jege teen bi ci biir nga jëm. 'Soreel ndaw soosu, bul jege bunt këram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 8)
jegee: Bu la asamaan jegee, fexeel ba laal ko. 'Bul fàtte sab xarit mbaa sa xaritu baay, boo jàqee, bul seeti sa mbokk; dëkkandoo bu jegee gën mbokk mu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 10)
jegesi: 'jegesi 'ndax ñu ne la: "Yéegal, jegesi fii," moo gën ñu toroxal la ci kanam kilifa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 7)
jegewu: Defal boppam 'jegew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëggaani: . Nit a ngay jëggaani lu ni gàññ ca péeyam.  . Nit ak jikkoom, pax rekk.
jéggal: 'jéggal 'Ku jiital ngor ak worma, Yàlla jéggal la; ku ragal Aji Sax ji, dëddu lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 6)
jéggale: 'jéggale 'Mbañeel ak ayoo; cofeel ak jéggale bépp tooñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 12)
jeggalu: Defal boppam 'jeggal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jéggalu: Defal boppam 'jéggal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jéggi: . Roof-roppi du fékke ayu boroomam.  . Rootaan jéggi nam ndox. 'Jubook mbokk moo tooñ, jéggi tataa ko gëna yomb, mbaa ubbi bunt yu tëje ràpp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 19)
jekk: Bakkan jekk na ci xar-kanam, ndaxub gise. 'Kaala gu jekk la ci bopp, di gànjar ci baat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 9)
jëkk: Benn nopp, ku ca jëkk wat.
jëkka: Ba nga séenee ron, ron a la jëkka séen. (,,,) Ba nga laata séen ron, ron a la njëkka séen.
jekkaayu: Defal boppam 'jekkaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jekkadi: 'jekkadi 'mucc ci yoonu ku bon ak kuy wax lu jekkadi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 12)
jekkadiy: 'jekkadiy 'jekkadiy xalaat, di mébét lu bon aka yokku ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 14)
jekkaliku: Defal boppam 'jekkalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jekkalu: Defal boppam 'jekkal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëkke: .	Jombos bu tàng, du lex ba ko jëkke moo koy mujje. (, ,) Yomb gu tàng, lex bi ko jëkke du ko mujje. 'Ragal Aji Sax ji day rafetal xel; jëkke woyof, mujje tedd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 33)
jekkee: . Ki nekk ci làng a xam fi gal-gal jekkee.  . Ki wax, waxul ; ki jottali moo wax. (,,,)
jëkkee: .	Kaala ci ndigg lay jóge dem ci bopp, waaye su jëkkee ci bopp, dana wàccaat ci ndigg.
jëkkër: Diggante jëkkër ak jabar, kersa gi warula bare. 'Sama jëkkër newu fa, daa dem yoon wu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 19)
jëkkëram: .	Jabar, la mu am fa kër jëkkëram, su ko doon am fa kër baayam du séyi.  .	Jabar ñatt la: 'Day defal jëkkëram lu baax, du ko lor, te di ànd ak bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 12)
jëkkëru: Defal boppam 'jëkkër' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jekki: 'jekki 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
jekkoo: 'jekkoo 'Ku ñàkk, su jekkoo ab ndóol, du ko bàyyil fepp, day mel ni waame.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 3)
jëkkoon: . Su mbàttu ndaa jëkkoon ca sàq, jeextil. (,)
jekku: Defal boppam 'jekk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jekkul: Bàyyil bésub, jekkul ci nit ku yiw. 'Waxi teggin jekkul cib dof, ay fen ci as gor waxi noppi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 7)
jekkum: 'jekkum 'Ñett a ngii, ñu jekkum ndaag, ba ci ñeent ñu jekk doxin:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 29)
jël: Baadoolo, boo ko nee kaay jël sa teraanga, mu bañ, danga koy jox toroxalam. 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
jëlal: 'jëlal 'Ku gàddul jàmbur bor, jëlal mbubbam; tayle ko, moo dige feyal jàmbur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 16)
jëlalu: Defal boppam 'jëlal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëlatuñu: Defal boppam 'jëlatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jële: . Kuy gunge boroom biir buy daw, lu la ca waaxusil fekkee. (,) . Kuy jaaru te liwul, ñaq la fay jële.
jëleesu: Defal boppam 'jëlees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëlewu: Defal boppam 'jëlew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëli: Xalu ndéef gëmm na, ne feyul.  . Xam denc, ba soxla jëli ko. 'Day mel ni gaalu jula, di jëli dundam fu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 14)
jéll: Bëtub mbëggeel, jéll nab gàkk. (,,,,) Bëtu mbëggeel jéll na ab gàkk. 'Ku yaakaar sa alal sab jéll a ngi ñëw, ku jub day juble ni gàncax gu naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 28)
jéllam: . Ku teg diw ci naaj, moo ko reyloo.  . Ku tëg sa ndënd nit ni wallisi.  . Ku tey ab jéllam, kenn du ko tawat. 'Bu ku bon féetee kaw, ag moy law, waaye kiy jëfe njekk ay fekke jéllam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 16)
jéllu: Defal boppam 'jéll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëloonub: 'jëloonub 'Soo jëloonub dof, yeb ci gënn, booleek pepp, wol, du tax ndof ga deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 22)
jëlu: Jur mu dee taxula yaradal ; jur mu né léõõ, te fajul dara ay yaradal.  .	Ka jëlu yuux, xam na lu xew.
jëm: Dëgmël lu ko gëna jege teen bi ci biir nga jëm. 'Këram day joy wuti dee, ay jaaruwaayam jëm njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 18)
jëmale: Ku ñuy yërëm doo bindlu cawli gémmiñ.  .  Ku puudar taxa rafet, boo ñaqee ñaaw.   . Ku ràcc, jëmale sa kanam, mu dëll. (,,)
jëmb: Dawug daay tàbbib jëmb. (,) Daw jëmb tàbbi daay.
jëmbat: 'jëmbat 'Day seetlu ab tool, jënd ko, sàkk ciw ñaqam, jëmbat tóokër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 16)
jëmbkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jëmb' (Someone who does...).
jëme: .	Janax yu bari duñu gas menn pax.  .	Jàng dey gindi jëme ci jëf. 'Yoon a ngii, nit defe ne jub na, te mu jëme ko ci dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 12)
jëmm: Bu bëgg-bëgg doonoon jëmm, dina bëmëx boroomam ci kàmb. (,)
jëmmalu: Defal boppam 'jëmmal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëmmam: 'jëmmam 'Mooy dundloo ku ci jàpp, di wéral jëmmam jépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 22)
jëmmkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jëmm' (Someone who does...).
jëmmu: Defal boppam 'jëmm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëmuñu: Defal boppam 'jëmuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jën: Aw doj du yàgg géej ba tax mu doon aw jën.
jënd: .	Duma bokk ak yaw jëkkër, te boo ma ca fekkee ma dem ba la ca.  .	Duma jënd jaan ci pax. 'Day seetlu ab tool, jënd ko, sàkk ciw ñaqam, jëmbat tóokër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 16)
jëndal: 'jëndal 'Jëndal dëgg te bu ko jaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 23)
jënde: Bu la mën-ngawar jayee ba nga mafñàndum saaw, boo fa jógee, loo amati jënde koog teg. (,) 'Ab dof du am xaalis, jënde xel mu rafet; bëggu ca dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 16)
jëndee: . Ku nu ne infiroo nga ne duma dëmm yaa wone sa bopp.  . Ku nuy feyyikug tëng ci ndàqum ginaar, daa weesu kës.  . Ku ñaan ñàkk, boo jëndee am. (,)
jëndkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jënd' (Someone who does...).
jéng: 'jéng 'Waa ja jekki, topp ko, mbete yëkk wu ñuy rendiji, mbaa dof bu ñu jéng, di ko yari.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 22)
jéngu: Defal boppam 'jéng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jenn: Ku dàqandoo ñaari jaar jenn ja raw la.  Kenn mënula nappandoo ñaari jaar.
jépp: 'jépp 'Mooy dundloo ku ci jàpp, di wéral jëmmam jépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 22)
jéppi: 'jéppi 'Bul yedd kuy ñaawle, da lay jéppi; yeddal ku rafet xel, mu naw la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 8)
jeqikaayu: Defal boppam 'jeqikaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jëtun: 'jëtun 'Ku bew, Aji Sax ji màbb sa kër; ab jëtun, Aji Sax ji ñoŋal pàkkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 25)
jëw: .	Jakkarloo ku ko mos xam ne jëw a dàq.  .	Jàkkay xobbat jombul ilimaani wunk. (,,) .	Jalu muus janax du ko yër. 'Xel mu ñaw, jëw bu rafet; sam xel jekkadi, ñu xeeb la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 8)
jëwam: . Ku lay mbej ngay fayyu su yaggee mu ba la.  . Ku lekk ab jëwam.
jëwkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jëw' (Someone who does...). 'Waxi jëwkat di ñam wu neex wuy seey, jàll ca biir-a-biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 8)
jëwu: Bul war loo di jëwu fas.
jib: Benn lam, du jib daal. 'Nit bége na tontam lu dal, kàddu gu jib fa mu ñoree neex!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 23)
jiba: Bëgg jiba, duma taxa gaar sama dënn. (,,) Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,) Bëgg xaritu pël du ma taxa booti sëllu.   Bëggu yàpp, bu mu la taxa lekk médd.
jibe: Bu nu demee ba ca cippaa ndaw ja, yuux dina jibe fu ñu ko foogewul.
jig: . Kerug caxat, bu ca mbooloo yendoo garab ga mu law a tax.  . Kettet buy la jig te buy daanuy toj.
jigéen: Àddina jigéen la, ju fu mu tollu, mu ngi ëmb te kenn xamul lu muy jur. 'Safool xel mu rafet, muy sab jigéen, te nga xejjoo dég-dég ni sa mbokk lenqe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 4)
jigéenu: Defal boppam 'jigéen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Xel mu rafet da lay musal ci jigéenu njaalookat, bokk feneen, di wax lu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 16)
jii: 'jii 'Yaw laa koy xamal tey jii, ndax nga wóolu Aji Sax ji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 19)
jiin: .	Géwal, su reppee cib xare, lu mu jiin xeeb ko. (,,) .	Ginaar ak i nenam yépp, boroom ginaar a moom. (,) Ginaar ak i nenam, lépp boroom a ko moom. (,)
jiiñ: Deñcin wu ñaaw moo gën jiiñ sab xarit.
jiit: Fu jàmm yendu, waay a fa xam lu mu waxul.  .	Fu la jiit màtt, mu raay-raayi.
jiital: .	Kenn du jiital kilifa, ba noppi di ko fakktal.  .	Kenn du ma jam-naani. 'Kuy jubal, jiital mat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 3)
jiite: Gumba du jiite yoon. (,,,) Gumba du jiiteew yoon. (,) Gumba du jiitew yoon. (,) Gumba du jiite aw yoon 'Booy dox mu di la jiite, nga tëdd, mu di la sàmm, nga yewwu, mu di la waxal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 22)
jiitee: 'jiitee 'Samay pexe la buur di jiitee, kilifa di ci àttee dëgg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 15)
jiiteesu: Defal boppam 'jiitees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Du ku ko yilif mbaa ku koy sas, te jiiteesu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 7)
jiitu: Defal boppam 'jiit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet nee na: "Aji Sax ji jagoo na ma ca njàlbéen, ma jiitu ca jëfam ya woon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 22)
jikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'ji' (Someone who does...).
jikko: Bokk meen, taxul bokk jikko. 'Day guddal saw fan, di rafetal sa jikko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 22)
jikkoo: . Ñaaw jikko, rafet jikkoo ko gën.  Rafet jikko moo gën jikko ju bon.
jikkook: .	Jikko ak boroom : pax. (,) Jikkook boroom pax.  Jikkook boroom ba ci pax.
jikkoom: Cin bax na, waaye du jikkoom, matt a ko ca jóo. 'Ku jub day xool ku muy xaritoolb; soxor bi, jikkoom a koy sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 26)
jikkoy: Bu raadu nee yàõõ baxaw bëgga booy, boo bëggee jot sa jikkoy baay sàccal ab jànqam. 'Jikkoy jigéenu moykat a ngii: day lekk, wommiku, te naan: "Defuma dara lu aay!"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 20)
jinigalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jinigal' (Someone who does...).
jirim: Baayo bu fattalikoo soxor.  Jirim, bu fàttalikoo, soxar. 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf, bul aakimoo suufas jirim.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 10)
jiw: . Nàkk sol mbaam taxu koo yenuy goroõ.  . Nàkk wéy na jiw.
jiwoon: Bés bu tawee, lay teg ca, lu ñu jiwoon dana sax, ku ko fekke doo né suuy.
jiwu: . Lem neex na, waaye duw jiwu. (,,)
jóg: Bukki nee na, ab reer taxumaa jóg, waaye bu ma ko fa fekkee sant. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
jógaat: 'jógaat 'Boroom njekk day daanu juróom ñaari yoon, jógaat, ab soxor sërëx ci njekkar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 16)
jógal: Baadoolo du ne moroom ma : “jógal, ma toog !”, waaye bu jóge mu toog. 'Tont lu neex day giifal, baat bu ñagas di jógal xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 1)
jógalu: Defal boppam 'jógal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jógatuñu: Defal boppam 'jógatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jóge: Baadoolo du ne moroom ma : “jógal, ma toog !”, waaye bu jóge mu toog. 'Kuy feye mbon jëf ju baax, lu bon du jóge sa kër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 13)
jógee: Bu la mën-ngawar jayee ba nga mafñàndum saaw, boo fa jógee, loo amati jënde koog teg. (,)
jógewoon: . Ku dem ba xamatoo foo jëm dangay toppaat say tànk dellu fa nga jógewoon.
jógu: Cin fuqul bënnul, yax ba ca nekkoon bëgga réer, te ka ko toggoon jógu fa.
jokku: Defal boppam 'jokk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jokkuwuñu: Defal boppam 'jokkuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jolu: 'jolu 'Aka yànj cib kaas te neexa jolu!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 31)
jom: .	Góorug “yaay may ma ñeex/wogg” amul jom.  .	Góorug wat baõ du faj gàcce. 'Faaydaak jom la làmboo, te ëllëg ubul boppam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 25)
jomb: 'jomb 'Aajo ju faju tooyal na xol, te ab dof jomb naa dëddu mbon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 19)
jomblu: Defal boppam 'jombl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jombu: Defal boppam 'jomb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jombul: .	Jakkarloo ku ko mos xam ne jëw a dàq.  .	Jàkkay xobbat jombul ilimaani wunk. (,,) .	Jalu muus janax du ko yër.
jommi: . Ku ji buuse dangaa amul kemb.  . Ku jommi jonkan.
jommu: Defal boppam 'jomm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jongama: Fullaa gën ub taar, waaye dëkk boo dem géléemug tukkal a nga fa, te fa lañ(u) koy weesu wuti jongama. 'Taaru jongama ju xel maa gàtt, mooy jaaro wurus ci noppu mbaam-xuux.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 22)
jonj: 'jonj 'Kuy woy, boroom tiisu xol di dégg, yaa futti mbubbam cib sedd, mbaa nga jonj xorom ci góomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 20)
jonjeesu: Defal boppam 'jonjees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jonkan: . Ku ji buuse dangaa amul kemb.  . Ku jommi jonkan.
jonkanu: Defal boppam 'jonkan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jonn: . Li né këtt, né jonn, te kenn du ko tudd.
joo: Alal joo gis, alaa ka fa ba.
jóo: Cin bax na, waaye du jikkoom, matt a ko ca jóo.
jooja: Jooja fajul jooja, mer mu yàgg la.
jooju: Defal boppam 'jooj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Jigéen jooju mooy bàyyi xel ci njabootam, te du nangoo yàccaaral.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 27)
joor: Àddina, ndoxum joor la ; buy taa, mu ngay õiis (,) '"Yeen mbooloo yi laay woo, doom aadama yi laay joor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 4)
joori: Joori waay bu mu la taxa sànni say sagar.  Jooru waay du ma taxa wocc samay sagar  Joori waay, bu mu tax nga sànni say sagar.
jooru: Defal boppam 'joor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jóoru: Defal boppam 'jóor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Réy, yàqule; xeebaate, jóoru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 18)
joowkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'joow' (Someone who does...).
joowu: Defal boppam 'joow' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jooy: Bët du jooy lul lu mu xam.
jooy-jooylu: Defal boppam 'jooy-jooyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jooyal: Dëjub xaalis, boroom a koy jooyal boppam.
jooyi: Jooyi gune moo gën jooyi mag.  . Lu jot Yàlla def ko. 'Ku tanqamlu jooyi ku ñàkk dina woote wall, wall ñàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 13)
jooyloo: . Lu jooyloo xaleel a gën lu jooyloo mag. (,,) Jooyu xaleel a gën yu mag.
jooytu: Defal boppam 'jooyt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jooyul: . Salaan jooyul wéet.  . Sàll laajul tenqo
jortu: Defal boppam 'jort' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
josam: 'josam 'Ku xelu denc këram ngëneeli alal aku diw, ab dof saax-saaxee josam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 20)
jot: Ak lu nar teela xéy, bu dëgg gontee, jot ko. (,,) 'Bu jotee mu denc ab dundam, mu jot, mu for lekkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 8)
jotaatuñu: Defal boppam 'jotaatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jotaguñu: Defal boppam 'jotaguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jote: Dabe jote. 'Réy-réylu jote rekk lay jur, ku dégg ndigal a xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 10)
jotee: Bala ngaa xam luw taat di jëriñ, mbate toog jotee. (,) Bala ngay xam li taat di jariñ, toog jot. (,) 'Bu jotee mu denc ab dundam, mu jot, mu for lekkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 8)
joteek: 'joteek 'Bul joteek kenn ci neen, te tooñu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 30)
joteel: 'joteel 'Ku njëkk a layoo, ñu ne yaa yey, ba keroog ka nga joteel weddi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 17)
joteesu: Defal boppam 'jotees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jotewuñu: Defal boppam 'jotewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jotkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jot' (Someone who does...).
jotkatu: Defal boppam 'jotkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jotlu: Defal boppam 'jotl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jotoo: . Looy ñut-ñuti na sàcc bu ànd ak narkat.  . Looy tendeefal, ne patt bu fori gët.  . Looy yóotu, jotoo ko.
jottali: . Ki nekk ci làng a xam fi gal-gal jekkee.  . Ki wax, waxul ; ki jottali moo wax. (,,,)
jottalikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'jottali' (Someone who does...).
jotu: .	Gawar gu di dawal fasam, mbaxanaam wadd te jotu ko for ?  .	Gaynde bëggul mbuum, yàpp lay dunde. (,,,)
jotul: Bu ñuy werante wurus ak similoor, booba taylee jotul.
jotuñu: Defal boppam 'jotuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jox: Àddina potu ndaa la, ku naan jox sa moroom mu naan. (,,,) 'Bul ne say dëkk: "Demal ba beneen, ma jox la," te fekk la yor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 28)
joxe: Bu joxe doon taxa ñàkk, kon ku watu doo sëq. 'Waaye bu feeñee, fey boroom juróom ñaari yoon, joxe alalu këram yépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 31)
joxee: . Ku di loo bëgg jaar ca, sa ngor yàqu. (,,) . Ku di loo xam wax ko, sa ngor yàqu. (,) . Ku di naan ngelaw su joxee ci soow jël.  . Ku di waliis, dafa ras i tuñam. 'Gudd fan, mu joxee ndijoor; càmmoñ ba, alal ak teraanga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 16)
joxeeka: 'joxeeka 'day yendoo xemmem, te du am; kay jëfe njekk di joxeeka joxewaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 26)
joxeesu: Defal boppam 'joxees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
joxeetuñu: Defal boppam 'joxeetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
joxewaat: 'joxewaat 'day yendoo xemmem, te du am; kay jëfe njekk di joxeeka joxewaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 26)
joxleen: 'joxleen 'Joxleen ko njukkalu ñaqam,jëfam di woyam ca pénc ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 31)
joxoñ: Joxoñ, benn baaraam ; la ca des, tàllal sa loxo la. (,) .	Jubb wu la fal, waroo koo bàyyi muy mar diw. (,) .	Juddu bu rafet doõõ sampul kër.
joxoñu: Defal boppam 'joxoñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
joxunu: Defal boppam 'joxun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
joxuñu: Defal boppam 'joxuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
joy: Bañi daaw su bëggee ren, pexeem a joy. 'Këram day joy wuti dee, ay jaaruwaayam jëm njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 18)
jub: Dëng ànd ak say mbokk a gëna jub tàggook ñoom. 'Day wattu ku jub fu mu jaare, di sàmm wóllëreem ciw yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 8)
jub-jublu: Defal boppam 'jub-jubl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jubadi: 'jubadi 'Kër ku jub, koom gu yaa; ku jubadi, alalam jur fitna.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 6)
jubal: 'jubal 'ngir yaru ci  jëfe xel ak njub ak yoon, di jubal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 3)
jubalal: 'jubalal 'Jubalal, sa jëfi njekk musal la; ab workat day bëgge, ba far keppu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 6)
jubaleek: 'jubaleek 'Ku Aji Sax ji rafetlu say jëf, say bañ sax, mu jubaleek yaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 7)
jubalu: Defal boppam 'jubal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jubb: Joxoñ, benn baaraam ; la ca des, tàllal sa loxo la. (,) .	Jubb wu la fal, waroo koo bàyyi muy mar diw. (,) .	Juddu bu rafet doõõ sampul kër.
jubbanti: .	Garab ba muy lu tuuti lees ko wara jubbanti.  .	Garab ca kaw lay fekkantee.
jubbantiku: Defal boppam 'jubbantik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jubbantilu: Defal boppam 'jubbantil' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jubbantiwu: Defal boppam 'jubbantiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jubee: 'jubee 'Su doom jubee, seral xolu baay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 24)
juble: 'juble 'Ku yaakaar sa alal sab jéll a ngi ñëw, ku jub day juble ni gàncax gu naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 28)
jubloo: 'jubloo 'Saraxu nit ku bon ñaawtéef la, rawatina bu ci jubloo lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 27)
jubloowu: Defal boppam 'jubloow' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jublu: Defal boppam 'jubl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Alalu ger njiglaay la ca ka koy joxe, ba fu mu jublu, mu nooy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 8)
jubluwuñu: Defal boppam 'jubluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
juboo: . Magum téeméeri at ak ndawul téeméeri teen su ñu waxtaanee juboo.  . Malaaka mu ne, am na mallarci.
jubook: 'jubook 'Jubook mbokk moo tooñ, jéggi tataa ko gëna yomb, mbaa ubbi bunt yu tëje ràpp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 19)
juboowunu: Defal boppam 'juboowun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
juboowuñu: Defal boppam 'juboowuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
juddoo: Bu liir juddoo sex weenu ndeyam, am na lu mu ci jublu : dund.
juddooguñu: Defal boppam 'juddooguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
juddoom: .  Ku xeeb juddoom wàññi darajaam. (,) . Ku xeeb laaxi ndékki bu ko def ci noppam.
juddu: Defal boppam 'judd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jukki: . Ku jaqe foo jublu, moy sa yoonu kër. (,) . Ku jëkka jukki, ba ca.
jula: 'jula 'Day mel ni gaalu jula, di jëli dundam fu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 14)
julaa: Bàkkanu julaa ngi ci làmmiñu penkat.
jullootu: Defal boppam 'julloot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jum: 'jum '18-19 Nit kuy naxe, naan: "Damay fo!" yaay dof buy sànniy jum, di fitteeka reye.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 17)
jumbaxu: Defal boppam 'jumbax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jumtukaayu: Defal boppam 'jumtukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jur: Àddina jigéen la, ju fu mu tollu, mu ngi ëmb te kenn xamul lu muy jur. 'Kàddug boroom njekk day jur xel mu rafet, ku wax njekkar ñu tëj sa gémmiñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 31)
juram: 'juram 'Mu rendi ag juram, njafaan ay biiñam, xelli, taaj ay ndabam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 2)
juree: Bu ñey juree, meew baawaan. 'Boo juree ku rafet xel, am nga bànneex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 24)
juróom: . Ku jaay juróom-ñaari màggat wara xam lu sa maam di jar.  Ku jaay màggat war ngaa xam looy jaaye sa maam. 'Juróom benn a ngii yu Aji Sax ji bañ, ba ci juróom ñaar yu mu seexlu:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 16)
juróomeelu: Defal boppam 'juróomeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
jurul: Bëre bëy duma taxa ngénte doom ju ma jurul.
jurunu: Defal boppam 'jurun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
juug: . Yaay moom day juug, yére yi bu mu jot sol.  . Yaay sarwet, doo daanu.
juum: . Ku tagg sa bopp, doo juum.
juunu: Defal boppam 'juun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
juutikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'juuti' (Someone who does...).
juy: 'juy 'Wax ju yiw di lem juy xelli, neexa ñam, di jàmmi yaram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 24)
kaa: Ceddo magul pël da kaa jëkka juddu rekk.
kaabaab: Pesum gémmiñ, boroom a koy fajal boppam.  Pesum kaabaab boroom a koy fajal boppam.
kaala: .	Kaala ci ndigg lay jóge dem ci bopp, waaye su jëkkee ci bopp, dana wàccaat ci ndigg. 'Kaala gu jekk la ci bopp, di gànjar ci baat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 9)
kaalawu: Defal boppam 'kaalaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kaani: Dëgg, kaani la, ku ñu ko xëpp nga toxoñu. (,,,,) Dëgg kaani la, koo ko tuuf mu toxoñu.
kaaŋu: Defal boppam 'kaaŋ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kaaraange: 'kaaraange 'Ragal Aji Sax ji kaaraange gu wér la ci nit, di rawtu ciy doomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 26)
kaaru: Defal boppam 'kaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kaas: Bul mere li ci kaas bi, mereel ki ko xelli. 'Aka yànj cib kaas te neexa jolu!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 31)
kaasu: Defal boppam 'kaas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kaay: Baadoolo, boo ko nee kaay jël sa teraanga, mu bañ, danga koy jox toroxalam. '"Kaay, ma may la, nga lekk, xellil la biiñ bi ma njafaan, nga naan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 5)
kaayu: Defal boppam 'kaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kàdd: .	Kar-kar ay doon kàdd ; lëppaa-lëpp ay mujje dewnde.  .	Kar-kar ay mujj doon kàdd. (,,)
kàddoo: 'kàddoo 'Ay kàddoo ngii yu ànd ak lim' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 14)
kàddoom: 'kàddoom 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
kàddu: Defal boppam 'kàdd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kàddu yu xelu yu Suleymaan buurub Israayil, di doomu Daawuda.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 1)
kàddug: 'kàddug 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
kàdduy: 'kàdduy 'Dàqal wor, mu sore la; kàdduy naxe, na la dànd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 24)
kaf: Gayndeg waay, xarum waay.  . Xasu kaf, bañ na sikkas boroom. (,) . Xawala wax, ma xawa xam.
kàggu: Defal boppam 'kàgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kàkkatar: .	Fëfëlaan du jël wërsëgu kàkkatar.  .	Fegoo gën faju. (,,,)
kàmb: Bu bëgg-bëgg doonoon jëmm, dina bëmëx boroomam ci kàmb. (,)
kàmbu: Defal boppam 'kàmb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kan: Bu kenn dee gas, fukk di suul, kan ma dana yeexa xóot. 'Kon nga xam luy ragal Aji Sax ji, xam Yàllaa di kan;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 5)
kañ: .	Kañ la fi soowum ginaar ba, ñuy sunjuñi cuuj ?  Kañ la soowum ginaar ba ñuy õalaab i cuuj ?
kañaan: .	Kañaan du tee béjjén a daan.
kanam: Àddinaa ngi ci sunu kanam. 'Xooleel, sa bët ne jàkk, ngay xool sa kanam màkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 25)
kanamam: . Koo yaakaar, Yàlla la yaakaar. (,,,) . Kóoni du rot ci kanamam. 'man, Xel mu Rafet, maa doon ku xareñ ci wetam, di ko bànneexal bés bu ne, tey bànneexu fi kanamam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 30)
kanamu: Defal boppam 'kanam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kàngam: 'kàngam 'Ci samay pexe la njiit di saytoo, ñook kàngam yeek ñiy àtte dëgg ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 16)
kàngamu: Defal boppam 'kàngam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kar: .	Kar-kar ay doon kàdd ; lëppaa-lëpp ay mujje dewnde.  .	Kar-kar ay mujj doon kàdd. (,,)
kasaray: . Yëf yi bëréb, bukkeek mbaam la.  . Yëf yi kasaray lem gu mbaam naan la.  . Yëg ay jiitu yëgle.
kaslu: Defal boppam 'kasl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kaso: .	Kàkkatar, garab gu mu yéeg daadi koy muru. (,) .	Kàkkatar lu mu yéex yéex, wërsëgam lay dunde.  .	Kanam du kaso, waaye koo ca tëj mu xam ko. (,) .	Kàngamloo ma gënal ku ma dàq yóbbuma nduluñ.
kat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk '' (Someone who does...). 'Ñii kat seen bopp lañuy fiir, seen bakkanu bopp lañu sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 18)
kat-kat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'kat-' (Someone who does...).
katam: 'katam 'Ndaw sa ne ko katam, fóon, ne wajj, ne ko:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 13)
kàttan: Bët kàttan. 'damanh, barewul kàttan, te day dëkk ciy doj;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 26)
kàttanu: Defal boppam 'kàttan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kaw: .	Garab ba muy lu tuuti lees ko wara jubbanti.  .	Garab ca kaw lay fekkantee. 'ak ba muy teg niir ya fa kaw, ak ba muy dooleel ndoxi xóotey géej,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 28)
kawar: Cin du am kawar ndege safara.
kawari: 'kawari 'Day wut kawari gàtt aki wëñ, di ca liggéeye mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 13)
kawaru: Defal boppam 'kawar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kawas: . Toxal dëkk a gëna yomb toxal jikko.  . Tubaab ba ca géej xajam ak wundam.  .  Tubaab Jaxate : dàll saõ kawas !  . Tubay i paate kepp ci bolle.
kawe: 'kawe 'Ma nga taxaw ca selebe yoon ya, fu gëna kawe ca yoon wa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 2)
kawee: 'kawee 'Xel mu Rafet yónni ay janqam, di wootee fu kawee kawe ca dëkk ba,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 3)
kawewaayu: Defal boppam 'kawewaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kawi: 'kawi 'yoonu jaxaay ci asamaan, yoonu jaan ci kawi doj, yoonu gaal ci diggu géej, yoon wi góor di jaar as ndaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 19)
kay: .	Jasig su fàddee kay taxan, kay sangu ca dex ga matula wax.  .	“Jatul” matula wax soccet. 'Ab dof wutul ag dégg, li muy def kay mooy jaay ag muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 2)
kayitu: Defal boppam 'kayit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kebetu: Defal boppam 'kebet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
këcc: 'këcc 'Ab soxor bu daanoo, jeex na; ku jub, sa kër taxaw, ne këcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 7)
këccu: Defal boppam 'këcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ma ngay yor poqe ak këccu, di ëcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 19)
kéemaanu: Defal boppam 'kéemaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
keesu: Defal boppam 'kees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
këf: .	Jolonker dina këf yàpp, di yóbbu, di lekk.  .	Jom ay tukki, waaye fullaay ñibbisi.
kekk: Boo amee xaritub gunóor, bu ko tas cib kekk. 'Ab soxor, taxawaayam du yàgg; kuy jëfe njekk garab la, reen ba ne kekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 3)
kekku: Defal boppam 'kekk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
këll: .	Këll bu ne am na mberoom. (,,,,) 'Waaye loo ci góobe, gar ko, say pexe suur la këll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 31)
këllu: Defal boppam 'këll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kéméju: Defal boppam 'kéméj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kemi: 'kemi 'Mbaa mu rëdd mboolem kemi àddina?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 4)
kemoom: 'kemoom 'ak ba muy sàkkal géej kemoom, ba du jàll fa mu wax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 29)
kemtalaayu: Defal boppam 'kemtalaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
keneen: Bu la sa xaj bawul, xaju keneen bawlë. 'Kon nga ñàkk daraja, keneen jagoo; ku néeg bóom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 9)
kenn: Àddina jigéen la, ju fu mu tollu, mu ngi ëmb te kenn xamul lu muy jur. 'Bul joteek kenn ci neen, te tooñu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 30)
kenoom: 'kenoom 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet daa tabax këram, yatt juróom ñaari kenoom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 1)
képp: . Yàlla rëbb na képp kuy yee fitna.  . Yàlla rekk moo moom baax. 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
këpp: Ku ni tisoo sa yuur ne këpp, ku ne la dinga gudd fan, nga weddi ko.  . Kuy wàlliyàan, sa kër a tëggul.
keppaaru: Defal boppam 'keppaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
keppaarug: . Keppaarug ngunu jombul séq. (,,) . Ker, kenn du ca mbaar. (,)
këppoo: 'këppoo 'Ku bon këppoo ayu ku baax, workat gàddu musibam kuy jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 18)
keppu: Defal boppam 'kepp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'saw làmmiñ yeb la cim pax, nga keppu?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 2)
këppu: Defal boppam 'këpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ker: Béntéñe doõõ du ker, waaye moom lañu taamu.
kër: Àddina du kër, xaarukaayu dee la. 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
kër-këri: .  Kër, ñaari wax a koy tas : “su doon man” ak “su ma doon yow”.   . Kër waay, ku ca dikk ak dagaan, yaa tooñ ; boroom da di kër-këri bay am
kër-këru: Defal boppam 'kër-kër' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kera: 'kera 'Ku bon du nelaw te lorewul, du dajjant ba kera muy téqe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 16)
keral: Lu la sutul manu laa keral. (,) . Lu la tiim weesu na la.
këram: Aawo buuru këram. 'Këram day joy wuti dee, ay jaaruwaayam jëm njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 18)
këri: .  Kër, ñaari wax a koy tas : “su doon man” ak “su ma doon yow”.   . Kër waay, ku ca dikk ak dagaan, yaa tooñ ; boroom da di kër-këri bay am 'Barkeb Aji Sax jeey maye alal, kër-këri taxula barele.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 22)
këriñ: Juddu, ku koy tëgglu sa këriñ dana jeex. 'Këriñ defi xal, matt xambub taal, ab xulookat di xambu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 21)
keroog: Aaye na, aayeetul keroog. '"Keroog nga woo ma wall, duma wuyu, nga seet ma, seet, doo ma gis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 28)
kersa: Diggante jëkkër ak jabar, kersa gi warula bare. 'Tontu te déggagoo, ndof la, ak ñàkk kersa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 13)
kerug: . Kerug caxat, bu ca mbooloo yendoo garab ga mu law a tax.  . Kettet buy la jig te buy daanuy toj.
kërug: 'kërug 'Feppu dugub wu ànd ak dal moo gën lu ne gàññ kërug ayoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 1)
këruus: 'këruus 'Yoonu ku bon ne këruus, du xam lu muy téqtaloo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 19)
kéwél: . Kéwél bu dul foog du locci. 'Dawal ni kéwél gu rëccub rëbb, ne fërr ni picc mu raw ab fiirkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
kii: Jëkka laye di tax nga ey.  .	Jël bu kii suule bu ki.
kiiraayu: Defal boppam 'kiiraay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kilifa: Daw jiitu taxula moom yoon.  Daw jiitu du may kilifa. (,) 'Samay pexe la buur di jiitee, kilifa di ci àttee dëgg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 15)
kilifteefu: Defal boppam 'kilifteef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kiñaan: . Kiñaan fanqul muur, Yàllaay maye. (,) Añaan fankul muur Yàlla moo la may.
kiy: Deel teggi sa loxo bi ci taati kiy dem. 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
kkatu: Defal boppam 'kkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kob: ak golo gi dëkk Ndakaaroo yem, Goo ci bett dóor kob yar, 'Ku deful dara, feyloo kob daan, dug njub; dóor as gor du yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 26)
koddaay: 'koddaay 'say xar da lay amal koddaay, bëy yi génneel la njëgu tool.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 26)
kókkalee: 'kókkalee 'Rafet xel, jariñu, kuy kókkalee, wéetook sa añ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 12)
kókkalikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'kókkali' (Someone who does...).
kol: Boroom kol gu weex, day moytu boroom xàndi tiir.
koll: Déggadi ñett la jur : buum ci baat ; — xeej ci koll ; — ak gis ku ne : « Ki diw ma woon am ? »
kóllëre: . Kokkateey lekk mburum gune. (,) . Kolkolaat yëgul ne yamb baax na. (,) . Kóllëre gannaaw lay féete. (,) 'Ñu baree ngi naa: "Gore naa," waaye kuy boroom kóllëre dëgg?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 6)
kóllëreem: 'kóllëreem 'Day dëddu wóllëreem, ba muy ndaw, fàtte *kóllëreem ak Yàllaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 17)
kon: Bay ci sa toolu sëriñ bu doon maye barke kon seeni doom a cay jiitu. 'Ma ne, kon ma xellil la samam xel, xamal la samay kàddu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 23)
koo: Àddina yagadeete la, koo ca gis ngaa ndëndam, mu ko tëggal ; noppam ne ko : yàggleel. 'Am koo gën am xaalis, te njariñ laa raw wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 14)
koog: Bu la mën-ngawar jayee ba nga mafñàndum saaw, boo fa jógee, loo amati jënde koog teg. (,)
kook: Beref ku ko mayul diw, bàyyi kook diw sa ka yàlla jox.  Ku mayul berefus ndiw, bàyyi kookus ndiwam.
kooka: 'kooka 'Waaye kooka du xam ne waa njaniiw a nga fa, te ku wuyuji, tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 18)
kookoo: 'kookoo 'Melokaan wu jekk day naxe, taar day wéy, waaye jigéen ju ragal Aji Sax ji, kookoo jara gërëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 30)
kooku: Defal boppam 'kook' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kooku ab dof a ko gën demin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 12)
kóolute: 'kóolute 'Bul fexeel dëkkandoo bu dëkk ak yaw ci kóolute.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 29)
koom: 'koom 'Ab yaafus bu rëbbee, sooy; cawarte koom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 27)
koomu: Defal boppam 'koom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kóomu: Defal boppam 'kóom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
koon: Bu dul woon tubéy, julli ñaaw. (,,,) Su dul koon jat, julli aay. (,)
koor: Àddina weeru koor la ; feek jant sowul, juubu du wees. (,) Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) Koor gu jant sowagul, juubu weesoogu ca.
kóosu: Defal boppam 'kóos' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kooy: .	“Gëmmal” matula wax gumba, fekkoon na kooy patamtiku.  Gëmmal, matula wax gumba. (,,)
kow: .	Doxatu géléem, kow la jëm.  .	Doxkat, bu yóbbuwul, indi.
koy: Àddina du cere, waaye dañu koy laalo. (,,,,,,,,) Àddina du cere waaye lu mata laalo la. 'Du ku ko yilif mbaa ku koy sas, te jiiteesu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 7)
kubeeru: Defal boppam 'kubeer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kubéeru: Defal boppam 'kubéer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kuddu: Defal boppam 'kudd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kukk: Bëñ bu weex tàll, te deret ju ñuul kukk lal ko.  Bëñ de na ree, wandey deret anga ca suufam.  Bëñ weex na, nde deret a ko ronu.
kum: . Soow um pël kum taxa tuur sam soow loonku nga.  . Sopp buur aayul, wànte buur sopp laa ko gën. (,)
kuréel: .  Lu cuuj tuut-tuut gàddu njëlam.  .  Lu daay tàkk-tàkk bàyyi fa kuréel. (,)
kuréelu: Defal boppam 'kuréel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kuti: . Ku say tuñ dagg doo mën : “wópplëw !”  . Ku sëlmuwul, doo sëlëm i kuti.
kutt: . Kur man jaawara mbott mu ñu wolet.  . Kutt mbëtt, we wu damm xaj na ca. (,) . Kuuy dawul ; dafa wuti doole.
kuutaayu: Defal boppam 'kuutaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kuutlaay: . Ndey dàllu géléem la amul kuutlaay.
kuuy: Ba béjjéni kuuy di lëõaaru, mag ñaa nga fa woon, te mënu ñu ca woon dara.
kuuyu: Defal boppam 'kuuy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
kuy: Kuy mbaam mbaam lu, ma lawbe lawbe lu. 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
laa: Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa rey. (,,,,) Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa gaañ. (,,) Bala ngay xam, xamadi rey la. 'Am koo gën am xaalis, te njariñ laa raw wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 14)
laab: Bañuma ku ma tarka, waaye kenn du ma laab. 'Xiir, aw fas; laab, mbaam; yetu gannaaw, ab dof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 3)
laabiir: Boo bëggee xam luy laabiir, amal doom. (,,,,,)
laaf: 'laaf 'Ndax xef ak xippi mu wéy, mel ni lu saxi laaf, ne fëyy, naaw ni jaxaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 5)
laafu: Defal boppam 'laaf' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
laago: Bu la taar bi taxa bew, ndax laago du wees. (,,)
laaj: Dafa mel ni yaa ngi laaj mbott geenam.  Laaj mbottu gennam...
laajal: Cokkeer a dim limb, ku weddi laajal baag.
laaji: 'laaji 'Kuy ñaawle bëggul ku ko artu, te du laaji ku rafet xel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 12)
laajte: . Ku doon laajte Faali, Ngooy a ngi.  . Ku doon may sa bopp doo ñàkk.
laaju: Defal boppam 'laaj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
laajul: .	Gaawo, bu nare neex ca àjjuma ja lañ koy xam.  .	Gàcce ak xamadi, laajul a ko indi. (,)
laajuñu: Defal boppam 'laajuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
laak: Àddinaa neex ba ku dee, ñu bàyyi laak say gëñ.
laal: Bu la asamaan jegee, fexeel ba laal ko.
laalee: Béjjénu nag jégeñe na lool, waaye bu ñu laalee du sagos boroom. (,)
laalu: Defal boppam 'laal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
laalul: . Sàkketu boõ-boõ, xer ba ko téyé di suukar, kenn du ko dénk ab dongo.  . Salaan gaaw naa jooy, waaye ku ko laalul du jooy.
laat: . Su nga duggee ci néeg yuux, génn yuux, doo xam ñaata laat a ca nekk. (,)
laata: Ba nga séenee ron, ron a la jëkka séen. (,,,) Ba nga laata séen ron, ron a la njëkka séen. 'laata Yàllaa sàkk suuf aki àllam ak feppu pënd ci àddina.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 26)
laay: 'laay '"Yeen mbooloo yi laay woo, doom aadama yi laay joor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 4)
lab: . Ku dem mbaar um Macaam Macaam teg lab tànk.  . Ku demul àllarbay sëriñ bi dem dibéeri Firawna.
làbbali: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko.
làccu: Defal boppam 'làcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf te say maam tegoon ko fa démb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 28)
lafañ: .	Golo xàmmeewul xaj bu gumbaak bu lafañ. 'Kàddu gu xelu ci gémmiñug dof, mooy tànki lafañ, amalu ko njariñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 7)
lag: 'lag 'Ab dof sax bu noppee, nirook boroom xel; ku ne cell, ñu fooge lag muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 28)
lajj: 'lajj 'Rëddul yoonu dund, daa lajj, te xamu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 6)
lakk: .	Garabug Saalum, balaa am njariñ ñu lakk taat wa. 'Te ku ne sawara cas, tafoo, lakk say yére.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 27)
làkk: .	Fàkk taal dëju ca ku ca ragalul yàlla it war caa ragal taat wu làkk.  .	Falleen bët, folli nopp. (,)
lakkee: Darnde, bu lakkee, boroom yëg ko.
lakkkatu: Defal boppam 'lakkkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lakku: Defal boppam 'lakk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
làkku: Defal boppam 'làkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lal: Bëñ weex na, waaye deret a ko lal. (,,,) 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
lalam: Boroom lal a xam i màttam. (,,,) Tëddji lal, moo xam ay màttam. (,) Boroom lal a xam màttu lalam.
lale: 'lale 'Aji Sax ji xel mu rafet la sose suuf, lale asamaan ag dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 19)
laltu: Defal boppam 'lalt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lalu: .	Gonee may dëkk, waaye mag a may daan !  .	Gonee nga daan sakkane ca lalu ndeyam.  .	Goneey doon mag.
lamb: . Ku lamb, yaa tey ; daagu : fa ñu la nobe (,,) . Ku làqu ci ku ñu rus dinga raw.
làmb: Bu la yàppu bopp umpee, làmbal sam kaaõ.  Ku sa yàppu bopp réer dangay làmb sam kaaõ.
làmbatu: Defal boppam 'làmbat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
làmboo: Buur warula làmboo nekk njiitu réew ba noppi, gëna bëgg nit ñi koppar yeek xéewal yi. 'Faaydaak jom la làmboo, te ëllëg ubul boppam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 25)
làmmiñ: Bëñ ak làmmiñ a dëkk, waaye danuy daje. 'Lu mel ni lem la jigéenu njaalookat di wax, làmmiñ wa ni diw gu ñu lay raay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 3)
làmmiñam: 'làmmiñam 'Da lay aar ci ndaw su bon ak jabaru jàmbur ak làmmiñam wu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 24)
làmmiñu: Defal boppam 'làmmiñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Làmmiñu waxkat, jam-jami jaasi; kàddu gu xelu, garab la ci.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 18)
làmp: Bukki am na gillint, tey àll bi leer.  Bukki am na taal àll, bi leer na.  Su bukki amee làmp, àll bi leer. 'Xelum nit làmp la bu Aji Sax ji taal, da koy niital ba ca biir xolam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 27)
làmpam: 'làmpam 'Day gis njartel liggéeyam, te làmpam du fey guddi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 18)
làmpu: Defal boppam 'làmp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lamsal: 'lamsal 'Bu ko xemmeme taaram, bumu la fiir aki lamsal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 25)
lanc: .  Sàqami nga samab lanc. (,,,) . Saraxatul gumba doy na koy duma.  . Saw mënul raxas sobe.
lancub: 'lancub 'Njublaŋ, lekk, jëkke neex, mujj mel ni lancub suuf.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 17)
lang: . Tuñum géléem lang na, waaye rotul. (,,,,) . Tuurule barca, for barca jafe na. 'Ngoonug suuf la, jant biy lang, muy lëndëm di gëna guddi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 9)
làng: . Ki nekk ci làng a xam fi gal-gal jekkee.  . Ki wax, waxul ; ki jottali moo wax. (,,,)
langaamu: Defal boppam 'langaam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
làngu: Defal boppam 'làng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lànkal: 'lànkal 'Doom, bàkkaarkat bu la xiirtal, lànkal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 10)
lañu: Béntéñe doõõ du ker, waaye moom lañu taamu. 'Ñii kat seen bopp lañuy fiir, seen bakkanu bopp lañu sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 18)
lanuy: . Si gitax lanuy jàpp ba amu yat.  . Siis, ji rafetu ndugg a ko gën.  . Siiw, du jàmmi boroom.
lañuy: Garab ci kaw lañuy fekkantee  .	Garab du meññ lu dul la ñu ca gajj. 'Ñii kat seen bopp lañuy fiir, seen bakkanu bopp lañu sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 18)
làq: Bala kenn mëna làq ñeme li lay dàq. 'Jub, barkeelu; ku soxor, wax ja làq fitna.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 6)
làqal: 'làqal 'Piiseek làq-làqal, sabab njàqare; ab dof wax a wax, ba loru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 10)
làqoo: 'làqoo 'Ab noon làqoo na ay waxam, lal pexey wor ca xolam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 24)
làqtu: Defal boppam 'làqt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
làqu: . Ku lakk sab jëmb, foo làqu të la. 'Sàkkul xel mu rafet ni xaalis, wut ko ni alal ju làqu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 4)
làquji: 'làquji 'Bu kuy jëfe njekk amee ndam, mbégte mu réy la; ab soxor falu, ñépp làquji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 12)
làquñu: Defal boppam 'làquñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
làquwuñu: Defal boppam 'làquwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
law: .	Gone, lawtanu yomb la; boo walbatiwul mu law fu la neexul. (,,,,) .	Gone, lu luppub ndeyam lax-lax, ca lay wuufu. (,,,) 'Kuy ñaawle, moo lay ñaawal, ku toroxlu, mu may law yiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 34)
lawiiru: Defal boppam 'lawiir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lawoon: Ku déggi Lawbe neexa jangali pël.  . Lawoon wonni na.
lax: .	Garab su daanoo xob ya lax.
laxas: . Laxas nga jaan, ci sa njaay.
laxasaayu: Defal boppam 'laxasaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
laxaseesu: Defal boppam 'laxasees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
laxasu: Defal boppam 'laxas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lay: Àddina njoowaanu golo la, garab gu nekk lay wékku. (,) 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
laye: .	Jëkka fecc taxula mujjeb géew. (,,,,) .	Jëkk cim pax, sab geen nekk ci biti. (,,,) .	Jëkka laye taxula ey. (,,)
layoo: 'layoo 'Ku njëkk a layoo, ñu ne yaa yey, ba keroog ka nga joteel weddi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 17)
layooji: . Kuy laax géej, sa sanqal dana yàqu, te sab laax tooy. (,,,,) . Kuy layooji fàtte saw làmmiñ. 'bul gaawa layooji, ana nooy def ëllëg, bu ñu la yeyee?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 8)
layookat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'layoo' (Someone who does...).
layookub: 'layookub 'Boroom xel, buy layookub dof, bu mereek buy ree, jàmm du am.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 9)
leb: Bés boo gis, day leb walla muy fey. (,) 'Ku am ay yilif ku ñàkk, koo leb di surgaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 7)
lebal: . Leb yomm-yomm, fey dënit-denit.  . Lebal nga jaboot tojal i guddi. 'Ku baaxe ku ñàkk, lebal nga Aji Sax ji, te moo lay yool.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 17)
lebkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'leb' (Someone who does...).
leble: . Ku ñu fey sa bor nga mer, la nga leble rafetul. 'Kiy leble di tege, ba barele, kay yéwéne néew-ji-doole lay dencal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 8)
leblekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'leble' (Someone who does...).
lee: . Ñag, dabas baax na ca lee-léeg.  . Ñàkk kilifa baayam amul fulla
léeb: . Lakk a gëna gaaw togg boo ca bëggul ñeex.  . Lakk goo gis la fa gëna diis a fay lakk.  . Làkk ma, mbaa nga léeb ma ! 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
léebu: Defal boppam 'léeb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
léegi: “Am léegi” a gën “daa am ci kanam”.
leel: 'leel 'caaxaan aki fen, yal na ma sore, néewleek barele, bu ma ci may lenn, leel ma lu ma doy;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 8)
leen: Amuloo salaamaalekum, amuloo fanaan leen jàmm. 'Maa ngi leen di jàngal lu baax, buleen fàtte sama njàngale.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 2)
leena: Ku bëgga dee, ak ku bëgga toxu, kenn mënu leena dëkkal.  . Kuy bëre yaay daanu. (,,,,,)
leenu: Defal boppam 'leen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
leer: Bataaxal boo bëggee mu leer doo ko binde bale. 'Yoonu ku jub day leer, ba ne ràññ ni bëccëg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 18)
leeraayu: Defal boppam 'leeraay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
leeralal: 'leeralal 'Santaane da lay niital, ndigal leeralal la, artookub yar di yoonu dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 23)
leeralalu: Defal boppam 'leeralal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
leerlu: Defal boppam 'leerl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
leeru: Defal boppam 'leer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lees: .	Garab ba muy lu tuuti lees ko wara jubbanti.  .	Garab ca kaw lay fekkantee.
leewaayu: Defal boppam 'leewaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku ñàkk a ngi leewaayu, boroom alal di ko jànni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 23)
leewu: Defal boppam 'leew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lëf: Boo gisee lëf lëf a tax, boo gisee yàpp, rab a dee.
légét: . Lëg mën naa daw, waaye àttanul teg. (,,,,,,) . Légét, bu wunnee, dana raw fa woon.
légétub: . Yaayu jàmbaar amul doom. (,) . Yàgg ay wone légétub taat. (,,,) . Yàgg bawul dara. (,,,)
lëjalu: Defal boppam 'lëjal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
leket: .	Kenn bëggul ku la sut ba mu des sa doom ja nga jur.  .	Kenn ci ñoom warul féete sa moroom gannaaw.  .	Kenn du boole say nen yépp ci genn leket.
lekk: Àddiya ak moyaal, loo ci lekk, boo géexee, mu rees. 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
lekkaat: 'lekkaat 'Dof day def jëfi dof, dellu ca, mooy xaj, bu waccoo, lekkaat ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 11)
lekkal: . Lekkal lu la neex, waaye solal lu neex nit ña. (,) . Lëkkale ay fen taxula am dëgg. (,) 'Ma ngay xool la ngay lekk, nu mu tollu, naan la: "Lekkal, naanal!" Te xol ba àndu ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 7)
lëkkale: . Lekkal lu la neex, waaye solal lu neex nit ña. (,) . Lëkkale ay fen taxula am dëgg. (,)
lekkam: 'lekkam 'Bu jotee mu denc ab dundam, mu jot, mu for lekkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 8)
lekke: 'lekke 'Soo bokkeek kilifa ndab, xamal bu baax ni ngay lekke.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 1)
lekkee: Boo lekkee ci ndab, ubal ba mu jekk, teraanga la.
lekkewu: Defal boppam 'lekkew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lekkoo: . Lekkuloo diw, sa gémmiñ niin.  Lekkoo, sa gémmiñ niin.
lekku: Defal boppam 'lekk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lekkul: Bul mere ka la yakkal ci gaalu xaj, boo ca lekkul mu jar ko.
lekkunu: Defal boppam 'lekkun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lekkuñu: Defal boppam 'lekkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lël: . Nxarit ba laa dëër nu takk ko ciw naaj.  . Ña bokk lël, def ñu di ànd ba moos.
lem: Buleen sonnal béer, njaw du mel na lem. 'Lu mel ni lem la jigéenu njaalookat di wax, làmmiñ wa ni diw gu ñu lay raay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 3)
lëmësu: Defal boppam 'lëmës' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lëmm: 'lëmm 'Dogu mburu fey nab gànc; waaye jabaru jàmbur, bakkanu lëmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 26)
lëndëm: . Màggatum guddi, ku ko gisul mu gis boppam.  Magum lëndëm ku ko gisul it, mu gis boppam.  Magum lëndëm, ku ko dajatul, mu daj boppam. 'mucc ci kuy wacc yoonu njub, di jaare mbedd yu lëndëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 13)
lëndëmtu: Defal boppam 'lëndëmt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lëndëmu: Defal boppam 'lëndëm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku saaga sa ndey mbaa sa baay añe lëndëmu bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 20)
lëndu: Defal boppam 'lënd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
leneen: Gumba am na beneen liggéey bu dul nas i pusó. (,) Gumba tal na beneen liggéey bu dul nasi pusó.  Gumba tal na leneen lu dul nas i puso.
lëngoo: . Lëngoo dafa neex, waaye koo bàyyi mu demal boppam. (,,) Lëngoo dafa neex rekk, waaye koo bàyyi mu dem ak boppam. (,)
lëngook: 'lëngook 'Bul lëngook kuy fippu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 21)
lëngookub: 'lëngookub 'Àndal ak ku xelu, sam xel rafet; ku lëngookub dof, loru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 20)
lenn: Dërëm ak jabar aku jaal laa yemale (: lenn laa ci yorul.) 'Ku am ak ku ñàkk a bokk lenn: Aji Sax jee leen boole sàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 2)
lennu: Defal boppam 'lenn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lenqe: 'lenqe 'Safool xel mu rafet, muy sab jigéen, te nga xejjoo dég-dég ni sa mbokk lenqe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 4)
lépp: Dina màtt ak du màtt lépp, bul jox sa loxo. (,) Dey màtteek du màtte, bul jox sa loxo 'Lépp a dëggu ci ku amug dégg, te jub ci ku for xam-xam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 9)
léppi: 'léppi 'Nanga wóoloo Aji Sax ji sa léppi xol, te bul wéeru ci saw déggin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 5)
lëppu: Defal boppam 'lëpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
leqaliku: Defal boppam 'leqalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lerxatu: Defal boppam 'lerxat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
létt: Danga ma létt, mbaa nga laõ ma.
lew: . Li gëna jafe ci àddina mooy am alal ju ne gàññ, lew domm.  . Li jig mbëtt jigul bar.
lewal: 'lewal 'Woyof, ànd ak ku néewle moo gën séddook ku bew la mu lewal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 19)
lewul: 'lewul 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
liccin: .  Li ngay dàq mu jëm àll, dàq ko mu jëm kër.  . Liccin, li mu yabe ginaar ca ba ñuy gone lawoon.
liggéey: Baadoolo bu bañee liggéey, bañeek mbokkam. (,) 'Ku bëgg lu neex, liggéey; ku bëgga faj sab xiif, njaxlaf.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 26)
liggéeyal: . Liggéeyal àddina ja mu mel ni dootoo dee, liggéeyal allaaxira ja mu mel ni suba ngay dee. 'Seetlul ku man liggéeyam, buur lay liggéeyal, du liggéeyal baadoolo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 29)
liggéeyaluñu: Defal boppam 'liggéeyaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
liggéeyam: 'liggéeyam 'Seetlul ku man liggéeyam, buur lay liggéeyal, du liggéeyal baadoolo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 29)
liggéeye: 'liggéeye 'Day wut kawari gàtt aki wëñ, di ca liggéeye mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 13)
liggéeykat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'liggéey' (Someone who does...).
liggéeykatu: Defal boppam 'liggéeykat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
liggéeyloo: 'liggéeyloo 'Njaatige luy liggéeyloo ab dof ak kuy romb, daa mel ni fittkat buy gaañ ku ne.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 10)
liggéeyu: Defal boppam 'liggéey' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
liggéeyub: . Liggéeyu ndey mbind mu nu yaxan la doom jaay juddu maas.  . Liggéeyub ndey; añub doom. (,,,)
liggéeyuñu: Defal boppam 'liggéeyuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lii: Bala ngaa dem lii moo neex, fàww nga jaar ci sonnoneen. 'Aji Sax ji bañ na lii' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 15)
liibaru: Defal boppam 'liibar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
liimu: Defal boppam 'liim' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
liir: Bu liir juddoo sex weenu ndeyam, am na lu mu ci jublu : dund.
liiru: Defal boppam 'liir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
liitaru: Defal boppam 'liitar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
liitu: Defal boppam 'liit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lijjanti: . Lijjanti faj na aajo, waaye defarul am réew.  . Li ñu men ci ab ànk maneesu ko ci ab loot.
lim: 'lim 'Ay kàddoo ngii yu ànd ak lim' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 14)
limaaleesu: Defal boppam 'limaalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
limaaleewuñu: Defal boppam 'limaaleewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
limaalewu: Defal boppam 'limaalew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
limaalewuñu: Defal boppam 'limaalewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
limeefu: Defal boppam 'limeef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
limlu: Defal boppam 'liml' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
limukaayu: Defal boppam 'limukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lingeer: Am réew, su fa lingeer dee fecc, ku fay woyaan doo rusa yaõas. (,,)
lingeeru: Defal boppam 'lingeer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lis: Lis man cib ànk, maneesu ko cib loot.  . Liy jaay cib ja lépp, manee su koo boole jënd.  . Liy raam, ca ñag ba la jëm. (,,,)
liy: Lis man cib ànk, maneesu ko cib loot.  . Liy jaay cib ja lépp, manee su koo boole jënd.  . Liy raam, ca ñag ba la jëm. (,,,) 'Aji Sax jeey sàmm liy dëgg, di weddi waxi fen-kat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 12)
log: . Ku lekkul yàpp du muucu yax.  . Ku log suukar, doo ko yàbbi.  . Ku ma fa dëgg, nee ma : mas sa !  . Ku ma fatt, ma toxoñu. (,)
lonk: . Man suma doonatul baay kenn du ma miraasaale.  . Man, taxas laa, ku ma lonk nga sëgg.
lonku: Defal boppam 'lonk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Lu ko moy nga mel ni moom, te kon nga lonku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 25)
loo: Àddiya ak moyaal, loo ci lekk, boo géexee, mu rees. 'Daa fekk nga baña xam, te ragal Yàlla du loo tànn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 29)
loof: 'loof 'Xibaaru jàmm, bawoo fu sore mooy ndox mu sedd ci ku loof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 25)
lool: Béjjénu nag jégeñe na lool, waaye bu ñu laalee du sagos boroom. (,) 'ngir fan wi gudd lool, nga gëna am jàmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 2)
loola: . Xolub doxandéem, soo ko xaree fekk ca ñibbi.  . Xool, bàyyi, gannaaw loola nga wokk sa pooj.  . Xool nit fa toggkat di xool ginaar.
loolu: Defal boppam 'lool' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
loos: Bu loos wu gudd doon taxa falu, kon giléem du fanaan biti.
loosu: Defal boppam 'loos' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
looy: . Ku jaay juróom-ñaari màggat wara xam lu sa maam di jar.  Ku jaay màggat war ngaa xam looy jaaye sa maam. 'Doom, ana looy xemmeme keneen, bay fowe céri jàmbur?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 20)
looyu: Defal boppam 'looy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lor: . “Maay taawu boroom kër gi”, tekki dara ci kër gee ko gën.  . Macc buy : ay lor. 'Alal day aar boroom ni ab tata, ñàkk di lor baadoolo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 15)
loraange: 'loraange 'Artu kuy ñaawle, feyoo saaga rekk, yedd ab soxor, yooloo loraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 7)
lore: 'lore 'Ab soxor day namma lore, te du yërëm moroomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 10)
loree: 'loree 'Ay sos la yéefar di loree dëkkandoom, waaye kiy jëfe njekk, xam-xam la cay mucce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 9)
lorewul: 'lorewul 'Ku bon du nelaw te lorewul, du dajjant ba kera muy téqe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 16)
lorkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'lor' (Someone who does...).
loru: 'loru 'Ku ma moy loru, ku ma bañ, daa repp."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 36)
lorunu: Defal boppam 'lorun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
loxo: Benn loxo du tàccu. (,,,,,) 'Damaa woote, nga gàntal, ma tàllal loxo, faaleesu ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 24)
loxol: . Ndimbal, na ca fekk loxol boroom. (,,,,,,,,,) 'Xolu buur walum ndox la ci loxol Aji Sax ji, fu ko soob mu jëme ko fa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 1)
loxoo: Diggante, sér la, ñaari loxoo koy wodd.
loxooka: 'loxooka 'Ngay dajjant aka for bët, di tegley loxooka jaaxaan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 10)
loxool: Loxool Kajoor-kajoor di weesaloo.  . Lu àll ay-ay taat fare gannaaw.
loxoom: .	Gone bu loxo la setee, mu mëna bokk ak mag. (,,,) Gone bu loxoom setee mu mëna bokk ak mag ña. 'Ab yaafus day yeb loxoom ci ndab, tàyyi ko yékkati, sex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 24)
loxoy: . Loxo lu nekk, biir ba muy riisoo ko tax di sonn.  . Loxoy Kajoor dañuy féewaloo. 'Yaa ngi ci sa loxoy moroom, kon defal nii, doom, ba rëcc: doxal tinuji ko, raamali ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 3)
lukaayu: Defal boppam 'lukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
lunk: 'lunk 'Yoonu ku ni mel day lunk, jaaruwaayam dëng.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 15)
lupp: Ab yeel bu ëppee ab lupp booba jàngoro rax na ca.
luppóotu: Defal boppam 'luppóot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
luppu: Defal boppam 'lupp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
luqatu: Defal boppam 'luqat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
luqi: Dëgg dina bas ay bët waaye du ko luqi. 'Kuy xeelu sa baay, di siidee déggal sa ndey, baaxoñ génne ciw xur, luqi sa bët, tan ya lekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 17)
luu: . Làmmiñ, su nee “ñam wi wex na kaani”, muccu ca.  . Làmmiñ wu ñaaw, weñ la wuy naaw, dina dal ci ku ne.  . Làmmiñu luu a gën làmmiñu fenkat.
luxuskat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'luxus' (Someone who does...).
luy: Boo bëggee xam luy muñ, amal jabar. (,,,,,) 'Doo firib caax, ba jàpp njanaaw luy xoole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 17)
maa: Bëgg naa la, maa la raw mënu koo fey. 'Maa ngi leen di jàngal lu baax, buleen fàtte sama njàngale.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 2)
maak: Bul diw suukar ci sama yaram, bàyyi maak sànqaleñ yi.
maam: “Danaa laa” reyoon sama maam ! 'Teraangay maam, sët ba; sagu doom, baay ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 6)
maamam: .	Jigéen yàgg naa xiif te nàmpul yaari weenam.  .	Jiit, jànkalaaray maamam.
maamu: Defal boppam 'maam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
maas: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg. 'Ag maas a ngi saaga baay, te wormaaluñu ndey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 11)
maasam: . Nit dina ànd ak moroomam, te du maasam. (,) . Nit du dara.
maaseek: . Maaseek nit, musu laa gën tubay, musu laa gën mbubb, mu xëy doomam a gën sa doom, dafa metti.
maasu: Defal boppam 'maas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
maay: Man maay béjjén, bi may déng mag ñaa ngi fi, dañu cee mënul dara. 'Maay Xel mu Rafet, ku ma topp gudd fan, dund, dundati.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 11)
màbb: 'màbb 'Ku bew, Aji Sax ji màbb sa kër; ab jëtun, Aji Sax ji ñoŋal pàkkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 25)
màbbu: Defal boppam 'màbb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
macc: Fullaay jaay daqaar, (mbaa “ma ñam” jeexal ko). (,) Fullaay jaay daqaar mbaa ma macc jeexal ko.  Fullaay jaay daqaar, mbaa – ma mos – jeexal ko.  Fullaay jaay keccax.
maf: . Ku maf jaay mafati jaay njëngu jaam du la réer.  . Ku màgg doon mag, di sa magum bopp.
mag: Ba béjjéni kuuy di lëõaaru, mag ñaa nga fa woon, te mënu ñu ca woon dara. 'Ku ma sopp, ma nàddil la, feesal sab denc." Xel mu Rafet a mag lépp' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 21)
màgg: Béjjénu xaaf, ba muy màgg bay wëndéelu, booba mag ñaa nga fa. 'Ki koy aar màgg na, da koy taxawu, dal ci sa kaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 11)
màggaayu: Defal boppam 'màggaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màggalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'màggal' (Someone who does...).
màggalu: Defal boppam 'màggal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màggaluñu: Defal boppam 'màggaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màggat: . Ku jaay juróom-ñaari màggat wara xam lu sa maam di jar.  Ku jaay màggat war ngaa xam looy jaaye sa maam.
màggatee: 'màggatee 'Bu sa ndey màggatee, bu ko sàggane.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 22)
màgge: .	Géléem du juddoo ci wanañ màgge fa.  .	Géléem du màgge ci ron lal.
màggee: Bu cuuj màggee, ñu bàyyi ginaar. 'Tegal gone ciw yoon; ba bu màggee, du ko wacc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 6)
màggu: Defal boppam 'màgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màggug: 'màggug 'Màggug Yàllaa ngi ci li mu làq, darajay buur a ngi ci li mu feeñal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 2)
magi: .	Guney tey ñooy dooni magi ëllëg.  .	Gunge àgg baaxu ca. 'Dees na ràññee jëkkëram ca pénc ma, fa muy toog ca magi réew ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 23)
magu: . Magu ñey, maaseek moom a ko gën.
magum: . Ku gisatul kenn, di sa magum bopp.
màkk: 'màkk 'Xooleel, sa bët ne jàkk, ngay xool sa kanam màkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 25)
màkkaanu: Defal boppam 'màkkaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
malaaka: . Magum téeméeri at ak ndawul téeméeri teen su ñu waxtaanee juboo.  . Malaaka mu ne, am na mallarci.
malaaku: Defal boppam 'malaak' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
malaan: 'malaan 'Lal naa saab lal, ba mu jekk, di malaan yu yànj, bawoo Misra.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 16)
man: Àddina ñett a ci gën, am a gën, man a gën, xam a gën. (,,) 'Kon boo sëngéemee, man it ma ree, njàqare dab la, may tex-texi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 26)
mana: Baax ak bon, loo ca mana nëbb dafa wóorul. (,,) 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
manal: 'manal 'Nit xeluwul, amulug dégg ak pexe, ba manal Aji Sax ji dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 30)
manalatu: Defal boppam 'manalat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
manalu: Defal boppam 'manal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
manatu: Defal boppam 'manat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
manatuñu: Defal boppam 'manatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màndargam: 'màndargam 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf te say maam tegoon ko fa démb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 28)
màndaxekaayu: Defal boppam 'màndaxekaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màndee: Ku nëbbu di naan, boo màndee feeñ.  Nëbbu naan, màndi feeñ. 'Daa bon, def ko lekk, di màndee coxoram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 17)
