màndi: Ku nëbbu di naan, boo màndee feeñ.  Nëbbu naan, màndi feeñ. 'Bul bokk ci ñiy lekk lu ëpp aka màndi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 20)
màndikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'màndi' (Someone who does...). 'Kàddu gu xelu ci gémmiñug dof mooy car aki dégam, màndikat xàcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 9)
màndiŋu: Defal boppam 'màndiŋ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màndiõ: .	Gam-gamle bukkeek mbaam, bu mu doon ci màndiõ.  .	Gan, dañu koy xuuf
màndiwuñu: Defal boppam 'màndiwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màndu: Defal boppam 'mànd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Màndu, fegu; dëng, weeru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 9)
mànduteem: 'mànduteem 'Coxor detteel boroom; ku jub fegoo mànduteem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 32)
manee: Lis man cib ànk, maneesu ko cib loot.  . Liy jaay cib ja lépp, manee su koo boole jënd.  . Liy raam, ca ñag ba la jëm. (,,,)
manees: Aw fas, manees na koo wommat ba cim ndox, waaye naanloo ko te marul, maneesu ko 'sindax, manees na koo ŋëb, teewul ma nga biir kër buur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 28)
maneesu: Defal boppam 'manees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Alal day aar boroom ni ab tata, mu foog ne maneesu koo bëtt.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 11)
maneesula: 'maneesula 'Bare na ku dee, moo ko rey, maneesula waññ ñi mu rey ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 26)
màngo: . Kuy aaye xobu màngo, doo ca mayeeb doom. (,) . Kuy bëgg i nelaw, boo deewee mu faju.
manin: Yuqamtiku yokk nab taxawaay, waaye ku sonn, dellu ca saw manin.
maniyu: Defal boppam 'maniy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
manoorewu: Defal boppam 'manoorew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
manu: . Kéwél du tëb, doom ja bëtt. (,,,,,,,,,) . Kéwél ga ca géej, dana manu ko jam. (,)
manunu: Defal boppam 'manun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
manuñu: Defal boppam 'manuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
màppu: Defal boppam 'màpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mar: “Dàqal mu ñów naan” marul, “dàqal ma ngay naan” a mar.
maree: 'maree 'Bu sab noon xiifee, jox ko mu lekk, bu maree, may ko mu naan,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 21)
marse: . Ku dee ca ja ba, yaa tàgge sa bopp. (,,,,,,,) Ku dee cib marse yaa tàgge sa bopp.
mas: . Ku lekkul yàpp du muucu yax.  . Ku log suukar, doo ko yàbbi.  . Ku ma fa dëgg, nee ma : mas sa !  . Ku ma fatt, ma toxoñu. (,)
mas-sawu: Defal boppam 'mas-saw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
masa: Ku def garabug guddi goo jot rocci, danga masa rocci gu am i dég.  .	Garabug kaani, doom yaa ko gëna wex. 'Mbaa mu masa ŋëb ngelaw ciy loxoom?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 4)
maseesu: Defal boppam 'masees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
masinu: Defal boppam 'masin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
maslaakat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'maslaa' (Someone who does...).
masula: Picc mu lakk bopp a gëna bëgg moroom.  . Picc mu masula naaw, su naawee firim réew. (,,)
masuma: .	Fajtekoon bejjaaw, faj bejjaaw ba ca kër ga.  .	Fakk naa laa gën a masuma laa gis.
masunu: Defal boppam 'masun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
masuñu: Defal boppam 'masuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mat: Bëgge du mat, ngor mat. 'Day dencalal ndam kiy jubal, di yiir ku mat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 7)
mat-matu: Defal boppam 'mat-mat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mata: Àddina du cere, waaye dañu koy laalo. (,,,,,,,,) Àddina du cere waaye lu mata laalo la.
matal: 'matal '"Tey matal naa la ma digoon Yàlla, yàppu bernde waa nga kër ga, *saraxu cant laa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 14)
mataluñu: Defal boppam 'mataluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
matee: Bu mbey matee faj baaraam des.
matewu: Defal boppam 'matew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
matewuñu: Defal boppam 'matewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
matt: Cin bax na, waaye du jikkoom, matt a ko ca jóo. 'Bu matt amul, ab taal fey, fu soskat amul it, xuloo jeex fa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 20)
màtt: Bu ndab xatee, gaana jooy, Xulóol du màtt saamaan, Nag du màtt 'Bu weesoo mu màtt la ni jaan, ne la càppit ni ñàngóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 32)
màtte: Dina màtte am du màtte, bul jox sa loxo.
màttu: Defal boppam 'màtt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Piise, ku nar njekkar; màttu, ku def lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 30)
matu: . Lu gune gu jigéen muus-muus buy matu woo yaay ja.
matul: .	Janax du woo loob deram bay bëtt ñag du ñeme ndono la.  .	Janax matul mbuus, te yàq mbuus.
matula: .	“Gëmmal” matula wax gumba, fekkoon na kooy patamtiku.  Gëmmal, matula wax gumba. (,,)
may: Ay wax yu bare, du may lu ñu lekk. 'Kon boo sëngéemee, man it ma ree, njàqare dab la, may tex-texi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 26)
mayatu: Defal boppam 'mayat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mayatuñu: Defal boppam 'mayatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
maye: Bay ci sa toolu sëriñ bu doon maye barke kon seeni doom a cay jiitu. 'ndax Aji Sax jeey maye xel mu rafet, kàddoom di taxa xam, di dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 6)
mayee: Bu la ngelaw mayee mbaam, ngelaw a la koy xañ. 'Li may mayee gën wurus, muy wurus wa gën, sama njariñ wees xaalis ba gën.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 19)
mayeel: . Ku la ne : “mayeel sa alal”, sa ngërëm la bëgg. (,,) . Ku la nekkal ci naaj bi, nga nekkal ko ci kër gi.  . Ku la sut, nga ne ko njool mi. (,,,)
mayeesu: Defal boppam 'mayees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mayewu: Defal boppam 'mayew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mayewul: Dàqe mayewul taalu béy bay baxaw.
mayu: . Maye bopp rocciw làmmiñ. (,,) . Mayee lu baax ci kër laa njëkkee.  . Mayu nangu baaxul.
mayul: Beref ku ko mayul diw, bàyyi kook diw sa ka yàlla jox.  Ku mayul berefus ndiw, bàyyi kookus ndiwam.
mayunu: Defal boppam 'mayun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mayuñu: Defal boppam 'mayuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mba: . Ku di dem xare, nga gànnaayu, mba doo ca faj soxla.  . Ku di foo yabu dem fa, sa ngor yàqu. (,)
mbaa: Ag mbokk, dañu koy dox, mbaa ñu wax ko. 'Bul jàdd, ndijoor mbaa càmmoñ, na sa tànk moyu lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 27)
mbaal: 'mbaal 'Jëf ju bon day fiir ka ko sàlloo, bàkkaaram di mbaal, jàpp ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 22)
mbaam: Bérab bukkeek mbaam yàgg-yàgg mbaam ay dee.  Bérab bukkeek mbaam. 'Taaru jongama ju xel maa gàtt, mooy jaaro wurus ci noppu mbaam-xuux.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 22)
mbaamu: Defal boppam 'mbaam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbaamum: . Mbaamum jaambur waññ nopp du ma ca fekk.  .  Mbaax gu ñu soq njànj, mayewul uw nit.   . Mbamb reyul weer.
mbaaru: Defal boppam 'mbaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbaarum: 'mbaarum 'Ab soxor, këram day tas, mbaarum ku jub di naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 11)
mbaax: Boo waree fasu mbaax ñu war fasu waññ topp la. 'Kon nga xam njub ak yoon, xam jubal ak mboolem yoonu mbaax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 9)
mbaaxu: Defal boppam 'mbaax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbagg: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg.
mbaggu: Defal boppam 'mbagg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbàjj: Ana golooka sàngoo mbàjj bay taamu nimoro diis ?
mbalitu: Defal boppam 'mbalit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbalka: . Ñaari yëkk yu mat xajuñu ci menn mbalka. (,,) Ñaari yëkk xajuñu ci menn mbalka.
mbalkam: 'mbalkam 'Naanal ci sa mbalkam bopp, ndox ma balle sa teenu bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 15)
mbañ: .	Kenn mënula nuru mbokki jàmbur, ku ne say mbokk ngay nuru.  . Kenn rawul sa mbañ ci ñaaw làmmiñ.
mbànd: . Kuy jéem mbànd te mënoo tabax, dangay yàq ban, rekk.  Bàyyileen jéem i mbànd ku mënula tabax doo yàq ban.  Tabaxe su jéemantoo mbànd tojle (de nga ko toj).
mbàndi: 'mbàndi 'say sàq day fees, ne xéew, say mbàndi ndoxi reseñ di wal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 10)
mbañeel: 'mbañeel 'Mbañeel ak ayoo; cofeel ak jéggale bépp tooñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 12)
mbañeelu: Defal boppam 'mbañeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbaq: 'mbaq 'Kuy teral ab dof, jël ngaw doj, takk ko ci mbaq.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 8)
mbaram: . Paaka laa, kenn du ma ko jëkk ci sama mbar.  Paaka, kenn du ko jiitu ci mbaram.
mbartalu: Defal boppam 'mbartal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbaru: Defal boppam 'mbar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbas: Boroom bakkan bu ne la “mbas maa ngoog”, nee ko : “fas Yàlla”.
mbasal: 'mbasal 'Moyul, bu fa jaare; mbasal te wéy!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 15)
mbàttu: Defal boppam 'mbàtt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbaxana: . Mbaxana du fekke coonob boroom. (,,) Mbaxanay du fekki deewu boroomam.  Mbaxana du fekke ayu boroomam.
mbaxanam: 'mbaxanam 'Da lay takkal kaala gu jekk, solal la mbaxanam buur." Moytul yoonu ku bon' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 9)
mbaxanay: . Mbaxana du fekke coonob boroom. (,,) Mbaxanay du fekki deewu boroomam.  Mbaxana du fekke ayu boroomam.
mbaxane: . Yóbbu mbir mi fa mbaxane nekke benn.  . Yokkule, sakkanlee ko gën.
mbedd: Balaa ngaa dundal ña ca mbedd ma nga dundal ña ca kër ga. 'Xel mu Rafet a ngay woote ca mbedd ma, di xaacu ca pénc ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 20)
mbeddum: 'mbeddum 'Kon nag aweel mbeddum waa ju baax, toppal yoonu defkatu njekk,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 20)
mbëggeel: Bëtu mbëggeel du gis melo. 'Dikkal, nu baanee baane, ba bët set, te bànneexu ci mbëggeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 18)
mbëggeelu: Defal boppam 'mbëggeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbégte: 'mbégte 'Mbégte ñeel na ki may topp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 32)
mbégtee: 'mbégtee 'Mbégtee ñeel ku daj xel mu rafet ak ku amug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 13)
mbégtey: 'mbégtey 'Mooy garab giy taxa dund ci ku ko jàpp, di mbégtey ku ca ŋoy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 18)
mbej: Bala ngaa mbej Samba, xamal la muy waliis.
mbejum: . Mbëggeel gu mat sëkk, wéet gu mat sëkk, ngor gu mat sëkk du fa nekk.  . Mbejum kanam, boroom a koy fajal boppam. (,)
mbëkku: Defal boppam 'mbëkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbënnu: Defal boppam 'mbënn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbër: Daan mbër daanu xaj na ca.
mbete: 'mbete 'Waa ja jekki, topp ko, mbete yëkk wu ñuy rendiji, mbaa dof bu ñu jéng, di ko yari.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 22)
mbëtt: Du bés bu ne baay ray nag.  Du bés bu set baay rey mbëtt.
mbey: Bañ mbey du tee dégg ug dënnu.
mbeyu: Defal boppam 'mbey' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbind: . Liggéeyu ndey mbind mu nu yaxan la doom jaay juddu maas.  . Liggéeyub ndey; añub doom. (,,,)
mbindaan: . Mbindaan du jaam, (daan sa doole la).
mbindinu: Defal boppam 'mbindin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbindu: Defal boppam 'mbind' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbir: . Yóbbu mbir mi fa mbaxane nekke benn.  . Yokkule, sakkanlee ko gën. 'Lu Aji Sax ji sàkk, mbir la ca namm, ba ci ku soxor ak bésu mbugalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 4)
mbiru: Defal boppam 'mbir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbokk: Ag mbokk, dañu koy dox, mbaa ñu wax ko. 'Safool xel mu rafet, muy sab jigéen, te nga xejjoo dég-dég ni sa mbokk lenqe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 4)
mbokkam: Baadoolo bu bañee liggéey, bañeek mbokkam. (,) 'Barey àndandoo lor a ngi ci, waaye xarit a ngi gëna taq nit mbokkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 24)
mbokki: .	Kenn mënula nuru mbokki jàmbur, ku ne say mbokk ngay nuru.  . Kenn rawul sa mbañ ci ñaaw làmmiñ.
mbokku: Defal boppam 'mbokk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbokkum: Cere ju ne, mbokkum sëb la, waaye cóopóor a ca raw.
mbombu: Defal boppam 'mbomb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbon: . Mbon moo di li nekk ci sa xol, nga di ko nëbb.  . Mbonaat ñawkat la woon. 'Bul doyloo sa xel mu rafet, ragalal Aji Sax ji, dëddu mbon;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 7)
mbonam: 'mbonam 'Su la nëbbalee mbañeel, di la nax it, ag mbonam mujj bir ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 26)
mbonu: Defal boppam 'mbon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mboob: Cokkeer mënula réer moroom ma ci mboob. (,,) Cokkeer mënula réer moroomam ci ngeer.  Cokkeer, mënta réer moroom ma ci dédd
mbool: . Soo bëgg loo lekk nawet na nga di sakkantal ci noor.  .  Soo dee jéem õampat jalam mbool nga amul. (,)  . Soo deetee dox ba ëkk fël la, danga koy gor.
mboolem: 'mboolem 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
mboolemu: Defal boppam 'mboolem' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbooloo: . Kerug caxat, bu ca mbooloo yendoo garab ga mu law a tax.  . Kettet buy la jig te buy daanuy toj. '"Yeen mbooloo yi laay woo, doom aadama yi laay joor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 4)
mboolooy: . Mbooloo mooy doole. (,,) Mboolooy indi doole.
mbootaayu: Defal boppam 'mbootaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbóotu: Defal boppam 'mbóot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbooy: 'mbooy 'Merum buur ni gaynde gu ŋar; yërmandey buur ni lay cig mbooy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 12)
mbóoyo: .	Goneg mbóoyo gu reew, xaar ko ca taatu ndaa la. (,,,) .	Gont taxani for aw ñey, muur a koy maye.
mbote: . Kuy jiiy mbote wara séenu culletum bukki.  . Kuy jooy di bëse kenn du la ñaan am ñeex.
mbott: Ba mbott bëggee tollu niw ñay, daa funki ba toj te sottiwul.
mbubb: .	Fu ma war a doone mbubb, duma fa doon jiba.  .	Fu mag newul lu fa yobbu turam. 'Woyof mbubb, am benn surga doŋŋ, moo gën réyal turki tey dee ak xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 9)
mbubbam: 'mbubbam 'Ku gàddul jàmbur bor, jëlal mbubbam; tayle ko, moo dige feyal jàmbur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 16)
mbubbu: Defal boppam 'mbubb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbugal: 'mbugal 'Mbugal ak toroxte dib añam, te gàcceem du deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 33)
mbugalam: 'mbugalam 'Ab soxor mbugalam du jaas, wóor na; te ku jëfe njekk, saw askan mucc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 21)
mbugalee: 'mbugalee 'Boo mbugalee kuy ñaawle, ab téxét jànge ca; nga jàngal ku rafet xel, mu yokku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 11)
mbugalu: Defal boppam 'mbugal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mburtu: Defal boppam 'mburt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mburu: Defal boppam 'mbur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Dogu mburu fey nab gànc; waaye jabaru jàmbur, bakkanu lëmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 26)
mburum: . Kokkateey lekk mburum gune. (,) . Kolkolaat yëgul ne yamb baax na. (,) . Kóllëre gannaaw lay féete. (,)
mbuubitu: Defal boppam 'mbuubit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbuum: .	Gawar gu di dawal fasam, mbaxanaam wadd te jotu ko for ?  .	Gaynde bëggul mbuum, yàpp lay dunde. (,,,)
mbuus: Àddina, ñett a ci di yóbbal : ab xame, ab taar ak mbuus. (,) 'Dikkal nu far, mbuus miy benn, nu bokk."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 14)
mbuusam: . Lu Naar gis ci mbuusam, ba sànni ko, ku ko for it du am njeriñ.  . Lu nar barey-barey su dëgg jógee jot ko.
mbuusu: Defal boppam 'mbuus' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mbuusum: . Mbuusum gone munul sol yaxi mag.  .  Mécce, mu ca bënn am njariñ.   . Meew mu wayul tuuru na. (,,,) . Meex-sedd, rey. 'Mbuusum xaalis la ŋàbb, yóbbu, du ñibbisi ndare weer wi fees dell."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 20)
mébét: . Kuy ñuy diri, doo taamu fu ñu lay jaarale. (,,) . Kuy raam di la wat su yéege fas toogu la.  . Kuy reere mébét bu yaboo falaõi dog. 'Loo mébét, bàyyil Yàlla xel, mu xàllal la yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 6)
mébétu: Defal boppam 'mébét' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Mébétu jàmbur day teen bu xóot, ku amug dégg a cay root.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 5)
médd: Bëgg jiba, duma taxa gaar sama dënn. (,,) Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,) Bëgg xaritu pël du ma taxa booti sëllu.   Bëggu yàpp, bu mu la taxa lekk médd.
mëdd: 'mëdd 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
méddu: Defal boppam 'médd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
méddum: Bëtub tan jéll na méddum sanqaleñ.
meewum: 'meewum 'Meewum bëy daldi am, ba doy la dund, yaak sa waa kër ak sa surga yu jigéen.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 27)
mel: Buleen sonnal béer, njaw du mel na lem. 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
melax: . Lépp luy melax du caagine wurus la.  . Lépp lu am nopp du nen.
melee: Bu ñépp melee nib yaafus, tool booy.
melestiku: Defal boppam 'melestik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
melokaan: 'melokaan 'Melokaan wu jekk day naxe, taar day wéy, waaye jigéen ju ragal Aji Sax ji, kookoo jara gërëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 30)
melokaanu: Defal boppam 'melokaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
meloon: . Lu nekk mënees na koo toxal, mu mel na mu meloon ba mu des wax. (,) . Lu nga ñàkk-ñàkk xel, xam ne jabaru baay, ndey la. (,)
mënatuñu: Defal boppam 'mënatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
meññ: Garab ci kaw lañuy fekkantee  .	Garab du meññ lu dul la ñu ca gajj.
meññal: 'meññal 'Ab soxor ay xemmem alal ju lewul, kiy jëfe njekk garab la, reen baa ko meññal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 12)
meññaluñu: Defal boppam 'meññaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
meññeef: 'meññeef 'Ku néewle bey na, meññeef ne gàññ, ñu àtte ko ñàkkal, mu ñàkk ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 23)
meññeefu: Defal boppam 'meññeef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
meññle: 'meññle 'Teralal Aji Sax ji ci sa alal ak loo njëkka meññle,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 9)
mënula: Bañ loo mënula wàññi dara, mook bëgg yem. (,)
mënuma: . “Mënuma ko”, dëgg la, waaye “mëneesu ko”, leneen lay niru.  . Mënuñu am dara tey sonnuñu ca.
mënuñoo: .	Fukk ñuy ñaan, kenn kuy gàntoo leen mën.  .	Fukki nit mënuñoo bokk fen.
mënunu: Defal boppam 'mënun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mënuñu: Defal boppam 'mënuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mëq: . Ku la mage fukki fan, wara xam fukk yoo xamul.  . Ku la man ci mëq, man la ci siim.
mer: Jooja fajul jooja, mer mu yàgg la. 'Ku gaawa mer, def jëfi dof, te kuy fexeel nit, ñu bañ la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 17)
mere: Bul mere ka la yakkal ci gaalu xaj, boo ca lekkul mu jar ko. 'Nit def na jëfi dof, ba sànku, walbatiku mere Aji Sax ji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 3)
meree: 'meree 'Ab dof bu meree, mu gaawa feeñ; ku teey, tanqamlu saaga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 16)
mereek: 'mereek 'Boroom xel, buy layookub dof, bu mereek buy ree, jàmm du am.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 9)
mërëgu: Defal boppam 'mërëg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mërgalu: Defal boppam 'mërgal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mërgëlu: Defal boppam 'mërgël' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
merloo: 'merloo 'Buur mer lool, mel ni gayndee ŋar; boo ko merloo, dangay xaru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 2)
merum: . Merum ginaar lu muy wàññi tusuñe ? (,,,) Merum ginaar saful tusuñe. (,) 'Merum buur ndaw la, dee a ko yónni; ku rafetum xel, giifal ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 14)
mes: 'mes 'Bu ngëlén walee, ab soxor ne mes; kiy def njekk, sab reen sax ba fàww.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 25)
mës: Du xam nganj, mës a suub la.  Du miin nganj, yàggal suub la.  Lii du xam nganj, mën suub la.
mësa: .	Garab gu tooy dina mësa wow.  .	Garab, loo fa gàjjee fay jebbi.
mësiiru: Defal boppam 'mësiir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mësula: Picc mu mësula naaw, bu wëree am réew, tas ko.  . Picc muy naaw di reg, bu dalee matula wax.
metitu: Defal boppam 'metit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mettee: .	Jabar ju bon ak bëñ buy mettee yem (buddi rekk.) 'Bu mettee, nga yoqi, sa doolee néew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 10)
metti: .	Gajj ndox, sa dënn a cay metti, ndege du ko taxa dog. (,) Gajj ndox, sa dënn a cay metti. 'Dangay xam lu jaadu, ñu naw la; yoonu workat day metti.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 15)
mettitu: Defal boppam 'mettit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
miimee: 'miimee 'Ku ànd akub sàcc, sa noonu bopp nga: soo waxee dëgg, yoon topp la; soo ko miimee, Yàlla topp lae.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 24)
miin: Du xam nganj, mës a suub la.  Du miin nganj, yàggal suub la.  Lii du xam nganj, mën suub la.
miineelu: Defal boppam 'miineel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
miiru: Defal boppam 'miir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
miraaskat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'miraas' (Someone who does...).
misaalu: Defal boppam 'misaal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mititlu: Defal boppam 'mititl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mititu: Defal boppam 'mitit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
miy: 'miy 'Dikkal nu far, mbuus miy benn, nu bokk."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 14)
mocc: 'mocc 'Muy mocc aka moccaat, ba nax ko, di wax lu neex, ba man ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 21)
moccaat: 'moccaat 'Muy mocc aka moccaat, ba nax ko, di wax lu neex, ba man ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 21)
moggu: Defal boppam 'mogg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mokk: . Mag mën naa rukki nen ba mu mokk te du toj.  .  Mag su rukkeeb laaloom, mëq ub daõam.  . Mag toog na séen lu xale taxaw te séenu ko. (,)
mokkalee: .	Jàng njàngaan, soo mokkalee ber sa daara.  Ku jàng, boo mokkalee, ber sa daara. 'Soo mokkalee, ba man koo tari, muy sa mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 18)
mokketu: Defal boppam 'mokket' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
montëru: Defal boppam 'montër' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
moo: ﻿Aar moo gën faj. 'Ma nga naan: "Moo téxét bi, foo àppal sa téxét gi?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
mook: Bañ loo mënula wàññi dara, mook bëgg yem. (,) 'Kilifa guy soxore néew-ji-doole mook gaynde guy yëmmoo yem, mbaa rab wuy songe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 15)
mooki: 'mooki 'Nuyoo bu xumb, suba teel mooki saagaa yem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 14)
móollu: Defal boppam 'móoll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
móolu: Defal boppam 'móol' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Nit a ngi móolu kuy denc pepp, ba mu ñàkkee, di gërëm ka koy jaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 26)
moom: Béntéñe doõõ du ker, waaye moom lañu taamu. 'Ku dem ca moom dootoo délsi, doo gisati yoonu dund mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 19)
moomatu: Defal boppam 'moomat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
moome: Ku amul ndey, nàmp maam. (,,,,) . Ku añaane say dono, sa deewin ñaaw.  . Ku aye, wol sa moome. (,)
moomeelu: Defal boppam 'moomeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
moomi: 'moomi 'Maa moomi digle, di maye gis-gis; maa amug dégg, di boroom doole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 14)
moomu: Defal boppam 'moom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Buur moomul di naan biiñ, Lemuyel, buur moomu ko; kilifa moomul di sàkku ñoll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 4)
moomul: . Ku moomul sa alal, sa alal moom la.  . Ku muñ, muuñ. (,,,,,,) 'Buur moomul di naan biiñ, Lemuyel, buur moomu ko; kilifa moomul di sàkku ñoll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 4)
moomunu: Defal boppam 'moomun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mooñ: Cerey puso, ku ko soq, wol ko, mooñ ko du la jaaxal. (,)
moona: 'moona 'Ñu baree ngi sàkku kilifa baaxe leen, moona Aji Sax jeey àtteb jaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 26)
moos: . Nxarit ba laa dëër nu takk ko ciw naaj.  . Ña bokk lël, def ñu di ànd ba moos.
mooy: .	Gàcceg may ma, bu doon ray, kon ki ñàkk bay ñaani mooy jëkka dee.  .	Gajànga, kenn du ko ràkkal. 'Mooy garab giy taxa dund ci ku ko jàpp, di mbégtey ku ca ŋoy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 18)
moroom: Ab dag du bëgg moroom ma. 'Yaa ngi ci sa loxoy moroom, kon defal nii, doom, ba rëcc: doxal tinuji ko, raamali ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 3)
moroomam: Cokkeer mënula réer moroom ma ci mboob. (,,) Cokkeer mënula réer moroomam ci ngeer.  Cokkeer, mënta réer moroom ma ci dédd 'Ab soxor day namma lore, te du yërëm moroomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 10)
moroomu: Defal boppam 'moroom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mos: Fullaay jaay daqaar, (mbaa “ma ñam” jeexal ko). (,) Fullaay jaay daqaar mbaa ma macc jeexal ko.  Fullaay jaay daqaar, mbaa – ma mos – jeexal ko.  Fullaay jaay keccax.
mosi: 'mosi 'Xanaa kiy naan-naane biiñ, di mosi yeneen njafaan?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 30)
moy: Deretu bopp, du moy mbàgg. 'Bul fàtte te bul moy samay wax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 5)
moyati: 'moyati 'Boroom xadar day sooke ay, te ku tàng bopp moy, moyati.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 22)
moykat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'moy' (Someone who does...). 'Ku mat day jub, ba fegu; moykat soxor, ba sànku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 6)
moyloo: 'moyloo 'Par-parloo baaxul, waaye dogu mburu moyloo na kilifa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 21)
moytu: Defal boppam 'moyt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
moytul: 'moytul 'Da lay takkal kaala gu jekk, solal la mbaxanam buur." Moytul yoonu ku bon' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 9)
moytuwul: 'moytuwul 'Ku jëfe ndigal, sàmm sa bakkan; ku moytuwul sa bopp, dangay dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 16)
moyu: 'moyu 'Bul jàdd, ndijoor mbaa càmmoñ, na sa tànk moyu lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 27)
moyul: 'moyul 'Moyul, bu fa jaare; mbasal te wéy!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 15)
mucc: .	Janax day bari pax, bu bëggee mucc.  .	Janax du jur lu dul luy gas. 'mucc ci yoonu ku bon ak kuy wax lu jekkadi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 12)
muccagunu: Defal boppam 'muccagun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mucce: 'mucce 'Ay sos la yéefar di loree dëkkandoom, waaye kiy jëfe njekk, xam-xam la cay mucce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 9)
muccu: Defal boppam 'mucc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
muccul: 'muccul 'Seede buy fen muccul mbugalam, kuy noyyee ay fen du rëcc àtteem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 5)
muj: . Ku tey xamoon njàlbéen, muj di noflaay. (,,) . Ku togg sa cin, yaw lay jëkka xeeñ. 'Muj ga mu wex xàtt, di gaañe ni ñawkay saamar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 4)
mujja: . Lu ñam baree-bare, mujja jeex, ndegem nëbbu la ko.  Lu ñam barey-barey, mujja jeex.
mujjantalu: Defal boppam 'mujjantal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mujje: Jataõ loo ko fóot fóot mu xeeñ mbeqe.  .	Jatkatub jaan jaan a koy mujje. 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
mujjeek: . Na nga fexe ba ku Tabaski jox la pooj, foo Tamxarite, jox ko këllu cere.  . Na ñu bàyyi wànneen ba xam nu muy mujjeek i gëtam.
mujju: Defal boppam 'mujj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
mukk: Bul ne : “teen bi, duma naan mukk sam ndox”. 'Ku dem ca moom dootoo délsi, doo gisati yoonu dund mukk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 19)
muñ: Boo bëggee xam luy muñ, amal jabar. (,,,,,) 'Muñ mer, déggin wu yaa; gaawa tàng, gënatee dof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 29)
muñal: .	Gan su dikkee silmaxa la, su dee ñibbi, géwël la. (,) .	Gan yomb naa muñal.
muriku: Defal boppam 'murik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
musal: 'musal 'Xel mu rafet da lay musal ci jigéenu njaalookat, bokk feneen, di wax lu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 16)
musejubru: Defal boppam 'musejubr' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
musiba: Ay du yem ci boppub boroom. (,,,,) Ay du yem ci boppu boroomam. (,) Musiba du yem ci boppu boroom. 'ngir dañuy xélu, nar musiba, di gaawtuy sànk bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 16)
musibaa: 'musibaa 'Ku bon fippu doŋŋ lay jéem, te musibaa koy dikkal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 11)
musibam: 'musibam 'Ku bon këppoo ayu ku baax, workat gàddu musibam kuy jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 18)
musle: 'musle 'Ab soxor, waxam am tëru la, day reye; kàdduy kiy jubal di musle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 6)
muslu: Defal boppam 'musl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
muucu: Defal boppam 'muuc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
muuñ: . Ku moomul sa alal, sa alal moom la.  . Ku muñ, muuñ. (,,,,,,)
muur: .	Goneg mbóoyo gu reew, xaar ko ca taatu ndaa la. (,,,) .	Gont taxani for aw ñey, muur a koy maye.
muuraayu: Defal boppam 'muuraay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
muuru: Defal boppam 'muur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku baax, donale ba cay sëtam; alalu moykat, muuru ku jub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 22)
muus: Dara dara né muus mu daqaar yar. 'Yaafus bee, xoolal xorondom, seetal ci moom, ba muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 6)
muusaatu: Defal boppam 'muusaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
muusal: 'muusal 'Déglul, doom, muusal te yebu ci yoonu njub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 19)
muut: .	Garees gi ginaar am bay jenj, xàbbon am na ko te ni muut ak moom.  .	Gaskatu dànkew a ngay wayaseer
muy: Àddina jigéen la, ju fu mu tollu, mu ngi ëmb te kenn xamul lu muy jur. 'Day dëddu wóllëreem, ba muy ndaw, fàtte *kóllëreem ak Yàllaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 17)
naa: “Am naa géléem ca Gànnaar” yomb naa wax, (,,,,,) 'Man it amoon naa baay, di benn bàjjo ci saa ndey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 3)
ñaa: Ba béjjéni kuuy di lëõaaru, mag ñaa nga fa woon, te mënu ñu ca woon dara.
naaféq: 'naaféq 'Seedeb naaféq faalewul yoon, ab soxor lu bon lay tàqamtikoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 28)
ñaag: . Ña daan ñaane njekk, jeexuñu ; ña daan maye njekka jeexe.  . Ñaag bu réy ray na boroom waaye regg la ca jublu woon.  . Ñaan gu daje ak amiin la. (,)
naagu: Defal boppam 'naag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Déggadi sànk ab téxét, naagu rey ab dof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 32)
naaj: Baadoolo bu ragal naaj ragal na njariñam. (,) Baadoolo bu bañee naaj, bañ nak mbokkam.
naaje: . Kuy sëqaat, ku ko ñaani mbël doo fa naaje.  . Kuy summi lu ñu sol, du fa bàyyi lu ñu wékk.  . Kuy tëgg ndëndëk sémmiñ doo bari wàlliyaan.
naak: Am yàlla yàllaay Buur, Naak yàlla yàllaay Buur.
naam: Bala nga ne “naam”, ne fa. (,,,,,,) Bala nga wuyu nekk fa. (,)
naan: Àddina potu ndaa la, ku naan jox sa moroom mu naan. (,,,) 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
ñaan: .	Fukk ñuy ñaan, kenn kuy gàntoo leen mën.  .	Fukki nit mënuñoo bokk fen. 'Ñaan-yàlla, soo tooñul, du la dal, day mel ni picc muy naaw, tëë toŋ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 2)
naanal: 'naanal 'Naanal ci sa mbalkam bopp, ndox ma balle sa teenu bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 15)
ñaanal: Doomu ñey bu ko ñaanal mu réy, ñaanal ko mu wér to gudd fan.  Ñey wu ndaw, ñaanal ko fan wu gudd te bañ koo ñaanal réy.
naanatul: Buma naanatul ñeex, ñeex duma naan.
naane: .	Fii mu ne, su ma toogee cib nen sax, du toj !  .	Fii, wund du fi naane ñeex. (,,,) 'Xanaa kiy naan-naane biiñ, di mosi yeneen njafaan?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 30)
ñaane: .	Fa ñuy tëgge ab xàndoor, deesu fa ñaani njël ; fa ñu koy bey lañu koy ñaane. (,)
naanee: 'naanee 'Bu ñu naanee, fàtte seen néewle, ba dootuñu fàttaliku seenu tiis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 7)
naaneeti: 'naaneeti 'Duma yewwu nag, ba naaneeti?"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 35)
naaneetuñu: Defal boppam 'naaneetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
naani: .	Kenn du jiital kilifa, ba noppi di ko fakktal.  .	Kenn du ma jam-naani.
ñaani: .	Fa ñuy tëgge ab xàndoor, deesu fa ñaani njël ; fa ñu koy bey lañu koy ñaane. (,)
naanloo: Aw fas, manees na koo wommat ba cim ndox, waaye naanloo ko te marul, maneesu ko
naanu: Defal boppam 'naan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñaanu: Defal boppam 'ñaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Saraxub ku soxor, Aji Sax ji bañ na ko; ñaanu kuy jubal da koy bége.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 8)
naanukaay: 'naanukaay 'Yal na sa naanukaay barkeel, nga bànneexoo kiy sa jabar ba ngay ndaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 18)
ñaanunu: Defal boppam 'ñaanun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
naar: Bu naar sonnee wax i wolof. (,,)
ñaar: Bu dul wonteek benn kenn du ni ñaar 'Juróom benn a ngii yu Aji Sax ji bañ, ba ci juróom ñaar yu mu seexlu:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 16)
ñaareel: . Ku yakke loxo, bàyyi kuddu, doo ko ñaareel. (,,)
ñaareelu: Defal boppam 'ñaareel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñaari: Caga, kenn du ka nax ñaari yoon. 'Waaye bu feeñee, fey boroom juróom ñaari yoon, joxe alalu këram yépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 31)
naaru-góor: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko.
ñaasu: Defal boppam 'ñaas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
naat: . Ku rey naat dem sa kër baay, ku rey nit dem sa kër ndey.  . Ku rey sa mbaam, yenu sab sëf. 'sa yaram wér, say cér naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 8)
ñaata: . Su nga duggee ci néeg yuux, génn yuux, doo xam ñaata laat a ca nekk. (,) 'Dof bi, ñaata yoon ngay bañ xam-xam?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
naataangeek: 'naataangeek 'Ku saxoo njekk ak ngor, am fan wu gudd, naataangeek daraja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 21)
naatal: 'naatal 'Kàdduy ku jub bëtu ndox la, day naatal; waaye ku soxor, wax ja làq fitna.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 11)
naaw: Bu ñu la suqiwul, nga naaw. 'Alal ju lewul day naaw; foral benn-benn, ba barele.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 11)
ñaaw: Bu bët setee, ku ñaaw rus. 'kuy fexe lu bon ci xolam, kuy gaawtuy def lu ñaaw,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 18)
ñaawal: . Yàgg ci yoon wi moo gën yàqule ci yoon wi.  .  Yàgg du saabu, waaye dana fóot. (,,,) . Yàgg, lu mu dugg, ñaawal ko. 'Kuy ñaawle, moo lay ñaawal, ku toroxlu, mu may law yiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 34)
naawee: Picc mu lakk bopp a gëna bëgg moroom.  . Picc mu masula naaw, su naawee firim réew. (,,)
ñaawle: 'ñaawle 'Ñaawlekat bi, foo àppal sa ñaawle bi?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
ñaawlekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'ñaawle' (Someone who does...). 'Ñaawlekat bi, foo àppal sa ñaawle bi?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
ñaawlu: Defal boppam 'ñaawl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Lu ko moy Aji Sax ji gis la, ñaawlu ko, daldi giif, dootu ko mbugal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 18)
ñaawlu-ñaawlulu: Defal boppam 'ñaawlu-ñaawlul' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñaawtéef: 'ñaawtéef 'Saraxu nit ku bon ñaawtéef la, rawatina bu ci jubloo lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 27)
ñaawtéefu: Defal boppam 'ñaawtéef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
naaxsaay: 'naaxsaay 'Kuy dige te doo joxe, yaay xiin wu ngelaw, mu naaxsaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 14)
naaxu: Defal boppam 'naax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñaay: . Ndab ku ca mënuta sukk sukkin wu jekk, waru caa jéema lekk. (,) . Ndànk-ndànk mooy jàpp golo cib ñaay. (,,,,,,,,)
nab: Àddina gudd nab tank. 'Dogu mburu fey nab gànc; waaye jabaru jàmbur, bakkanu lëmm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 26)
nàcc: Ku lay añaane xeesaay du la takkal korooj.  . Ku la jam, doo nàcc ! (,) 'Ndax ku ruux soow, am ca dax, ku wañaar bakkan, mu nàcc, te lu jógal xol, indiw ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 33)
nàddil: 'nàddil 'Ku ma sopp, ma nàddil la, feesal sab denc." Xel mu Rafet a mag lépp' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 21)
naftu: Defal boppam 'naft' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nag: Béjjénu nag jégeñe na lool, waaye bu ñu laalee du sagos boroom. (,) 'Kon nag aweel mbeddum waa ju baax, toppal yoonu defkatu njekk,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 20)
ñag: Bérab bu nekk, la fay ñuul, moo fa dib ñag. (,,,) Bérab, la fay ñuul a fa dib ñag.
ñagas: . Ñag boo gis dafa wara gëna ñagas la muy ñag, mbaa du ko mëna ñag.  . Ñag bu sore kaw, teewul am picc a ruur. 'Tont lu neex day giifal, baat bu ñagas di jógal xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 1)
nagi: . Ndëféenaay yóbbuwul nagi mbëtt.  Ndëfeenaay yóbbuwul nagi bët.  Dëféenu yóbbuwul nag i mbëtt.
nagu: . Nag wu ñuul, ku ca am soow mu weex wara daw ba fattu.  . Nagu naankat, dex a koy tiiñ. (,)
naka: .	Jëndle la fas wu yaa-biir te duñ(u) la ko gubleel.  .	Jigéen naka takkaayam day, la jikkoom day.  .	Jigéen ay jur lu ne.
naka-su-dul-noonu: Defal boppam 'naka-su-dul-noon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nàkk: Bu la am-am taxa bew, ndax nàkk du wees. (,)
ñàkk: Am : gore, ñàkk : gore. 'Kon nga ñàkk daraja, keneen jagoo; ku néeg bóom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 9)
ñàkka: Ñàkka xam mbaam a waral ngay fóon wàqu gannaaw wa.  Ku xamul mbaam mooy fóon we wa.
ñàkkal: . Yomb day tax nga ñàkkal faayda lu am faayda.  . Yomb fey na naajo, ba wes ko. 'Ku néewle bey na, meññeef ne gàññ, ñu àtte ko ñàkkal, mu ñàkk ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 23)
ñàkke: . Ku naan bay jayax, dangaa yemul cim ndox.  . Ku naar di sa gan booba nga ñàkke sa gan. 'lu ko moy ma regg, weddi la, ba naan: "Kuy Aji Sax ji?" Mbaa ma ñàkk bay sàcc, di la ñàkke worma, yaw sama Yàlla.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 9)
ñàkkee: .	Gopp bu nekk ci biir ba muy romb a tax muy bey.  .	Gor, bu ñàkkee, fàttaliku bor. (,) 'Nit a ngi móolu kuy denc pepp, ba mu ñàkkee, di gërëm ka koy jaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 26)
ñàkki: 'ñàkki 'Taseek gaynde gu ñàkki doomam moo gën taseek dof ak yëfi dofam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 12)
ñàkkoo: Ku am kuddu du lakk, walla bu lakkee, di cuune.  . Ku am nit ñi, ñàkkoo dara. Ku ñàkk nit ñi, amoo dara. (,)
nàkku: Defal boppam 'nàkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñàkku: Defal boppam 'ñàkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Wax ju bare, moy ñàkku ca; ku moom sa làmmiñ, xelu nga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 19)
ñàkkul: Boroom karaw gu ñuul ñàkkul dara.
ñàkkuñu: Defal boppam 'ñàkkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñal: . Su ñu nee : “na xob yépp yëngu”, paftan taxul ñuy wax.  . Su picc geddee ab déeg, dafa ñal ag suux. (,)
nalatu: Defal boppam 'nalat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñalgu: Defal boppam 'ñalg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nalkatu: Defal boppam 'nalkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñallu: Defal boppam 'ñall' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nalukaayu: Defal boppam 'nalukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nam: Ba nga déggee mbott mën nam ndox, ma ñu baxal taxul ñuy wax.  Mbott mën na ndox, waaye du mu tàng.
ñam: Bu ñam tegee, ku fekke ci nga. 'Deesul sikk ku sàcc aw ñam, def ci biiram ndax xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 30)
ñamee: Bu lëg ñamee aloom, na ko gërëme coy.
namm: Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci galgal aw ñey.  Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci wonnub suññéel.  Namm yàpp du ma taxa lekk war-waraan. 'Wax ju rafet yool na boroom, workat fitna la namm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 2)
nàmm: 'nàmm 'Weñ ay nàmm weñ, nit ay nàmm xelu moroom ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 17)
namma: 'namma 'Ab soxor day namma lore, te du yërëm moroomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 10)
nammee: Bukki bu nammee fande reere doom ja.
nammeelam: 'nammeelam 'Aji Sax jeeki nammeelam rawtu la ci ku mat, di sànkute ci kuy def lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 29)
nammeelu: Defal boppam 'nammeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ab soxor, li mu ragal moo koy dab; nammeelu kiy def njekk nag day sotti.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 24)
nàmmlu: Defal boppam 'nàmml' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nammuñu: Defal boppam 'nammuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nàmp: Doom, lu mu fekk ci weeni ndeyam, moom la nàmp.  Doom, lu mu fekk ci weenu ndeyam la nàmp.
ñamu: .  Ñàkk pexe, pexe la. (,,) . Ñamu lël, njulli bi ci la bokk. '"Ndox mu lewul a neex, ñamu làqu-lekk dàqati."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 17)
nañ: . Màggatum pël : nañ màngi i yóo, bu nu màngi i yóo.  . Màggetum dàngin, cuqtaan yóbbuwul ub lancam.  . Màggetum golo kenn du ko jàngal õeleju.
ñàng: . Yaa ne woon, man ngaa faj dof, gasali nuy reen.  . Yaa ñàng, ni kaani. 'Xadar day ñàng, mer di wal mu baawaan, waaye fiiraange amul moroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 4)
nanga: . Su ñu la séddee ci gaalu xaj itam, nanga fexe ba bu ca lekk.  Mën nañu la yekkal ci gaalu xaj, waaye bu ca lekk. 'Nanga wóoloo Aji Sax ji sa léppi xol, te bul wéeru ci saw déggin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 5)
nangeen: 'nangeen 'Nangeen déglu ku leen di yar, daldi muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 33)
nangoo: Bañu démb bu nangoo tey, pexeem a joyul. 'Ab yaafus day bëgg lu mu amul ba dee, ndax du nangoo liggéey,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 25)
ñàngóor: . Mag, jaani ñàngóor la : bu la riisoo, bàyyil la daõar, boo ko riisoo mu bàyyil la daõar. 'Bu weesoo mu màtt la ni jaan, ne la càppit ni ñàngóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 32)
nangootunu: Defal boppam 'nangootun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nangu: Defal boppam 'nang' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Aji Sax ji day dëddu ab soxor, di nangu ñaanu ku jub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 29)
nangub: 'nangub 'Muñ mer, moo gën njàmbaar; tënk sa bakkan moo raw nangub dëkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 32)
nangul: 'nangul 'Ku jub bu dee nangul ku bon, yàqu na, ni seyaan bu nëx mbaa teen bu xàbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 26)
nangulatu: Defal boppam 'nangulat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nangulunu: Defal boppam 'nangulun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nanguluñu: Defal boppam 'nanguluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nangum: .  Ku bañ céebo nangum xaar.  . Ku bañ ginaar doo wonniy nenam.
nanguwoo: 'nanguwoo 'Sofental nga samay digle, nanguwoo samay artu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 25)
nanguwu: Defal boppam 'nanguw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nanguwul: Ku nanguwul nit yilif la, jinne doon sa kilifa. (,) . Ku amul mbubb sa biir feeñ. (,)
nanguwuñu: Defal boppam 'nanguwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nàññ: 'nàññ 'Ku jub day leer nàññ, ab soxor mel ni taal bu fey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 9)
nañoo: Fas yépp dinañu daw, waaye roccim-ngeer a ci raw.  Fas yépp mën nañoo daw, waaye roccee ca mën.  Fas dina daw, wànde roccim-ngeer a ca raw.
nanu: . Koo ci ne “nanu dem ca ngénte la”, mu ne la “dëj baa ëpp u nit”.  . Koo gënul doo ko teeñ. 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
nañu: Andulook waa ndugóor yi, te waa nëw yi raw nañu la. 'Ag maas a ngi defe ne set nañu, te taq ripp ak bàkkaar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 12)
napp: . Lu la waay maye kon jën, na la ko jàngale napp moo gën.  . Lu la waay wàll ëppale la ca.
nappkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'napp' (Someone who does...).
ñaq: . Kuy gunge boroom biir buy daw, lu la ca waaxusil fekkee. (,) . Kuy jaaru te liwul, ñaq la fay jële. 'Jàmbur jariñoo sa doole, doxandéem jagoo saw ñaq.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 10)
ñaqam: 'ñaqam 'Day seetlu ab tool, jënd ko, sàkk ciw ñaqam, jëmbat tóokër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 16)
naqar: . Ku bërewul itam, ñu bëre daanu ci sa kaw. (,) . Ku bey sa bànneex, góob saw naqar. (,,) 'Xol bu tiis, naqar wu sax; xol bu neex, bànneex bu sax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 15)
naqaree: Bët yu naqaree gën foo fi nekke.
naqari: . Li ma naqari neexuma. 'Naqari deret, taalu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 18)
naqarlu: Defal boppam 'naqarl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
naqaru: Defal boppam 'naqar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Doom ju dof di tiisu baay ba ak naqaru ndey ja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 25)
nar: Ak lu nar teela xéy, bu dëgg gontee, jot ko. (,,) 'ngir dañuy xélu, nar musiba, di gaawtuy sànk bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 16)
nara: Bopp bu nara barkeel, nopp ya cay sax day dégg um ndigal.  Bopp bu naree am jàmm, yàlla da cay saxal nopp yuy dégg.  Bopp bu am njeriñ, noppi moo ca sax. 'Ku bon day nangu alalu ger ca suuf, nara jalgati yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 23)
naree: Bopp bu nara barkeel, nopp ya cay sax day dégg um ndigal.  Bopp bu naree am jàmm, yàlla da cay saxal nopp yuy dégg.  Bopp bu am njeriñ, noppi moo ca sax. 'Gone sax day jëf, nga gis jikkoom; bu naree dëggu te jub, nga xam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 11)
nas: Gumba am na beneen liggéey bu dul nas i pusó. (,) Gumba tal na beneen liggéey bu dul nasi pusó.  Gumba tal na leneen lu dul nas i puso. 'ndax coxor lay nas ci xolam, te fitna la ay waxam di yee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 2)
nasax: 'nasax 'Bul wóolu workat bésub njàqare, mooy bëñ bu bon mbaa tànk bu nasax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 19)
nasinu: Defal boppam 'nasin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nataal: . Tukki yokkul wërsëg, ña ko lekk a ko fa nekkul.  . Tunguni du teew, ñu di ko nataal. (,)
nataalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'nataal' (Someone who does...).
nataalu: Defal boppam 'nataal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Wax ju ñor di nataalu wurus wu tege ci xaalis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 11)
nataalukaayu: Defal boppam 'nataalukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
natt: . Mbaxana moo teg sa bopp jekku ca, bul ko teg ci boppu keneen.  Mbaxana moo natt ci sa bopp, jekku ca, bu ko natt ci sa boppu nawle. (,,) 'Lu waay def, daa jekk ca moom, waaye Aji Sax jeey natt xol yi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 2)
natti: 'natti 'Aji Sax ji bañ na nattu diisaay yu wuute, njublaŋ ci natti diisaay baaxul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 23)
nattinu: Defal boppam 'nattin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nattu: Defal boppam 'natt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Xaalis ak wurus sawaraa koy xelli, waaye nit, ab xolam, Aji Sax jee koy nattu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 3)
nattub: Buur Yàlla day nattub jaamam. 'Aji Sax ji bañ na njublaŋ ci nattub diisaay, ay nattukaay na mat, muy bànneexam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 1)
nattukaay: 'nattukaay 'Aji Sax ji bañ na njublaŋ ci nattub diisaay, ay nattukaay na mat, muy bànneexam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 1)
nattukaayu: Defal boppam 'nattukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nattukatu: Defal boppam 'nattukat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
naw: Boo déggee “jaar bëgg naw sëb”, newul ñu boole kook moom togg. 'Bul yedd kuy ñaawle, da lay jéppi; yeddal ku rafet xel, mu naw la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 8)
ñaw: . Ku bëgge taxa xar sab dënn, ñaw ko dina la jaaxal. (,) . Ku bëggul gaana, ba kook wéñam. 'Xel mu ñaw, jëw bu rafet; sam xel jekkadi, ñu xeeb la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 8)
ñawe: . Wax, ab xottiku la, kenn ku ne, yaa xam noo koy ñawe. (,,,) . Wax daaneelul bëstul.
ñaweesu: Defal boppam 'ñawees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nawet: Lu waay rendi, ca suba, ba ngoon ci yoxoom lay nàcc.  . Lu waay wax cib nawet, cab toolam la ko gise. (,) 'Teraanga jekkul cib dof, mooy seddub nawet mbaa taw cim ngóob.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 1)
ñawkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'ñaw' (Someone who does...).
ñawkay: 'ñawkay 'Muj ga mu wex xàtt, di gaañe ni ñawkay saamar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 4)
nawle: .	Jommal sa tool moo gën jommal sa nawle.
nawleem: . Nit ku nekk ab tool la, lu ca waay ji, moom la cay góobé.  . Nit ku nekk àddina war na bàyyi xel nawleem.
nawloo: 'nawloo 'Wutal a wut lu baax, ñu nawloo la; ku sàkku lu bon, yaa koy yenu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 27)
nawloowuñu: Defal boppam 'nawloowuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nawlu: Defal boppam 'nawl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nax: Caga, benn yoon la ñu koy nax. 'Muy mocc aka moccaat, ba nax ko, di wax lu neex, ba man ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 21)
ñax: . Lekk ñax mu wow, aste lekk ngooñ ak dugub, dina làpploo fas.  . Lëkkaayu Yàlla, xalangu du ko dindi. (,,) 'Ndeke lépp a nga saxi dég, fépp fees akum ñax, tabaxu doj ba ko wër màbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 31)
naxe: . Naxe, ku ca am mbubb, am ca tubéy, mbaxana të la ca. (,) Kuy nax may mbubb, tubëy ja të la. 'Dàqal wor, mu sore la; kàdduy naxe, na la dànd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 24)
naxekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'naxe' (Someone who does...).
naxekatu: Defal boppam 'naxekat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
naxlu: Defal boppam 'naxl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñaxtu: Defal boppam 'ñaxt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñaxum: . Sàmm bu baax moo xam fa ñaxum noor di baree. (,)
naxunu: Defal boppam 'naxun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nay: Boroom caq war nay moytu boroom baatub neen.  Boroom caq day moytu boroom yoqeel. 'Nay sa alal, yaw doŋŋ, ku bokk feneen bokkul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 17)
ñay: Ba mbott bëggee tollu niw ñay, daa funki ba toj te sottiwul. 'Ma nga ca buntu dëkk ba, taxaw; fa nit ñay jaare lay xaacoo naan:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 3)
ndaa: Àddina potu ndaa la, ku naan jox sa moroom mu naan. (,,,)
ndaag: 'ndaag 'Ñett a ngii, ñu jekkum ndaag, ba ci ñeent ñu jekk doxin:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 29)
ndaanaanu: Defal boppam 'ndaanaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndab: Boo lekkee ci ndab, ubal ba mu jekk, teraanga la. 'Ab yaafus day yeb loxoom ci ndab, tàyyi ko yékkati, sex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 24)
ndabal: 'ndabal 'Kuy wax lu neex, tey mébét lu bon, yaay xaalis bu rax, ñu xoob ca ndabal xandeer.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 23)
ndabam: 'ndabam 'Mu rendi ag juram, njafaan ay biiñam, xelli, taaj ay ndabam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 2)
ndàbb: 'ndàbb 'Lal ba, ma xeeñal, mu ne bann, di ndàbb, cuuraay ak xas mu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 17)
ndàbbu: Defal boppam 'ndàbb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndabu: Defal boppam 'ndab' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndaje: Menn picc, bu beddiku, yàqul ndiiraan.  Menn picc mënula yàq am ndaje.  Menn picc yàqul um ndaje.
ndajem: .  Tàgge boo gis, am na jàppal diw. (,) . Taluma ndajem ndetteelu xott laa woddoo.  . Tama ñaari boor.
ndam: . “Sama waa ja, sama waa ja”, ndam a nga ca, gàccee nga ca.  “Saa waa ji, saa waa ji”, ndam a nga ca, gàccee nga ca. 'Day dencalal ndam kiy jubal, di yiir ku mat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 7)
ndàmpaay: 'ndàmpaay 'Du faale ndàmpaay, loo ko may, may, du giif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 35)
ndamu: Defal boppam 'ndam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndànk-ndànk: . Ndab ku ca mënuta sukk sukkin wu jekk, waru caa jéema lekk. (,) . Ndànk-ndànk mooy jàpp golo cib ñaay. (,,,,,,,,)
ndàqum: . Ku nu ne infiroo nga ne duma dëmm yaa wone sa bopp.  . Ku nuy feyyikug tëng ci ndàqum ginaar, daa weesu kës.  . Ku ñaan ñàkk, boo jëndee am. (,)
ndare: 'ndare 'Mbuusum xaalis la ŋàbb, yóbbu, du ñibbisi ndare weer wi fees dell."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 20)
ndaw: Bu nu demee ba ca cippaa ndaw ja, yuux dina jibe fu ñu ko foogewul. 'ndax ab téxét di foog, ndaw li it xam tey xalaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 4)
ndawal: . Yàlla su doon def sago bañee, def sago soppee.  . Yàllaa ngeek ndawal lu dul kóoba.
ndawalu: Defal boppam 'ndawal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndawtal: Dana mel na ngéntel saxaar lu roplaan di yóbbug ndawtal.
ndawu: Defal boppam 'ndaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndax: Bu la am-am taxa bew, ndax nàkk du wees. (,) 'ndax ab téxét di foog, ndaw li it xam tey xalaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 4)
ndaxu: Defal boppam 'ndax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndaxub: Bakkan jekk na ci xar-kanam, ndaxub gise.
nde: Bëñ bu weex tàll, te deret ju ñuul kukk lal ko.  Bëñ de na ree, wandey deret anga ca suufam.  Bëñ weex na, nde deret a ko ronu. 'Sàmmal a sàmm sab xol, nde xalaati xol ngay jëfe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 23)
ndéef: . Xàll yoon yomb na, jaar ca xàll waa jafe.  . Xalu ndéef gëmm na, waaye feyul. (,)
ndéey: Gumba gu tëx, déggul ndéey. 'Téxét bi, deel foog, dof bi, déggal ndéey lu xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 5)
ndefu: Defal boppam 'ndef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndegam: Bu jamar naagu, ndegam sarweet a ngi dund. 'Bul xañ njekk ku ko yelloo, ndegam man nga ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 27)
ndëggastalu: Defal boppam 'ndëggastal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndëggu: Defal boppam 'ndëgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndégu: Defal boppam 'ndég' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndeke: 'ndeke 'Ndeke lépp a nga saxi dég, fépp fees akum ñax, tabaxu doj ba ko wër màbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 31)
ndékki: Boroom ndékki, ku ko jëkka yeewu tëddaat. (,,,,,) Boroom-kër, ku ko jëkka jog, dinga tëddaat. (,) Boroom ndéegó, ku ko jëkka yeewu tëddaat.
ndesu: Defal boppam 'ndes' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndey: Baax ndey, baax baay, baax ci bopp a gën. 'Man it amoon naa baay, di benn bàjjo ci saa ndey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 3)
ndeyam: Bu liir juddoo sex weenu ndeyam, am na lu mu ci jublu : dund. 'Deel bantal aka yedde, day rafetal xel; gone goo bay-bayal, mu gàcceel ndeyam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 15)
ndeyi: . Ku taxawul faratay boroomam, taxaw yu moroomam.  . Ku taxul ndeyi kenn a liggéey, sa ndey du liggéey mukk.
ndeyjooru: Defal boppam 'ndeyjoor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndeyu: Defal boppam 'ndey' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndigal: Bopp bu nara barkeel, nopp ya cay sax day dégg um ndigal.  Bopp bu naree am jàmm, yàlla da cay saxal nopp yuy dégg.  Bopp bu am njeriñ, noppi moo ca sax. 'Santaane da lay niital, ndigal leeralal la, artookub yar di yoonu dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 23)
ndigalal: 'ndigalal 'Doom, defal li la baay sant, te bul wacc ndigalal yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 20)
ndigalu: Defal boppam 'ndigal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Doom, toppal yaru baay, te bul wacc ndigalu yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 8)
ndigg: .	Golo ci cank lañu koy yeew. (,,,) Golo ci ndigg lañu koy yeew. (,)
ndiiraan: .  Mëneesu laa tàgg ba tawtewoo !  . Menn picc mënula yàq ndiiraan. (,,,)
ndiiraanu: Defal boppam 'ndiiraan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndijoor: . Tuuti bet a gën toppal sa ndijoor. (,) . Upp baax na ci laax bu tàng. (,,) . Waa jaa ngi, li sàcc di bañ. 'Gudd fan, mu joxee ndijoor; càmmoñ ba, alal ak teraanga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 16)
ndijooru: Defal boppam 'ndijoor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndimbal: . Ndimbal, na ca fekk loxol boroom. (,,,,,,,,,)
ndimbalu: Defal boppam 'ndimbal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndimo: 'ndimo 'Ana ku masa ëmb ndox ci ndimo?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 4)
ndobin: .  Ku ndóbin rey sa maam, foo séenati lu ñuul, daw. (,,,)  Ku ndóbin rey sa maam, foo séene lu ñuul wara daw.  Ku ndobin rey sa maam, boo séenée lu ñuul daw. (,) Ku ndóbin ray sa maam, boo gisee lu ñuul wara daw.
ndoddu: Defal boppam 'ndodd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndof: . Maa ci joo gis, ndof a ko lal.  Maa ci joo gis, ag ndof la. 'Ñàkk yar, dee; ndof gu réy, sànku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 23)
ndofam: 'ndofam 'Képp ku teey jëfe xam-xam; ab dof ay siiwal ndofam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 16)
ndog: 'ndog 'Ndog soo ca lekk, waccu ko, yiw woo ko wax daldi neen.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 8)
ndogalu: Defal boppam 'ndogal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndokk: .	For nëbb du xeloo jébbalee.  For, ne ndokk, jébbaletil.
ndongo: Bu ndongo sañoon, tawu mburu di am bés bu nekk.
ndono: .	Janax du woo loob deram bay bëtt ñag du ñeme ndono la.  .	Janax matul mbuus, te yàq mbuus.
ndóol: 'ndóol 'Ku ñàkk, su jekkoo ab ndóol, du ko bàyyil fepp, day mel ni waame.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 3)
ndoorte: 'ndoorte 'Bu yàgg lañu ma dëj, ca ndoorte la, bala suuf a sosu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 23)
ndoorteelu: Defal boppam 'ndoorteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndoortel: 'ndoortel 'Ndoortel ay di wal mu tàmbali, luy indib xuloo, bàyyil.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 14)
ndox: Lu nit di naan (Water). 'Naanal ci sa mbalkam bopp, ndox ma balle sa teenu bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 15)
ndoxi: 'ndoxi 'say sàq day fees, ne xéew, say mbàndi ndoxi reseñ di wal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 10)
ndoxu: Defal boppam 'ndox' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ndoxum: Àddina, ndoxum joor la ; buy taa, mu ngay õiis (,)
ndundatu: Defal boppam 'ndundat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nëb: Benn pombiteer bu nëb yàq na pañe.
nëbb: Baax ak bon, loo ca mana nëbb dafa wóorul. (,,)
nëbbal: 'nëbbal 'Ku la nëbbal mbañeel, da lay fen; kuy wër di sos, ab dof la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 18)
nëbbalee: 'nëbbalee 'Su la nëbbalee mbañeel, di la nax it, ag mbonam mujj bir ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 26)
ñebbe: .	Duma õaandook kàmb ndax xaw ma fu muy õebe.  .	Duma ñeexum ñebbe.
nebbon: . Nebbon bi ci dënnu tuabéer, ba tax ko tëbëntu, mungi ci xàbban te mu ne tekk ak moom.
nebbonu: Defal boppam 'nebbon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nëbbu: Defal boppam 'nëbb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñedd: . Kolonk ñedd tallal raxas.  . Kon, ay di buriy sarax.
nee: Baadoolo, boo ko nee kaay jël sa teraanga, mu bañ, danga koy jox toroxalam. 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet nee na: "Aji Sax ji jagoo na ma ca njàlbéen, ma jiitu ca jëfam ya woon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 22)
ñee: Biirub ribaa jarula ñee boroom. 'Bul ñee ku néeg, te bu ko roy fenn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 31)
ñéebloo: 'ñéebloo 'Bul ñéebloo yar gone, bantal ko taxu koo dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 13)
ñéeblu: Defal boppam 'ñéebl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Fiiraange day feesal xolu góor, te du ñéeblu buy feyu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 34)
ñéebluweesu: Defal boppam 'ñéebluwees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
néeg: Bu la sa caxkaal dugub neexee ba nga néeg koo suqi, bu sekkee du la noppal. (,) 'Bul ñee ku néeg, te bu ko roy fenn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 31)
néegam: Baadoolo, ci buntu néegam lay tawtee.
néegi: . Nëbbul te ne gisuma kenn, waaye bul wax ne kenn gisu ma.  . Néegi baadoolo yépp a niroo ba ca gayet ga. 'Këram yoonu njaniiw la, daa bartalu, tàbbi néegi dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 27)
néegu: Defal boppam 'néeg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
néegub: . Néegub jargoñ la, du la fegalub sedd, du la fegalu tàngoor.  . Néegub ngor, kenn terewu ko, ku ci duggul ci yow la. (,) . Neenug neen, du rey bukki. (,)
ñeel: 'ñeel 'Mbégtee ñeel ku daj xel mu rafet ak ku amug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 13)
ñeelu: Defal boppam 'ñeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
neen: Àddina wori neen la. (,,) 'Bul joteek kenn ci neen, te tooñu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 30)
ñeengokat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'ñeengo' (Someone who does...).
ñeent: . Xam-xam ñeent a koy kulóor : di ko bind, di ko jàngale, di ko waxtaane, mbaa di ko jëfe. (,) 'Ñett a ngii ñu dul suur, ba ci ñeent ñu dul ne doy na mukk:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 15)
ñeenteelu: Defal boppam 'ñeenteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñeenti: . Li la dal, dalul galo, mi am ñeenti jabar, ba noppi di raasi ndéem.  . Li la wokk a ma xuri. (,)
ñeentu: Defal boppam 'ñeent' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
neenug: . Néegub jargoñ la, du la fegalub sedd, du la fegalu tàngoor.  . Néegub ngor, kenn terewu ko, ku ci duggul ci yow la. (,) . Neenug neen, du rey bukki. (,)
néew: .	Fu ñuy suuleb néew, kenn du fa jooy ku wopp. (,,) .	Fu sindax di ñaawatee xodd, garab a faa jege. 'Su mbooloo baree, buur am ndam; fu nit ña néew, kilifa du fa dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 28)
ñeewantewu: Defal boppam 'ñeewantew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
néewle: 'néewle 'Ku néewle bey na, meññeef ne gàññ, ñu àtte ko ñàkkal, mu ñàkk ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 23)
néewlee: 'néewlee 'Néewlee ngi lay dikkal nib sàcc, ñàkk gànnaayul la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 11)
néewleek: 'néewleek 'caaxaan aki fen, yal na ma sore, néewleek barele, bu ma ci may lenn, leel ma lu ma doy;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 8)
néewu: Defal boppam 'néew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
neex: Lu rafet (Sweet/Nice). 'Xel mu rafet da lay musal ci jigéenu njaalookat, bokk feneen, di wax lu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 16)
ñeex: Bare ñeex, bare ceree ko gën. (,,)
neexa: . Kuy yoot du sëqat. (,,,) . Kuy yuut a neexa jàngal tëfli. 'Wax ju yiw di lem juy xelli, neexa ñam, di jàmmi yaram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 24)
neexal: Lu waay muus muus doo mëna nettali sa géntuk moroom.  . Neexal ku la fasale, neexal ku la daan a ko gën. 'Ku mer, may ko ci sutura, mu giif; boroom xadar, boqal ko neexal, mu dal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 14)
neexalu: Defal boppam 'neexal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
neexatu: Defal boppam 'neexat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
neexe: . Ku dul toxu doo xam fu dëkk neexe. (,,) 'Xamal ne xel mu rafet ni la neexe; soo xeloo, sa muj rafet, te sa yaakaar du tas.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 14)
neexee: Bu la sa caxkaal dugub neexee ba nga néeg koo suqi, bu sekkee du la noppal. (,)
neexook: 'neexook 'Ku xañ say waajur seen alal te defe ne tooñoo, yaa neexook saay-saayu yàqkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 24)
neexoon: . Su kaw neexoon golo du wàcc suuf. (,,) . Su kumpa deñee, yebeel dugg.
neexu: Defal boppam 'neex' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
neexul: Bu sef neexul, seppali du neex. (,)
neexuñu: Defal boppam 'neexuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñefee: 'ñefee 'Boo ñefee ab ñaawlekat, téxét ba jànge ca; nga yedd kuy dégg, mu xame ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 25)
nég: . Neexum ngont, xam fooy fanaanee ko gën. (,,) . Nég ba jaan dem, nga topp ca watit way dóor. (,,)
négandiku: Defal boppam 'négandik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nekk: Àddina njoowaanu golo la, garab gu nekk lay wékku. (,) 'Mbégte ñeel na ki may déglu, di teewlu ca sama bunt bés bu nekk, di ma toogaanu sama bunt kër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 34)
nekkal: . Ku la ne : “mayeel sa alal”, sa ngërëm la bëgg. (,,) . Ku la nekkal ci naaj bi, nga nekkal ko ci kër gi.  . Ku la sut, nga ne ko njool mi. (,,,)
nekkatu: Defal boppam 'nekkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nekkatunu: Defal boppam 'nekkatun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nekkatuñu: Defal boppam 'nekkatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nekke: Bët yu naqaree gën foo fi nekke. 'Xamal bu baax lu say gàtt nekke, te def sa xel ci say gétt,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 23)
nekkinu: Defal boppam 'nekkin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nekkoon: Cin fuqul bënnul, yax ba ca nekkoon bëgga réer, te ka ko toggoon jógu fa.
nekku: Defal boppam 'nekk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Soo nee sa yoon nekku ci it, kiy natt xol yi, xam na, moom miy wattu sa bakkan, xam na, te kat mooy fey nit jëfam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 12)
nekkul: Boo ma jàppee fu Yàlla nekkul, rey ma.
nelaw: Boo luuboo, ba luubu, bu la Yàlla yeetalee nga nelaw. 'Soo tëddee doo tiit; say nelaw day neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 24)
nelawee: . Lu néeg rafet-rafet, boo nelawee fàtte ko.  . Lu neex, Buur jël, ba mu des fuddu.  . Lu neex du doy.
nelawul: .	Dox sag ndaw aayul, waaye dëkk cee bon.  .	Doxandéem nelawul ba yàndoor.
ñeme: Bala kenn mëna làq ñeme li lay dàq. 'Ku bon day ñeme-ñemelu, ku jub la muy def da koy wóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 29)
ñeme-ñemelu: Defal boppam 'ñeme-ñemel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñemeetu: Defal boppam 'ñemeet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñemeetuñu: Defal boppam 'ñemeetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñemewu: Defal boppam 'ñemew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñemewul: . Ku ñeme yamb, lekk lem. (,,,) . Ku ñemewul guddi, du rañaan.  . Ku ñépp sompal nga duunle.  . Ku ñépp tëfli nga tooy. (,,,)
ñemewuñu: Defal boppam 'ñemewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nemmiku: Defal boppam 'nemmik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nen: Mbaam du daan, Dax du jaaru, Nen du maaj
nenam: .	Géwal, su reppee cib xare, lu mu jiin xeeb ko. (,,) .	Ginaar ak i nenam yépp, boroom ginaar a moom. (,) Ginaar ak i nenam, lépp boroom a ko moom. (,)
nennoo: 'nennoo 'Ku ñàkk ak ka ko nennoo bokk lenn, Aji Sax jee leen boole sàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 13)
ñenteelu: Defal boppam 'ñenteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñépp: Boo baaxee ñépp a lay jur, 'Tuuti ma yàqu yaxeet fi kanam ñépp!" Yemal ci sa jabar' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 14)
nërmeelu: Defal boppam 'nërmeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñett: Àddina ñett a ci gën : àjjana biti, ak weerteewlu ak mëneek say dëkk, ak ku la gis bëgg la. 'Ñett a ngii ñu dul suur, ba ci ñeent ñu dul ne doy na mukk:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 15)
nettali: Bëgga nettali sa gént, nettali sa géntug moroom.
ñetteelu: Defal boppam 'ñetteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñetti: Àddina ñetti fan la, démb ñoom baay, tey ñun, ëllëg sunuy doom. 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
ñëw: Bu dee ku ñëw nga ni du waa ji, léegi waa ji romb la ànd ak gaa ña, te doo xam ni waa jaa. 'Ku yaakaar sa alal sab jéll a ngi ñëw, ku jub day juble ni gàncax gu naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 28)
ñëwee: . Ku la jox ndékki, jox la añ, su reer ñëwee nga yaakaar.  . Ku la mag, ëpp lay sagar. (,,,,,,,,,)
newoon: . Yaa ko mujje mu réer.  . Yaa ma newoon,
newu: 'newu 'Sama jëkkër newu fa, daa dem yoon wu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 19)
newul: Boo déggee “jaar bëgg naw sëb”, newul ñu boole kook moom togg. 'Kuy xuloo lu sa yoon newul, yaa jàpp ci noppi xaj buy romb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 17)
newuñu: Defal boppam 'newuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nëx: 'nëx 'Ku jub bu dee nangul ku bon, yàqu na, ni seyaan bu nëx mbaa teen bu xàbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 26)
ñey: Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci galgal aw ñey.  Bëggu yàpp bu mu la dugal ci wonnub suññéel.  Namm yàpp du ma taxa lekk war-waraan.
nga: Am na baat bu doonte xexer, nga daloo ko. 'Ma nga naan: "Moo téxét bi, foo àppal sa téxét gi?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 22)
ngaa: Àddina yagadeete la, koo ca gis ngaa ndëndam, mu ko tëggal ; noppam ne ko : yàggleel.
ngaak: Gumbaa ngaak yitte yu dul tëb i teen.
ngaana: . Ndegam seq a jommi astamaak cuuj.  . Ndegam tukkee tiis astemaak dee.  . Ndëmm ndey, ngaana baay.
ngag: 'ngag 'Ku moom sa làmmiñ am nga xam-xam, te ku teey am ngag dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 27)
ngajju: Defal boppam 'ngajj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngàjju: Defal boppam 'ngàjj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngalam: Dërëm ak dërëm, ngalam ak ngalam. 'Kàddu yu lay yedd ci kuy dégg, jaarob wurus la mbaa gànjaru ngalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 12)
ngalla: . Ku xam-xam dofloo ngalla ña la xamal. 'Ngalla wutala dégg, wool dég-dég wall.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 3)
ngan: Diiõat mag, dégg sa ngan gi nopp.
ngañaayu: Defal boppam 'ngañaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngànctu: Defal boppam 'ngànct' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nganj: Du man doõõ, bokkuma caa ko gën.  .	Du xamum nganj, yàgg a suub la.
ngànnaayu: Defal boppam 'ngànnaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nganug: Ngan gu yàqu, gunge defaru ko.  . Nganug nàkk amul ub nettali.
ngaw: 'ngaw 'Kuy teral ab dof, jël ngaw doj, takk ko ci mbaq.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 8)
ngay: Àddina, ndoxum joor la ; buy taa, mu ngay õiis (,) 'Xel mu Rafet a ngay woote ca mbedd ma, di xaacu ca pénc ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 20)
ngee: Jàpp sama loxoo ma gënal naan yoon waa ngee.  .	Jarag moo di sàqam jabaraankat.
ngeek: . Yàlla su doon def sago bañee, def sago soppee.  . Yàllaa ngeek ndawal lu dul kóoba.
ngeen: . Koo ne duma la topp fa ngeen jëm dafa sorewul.
ngeena: 'ngeena 'Gone yi, tee ngeena dégg yaru baay, te déglu, ba amug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 1)
ngeer: Boo gajjee am ngeer, ngeer rekk a fay jebbi.
ngegenaay: Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,)
ngelaw: Bu la ngelaw mayee mbaam, ngelaw a la koy xañ. 'Kuy dige te doo joxe, yaay xiin wu ngelaw, mu naaxsaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 14)
ngelawal: 'ngelawal 'Jëw, mer a cay topp; mooy ngelawal taw, taw a cay topp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 23)
ngelawu: Defal boppam 'ngelaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngëlembu: Defal boppam 'ngëlemb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngëlén: 'ngëlén 'Njàqare di ngëlén, dab la, sa musiba def callweer, buub la, njekkar ak fitna dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 27)
ngëlénu: Defal boppam 'ngëlén' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngemb: . Ku am xaritu golo sa ngemb du tag. (,,,)
ngembal: Golo mën naa yéeg, ngembal baay ba tag na !  .	Golo ñaawul, baay ba la niru. (,,,,)
ngëmu: Defal boppam 'ngëm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngëneel: 'ngëneel 'Ku am jabar, am nga ngëneel, am nga yiwu Aji Sax ji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 22)
ngëneeli: 'ngëneeli 'Ku xelu denc këram ngëneeli alal aku diw, ab dof saax-saaxee josam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 20)
ngëneelu: Defal boppam 'ngëneel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngërëm: . Ku la ne : “mayeel sa alal”, sa ngërëm la bëgg. (,,) . Ku la nekkal ci naaj bi, nga nekkal ko ci kër gi.  . Ku la sut, nga ne ko njool mi. (,,,) 'Ku aar garab, lekk ca doom ya; ku toppatoo sa sang, am ngërëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 18)
ngërëmam: Donn sa tabaxub baay, donn ngërëmam a ko gën.
ngërëmu: Defal boppam 'ngërëm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngi: Àddina jigéen la, ju fu mu tollu, mu ngi ëmb te kenn xamul lu muy jur. 'Maa ngi leen di jàngal lu baax, buleen fàtte sama njàngale.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 2)
ngii: 'ngii 'Juróom benn a ngii yu Aji Sax ji bañ, ba ci juróom ñaar yu mu seexlu:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 16)
ngir: Bopp du ngir karaw kese. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
ngiy: . Sama xef yaa ngiy nobante.  . Samba bañ bootaay bay ràkkam.
ngone: Su yàpp yépp meloon na res, sémmiñ du ca am yoon.  . Sug ngone doon dëkk, maam yaa ngi raam.
ngóob: Digooy tool, taxula yemum ngóob. 'Ku ngóob jot, nga góob, xelu nga; ngóob taxaw, ngay nelaw, gàcce la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 5)
ngóobu: Defal boppam 'ngóob' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngoog: Boroom bakkan bu ne la “mbas maa ngoog”, nee ko : “fas Yàlla”. 'Kuy dégg artu yu koy musal, ku rafet xel a ngoog.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 31)
ngoogu: Defal boppam 'ngoog' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngoon: Kuy jaay ker balaay ngoon nga wàññi sa njëg.  Ku jaay ker ba takkusaan wara yombal.
ngooñ: . Lekk ñax mu wow, aste lekk ngooñ ak dugub, dina làpploo fas.  . Lëkkaayu Yàlla, xalangu du ko dindi. (,,) 'Gannaaw bu ñu gubee, ba ñax saxaat, ñu dajale ngooñ ma ca tund yac,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 25)
ngoonee: .  Kuy jaay ker, bu jant sowee nga làlli. (,) Kuy jaay ker, bu ngoonee nga lamble.
ngoonu: Defal boppam 'ngoon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ngoonug: 'ngoonug 'Ngoonug suuf la, jant biy lang, muy lëndëm di gëna guddi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 9)
ngóor: . Mel né ba Ngóor jaaye mbaam ma te ne nopp ya duñ(u) ca bokk.  . Mel né tuq su bënn te saañ ba réer, (te mu defoon lu neex). 'Ngóor si doom, saa doomi bopp!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 2)
ngóora: Daw ba rëcc, ci ngóora la bokk. (,) 'Lekk lem ju ëpp baaxul, te wut waaw-góor du ngóora.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 27)
ngor: Bëgge du mat, ngor mat. 'Bu la ngor ak worma dëddu, booleel takk ci sa baat, bind ko ci sa àlluway xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 3)
nguur: . Ku bañ ñu saaga la, doo saagaante.  . Ku baña dee ci nguur doo falu.  . Ku bëgga dee, wéqu. (,,,)
nguuram: Buur bu amul ay gaay, nguuram wóoral. 'Buur daa sib kuy def lu bon, ndax njub mooy dëgëral nguuram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 12)
nguuru: Defal boppam 'nguur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nib: Bu ñépp melee nib yaafus, tool booy. 'Néewlee ngi lay dikkal nib sàcc, ñàkk gànnaayul la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 11)
ñibbi: .	Gan su dikkee silmaxa la, su dee ñibbi, géwël la. (,) .	Gan yomb naa muñal.
ñibbisi: .	Jolonker dina këf yàpp, di yóbbu, di lekk.  .	Jom ay tukki, waaye fullaay ñibbisi. 'Mbuusum xaalis la ŋàbb, yóbbu, du ñibbisi ndare weer wi fees dell."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 20)
nii: . Ñaar a ngi nii ñu xam : 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
ñii: Bu ñii di jooy, ñee ngay ree. 'Ñii kat seen bopp lañuy fiir, seen bakkanu bopp lañu sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 18)
ñiimu: Defal boppam 'ñiim' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñiimukaayu: Defal boppam 'ñiimukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
niin: . Lekkuloo diw, sa gémmiñ niin.  Lekkoo, sa gémmiñ niin. 'Ku topp sa bànneex, mujje ñàkk; ku sopp biiñ ak lu niin du woomle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 17)
niir: 'niir 'Ci xam-xamam la ndoxi xóote ya ne jàyy, ay niir di lay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 20)
niiru: Defal boppam 'niir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
niital: 'niital 'Santaane da lay niital, ndigal leeralal la, artookub yar di yoonu dund.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 23)
niitu: Defal boppam 'niit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nijaay: Doom ju amul nijaay ci mbedd lay dégge. (,) Doom ju amul nijaay ci mbedd lay yaroo.
niroo: . Nëbbul te ne gisuma kenn, waaye bul wax ne kenn gisu ma.  . Néegi baadoolo yépp a niroo ba ca gayet ga.
nirook: .	Faraasu dafa nirook yàq góob ñëw weddi ko.  Faraasu nuroo naak yàq, waaye góob a ko weddi. 'Ab dof sax bu noppee, nirook boroom xel; ku ne cell, ñu fooge lag muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 28)
niru: Golo mën naa yéeg, ngembal baay ba tag na !  .	Golo ñaawul, baay ba la niru. (,,,,)
nit: Góor walla jigeen (Person). 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
nitam: Buur bu baax dina sàmm i nitam.
niti: . Niti téyé, ku ñu dogal tubéy itam, ngemb laa nga ca wet ga di la xaar.  . Njaay mu xajam lamb. 'Lii it ay kàddu yu xelu la, di yu Suleymaan, ay niti Esekiyas buurub Yuda sotti ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 1)
nitu: 'nitu 'Buur day bége jawriñ ju xelu, di mbugal nitu gàcce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 35)
niw: Ba mbott bëggee tollu niw ñay, daa funki ba toj te sottiwul.
niy: 'niy 'Ag maas a ngi, seeni sell niy saamar, seeni gëñ niy paaka, ñuy lekk néew-ji-doole, ba raafal leen ci réew mi, ba ku ñàkk jeex ci biir nit ñi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 14)
ñiy: .  Ñiy gàmmu ak ñiy raas déem bokkuñu.   . Ñoõali neexul beykat, bu ko defee daa jekkul.  . Ñoxar a neexa ñoqali. 'Ci samay pexe la njiit di saytoo, ñook kàngam yeek ñiy àtte dëgg ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 16)
njaaloo: . Ku ñu nettali sa jëw nga mer la nga def rafetul.  . Ku ñu waccul doo tala njaaloo. 'Ku njaaloo gis ko' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 19)
njaalookat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'njaaloo' (Someone who does...). 'Xel mu rafet da lay musal ci jigéenu njaalookat, bokk feneen, di wax lu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 16)
njaamu: Defal boppam 'njaam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njaatige: 'njaatige 'Njaatige luy liggéeyloo ab dof ak kuy romb, daa mel ni fittkat buy gaañ ku ne.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 10)
njaatigeem: 'njaatigeem 'Ndaw lu wóor day seral xolu njaatigeem, mooy ndox mu sedd ci tàngooru ngóob.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 13)
njaaxaanaay: . Ndey géléem, baay géléem, bu sëful i ngaax waar i mbokkam.  . Ndey-ji-seex, njaaxaanaay lay tëdde. (,,,,,,,)
njaaxum: . Ku ne dama ne, raw nga say buum. Buñ la yeewee, du kenn yow a  Ku ne dama ni raw nga say buum, boo waxeeg njaaxum yaa yeew sa bopp, kenn yeewu la.
njaay: Bëgg-bëgg yee wuute, moo tax njaay may jar ca ja ba. (,)
njabarkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'njabar' (Someone who does...).
njaboot: . Sama loxo jotul sama gannaaw.  . Sama nijaay a boot njaboot gi.  . Sama rakk te duma rëkk. 'Tiitul ci njaboot gi sedd bu metti, ndax ñoom ñépp ay tegley yére.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 21)
njabootam: 'njabootam 'Day jóg te bët setul, di waajal njëlu njabootam, aka sas ay janqam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 15)
njabootu: Defal boppam 'njaboot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njafaan: 'njafaan 'Mu rendi ag juram, njafaan ay biiñam, xelli, taaj ay ndabam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 2)
njafaan-kat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'njafaan-' (Someone who does...).
njafaanlu: Defal boppam 'njafaanl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njafaanu: Defal boppam 'njafaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njàlbéen: . Ku tey xamoon njàlbéen, muj di noflaay. (,,) . Ku togg sa cin, yaw lay jëkka xeeñ. 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet nee na: "Aji Sax ji jagoo na ma ca njàlbéen, ma jiitu ca jëfam ya woon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 22)
njàlbéenu: Defal boppam 'njàlbéen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
njàmbaar: 'njàmbaar 'Muñ mer, moo gën njàmbaar; tënk sa bakkan moo raw nangub dëkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 32)
njàmbaaru: Defal boppam 'njàmbaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njàmbat: . Lu defu, waxu, te lu aay di njàmbat.  Lu defu waxu.
njanaaw: 'njanaaw 'Doo firib caax, ba jàpp njanaaw luy xoole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 17)
njàng: . Njalbéenug toroxte dey neex. (,) . Njàng mu ne am na àllarba. (,) . Njàng mu ne, ci baa lay tàmbalee.  . Njariñ : loo fekke !
njàngale: 'njàngale 'Doom, bul fàtte sama njàngale, defal sa xel ci saay santaane,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 1)
njàngam: 'njàngam 'Xamalal ku jub, mu yokk njàngam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 9)
njàngu: Defal boppam 'njàng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njaniiw: .	Jaaykat day war géléem, jëndkat war mbaam, ñu daje ciw loo.  .	Jaaykatu yax demetil njaniiw. (,) 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
njañu: Defal boppam 'njañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njàppu: Defal boppam 'njàpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njàqare: 'njàqare 'Kon boo sëngéemee, man it ma ree, njàqare dab la, may tex-texi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 26)
njàqareeku: Defal boppam 'njàqareek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njaqu: Defal boppam 'njaq' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njariñ: Bu la caxkaal dugub neexee, ba nga néeg koo suqi, bu sëkkée du la barilu njariñ. 'Am koo gën am xaalis, te njariñ laa raw wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 14)
njariñam: Baadoolo bu ragal naaj ragal na njariñam. (,) Baadoolo bu bañee naaj, bañ nak mbokkam.
njariñu: Defal boppam 'njariñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njartel: 'njartel 'Day gis njartel liggéeyam, te làmpam du fey guddi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 18)
njaxlaf: 'njaxlaf 'Njaxlaf, jiitu; yaafus, des gannaaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 24)
njaxlafee: 'njaxlafee 'Bul bëggi nelaw, ba ñàkk dab la; boo njaxlafee, lekk ba desal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 13)
njébbalu: Defal boppam 'njébbal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njebbitu: Defal boppam 'njebbit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njéeréer: . Yàlla na piccum jàmm naaw ba ñu koy wax booba njéeréer a tax.  . Yàlla nee na “duma sànk mukk yoolu kuy rafetal”
njeexitalu: Defal boppam 'njeexital' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njëg: Boroom njëg a yab luy jaay.
njëgam: Boo jaayee juróom ñaari màgget, boo geestoo yem ci sa maam, xam njëgam.
njéggalu: Defal boppam 'njéggal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njégu: Defal boppam 'njég' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njëgu: Defal boppam 'njëg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'say xar da lay amal koddaay, bëy yi génneel la njëgu tool.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 26)
njekk: . Lu la yar ak teggin mayul, leneen du la ko may. (,) . Lu li doon da na xaq um njekk. 'Kon nag aweel mbeddum waa ju baax, toppal yoonu defkatu njekk,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 20)
njëkk: . Ni ñuy def saa njëkk kenn du ko def saa béjjén.  . Niitu ba lakkle. (,) 'Ku njëkk a layoo, ñu ne yaa yey, ba keroog ka nga joteel weddi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 17)
njëkka: Ba nga séenee ron, ron a la jëkka séen. (,,,) Ba nga laata séen ron, ron a la njëkka séen. 'Teralal Aji Sax ji ci sa alal ak loo njëkka meññle,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 9)
