njekkal: . Njeexaataat, foo foreeb doom, delloo fa sab loxo.  . Njekk-njekkal a yàqoon gëti golo.
njekkar: 'njekkar 'Njàqare di ngëlén, dab la, sa musiba def callweer, buub la, njekkar ak fitna dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 27)
njëkkeesu: Defal boppam 'njëkkees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njekku: Defal boppam 'njekk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njël: .	Fa ñuy tëgge ab xàndoor, deesu fa ñaani njël ; fa ñu koy bey lañu koy ñaane. (,)
njëlam: .  Lu cuuj tuut-tuut gàddu njëlam.  .  Lu daay tàkk-tàkk bàyyi fa kuréel. (,)
njëloo: . Su nga fekkee ñu di xuloo, su nga ca faree, waxete dëgg ga.  . Su nga njëloo, lay laal la.
njëlu: Defal boppam 'njël' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
njeneeru: Defal boppam 'njeneer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njerembu: Defal boppam 'njeremb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nji: 'nji 'Buur, na kanam ga leer, sa bakkan mucc, su la baaxee, mu mel ni taw bu toppum nji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 15)
njiglaay: 'njiglaay 'Alalu ger njiglaay la ca ka koy joxe, ba fu mu jublu, mu nooy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 8)
njiin: Lu njiin Njaaga, te yaay Njaag.
njiit: Dëkkub gumba, patt a fay buur.  Dëkkub gumba, patt a fay njiit. 'Ci samay pexe la njiit di saytoo, ñook kàngam yeek ñiy àtte dëgg ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 16)
njiitlaayu: Defal boppam 'njiitlaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njiitu: Defal boppam 'njiit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njobbaxtalu: Defal boppam 'njobbaxtal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njolloor: . Ñettiku ca ba muy tooy, ndax bu wowee kadadaan.  . Ñey mënul ci daqaar dara, xanaa gësëm-gësëm bàyyi. (,) . Ñey wu dox njolloor moo lu njiinam sakku.
njoñ: . Werante xuuxaan, tekki tubéy. (,,) .  Wërsëg dina jóge ci njoñ. (,) . Wërsëg, soo dawee mu daagu.
njoofkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'njoof' (Someone who does...).
njort: . Njort lu ñaaw dinay faral di wattu boroom.  . Njula du yàgoo cim xel.
njotlaayu: Defal boppam 'njotlaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njotu: Defal boppam 'njot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njub: 'njub 'ngir yaru ci  jëfe xel ak njub ak yoon, di jubal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 3)
njubadi: 'njubadi 'Ku ji njubadi, góob fitna, yet wa muy dóore, damm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 8)
njubbu: Defal boppam 'njubb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njubte: 'njubte 'Ab soxor it, dàqal, mu sore buur, ngir njubte law, jalam sax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 5)
njubu: Defal boppam 'njub' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njuddu-fippu: Defal boppam 'njuddu-fipp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njugub: . Purux du gërëm ñamu daaw. (,,,,,,) . Puubi njugub ci boppam la rot. .
njukkalu: Defal boppam 'njukkal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Joxleen ko njukkalu ñaqam,jëfam di woyam ca pénc ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 31)
njur: 'njur 'Ku seedeel sa moroom ay fen, yen nga ko aw njur mbaa saamar mbaa fitt.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 18)
njureelu: Defal boppam 'njureel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njurukaayu: Defal boppam 'njurukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
njuumte: . Njullit moo di naan màndiwul, mu bàyyi.  . Njuumte du ñàkk, yàgg caa bon. (,,) . Njuutaay guddagul, mbate géléem juutoo.  . Nopp a mag boroom. (,)
noflaay: . Ku tey xamoon njàlbéen, muj di noflaay. (,,) . Ku togg sa cin, yaw lay jëkka xeeñ.
noflaayu: Defal boppam 'noflaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
noggatu: Defal boppam 'noggat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
noggatukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'noggatu' (Someone who does...).
ñoll: 'ñoll 'Naan biiñ ak ñaawle, naan ñoll, tanqale, ku mu nax xeluwoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 1)
noo: . Wax, ab xottiku la, kenn ku ne, yaa xam noo koy ñawe. (,,,) . Wax daaneelul bëstul.
ñoo: Bëñ ak làmmiñ ñoo dëkk, bés bu set dañuy xuloo, waaye dañuy jubóowaat. 'Ag maas a ngi daŋŋiiral; aka ñoo mana xeeloo!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 13)
ñook: 'ñook 'Ci samay pexe la njiit di saytoo, ñook kàngam yeek ñiy àtte dëgg ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 16)
ñoom: Àddina ñetti fan la, démb ñoom baay, tey ñun, ëllëg sunuy doom. 'Doom, bul ànd ak ñoom ciw yoon, bul jaare fa ñuy jaar,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 15)
ñoomu: Defal boppam 'ñoom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
noon: Baax du taxa ñàkk i noon. 'Bu sab noon daanoo, bu ko bànneexoo, bu tërëfee, bu ko bége.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 17)
noonu: Defal boppam 'noon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku ànd akub sàcc, sa noonu bopp nga: soo waxee dëgg, yoon topp la; soo ko miimee, Yàlla topp lae.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 24)
ñooñu: Defal boppam 'ñooñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
noonub: .  Mer, noonub boroom la.   . Mere buur, jege xol baa ko gën.
noor: . Koo ba noor lees koy wut.
ñooru: Defal boppam 'ñoor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Artu yu ñu la biralal moo gën cofeel gu la boroom ñooru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 5)
noot: 'noot 'Noot néew-ji-doole ngir yokkule, mbaa may boroom alal, loo ci def mu wàññi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 16)
nooteelu: Defal boppam 'nooteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nootkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'noot' (Someone who does...).
nootu: Defal boppam 'noot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nooy: . Kuy dund di xeeñ, boo deewee du mata wax.  Kuy dund di saxar, boo deewee nooy mel ? 'Alalu ger njiglaay la ca ka koy joxe, ba fu mu jublu, mu nooy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 8)
ñooy: .	Guney tey ñooy dooni magi ëllëg.  .	Gunge àgg baaxu ca.
nopp: Am nopp yu firéeku, taxula am dég-dég. 'Nopp buy dégg ak bët buy gis, Aji Sax jee sàkk lu ci nekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 12)
noppal: Bu la sa caxkaal dugub neexee ba nga néeg koo suqi, bu sekkee du la noppal. (,) 'Yaral sa doom, mu noppal la, bànneexal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 17)
noppaleesu: Defal boppam 'noppalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
noppalu: Defal boppam 'noppal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ragalal Aji Sax ji ndax nga gudd fan, noppalu te baña loru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 23)
noppaluji: 'noppaluji 'Ku noppee jëfe xel, noppaluji njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 16)
noppam: Àddina yagadeete la, koo ca gis ngaa ndëndam, mu ko tëggal ; noppam ne ko : yàggleel.
noppee: . Ku mënuta xaajal boppam, du mëna jeexal moroomam. (,) . Ku mer noppee muus. 'Bu ci noppee ja jàkk, te jàpp ko ci sa biir xel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 21)
noppi: Bopp bu nara barkeel, nopp ya cay sax day dégg um ndigal.  Bopp bu naree am jàmm, yàlla da cay saxal nopp yuy dégg.  Bopp bu am njeriñ, noppi moo ca sax. 'Waxi xeebaate ñàkk bopp la, ku am ag dégg day noppi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 12)
noppiloo: Kuy jooy di siime du maye am ñeex. (,) . Kuy jooy du noppiloo.
noppiwul: 'noppiwul 'Ku rafet xel day xam, ne cell; bu dof noppiwul, yàqule teew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 14)
noppiwunu: Defal boppam 'noppiwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
noppu: Defal boppam 'nopp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Taaru jongama ju xel maa gàtt, mooy jaaro wurus ci noppu mbaam-xuux.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 22)
ñoqali: .  Ñiy gàmmu ak ñiy raas déem bokkuñu.   . Ñoõali neexul beykat, bu ko defee daa jekkul.  . Ñoxar a neexa ñoqali.
ñor: . Lu ma waxadi-waxadi, bu ma giseeb nen, ne : “nen a ngi”.  . Lu ma xam ci ginaar gu ñor, lu-dul lekk ? 'Ku dox ciy xal it, say tànk ñor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 28)
ñoral: . Matt gay ñoral cin, cib àll lañ koy taxane.  . Màtt nga sa mpàllanq.
ñoree: . Yan bi diis, ku ci sàkkal boroom yanu mu war laa gërëm.  . Yàpp, bu ñoree, du jar àbb paaka. 'Nit bége na tontam lu dal, kàddu gu jib fa mu ñoree neex!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 23)
ñoriku: Defal boppam 'ñorik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñorle: . Mbaxalum xeer, du ka jëkka sóor ay jëkka ñorle.  Mbaxalum xeer, jëkk caa taal taxu caa jëkka ñorle.  Mbaxalum xeer njëkka baxle taxula njëkka ñorle.
ñorul: . Làmmiñ du lekk moroom ma, te toggeesu ko. (,,) Làmmiñ wenn mënula lekk moroom ma te ñorul.
noyyee: 'noyyee 'Seede buy fen muccul mbugalam, kuy noyyee ay fen du rëcc àtteem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 5)
nteelu: Defal boppam 'nteel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nugglu: Defal boppam 'nuggl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñurumtu: Defal boppam 'ñurumt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ñurumtukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'ñurumtu' (Someone who does...).
ñuul: Bëñ bu weex tàll, te deret ju ñuul kukk lal ko.  Bëñ de na ree, wandey deret anga ca suufam.  Bëñ weex na, nde deret a ko ronu.
ñuulaayu: Defal boppam 'ñuulaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
nuy: .	Fu nag nekk, bukki dee fa. (,,,) .	Fu nuy feese, kenn du fa jooy domp.  .	Fu ñépp di say, ku sayul, yaa dof.
ñuy: Ba nga déggee mbott mën nam ndox, ma ñu baxal taxul ñuy wax.  Mbott mën na ndox, waaye du mu tàng. 'Doom, bul ànd ak ñoom ciw yoon, bul jaare fa ñuy jaar,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 15)
nuyoo: . Lu feeñ cib sëy, nuyoo woon na ca ngoro ga, dañu koo fayul.  Lu gane cib séy nuyoo na ci ngoro dañu koo fayul. 'Bu mbon nuyoo, xeebeel topp ca; jëf ju ñaaw, gàcce rekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 3)
nuyu: .	Dugal ginaar ci ngunu laa mën, waaye xawma fu geen gay féetee.  .	Dukk-dukk ak yoll-yoll, yépp ci xél yi la, waaye wégét ay seen baay.  .	Duma bëgg lu la neex ba ne la Yàllaa ngi lay nuyu. (,)
ŋaamu: Defal boppam 'ŋaam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ŋalŋalu: Defal boppam 'ŋalŋal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ŋanku: Defal boppam 'ŋank' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ŋankukaayu: Defal boppam 'ŋankukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ŋaralekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'ŋarale' (Someone who does...).
ŋoyaalu: Defal boppam 'ŋoyaal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
õaax: .	Géléem gu la ngelaw may, bu ngéléenee tënkal.  .	Géléem nga, sëf õaax sippi õaax.
õaniitu: Defal boppam 'õaniit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
õëb: . Ku digeek gaana mbëkkante wara õëb fanaanal.
oliwu: Defal boppam 'oliw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
onk: 'onk 'Ngay mujje onk, desey yax, jeex tàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 11)
oom: Céebo du fi bàyyikoo guufa oom.  Céebo du jóge guufooy woom.
óom: Bey, ci sa wewu tànk. (,,) Mbey ci sa wewu tànk. (,) Bey ci say óom.
opp: . ôóobi, matula jàngal nopp-si-jaboot.  . Opp ju metti du taxa dee. (,)
paaka: Damay daas fanaanal ndax rendi day bette.  Daasal sa paaka fanaanal rendi day bette. 'Ag maas a ngi, seeni sell niy saamar, seeni gëñ niy paaka, ñuy lekk néew-ji-doole, ba raafal leen ci réew mi, ba ku ñàkk jeex ci biir nit ñi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 14)
paat: . Su sàngoo dër, na wottu jége safara. (,) . Su sippu õàbboo gëntee paat. (,)
pàccu: Defal boppam 'pàcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
paftan: . Su ñu nee : “na xob yépp yëngu”, paftan taxul ñuy wax.  . Su picc geddee ab déeg, dafa ñal ag suux. (,)
paj: 'paj 'Moo tax musiba di jekki dal ko, mu jekki yàqu, ba wees paj.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 15)
pàkkam: 'pàkkam 'Ku bew, Aji Sax ji màbb sa kër; ab jëtun, Aji Sax ji ñoŋal pàkkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 25)
pakku: Defal boppam 'pakk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pal: Biir dug pal. (,) 'ndax alal wéyul fàww, ag pal du ñeel sëtoo sët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 24)
palaas: . Ku amul palto, amul palaas, amul njariñ.  . Ku amul yaay, nàmp maam. (,)
palanteer: . Yàlla amul palanteer bu mu naan la tollu ma foofu ma jox la.  . Yàlla bindul ku mu dul rey waaye am na ñu mu dul toroxal.  . Yàlla bu mbootu di menn. 'Damaa tollu sama palanteer, séentu ca xarante ya,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 6)
palanteeru: Defal boppam 'palanteer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
palto: . Ku amul palto, amul palaas, amul njariñ.  . Ku amul yaay, nàmp maam. (,)
pañe: Benn pombiteer bu nëb yàq na pañe.
pànk: 'pànk 'Doom ju dof naqaru baay baa, te jabar ju pànk mooy senn bu dakkul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 13)
pann: . Kuy reere pann, boo woppee fande. (,,) . Kuy rootaani, seetil boroom goj ak baag.  . Kuy rooteek sendal, doo yóbbum ndox.  . Kuy sàkki ron, ku ko abal kàndaama bañu ko.  . Kuy sàngoo làmmiñ boo noppee rafle.
par: . Wax ju bari, wax ju néew te wér a ko gën.  . Wax ju jëkk, fasu par la, tontu la, naaru-góor. 'Par-parloo cib àtte baaxul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 23)
pare: Golo ci ndigg lañu koy yeew ba pare di ko xool.  Golo ci ndigg lees koy yeew.
parlu: Defal boppam 'parl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pas-pas: Pàq bi ñu la xame, boo ko watee ñu bàyyi la.  . Pas-pas ba Yàlla fas, kenn mënu ko fecci.
pas-pasu: Defal boppam 'pas-pas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pastéefu: Defal boppam 'pastéef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
patt: Dëkkub gumba, patt a fay buur.  Dëkkub gumba, patt a fay njiit.
pàttaliku: Defal boppam 'pàttalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pax: Bu fukk dee gas, fukk di suul, pënd ay bari waaye pax du fa am. (,,,,,,,) 'saw làmmiñ yeb la cim pax, nga keppu?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 2)
peccum: .  Peccum liir bu neexee, ndey jaa jàpp ca wagg ya. (,,) Peccum liir bu neexee, ndey jaa téyé ca wagg ya di yëngal.  Peccum liir, bu neexee, ndeyam a téye ca tank ya.
peelu: Defal boppam 'peel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
peeñu: Defal boppam 'peeñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
péey: Boo xejjatee ci péey ba fa jee ja.
péeyam: . Nit a ngay jëggaani lu ni gàññ ca péeyam.  . Nit ak jikkoom, pax rekk.
péeyu: Defal boppam 'péey' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
peggu: Defal boppam 'pegg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pénc: .	Garab gay doon pénc lawbe du ko gis ba di ko gor. (,) .	Garab gu dul meññ du am yoon. (,,) 'Xel mu Rafet a ngay woote ca mbedd ma, di xaacu ca pénc ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 20)
pënd: Bu fukk dee gas, fukk di suul, pënd ay bari waaye pax du fa am. (,,,,,,,) 'laata Yàllaa sàkk suuf aki àllam ak feppu pënd ci àddina.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 26)
pëndaxu: Defal boppam 'pëndax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pëndu: Defal boppam 'pënd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pëndub: . Pëndub tànk a gën pënduw taat. (,,) Tànk yu pënd a gën taat yu pënd.
penku: Defal boppam 'penk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pepp: . Loo mel ni kuy xëddé pepp, te fajar giy niit.  . Loo mën-mën biiru waay, mu def ca loo yëgul. (,) . Loo muus-muus, sab goro gën laa muus. 'Nit a ngi móolu kuy denc pepp, ba mu ñàkkee, di gërëm ka koy jaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 26)
peppu: Defal boppam 'pepp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
per: . “Wacc ma, ma wasin” talula njaaloo.  .  Waggi rammatu du wékk tama.  . Wallu teen, ca pind ba rekk ngay yem.  . Wann per a gën, diñé. 'Wurus am na ak gànjar yu bare, waaye kàdduy xam-xam a gën per yu jafe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 15)
peram: Dibtóon gàtt na, waaye peram kenn du ko yéeg.
perantal: . Rafet perantal, jarula ñeewe sa moroomum jeeg, bu doom ya màggee, àtte.
perdu: Defal boppam 'perd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
përëg: 'përëg 'Day gañu di góor-góorlu aka dëgëral përëg ya.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 17)
përëgu: Defal boppam 'përëg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pes: Balaa ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm, xaaral ba xam la mu waliis.  Balaa ngaa pes gëmmiñu sàmm xam lu mu waliis.
pesewu: Defal boppam 'pesew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pexe: Bóli gu dog, doktoor amu ca pexe.  Bóli gu dog, tiiñ nab doktoor. (,,) Bóli gu dog tiiñ na ab doktoor.  Bóli gu dog, doktoor mënu ci dara.  Put gu dog tiiñ na doktoor. 'Waaye loo ci góobe, gar ko, say pexe suur la këll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 31)
pexeem: Bañi daaw su bëggee ren, pexeem a joy. 'Ndaw si jekki dajeek moom, sol yérey gànc, lal pexeem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 10)
pexem: 'pexem 'Pexem dof bàkkaar la, te kuy ñaawle, ñu sib la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 9)
pexey: 'pexey 'Boroom njekk, lu jekk lay mébét; ab soxor di lal pexey wor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 5)
pey: . Liggéey bu amulug pey, yàgg lay taawloo, caatloo bon. (,) 'Coxor feyul boroom, day naxe; deel def njekk, sag pey wóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 18)
peyam: 'peyam 'Kiy jëfe njekk jot peyam, dunde; ab soxor di bàkkaare alalam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 16)
peyooru: Defal boppam 'peyoor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
picc: Lu ñor tàbbi, gajen baay bañ.  . Lu ñu dëppe sendal, aayewuñu ko weñ.  . Lu picc bare-bare, du teree ji dugub. (,) . Lu picc dégg, sabe. 'Dawal ni kéwél gu rëccub rëbb, ne fërr ni picc mu raw ab fiirkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
piis: 'piis 'day piis, di wokkeb tànk, di waxe baaraam,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 13)
pindu: Defal boppam 'pind' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pitaxu: Defal boppam 'pitax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pombiteer: Benn pombiteer bu nëb yàq na pañe.
ponkal: Bukki bu daanee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bukki, bu songee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bu bukki dabee gaynde, ca doxin wa la.  Bukki su yabee gaynde ca doxin wa la.
ponku: Defal boppam 'ponk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
pont: . Pont day dugge, te kenn du ko dugg.  . Póotum pël, bu wowee laab.
pooj: . Na nga fexe ba ku Tabaski jox la pooj, foo Tamxarite, jox ko këllu cere.  . Na ñu bàyyi wànneen ba xam nu muy mujjeek i gëtam.
pooju: Defal boppam 'pooj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
poojub: Lu paaka yàgg-yàgg ca kuude ga, yàgg ca poojub boroom lu ko raw.  . Pàq bi ñu la xame, boo ko watee ñu ba la. (,)
poot: Déegub poot, ay xam du ko naan, ay xamul a koy naan. (,,) Déegub póot, xam du ko naan, xamul a koy naan.
póotum: . Pont day dugge, te kenn du ko dugg.  . Póotum pël, bu wowee laab.
poqe: 'poqe 'Ma ngay yor poqe ak këccu, di ëcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 19)
portalekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'portale' (Someone who does...).
posetu: Defal boppam 'poset' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
poto-poto: . Xaleel poto-poto la, noo ko raaxe rekk lay wéye.  . Xalele bañ na loo mu tàmm.
potu: Àddina potu ndaa la, ku naan jox sa moroom mu naan. (,,,)
powum: . Powum jaar ca buntu pax ma.  . Powum xaalis du yàgg. (,)
puj: Ba ngay séen puj, puj a la jëkka séen.
puju: . Puju néeg dana xeex ak taw, te boroom néeg yégul ko.  Puju néeg dana xeex ak taw, tey seelu yegul.
puso: Cerey puso, ku ko soq, wol ko, mooñ ko du la jaaxal. (,)
put: Bóli gu dog, doktoor amu ca pexe.  Bóli gu dog, tiiñ nab doktoor. (,,) Bóli gu dog tiiñ na ab doktoor.  Bóli gu dog, doktoor mënu ci dara.  Put gu dog tiiñ na doktoor.
puukarey: . Puukarey àddina ku ko yendoo, torox ngay fanaane.  . Raagalkati ràmmkat yomb na ràmm.
puuru: Defal boppam 'puur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raadu: Defal boppam 'raad' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raaf: . Lu dugg ci benn nopp génn ca bale.  .  Lu dul dëgg du yàgg. (,,,)  .  Lu dul doy nu mu tollu doy.   . Lu dul jàmm, jàmm a ko gën.  . Lu dul raaf amul ci àddina si.  . Lu dul Yàlla, ag neen la. (,,,) . Lu ëpp tuuru. (,,)
raafal: 'raafal 'Ag maas a ngi, seeni sell niy saamar, seeni gëñ niy paaka, ñuy lekk néew-ji-doole, ba raafal leen ci réew mi, ba ku ñàkk jeex ci biir nit ñi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 14)
raam: Di raam, di sàcc, su màggee jël i gétt. (,)
raamali: 'raamali 'Yaa ngi ci sa loxoy moroom, kon defal nii, doom, ba rëcc: doxal tinuji ko, raamali ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 3)
raasaatu: Defal boppam 'raasaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raasklu: Defal boppam 'raaskl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raaskru: Defal boppam 'raaskr' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raaxe: . Xaleel poto-poto la, noo ko raaxe rekk lay wéye.  . Xalele bañ na loo mu tàmm.
raay: Beg raay ni tillug beyaat. 'Lu mel ni lem la jigéenu njaalookat di wax, làmmiñ wa ni diw gu ñu lay raay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 3)
rab: Boo gisee lëf lëf a tax, boo gisee yàpp, rab a dee. 'Kilifa guy soxore néew-ji-doole mook gaynde guy yëmmoo yem, mbaa rab wuy songe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 15)
ràbb: Lu nit nangu, teg ko ko dagan na. (,) . Lu waay ñàkk, waayam a ko amul. (,,) . Lu waay ràbb, rax ca dënk. 'Kuy ràbb lu bon lal pexey wor, kuy digle jàmm, am mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 20)
ràbbkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'ràbb' (Someone who does...).
ràbbu: Defal boppam 'ràbb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rafet: Diggante gaana ak gumba, deru Maam Yàlla du fa set/rafet. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
rafetal: Buur bu baax dina rafetal réewam. 'Day guddal saw fan, di rafetal sa jikko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 22)
rafetee: 'rafetee 'Ki rafet xel mooy kiy ràññee, te su wax rafetee, dég-dég yomb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 21)
rafetlu: Defal boppam 'rafetl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku Aji Sax ji rafetlu say jëf, say bañ sax, mu jubaleek yaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 7)
rafetoo: . Ku soqul, wolul, ba la ngaa laax duggub ruq.  . Ku sori taxa ñaaw, fa nga dëkk, rafetoo fa.  . Ku sumb tooy. (,)
rafetul: . Ku ñu fey sa bor nga mer, la nga leble rafetul.
rafetum: 'rafetum 'Na dof di jëfe, njub la ci moom; dégg ndigal rafetum xel la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 15)
rafle: . Kuy reere pann, boo woppee fande. (,,) . Kuy rootaani, seetil boroom goj ak baag.  . Kuy rooteek sendal, doo yóbbum ndox.  . Kuy sàkki ron, ku ko abal kàndaama bañu ko.  . Kuy sàngoo làmmiñ boo noppee rafle. 'ndax ku bëgg lekk aka màndi, ñàkk dab la, dajjant it, rafle rekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 21)
ragal: Baadoolo bu ragal naaj ragal na njariñam. (,) Baadoolo bu bañee naaj, bañ nak mbokkam. 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
ragalal: 'ragalal 'Bul doyloo sa xel mu rafet, ragalal Aji Sax ji, dëddu mbon;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 7)
ragalatunu: Defal boppam 'ragalatun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ragalee: .	Gëja gis sa màgget, bu mu tax nga defe ne sax na ay bëñ. (,) .	Géléem bu ñemeñee fanaan biti, bu ragalee fanaan biti.  .	Géléem ci biiri béy.
ragalul: .	Fàkk taal dëju ca ku ca ragalul yàlla it war caa ragal taat wu làkk.  .	Falleen bët, folli nopp. (,) 'gaynde, mooy buuru rab yi, ragalul kenn;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 30)
ragaluñu: Defal boppam 'ragaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raglu: Defal boppam 'ragl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràkkaaju: Defal boppam 'ràkkaaj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku xelu day ragal, di dëddu lu bon; ab dof day ràkkaaju, du tiit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 16)
rakki: . Nelaw ay rakki dee.  . Nelaw tax naa gëm dee.
rakku: Defal boppam 'rakk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ramatu: Defal boppam 'ramat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rambaaj: Bul ànd ak ña di rambaaj. 'Kuy mébét lu bon, ñu ne yaay rambaaj bi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 8)
ràmm: . Puukarey àddina ku ko yendoo, torox ngay fanaane.  . Raagalkati ràmmkat yomb na ràmm.
rammu: Defal boppam 'ramm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rammukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'rammu' (Someone who does...).
randal: . Sëriñ ba niwoon mën naa «nodd» tisbaar jot na.  . Sëriñ du sàcc, dafa randal, ba ñu fàtte, mu jël.  . Séyi, seeti lu tane sa kër baay la.
randu: Defal boppam 'rand' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràngaru: Defal boppam 'ràngar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràngoo: 'ràngoo 'Ku rafet xel jagoo alal, ab dof ràngoo ndofam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 24)
ràngu: Defal boppam 'ràng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràññ: 'ràññ 'Yoonu ku jub day leer, ba ne ràññ ni bëccëg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 18)
ràññee: 'ràññee 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
ràññeeku: Defal boppam 'ràññeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràññeewu: Defal boppam 'ràññeew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràññeewuñu: Defal boppam 'ràññeewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràññiku: Defal boppam 'ràññik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ràpp: . Keroog bésab waccu, ku yëgoon ruy ngay reere.  . Keroog jatuleen fekk na soccet ne ràpp. 'Jubook mbokk moo tooñ, jéggi tataa ko gëna yomb, mbaa ubbi bunt yu tëje ràpp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 19)
ras: . Ku di loo bëgg jaar ca, sa ngor yàqu. (,,) . Ku di loo xam wax ko, sa ngor yàqu. (,) . Ku di naan ngelaw su joxee ci soow jël.  . Ku di waliis, dafa ras i tuñam.
rattaxle: 'rattaxle 'Moom sa làmmiñ, sàmm sa bakkan; rattaxle, yàqule.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 3)
rattaxliku: Defal boppam 'rattaxlik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raw: Àndook waa new, waa dugóor raw la. 'nga foog, fegu, amug dégg, raw,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 11)
rawati: 'rawati 'Jeeg bu jàmbaare, ndaw lu jafe, ba rawati gànjar!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 10)
rawatina: Ndegam ña ca waluwaay ba ñoo daanu ca teen ba, rawatina ña ca pind ba. 'seede buy fen rekk, rawatina kuy yokku ay ci biiri bokk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 19)
rawe: .	Foo ragal, yónnee fa sa alal, boo demee ñeme fa. (,,) .	Fóore, fa nga rawe (,)
rawee: Sàcc bu dul raw mëtula yàq i nelaw.  . Sàcc bu rawee, doon buur.
rawtu: Defal boppam 'rawt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Aji Sax jeeki nammeelam rawtu la ci ku mat, di sànkute ci kuy def lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 29)
rawul: .	Kenn mënula nuru mbokki jàmbur, ku ne say mbokk ngay nuru.  . Kenn rawul sa mbañ ci ñaaw làmmiñ.
rax: Ab yeel bu ëppee ab lupp booba jàngoro rax na ca. 'Xellil xaalis, tonni lu ca rax, ba ab tëgg man caa am ndab.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 4)
raxas: . Kolonk ñedd tallal raxas.  . Kon, ay di buriy sarax.
raxaskat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'raxas' (Someone who does...).
raxasu: Defal boppam 'raxas' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
raxasuñu: Defal boppam 'raxasuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rëbb: Raxasit ndox la woon, yoxo yaa ca bari.  . Rëbb, ca coow la. (,) 'Dawal ni kéwél gu rëccub rëbb, ne fërr ni picc mu raw ab fiirkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
rëbbatu: Defal boppam 'rëbbat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rëbbee: 'rëbbee 'Ab yaafus bu rëbbee, sooy; cawarte koom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 27)
rëbbkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'rëbb' (Someone who does...).
rëcc: Daw ba rëcc, ci ngóora la bokk. (,) 'Yaa ngi ci sa loxoy moroom, kon defal nii, doom, ba rëcc: doxal tinuji ko, raamali ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 3)
rëccee: . Wax, soxu fetal la, su rëccee, dabu ko wees. (,,,) . Wax, su guddee, ñaar a ko guddal.
réccu: Defal boppam 'récc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bul gaawtuy digeek Yàlla, di dugal sa bopp; bul giñ, di réccu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 25)
rëccu: Defal boppam 'rëcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rëccub: 'rëccub 'Dawal ni kéwél gu rëccub rëbb, ne fërr ni picc mu raw ab fiirkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
rëdd: 'rëdd 'Ba muy taxawal asamaan, maa nga fa, ak ba muy rëdd fa asamaan taseek géej,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 27)
rëddlu: Defal boppam 'rëddl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rëddu: Defal boppam 'rëdd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rëddukaayu: Defal boppam 'rëddukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ree: Bëñ du ree jàmm ! (,) 'Kon boo sëngéemee, man it ma ree, njàqare dab la, may tex-texi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 26)
reeloo: Boo reeyee lëf a la reeloo. (,)
reen: Lu puso muus-muus wëñ jaar ca bën-bën ba.  . Lu reen jan-jan, reen a nga ca suufam. (,) 'Bu ngëlén walee, ab soxor ne mes; kiy def njekk, sab reen sax ba fàww.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 25)
reenu: Defal boppam 'reen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
reer: Añ ci, te bu ci reer.
réeral: Fi la dikkoon, du tere réeral.  .	Fii la fuuta féete mënula boyali lex.
reere: Bukki bu nammee fande reere doom ja.
reeri: Bu reer doon doy, reeri daaw ya doy. (,)
réerle: Fii, kekk la, golo du fi raweeb xaj. (,,) .	“Fii laa dikkoon” du tere réerle. (,)
réerlewunu: Defal boppam 'réerlewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
réeroo: . Réeroo amul, ñàkka waxtaan a am. (,,,) Mbañ amul, ñàkk waxtaan a am  Ñàkka juboo amul, ñàkk waxtaan a am. 'Nitu njekkar day yokk réeroo, ab soskat di féewaley xarit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 28)
reeru: Defal boppam 'reer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
réerul: . Wërsëgu jaambur ku cay tukki war koo gërëm.  . Wërsëgu jàmbur réerul boroom.
rees: Àddiya ak moyaal, loo ci lekk, boo géexee, mu rees.
reetaan: 'reetaan 'Kuy ñaawal ku ñàkk, tooñ nga Ka ko sàkk; kuy reetaan ku jàq, mbugalam du jaas.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 5)
reetaanu: Defal boppam 'reetaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
reetaanukaayu: Defal boppam 'reetaanukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
reew: .	Goneg mbóoyo gu reew, xaar ko ca taatu ndaa la. (,,,) .	Gont taxani for aw ñey, muur a koy maye. 'Soxna si, Jigéen ju Dof day xumb, reew, du xam lu xew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 13)
réew: Am réew, su fa lingeer dee fecc, ku fay woyaan doo rusa yaõas. (,,) 'ndax kuy jubal ay dëkke réew mi, te ku mat a fiy des.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 21)
réewam: Buur bu baax dina rafetal réewam.
réewu: Defal boppam 'réew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
regeju: Defal boppam 'regej' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
regg: . Ña daan ñaane njekk, jeexuñu ; ña daan maye njekka jeexe.  . Ñaag bu réy ray na boroom waaye regg la ca jublu woon.  . Ñaan gu daje ak amiin la. (,) 'Ku jub day lekk ba regg, soxor ba dëkke xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 25)
reggal: 'reggal 'Làmmiñ reggal na boroom; ñaq, jariñu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 14)
rekk: Boo gajjee am ngeer, ngeer rekk a fay jebbi. 'seede buy fen rekk, rawatina kuy yokku ay ci biiri bokk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 19)
rëkk: . Rëkk rey na suññeel waaye loxo muñu ko.  . Rendi bu ñaaw a gën médd.
rembat: . Sukk du tee yóbbu say wóom. (,,,,,,,,) . Suma i bët dañoo rembat.
ren: Bañi daaw su bëggee ren, pexeem a joy.
rendi: Damay daas fanaanal ndax rendi day bette.  Daasal sa paaka fanaanal rendi day bette. 'Mu rendi ag juram, njafaan ay biiñam, xelli, taaj ay ndabam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 2)
rendi-dóomalu: Defal boppam 'rendi-dóomal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rendiji: 'rendiji 'Waa ja jekki, topp ko, mbete yëkk wu ñuy rendiji, mbaa dof bu ñu jéng, di ko yari.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 22)
rendikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'rendi' (Someone who does...).
rengiku: Defal boppam 'rengik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
repp: 'repp 'Ku ma moy loru, ku ma bañ, daa repp."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 36)
res: . Su yàpp yépp meloon ni res, paaka du ca am yoon. (,)
reseñ: 'reseñ 'say sàq day fees, ne xéew, say mbàndi ndoxi reseñ di wal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 10)
reseñu: Defal boppam 'reseñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rewlekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'rewle' (Someone who does...).
rewlikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'rewli' (Someone who does...).
rey: Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa rey. (,,,,) Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa gaañ. (,,) Bala ngay xam, xamadi rey la. 'Déggadi sànk ab téxét, naagu rey ab dof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 32)
réy: Am na i bët yu gëna réy as gémmiñam. 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
rëy: Berkelle lu mu rëy-rëy, du ko taxa nekk naaru-góor.
réy-réylu: Defal boppam 'réy-réyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
réy-réylukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'réy-réylu' (Someone who does...).
reyal: . Yàlla du la jox njëgu saaku ceeb, jox la doole joo ko yenoo. (,) . Yàlla du reyal nit y bañam
réyal: 'réyal 'Woyof mbubb, am benn surga doŋŋ, moo gën réyal turki tey dee ak xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 9)
reye: 'reye 'Ab soxor, waxam am tëru la, day reye; kàdduy kiy jubal di musle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 6)
reyee: .	Gan doxat la balaay reyee, dem.  .	Gan du tabax. (,)
reyi: 'reyi 'Wallul ku ñuy reyi te tooñul, xettalil kuy tërëf, ñu di ko reyi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 11)
reykat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'rey' (Someone who does...).
reyloo: . Ku teg diw ci naaj, moo ko reyloo.  . Ku tëg sa ndënd nit ni wallisi.  . Ku tey ab jéllam, kenn du ko tawat.
reylu: Defal boppam 'reyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
réylu: Defal boppam 'réyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku réy-réylu rus; woyofal ndax nga xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 2)
reyluwu: Defal boppam 'reyluw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
reyul: Cat, bu la reyul, semmal la.  Cat du reyul sembal.
reyuñu: Defal boppam 'reyuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
riigu: Defal boppam 'riig' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
riir: . Réy nopp bu doon taxa dégg, kon mbaam yat du ko dal.  . Riir mi ci géej, ngelaw lee ko waral. 'Kiy jëfe njekk baaxle, waa dëkkam bànneexu; ab saay-saay saay, mbégte dim riir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 10)
riiru: Defal boppam 'riir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
riisu: Defal boppam 'riis' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ripp: 'ripp 'Ag maas a ngi defe ne set nañu, te taq ripp ak bàkkaar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 12)
robine: . Ku mar taxa naan póotit, bu “robine” ubbee nga rus.  .  Ku mbaanig sag ndaw, kàcc sag mag. (,,,) . Ku mën lu bare te du ca def dara mooy ki yàq.
robkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'rob' (Someone who does...).
robukaayu: Defal boppam 'robukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
roccee: Fas yépp dinañu daw, waaye roccim-ngeer a ci raw.  Fas yépp mën nañoo daw, waaye roccee ca mën.  Fas dina daw, wànde roccim-ngeer a ca raw.
rocceeku: Defal boppam 'rocceek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rocci: .	Garabu guddi kuy def goo gis rocci léegi nga rocci gu am i dég.
rocciku: Defal boppam 'roccik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
roccil: . Ku fóotal mbëtt, roccil bar. (,,,) .  Ku for sa pénc, yenduwaani.  . Ku gedd, sa ndey a togg. (,)
roccim: Fas yépp dinañu daw, waaye roccim-ngeer a ci raw.  Fas yépp mën nañoo daw, waaye roccee ca mën.  Fas dina daw, wànde roccim-ngeer a ca raw.
romb: Booy aji Màkka, dëkk boo romb am na jàkkaak yilimaan, waaye Màkka la yaakaar ja ne. 'Njaatige luy liggéeyloo ab dof ak kuy romb, daa mel ni fittkat buy gaañ ku ne.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 10)
ron: Ba nga séenee ron, ron a la jëkka séen. (,,,) Ba nga laata séen ron, ron a la njëkka séen.
ronu: Bëñ bu weex tàll, te deret ju ñuul kukk lal ko.  Bëñ de na ree, wandey deret anga ca suufam.  Bëñ weex na, nde deret a ko ronu.
roof: . Roof-roppi du fékke ayu boroomam.  . Rootaan jéggi nam ndox.
root: 'root 'Mébétu jàmbur day teen bu xóot, ku amug dégg a cay root.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 5)
rootal: Dex gu ne asamaan a ko rootal.
rooti: Gàcce gu palmaanoo ñay baxa yumé wula  .	Gàcce ngi ci rooti te sottiwoo.
rootkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'root' (Someone who does...).
rot: . Koo yaakaar, Yàlla la yaakaar. (,,,) . Kóoni du rot ci kanamam.
roy: Ag roy-dàq a fi yées. 'Bul ñee ku néeg, te bu ko roy fenn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 31)
royukaayu: Defal boppam 'royukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ruq: . Ku soqul, wolul, ba la ngaa laax duggub ruq.  . Ku sori taxa ñaaw, fa nga dëkk, rafetoo fa.  . Ku sumb tooy. (,) 'Ma nga ca mbedd ma, ne ca pénc ya, ruqoo ruq, ma ngay yeeroo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 12)
ruqoo: 'ruqoo 'Ma nga ca mbedd ma, ne ca pénc ya, ruqoo ruq, ma ngay yeeroo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 12)
rus: Bu bët setee, ku ñaaw rus. 'Ku réy-réylu rus; woyofal ndax nga xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 2)
rusantewuñu: Defal boppam 'rusantewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rusloo: 'rusloo 'Jeeg bu jàmbaare day teral jëkkër ja, jeeg buy rusloo day semmal jëkkër ja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 4)
ruslu: Defal boppam 'rusl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
rusul: Bët bu rusul, toj. (,,,,,) Bët bu rusul, tuuru.
rusuñu: Defal boppam 'rusuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ruuj: . Tool bu fi ñay ruuj, gëléem su koy ji, seet lay mana wey.  . Toolu golo du meññ. (,,,)
ruulu: Defal boppam 'ruul' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ruur: . Mbër a may dékk, mag a may daan.  . Mbër ca ka la jàggi ruur. (,)
ruuru: Defal boppam 'ruur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ruus: Baax sabaarub dugub la ; fu ñu ko fabe, ay fepp ruus fa.
ruux: 'ruux 'Ndax ku ruux soow, am ca dax, ku wañaar bakkan, mu nàcc, te lu jógal xol, indiw ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 33)
saa: Bëti saa-wëtë. 'Man it amoon naa baay, di benn bàjjo ci saa ndey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 3)
saab: 'saab 'Lal naa saab lal, ba mu jekk, di malaan yu yànj, bawoo Misra.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 16)
saabu: Defal boppam 'saab' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saafàndu: Defal boppam 'saafànd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saafukaayu: Defal boppam 'saafukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saaga: . Ku bañ ñu saaga la, doo saagaante.  . Ku baña dee ci nguur doo falu.  . Ku bëgga dee, wéqu. (,,,) 'Artu kuy ñaawle, feyoo saaga rekk, yedd ab soxor, yooloo loraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 7)
saagaa: 'saagaa 'Nuyoo bu xumb, suba teel mooki saagaa yem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 14)
saagakat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'saaga' (Someone who does...).
saaku: Defal boppam 'saak' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saamaan: Bu ndab xatee, gaana jooy, Xulóol du màtt saamaan, Nag du màtt
saamar: 'saamar 'Muj ga mu wex xàtt, di gaañe ni ñawkay saamar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 4)
saamaru: Defal boppam 'saamar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saañ: . Mel né ba Ngóor jaaye mbaam ma te ne nopp ya duñ(u) ca bokk.  . Mel né tuq su bënn te saañ ba réer, (te mu defoon lu neex).
saanu: Defal boppam 'saan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saaru: Defal boppam 'saar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saatu: Defal boppam 'saat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saaw: Bu la mën-ngawar jayee ba nga mafñàndum saaw, boo fa jógee, loo amati jënde koog teg. (,)
saawo: Bóli mbedd la, waaye nag du ca saawo.
saay: . Ku xamoon lu ñu lay tontu bala ngaa wax, waaj ko.  . Ku xamul “buur saay na”, xam “buur dee na”. (,,,,) 'Doom, bul fàtte sama njàngale, defal sa xel ci saay santaane,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 1)
saay-saay: . Lu gor di wëyée, Yàlla bu ko saay-saay xam.
saay-saayu: Defal boppam 'saay-saay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sab: Deñcin wu ñaaw moo gën jiiñ sab xarit. 'Kon sab dox wóor, doo fakkastalu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 23)
sabaaru: Defal boppam 'sabaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sabab: 'sabab 'Piiseek làq-làqal, sabab njàqare; ab dof wax a wax, ba loru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 10)
sabablu: Defal boppam 'sababl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sababu: Defal boppam 'sabab' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàbbaaluñu: Defal boppam 'sàbbaaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sabe: Lu ñor tàbbi, gajen baay bañ.  . Lu ñu dëppe sendal, aayewuñu ko weñ.  . Lu picc bare-bare, du teree ji dugub. (,) . Lu picc dégg, sabe.
sàcc: Bu bëy dàqee ab sàcc ci kër, xaj war naa rus. (,) Bu bëy dàqeeb sàcc ci kër, xaj war naa rus. 'Néewlee ngi lay dikkal nib sàcc, ñàkk gànnaayul la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 11)
sàccub: . Yaa fi sësay taxa donn/falu. (,,) . Yaa gàttum xel, ni sàccub yoor-yoor.
saf: . Ku bëgg ñeex mu saf, dangay togg yàpp wu duuf.
safaan: 'safaan 'Waaye déggal ma, dëkke jàmm, tàggook njekkar ak safaan."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 33)
safara: Cin du am kawar ndege safara.
safatu: Defal boppam 'safat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
safoo: 'safoo 'Jëf ju bon la dof di fowe; ku am dég-dég safoo lu xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 23)
saful: . Mbëtt ñaaw, saf ñeex.  . Mbey bey a koy jeexal.  . Mbiijum taat saful suuf.
sag: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg. 'Coxor feyul boroom, day naxe; deel def njekk, sag pey wóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 18)
sagal: . Naka sagal, naka ndeer. 'Jigéen, na yiw, ñu sagal ko; góor gu néeg, alal doŋŋ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 16)
sagar: Joori waay bu mu la taxa sànni say sagar.  Jooru waay du ma taxa wocc samay sagar  Joori waay, bu mu tax nga sànni say sagar.
sagaru: Defal boppam 'sagar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Sagaru nit mooy sulli lu bon, ay waxam sax sawara la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 27)
sàggan: Alalu ku sàggan, ku farlu moo koy jariñoo.
sàgganee: 'sàgganee 'Boo sàgganee bay tëggu, mbaa ngay mébét lu bon, nanga téye saw làmmiñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 32)
sàgganey: 'sàgganey 'Yaru, gudd fan; sàgganey artu, sànku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 17)
sàgganu: Defal boppam 'sàggan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàggiku: Defal boppam 'sàggik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sago: . Yàlla su doon def sago bañee, def sago soppee.  . Yàllaa ngeek ndawal lu dul kóoba. 'Na lay céram doy foo tollu, na la xañ sago saa su ne.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 19)
sagoom: 'sagoom 'Ab dof day mer, sàmbaar; ku xelu, mer, ànd ak sagoom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 11)
sagoy: . Sagoy jigéen mooy wujj wu dee ci ngóobte.  . Sakk dall, wacc kolloor.
sagu: 'sagu 'Teraangay maam, sët ba; sagu doom, baay ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 6)
sajju: Defal boppam 'sajj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sakk: . Sagoy jigéen mooy wujj wu dee ci ngóobte.  . Sakk dall, wacc kolloor.
sàkk: . Sàkk kolloor, wocc folloor.  . Sakkantal du la taxa texe. 'laata Yàllaa sàkk suuf aki àllam ak feppu pënd ci àddina.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 26)
sàkkal: . Yan bi diis, ku ci sàkkal boroom yanu mu war laa gërëm.  . Yàpp, bu ñoree, du jar àbb paaka. 'ak ba muy sàkkal géej kemoom, ba du jàll fa mu wax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 29)
sàkkeesu: Defal boppam 'sàkkees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàkkewu: Defal boppam 'sàkkew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàkki: . Kuy reere pann, boo woppee fande. (,,) . Kuy rootaani, seetil boroom goj ak baag.  . Kuy rooteek sendal, doo yóbbum ndox.  . Kuy sàkki ron, ku ko abal kàndaama bañu ko.  . Kuy sàngoo làmmiñ boo noppee rafle.
sàkklu: Defal boppam 'sàkkl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàkku: Defal boppam 'sàkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Njàlbéenu xel mu rafet mooy sàkku ko; ak loo mana am, amalug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 7)
sàkkul: 'sàkkul 'Sàkkul xel mu rafet ni xaalis, wut ko ni alal ju làqu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 4)
sàkkuñu: Defal boppam 'sàkkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàkkuwu: Defal boppam 'sàkkuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàkkuwuñu: Defal boppam 'sàkkuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
salfaañu: Defal boppam 'salfaañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàll: . Salaan jooyul wéet.  . Sàll laajul tenqo
salliiru: Defal boppam 'salliir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàlloo: . Sawaan, sëppaan, tëraan, ku ko sàlloo, doo baax doo am jom, doo tekki.  . Sawoor bëgg na dugub waaye du bey. (,,) 'Jëf ju bon day fiir ka ko sàlloo, bàkkaaram di mbaal, jàpp ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 22)
sam: Bu la yàppu bopp réeree, làmbal sam kaaõ. 'Teewlul xel mu rafet, sam xel di dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 2)
sama: Bëgg jiba, duma taxa gaar sama dënn. (,,) Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,) Bëgg xaritu pël du ma taxa booti sëllu.   Bëggu yàpp, bu mu la taxa lekk médd. 'Sama doom, déggal samay wax, fonk samay santaane.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 1)
samab: .  Sàqami nga samab lanc. (,,,) . Saraxatul gumba doy na koy duma.  . Saw mënul raxas sobe. 'Na la samab yar gënal xaalis, xam-xam dàqal la ngën-gi-wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 10)
samag: Béy wu ne am nag déem, (te yaay samag déem.)  Bëy wu ne am na ag déem.
samam: 'samam 'Ma ne, kon ma xellil la samam xel, xamal la samay kàddu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 23)
samay: Joori waay bu mu la taxa sànni say sagar.  Jooru waay du ma taxa wocc samay sagar  Joori waay, bu mu tax nga sànni say sagar. 'Ma ne, kon ma xellil la samam xel, xamal la samay kàddu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 23)
sàmbaar: 'sàmbaar 'Ab dof day mer, sàmbaar; ku xelu, mer, ànd ak sagoom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 11)
sàmm: Bala ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm dangay xam la mu waliis.  Bala ngay fél gémmiñu sàmm, nga xam lu mu waliis.  Bul fél gémmiñug sàmm te xamoo la muy waliis. 'Day wattu ku jub fu mu jaare, di sàmm wóllëreem ciw yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 8)
sàmmal: 'sàmmal 'Sàmmal a sàmm sab xol, nde xalaati xol ngay jëfe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 23)
sàmmkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'sàmm' (Someone who does...).
sàmmu: Defal boppam 'sàmm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàmmunu: Defal boppam 'sàmmun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàmmuñu: Defal boppam 'sàmmuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
samp: 'samp 'Ba muy rëdd fa muy samp àddina,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 29)
samplu: Defal boppam 'sampl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sampu: Defal boppam 'samp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Dikk naa bala tund yu mag yee sampu, lu jiitu tund yu ndaw yi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 25)
sañ: . Lu sax y dung naaw gannaaw bànjóoli.  . Lu surga sañadi, sañadi sañ ne : “suur naa”.  . Lu suur bajantu ba mu desub xaal.
sañ-sañu: Defal boppam 'sañ-sañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saña: . Ku sam xéy neexul, fasal jom ca ngont la ndegem xéyaat amul.  . Ku sañatula bañ, saña nangu.
sandaamtalu: Defal boppam 'sandaamtal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sang: . Mbaam ma ñu sang ba mu set wecc anga xalangu ca binit. . Mbaam mu, bu wéqee màtt, def na xeexu baayam. (,) 'Ku aar garab, lekk ca doom ya; ku toppatoo sa sang, am ngërëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 18)
sangam: .	Jigéen, jëkkëram mooy sangam.  .	Jigéen ju nekk ak sa yoonu tool. 'Surga, bu rafetee xel, tiim doom juy rusloo, séddu ni doom ci alalu sangam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 2)
sange: Dem sa làmb ja di bàkku jóge fa di bàkkoo ko gën. (,) .	Jën, fa nga ko jàpp, soo ko fa sange, mu rëcc.
sangeesu: Defal boppam 'sangees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàngoo: Ana golooka sàngoo mbàjj bay taamu nimoro diis ?
sangu: Defal boppam 'sang' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàngu: Defal boppam 'sàng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sangul: . Ku la ne : “mbas maa ngi ñów”, nee ko “ayca”.  . Ku la ne “sangul”, sab taar la bëgg. (,,)
sanguwuñu: Defal boppam 'sanguwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sànju: Defal boppam 'sànj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sànk: . Yàlla na piccum jàmm naaw ba ñu koy wax booba njéeréer a tax.  . Yàlla nee na “duma sànk mukk yoolu kuy rafetal” 'ngir dañuy xélu, nar musiba, di gaawtuy sànk bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 16)
sànke: 'sànke 'Kuy fen, dangaa bañ ka nga fenal, te boroom làmmiñ wu neex day sànke.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 28)
sànklu: Defal boppam 'sànkl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sànku: Defal boppam 'sànk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ñàkk yar, dee; ndof gu réy, sànku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 23)
sànkute: 'sànkute 'Aji Sax jeeki nammeelam rawtu la ci ku mat, di sànkute ci kuy def lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 29)
sànnee: Boo fa sànnee bàttu mu tag !
sànni: Bala nga sànni, diir. (,) 'Ku bon, ñu génne réew mi; kuy fecci worma, ñu buddi, sànni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 22)
sànniy: 'sànniy '18-19 Nit kuy naxe, naan: "Damay fo!" yaay dof buy sànniy jum, di fitteeka reye.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 17)
sañoon: Bu ndongo sañoon, tawu mburu di am bés bu nekk.
sant: Abb delloo la sant. 'Doom, defal li la baay sant, te bul wacc ndigalal yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 20)
santaane: 'santaane 'Sama doom, déggal samay wax, fonk samay santaane.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 1)
santu: Defal boppam 'sant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sañul: Bëgg ju sañul feeñe, mook bañaalé yem.
sañunu: Defal boppam 'sañun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sañuñu: Defal boppam 'sañuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sàppee: 'sàppee 'Na sa tànk di gëj kër dëkkandoo; boo ko sàppee, mu jéppi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 17)
sàq: . Neex i tànk, bumu la yóbbu ci sàq moo beyul woon.  Neex i tànk bumu la yóbbu ci sàq moo beyutoon. 'say sàq day fees, ne xéew, say mbàndi ndoxi reseñ di wal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 10)
sàqam: Jàpp sama loxoo ma gënal naan yoon waa ngee.  .	Jarag moo di sàqam jabaraankat.
sàqamee: . Tib bay ub làmb, kenn du ko sàqamee cib géew.
sàqameeguñu: Defal boppam 'sàqameeguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sarax: . Kolonk ñedd tallal raxas.  . Kon, ay di buriy sarax. 'Deel def dëgg ak lu jub, moo gënal Aji Sax ji ab sarax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 3)
saraxalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'saraxal' (Someone who does...).
saraxalkatu: Defal boppam 'saraxalkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saraxu: Defal boppam 'sarax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). '"Tey matal naa la ma digoon Yàlla, yàppu bernde waa nga kër ga, *saraxu cant laa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 14)
saraxub: 'saraxub 'Saraxub ku soxor, Aji Sax ji bañ na ko; ñaanu kuy jubal da koy bége.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 8)
sarxalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'sarxal' (Someone who does...).
sarxalkatu: Defal boppam 'sarxalkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sarxalukaayu: Defal boppam 'sarxalukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sarxu: Defal boppam 'sarx' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sas: 'sas 'Du ku ko yilif mbaa ku koy sas, te jiiteesu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 7)
saskat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'sas' (Someone who does...).
sasootuñu: Defal boppam 'sasootuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saw: Doom danga doon dem mu dab la, mënu laa yàqal saw yoon. Ki la fekk ci saw yoon, bu mu la yàqal saw yoon. 'Nanga wóoloo Aji Sax ji sa léppi xol, te bul wéeru ci saw déggin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 5)
sawar: Dem Gànnaar mag a ca gën mbaa gone gu sawar.  Dem Gànnaar, mag a ca gén.
sawara: 'sawara 'Te ku ne sawara cas, tafoo, lakk say yére.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 27)
sawaraa: 'sawaraa 'Xaalis ak wurus sawaraa koy xelli, waaye nit, ab xolam, Aji Sax jee koy nattu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 3)
sawoor: Ku ràcc jëmëlé ci sa kanam mu dëll. (,) . Ku ragal sawoor, bul ji dugub. (,)
sawta: Picc mënul ci jaan dara waaye dina ko reeteet ba ñu gis ko.  . Sawta sëgg na, waaye du kersaam.
sax: Àddina ñett a ko jàpp : saxle, gub sax bi, ak sax mi. (,) 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
saxaar: Dana mel na ngéntel saxaar lu roplaan di yóbbug ndawtal. 'Ndaw lu tayel ca ka yónnee daa mel ni lu forox ciy gëñ mbaa saxaar ciy gët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 26)
saxaaru: Defal boppam 'saxaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saxaat: Garab loo ca gajj mu saxaat. (,) Garab loo ca gajj moo ca jebbi. 'Gannaaw bu ñu gubee, ba ñax saxaat, ñu dajale ngooñ ma ca tund yac,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 25)
saxal: Bopp bu nara barkeel, nopp ya cay sax day dégg um ndigal.  Bopp bu naree am jàmm, yàlla da cay saxal nopp yuy dégg.  Bopp bu am njeriñ, noppi moo ca sax. 'Saxal ci lu baax' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 19)
saxi: 'saxi 'Ndax xef ak xippi mu wéy, mel ni lu saxi laaf, ne fëyy, naaw ni jaxaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 5)
saxle: Àddina ñett a ko jàpp : saxle, gub sax bi, ak sax mi. (,)
saxoo: 'saxoo 'kon nga saxoo foog, say wax tegu ci xam-xam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 2)
saxool: 'saxool 'Sama doom, saxool xelu akug foog, dee ci xool foo tollu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 21)
saxu: . Ya yi di maye alal, dara saxu ca kawar : tank, ak tëstën, ak làmmiñ. (,) . Yaa bari pexe, ni masoõ. 'Saxu watarg du suur, ñaar ñu jigéen la am: Jox Ma ak Jox Ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 15)
saxyaayu: Defal boppam 'saxyaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
say: Àddina ñett a ci gën : àjjana biti, ak weerteewlu ak mëneek say dëkk, ak ku la gis bëgg la. 'Waaye loo ci góobe, gar ko, say pexe suur la këll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 31)
saytoo: 'saytoo 'Ci samay pexe la njiit di saytoo, ñook kàngam yeek ñiy àtte dëgg ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 16)
saytu: Defal boppam 'sayt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
saytukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'saytu' (Someone who does...).
saytukatu: Defal boppam 'saytukat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sedd: Bu sedd jamee ku amul cangaay dangay banku. 'Xol bu sedd, kanam gu leer; xol bu tiis, boroom ne yogg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 13)
sédd: .	Ëlléerub gumba xammewul joor ak ub jànj.  .	Ellég du añ du reer, waaye jar na sédd. 'Ku tabe am barke, mooy kiy sédd ku ñàkk cib dundam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 9)
seddaayu: Defal boppam 'seddaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
séddale: . Séddale, ca kuddu yu jëkk ya.  . Seedes mbey dàgga. (,,)
seddee: . Yàpp neex na yëy, waaye yaxit neex naa seeñu.  . Yàppu xaj bu seddee soof.
séddee: . Su ñu la séddee ci gaalu xaj itam, nanga fexe ba bu ca lekk.  Mën nañu la yekkal ci gaalu xaj, waaye bu ca lekk.
séddoo: 'séddoo 'Ku sàggane yoonu yar, séddoo ñàkk ak gàcce; kuy déggi artu, am teraanga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 18)
séddook: 'séddook 'Woyof, ànd ak ku néewle moo gën séddook ku bew la mu lewal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 19)
séddu: Defal boppam 'sédd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Surga, bu rafetee xel, tiim doom juy rusloo, séddu ni doom ci alalu sangam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 2)
seddub: 'seddub 'Teraanga jekkul cib dof, mooy seddub nawet mbaa taw cim ngóob.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 1)
sédduñu: Defal boppam 'sédduñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seedaru: Defal boppam 'seedar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seede: . Ku sa mbañ seede, nga ñaaw.  . Ku sa mbootu jotul, doo rogganti. 'seede buy fen rekk, rawatina kuy yokku ay ci biiri bokk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 19)
seedeb: 'seedeb 'Seedeb naaféq faalewul yoon, ab soxor lu bon lay tàqamtikoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 28)
seedeel: 'seedeel 'Bul tuumaal nit ci neen, te bu ko seedeel ay fen.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 28)
seedes: . Séddale, ca kuddu yu jëkk ya.  . Seedes mbey dàgga. (,,)
seel: Bukki, kenn du ko dénk ay seel. (,) Kenn du dénk Bukki ay seel.
seelu: Defal boppam 'seel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seelukaayu: Defal boppam 'seelukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seen: Bu ñépp yemee, am ñu gedd seen cër. (,) 'Ñii kat seen bopp lañuy fiir, seen bakkanu bopp lañu sànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 18)
séen: Ba nga séenee ron, ron a la jëkka séen. (,,,) Ba nga laata séen ron, ron a la njëkka séen. 'séen ca biir téxét ya, ku ma seetlu ca xale yu góor ya, muy ku ñàkk bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 7)
séene: .  Ku ndóbin rey sa maam, foo séenati lu ñuul, daw. (,,,)  Ku ndóbin rey sa maam, foo séene lu ñuul wara daw.  Ku ndobin rey sa maam, boo séenée lu ñuul daw. (,) Ku ndóbin ray sa maam, boo gisee lu ñuul wara daw.
séenee: Ba nga séenee ron, ron a la jëkka séen. (,,,) Ba nga laata séen ron, ron a la njëkka séen.
seeni: Bay ci sa toolu sëriñ bu doon maye barke kon seeni doom a cay jiitu. 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
séentu: Defal boppam 'séent' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Damaa tollu sama palanteer, séentu ca xarante ya,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 6)
seenu: Defal boppam 'seen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'di woo ña fay jaare te jubal seenu yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 15)
seeñu: Defal boppam 'seeñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
séenu: Defal boppam 'séen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
séenuñu: Defal boppam 'séenuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seereer: Xaayaan si ñi deeg seereer.  Xaayaan ca ña dégg seereer.  Xaayaan, ku dégg i séeréer.
seet: .  Séentu asamaan jarul buuxaane té.  . Seet seet du tere boroom alal jél alalam.  . Seetaan a dàq cim ndaje. (,) '"Keroog nga woo ma wall, duma wuyu, nga seet ma, seet, doo ma gis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 28)
séet: Am na ku la ne “ma yen la” ; booba, la ca ndab la la bëgga gis. (,) Am na ku la ne ma yen la, tey sa ndab la bëgg séet.
seetaan: . Ku fecc ba génn ub géew, kenn du la seetaan. (,,) . Ku fecc taxa jàll dex ba àggee dinga mbabbsu.  . Ku fóon sa ngemb yab la. 'Aji Sax ji du seetaan kiy def njekk, di xiif, waaye day xañ ab soxor la mu xemmem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 3)
seetaanu: Defal boppam 'seetaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seetal: . Lu amul, du am u tur.  . Lu baax amul “seetal ma”. 'Yaafus bee, xoolal xorondom, seetal ci moom, ba muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 6)
seete: . Ku biiñ bëggal tuñam ngaa seete.
seeti: . Sëriñ ba niwoon mën naa «nodd» tisbaar jot na.  . Sëriñ du sàcc, dafa randal, ba ñu fàtte, mu jël.  . Séyi, seeti lu tane sa kër baay la. 'Bul fàtte sab xarit mbaa sa xaritu baay, boo jàqee, bul seeti sa mbokk; dëkkandoo bu jegee gën mbokk mu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 10)
seetkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'seet' (Someone who does...).
seetlu: Defal boppam 'seetl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'séen ca biir téxét ya, ku ma seetlu ca xale yu góor ya, muy ku ñàkk bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 7)
seetlul: 'seetlul 'Seetlul fi ngay teg tànk, ba foo awe, mu wóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 26)
seetluwu: Defal boppam 'seetluw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seetluwuñu: Defal boppam 'seetluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seetu: Defal boppam 'seet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
séetu: Defal boppam 'séet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seetuñu: Defal boppam 'seetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seex: . Ndey géléem, baay géléem, bu sëful i ngaax waar i mbokkam.  . Ndey-ji-seex, njaaxaanaay lay tëdde. (,,,,,,,)
seexlu: Defal boppam 'seexl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Juróom benn a ngii yu Aji Sax ji bañ, ba ci juróom ñaar yu mu seexlu:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 16)
séexlu: Defal boppam 'séexl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seexluwu: Defal boppam 'seexluw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seexu: Defal boppam 'seex' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seey: 'seey 'Ku jëfe njekk barkeel, saw tur du fey; ab soxor, turam seey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 7)
sëf: .	Fot-fot tàggalewul mbaam ak i noppam. (,,) Pët-pët tàggalewul mbaam ak i noppam. (,) Fóot-fóot teqalewul mbaam aki noppam.  Fëtfëtlu taggalewul mbaam aki noppam.  Fatfatlu du fasale mbaam sëf ak i noppam. (,) 'Doj diis na, suuf dib sëf, waaye fitnay dof a ko raw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 3)
sëfub: . Seexoo, féexoo, Yàlla tegu ko kenn.  . Sëf géléem, sëf jaam a ko gën.  . Sëfub géléem, mbaam àttanu ko.
segalu: Defal boppam 'segal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
seggkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'segg' (Someone who does...).
seggukaayu: Defal boppam 'seggukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sëgu: . Sëgu bu doon tee tooy taatu garab du sax ñax.  . Sëlamlée ngi tàq ci loxo.
sëkk: Bu sëkk amee, damu taxaw. 'Lu Yàlla wax, mat na sëkk, mooy yiir ku ko làqoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 5)
sekki: . Lu dagg sute xaaxaam ba di ko sekki ?  . Lu damm ndigg ay dóoxaluw taat.
sëkklu: Defal boppam 'sëkkl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sël-sëleeku: Defal boppam 'sël-sëleek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
selaŋlu: Defal boppam 'selaŋl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
selebe: 'selebe 'Muy dem ba fa ndaw say taxaw, ca selebe yoon wa, daldi wuti kër ndaw sa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 8)
sëlëm: . Ku say tuñ dagg doo mën : “wópplëw !”  . Ku sëlmuwul, doo sëlëm i kuti.
seleŋlu: Defal boppam 'seleŋl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sell: 'sell 'Ragal Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu rafet xel, xam *Aji Sell ji di amug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 10)
sellaayu: Defal boppam 'sellaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sellalu: Defal boppam 'sellal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sellaluñu: Defal boppam 'sellaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sëllu: Defal boppam 'sëll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sëlluu: Defal boppam 'sëllu' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sëlmu: Defal boppam 'sëlm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
semmal: Cat, bu la reyul, semmal la.  Cat du reyul sembal. 'Jeeg bu jàmbaare day teral jëkkër ja, jeeg buy rusloo day semmal jëkkër ja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 4)
sémmiñ: . Kuy sëqaat, ku ko ñaani mbël doo fa naaje.  . Kuy summi lu ñu sol, du fa bàyyi lu ñu wékk.  . Kuy tëgg ndëndëk sémmiñ doo bari wàlliyaan.
sën: . Xuloo ab sën la, lu waay jot xëpp sa moroom.  . Xunqu nóor xamul xetam.
sëngéemee: 'sëngéemee 'Kon boo sëngéemee, man it ma ree, njàqare dab la, may tex-texi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 26)
senn: 'senn 'Doom ju dof naqaru baay baa, te jabar ju pànk mooy senn bu dakkul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 13)
sëpp: . Sëpp-jaleñ du dindi xuuxaan. (,,) . Sëpp sayu xat bët sébbi.
seppikaayu: Defal boppam 'seppikaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sëppu: Defal boppam 'sëpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
séq: Cuuj bu naree doon séq, cin manalu ko dara. 'Te ñay jubal a séq yiwu Yàlla.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 9)
sëq: Bu joxe doon taxa ñàkk, kon ku watu doo sëq.
sëqaat: . Kuy sëqaat, ku ko ñaani mbël doo fa naaje.  . Kuy summi lu ñu sol, du fa bàyyi lu ñu wékk.  . Kuy tëgg ndëndëk sémmiñ doo bari wàlliyaan.
séquñu: Defal boppam 'séquñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sér: Diggante, sér la, ñaari loxoo koy wodd.
seral: 'seral 'Kanam gu leer day seral xol; xibaaru jàmm, jàmmu yaram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 30)
sërëx: 'sërëx 'Boroom njekk day daanu juróom ñaari yoon, jógaat, ab soxor sërëx ci njekkar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 16)
sëriñ: Bay ci sa toolu sëriñ bu doon maye barke kon seeni doom a cay jiitu. 'Lu ma tee woona dégg ku may digal, tey teewlu sama waxi sëriñ ya?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 13)
sës: . Sàkket, xer ba koy téyé da cay sës rëkk.  Xer bay tëyéw sàkket da cay sës. 'Ab soxor saay, yaakaaram seey, rawatina yaakaar ju sës ci alal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 7)
sëslaayu: Defal boppam 'sëslaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sësul: . Xaj bu génn amul boroom.  . Xaj bu sësul du baw. (,,,) 'Nanga àddul ku amul kàddu, ku sësul fenn, nga ñoŋal àqam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 8)
sësuñu: Defal boppam 'sësuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
set: Bëñ ak làmmiñ ñoo dëkk, bés bu set dañuy xuloo, waaye dañuy jubóowaat. 'Dikkal, nu baanee baane, ba bët set, te bànneexu ci mbëggeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 18)
sët: . Ku Faat Caam létt, nga gis i sët, booba jig na la.  . Ku fanaane def wara yendoo déglu. 'Teraangay maam, sët ba; sagu doom, baay ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 6)
setagul: Dund gu jeexagul, guddi gu bët setagul la, lu ne xaj na ca.  Dund gu sotteegul, lu ne xaj na ca.
setal: .  Su lëf defulee dëgg, bul ko waat.  . Su liggéey mettee, setal mpey ma.  . Su loxo yàggee ci pax jàmm la fa fekk.
sëtam: 'sëtam 'Ku baax, donale ba cay sëtam; alalu moykat, muuru ku jub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 22)
setee: Bu bët setee, ku ñaaw rus.
setlu: Defal boppam 'setl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
setluwuñu: Defal boppam 'setluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sëtoo: 'sëtoo 'ndax alal wéyul fàww, ag pal du ñeel sëtoo sët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 24)
setul: 'setul 'Day jóg te bët setul, di waajal njëlu njabootam, aka sas ay janqam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 15)
setuñu: Defal boppam 'setuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sex: Bu liir juddoo sex weenu ndeyam, am na lu mu ci jublu : dund. 'Ab yaafus day yeb loxoom ci ndab, tàyyi ko yékkati, sex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 24)
sexee: 'sexee 'Doom, deel lekk lem, baax na, lem ju xelli, boo sexee, mu tem-temi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 13)
sëxëtookat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'sëxëtoo' (Someone who does...).
seyaan: 'seyaan 'Ku jub bu dee nangul ku bon, yàqu na, ni seyaan bu nëx mbaa teen bu xàbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 26)
séyi: .	Jabar, la mu am fa kër jëkkëram, su ko doon am fa kër baayam du séyi.  .	Jabar ñatt la:
seytaane: . Saay-saay waxul dëgg, waaye yàq nam xel. (,,,) Saay-saay waxul dëgg, waaye yàq na xol.  Seytaane waxul dëgg waaye yàq nay xalaat.
sib: 'sib 'Aji Sax ji daa sib ku dëng, xejjoo kuy jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 32)
sibi: .	Gayndeg sibi du xaritook u loo.
siblu: Defal boppam 'sibl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
siddit: 'siddit 'Bul jox jigéen ñi sa doole, bul jox say siddit jigéen ñiy sànk buur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 3)
siggeetuñu: Defal boppam 'siggeetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sigiñu: Defal boppam 'sigiñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
siidee: 'siidee 'Kuy xeelu sa baay, di siidee déggal sa ndey, baaxoñ génne ciw xur, luqi sa bët, tan ya lekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 17)
siikalu: Defal boppam 'siikal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
siis: . Si gitax lanuy jàpp ba amu yat.  . Siis, ji rafetu ndugg a ko gën.  . Siiw, du jàmmi boroom. 'Ab siis, bànneexu boppam rekk, loo ko digal mu xalab.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 1)
siitaatu: Defal boppam 'siitaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
siiw: . Si gitax lanuy jàpp ba amu yat.  . Siis, ji rafetu ndugg a ko gën.  . Siiw, du jàmmi boroom.
siiwal: 'siiwal 'Nit ku ñaw day xam, ba ca; ab dof siiwal waxi dofam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 23)
sikk: Awma ginaar siiru sikk ma duma ci fekk. 'Deesul sikk ku sàcc aw ñam, def ci biiram ndax xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 30)
sikkal: 'sikkal 'Bul sikkal ab surga ca njaatigeem, da lay ñaan-yàlla, mu dal la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 10)
sikket: . Sikket amul bàjjen. 'séq daagu, jekk taxawaay; ab sikket, ak buur ci biiri dagam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 31)
sikketu: Defal boppam 'sikket' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sikkim: Bu sikkim lakkandoo, ku ne sa bos ngay fey.
sikkimu: Defal boppam 'sikkim' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sikkliku: Defal boppam 'sikklik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
silmaxa: .	Gan su dikkee silmaxa la, su dee ñibbi, géwël la. (,) .	Gan yomb naa muñal.
simis: . Maa ngi ci sa simis bi/mbubb mi/ létt bi
simpiku: Defal boppam 'simpik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sindax: .	Fu ñuy suuleb néew, kenn du fa jooy ku wopp. (,,) .	Fu sindax di ñaawatee xodd, garab a faa jege. 'sindax, manees na koo ŋëb, teewul ma nga biir kër buur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 28)
sippi: .	Géléem gu la ngelaw may, bu ngéléenee tënkal.  .	Géléem nga, sëf õaax sippi õaax.
sippiku: Defal boppam 'sippik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sobe: .  Sàqami nga samab lanc. (,,,) . Saraxatul gumba doy na koy duma.  . Saw mënul raxas sobe.
sobeelu: Defal boppam 'sobeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sobewu: Defal boppam 'sobew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soccet: .	Jasig su fàddee kay taxan, kay sangu ca dex ga matula wax.  .	“Jatul” matula wax soccet. 'soccet, amul buur, teewul ñuy àndandoo, diy gàngoor;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 27)
soccu: Defal boppam 'socc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sofental: 'sofental 'Sofental nga samay digle, nanguwoo samay artu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 25)
soflu: Defal boppam 'sofl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sokku: Defal boppam 'sokk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sol: Baay, wékkukaayu yëre la, buy dem yëre bi ci gën lay sol. 'Ndaw si jekki dajeek moom, sol yérey gànc, lal pexeem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 10)
solal: . Lekkal lu la neex, waaye solal lu neex nit ña. (,) . Lëkkale ay fen taxula am dëgg. (,) 'Da lay takkal kaala gu jekk, solal la mbaxanam buur." Moytul yoonu ku bon' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 9)
solo: Balaa soloo baax, solo yàqu. (,) 'Déglul, ma wax la lu am solo, dégtal la njub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 6)
solomu: Defal boppam 'solom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
solu: Diggante summikook solu, lu mu gaaw gaaw yaramu neen am caw yoon.
sonal: Dañuy sonal béer rekk, waaye njaw du mel na lem. 'Ku sonal ku ñàkk, tooñ nga Ka ko sàkk; ku baaxe ku néewle, teral nga Ka ko sàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 31)
song: Àkk àkkum gaynde, song songum bukki 'Ku dul ànd ak sa sago, yaa neexa song ni dëkk bu dara wërul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 28)
songe: 'songe 'Kon doo ragal njàqare lu bette ak saay-saay buy songe,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 25)
songee: Bukki bu daanee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bukki, bu songee ponkal ca doxin wa la.  Bu bukki dabee gaynde, ca doxin wa la.  Bukki su yabee gaynde ca doxin wa la.
songewu: Defal boppam 'songew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
songuñu: Defal boppam 'songuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sonnal: Buleen sonnal béer, njaw du mel na lem.
soññatu: Defal boppam 'soññat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sonne: . Ku sonne suuna ba ban suuna, bu la neexee sóonu ca kër ga.  . Ku sóobu tooy.
sonnee: Bu naar sonnee wax i wolof. (,,)
sonnu: Defal boppam 'sonn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soo: .	Jàng njàngaan, soo mokkalee ber sa daara.  Ku jàng, boo mokkalee, ber sa daara. 'Soo dëppee ba déglu, ma artu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 23)
soob: 'soob 'Xolu buur walum ndox la ci loxol Aji Sax ji, fu ko soob mu jëme ko fa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 1)
sóoboo: Bu sóoboo dex tooy xépp. Ku xuus, tooy.
sóobu: Defal boppam 'sóob' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soof: . Yàpp neex na yëy, waaye yaxit neex naa seeñu.  . Yàppu xaj bu seddee soof.
soog: . Mademmba Jóob Yatma Soog sëriñ bi ci Ñomre.  . Mag a moom xamam, su ko neexee làl ko toog.  . Mag ay duggi Ndóob.
sooke: 'sooke 'Ab dof, làmmiñam sooke naw ay, ay waxam di sàkku yeti gannaaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 6)
sóonu: Defal boppam 'sóon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soorooru: Defal boppam 'sooroor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soosu: Defal boppam 'soos' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Soreel ndaw soosu, bul jege bunt këram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 8)
soow: Am soow dina ëppela bare, wande du ëppela weex. 'Ndax ku ruux soow, am ca dax, ku wañaar bakkan, mu nàcc, te lu jógal xol, indiw ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 33)
soowoo: “Bëgg naa la” ak “bëgguma la”, jarul soowoo.
soowum: .	Kañ la fi soowum ginaar ba, ñuy sunjuñi cuuj ?  Kañ la soowum ginaar ba ñuy õalaab i cuuj ?
soox: . Metitu xol su nekkoon ci tànk ñu soox ko.  . Miin day tax nga yab loo warula yab. (,) . Miineef laago la, suy ñëw du tàggu boroom.  . Mo, ku sa biir xottiku, looy doye dugub ?
sooy: 'sooy 'Ab yaafus bu rëbbee, sooy; cawarte koom la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 27)
sooyu: Defal boppam 'sooy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sopp: . Ku nekk ndax boppam, tey Yàlla ndax ñépp.  . Ku nekk sopp na niroom. 'ndax Aji Sax ji, ku mu sopp, yar la, ni baay, ak doom ju ko neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 12)
soppal: .	Jigéen ñatt la: jigéenu xaj, jigéenu suñéel, jigéenu céeli.  .	Jigéen, soppal te bul wóolu. (,,,)
soppaliku: Defal boppam 'soppalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soppalikub: Gaanag Ndànd ga doon xool piisub perkaal Ba m(u) soppalikub mayluus.
sopparñiwunu: Defal boppam 'sopparñiwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soppe: . Looy may say bañ doo ko may say soppe. 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
soppiku: Defal boppam 'soppik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sopplu: Defal boppam 'soppl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Aka sopplu te jekk!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 19)
soppuñu: Defal boppam 'soppuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sore: Bés du ñàkk day sore. 'Dàqal wor, mu sore la; kàdduy naxe, na la dànd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 24)
soree: . Neex làmmiñ ci njaay, dem fu soree a ko gën.  . Neex làmmiñ ci njaay, neex njég a gën.
soreeguñu: Defal boppam 'soreeguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soreel: 'soreel 'Soreel ndaw soosu, bul jege bunt këram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 8)
soreeti: 'soreeti 'Ku ñàkk, sa bokk yépp dëddu la, sab xarit gën laa soreeti, ngay wax ak ñoom, dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 7)
sorewaayu: Defal boppam 'sorewaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sorewul: . Koo ne duma la topp fa ngeen jëm dafa sorewul.
sorewuñu: Defal boppam 'sorewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sori: .	Jéem, tële, bàyyi, gàcce nekku ca.  .	Jëf du fi jóg, nettali du màgget.  .	Jëf ñatt la: Jëf, jëfantu, jëfandoo.  .	Jëf yóbbaale na wax ba noppi.  .	Jege attayakat taxuta jëkka naan.  .	Jege buur, jege xol baa ko gën.  .	Jege te sori, sori te jege.
sos: 'sos 'Ku la nëbbal mbañeel, da lay fen; kuy wër di sos, ab dof la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 18)
sose: 'sose 'Aji Sax ji xel mu rafet la sose suuf, lale asamaan ag dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 19)
soskat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'sos' (Someone who does...). 'Nitu njekkar day yokk réeroo, ab soskat di féewaley xarit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 28)
sosu: 'sosu 'Bu yàgg lañu ma dëj, ca ndoorte la, bala suuf a sosu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 23)
sot: . Ñaar a mën kenn, te ñett du bëre : lii, ku ñu sot nga xam ko.
sottal: 'sottal 'Nit ay sumb yoonam, Aji Sax ji sottal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 9)
sotteeku: Defal boppam 'sotteek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sotteesu: Defal boppam 'sottees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sotti: . Ndar, xëyul sotti. Tepp-tepp, a gën yuréet.  Ndar xëyul xëy sotti. 'Ab soxor, li mu ragal moo koy dab; nammeelu kiy def njekk nag day sotti.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 24)
sottiku: Defal boppam 'sottik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sottiwu: Defal boppam 'sottiw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sottiwul: Ba mbott bëggee tollu niw ñay, daa funki ba toj te sottiwul.
sowee: .  Kuy jaay ker, bu jant sowee nga làlli. (,) Kuy jaay ker, bu ngoonee nga lamble.
sowul: Àddina weeru koor la ; feek jant sowul, juubu du wees. (,) Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) Koor gu jant sowagul, juubu weesoogu ca.
sox: . Kuy xool la ca ginnaaw sox bu tàkk, doo fital.  . Kuy yiit di të doo woccu.
soxalu: Defal boppam 'soxal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soxlaam: . Koo xeebal soxlaam, yaa ko rey.  . Koo xëy ci waaram ameel na la añ.
soxlawunu: Defal boppam 'soxlawun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soxlawuñu: Defal boppam 'soxlawuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soxna: 'soxna 'Xel mu Rafet di soxna saa ngi woote, moom soxna si Am Dégg di xaacu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 1)
soxor: Baayo bu fattalikoo soxor.  Jirim, bu fàttalikoo, soxar. 'Yoonu ku bon, bu ci tegu; fu ab soxor di jaar, bu fa dox.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 14)
soxore: 'soxore 'Ku tumurànke, bu ko soxore cib àtte,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 22)
soxorewunu: Defal boppam 'soxorewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
soxorul: .	Gaana day bëgg moroom.  .	Gaanaa soxorul, xol baa jeex.
suba: . Liggéeyal àddina ja mu mel ni dootoo dee, liggéeyal allaaxira ja mu mel ni suba ngay dee. 'Nuyoo bu xumb, suba teel mooki saagaa yem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 14)
sujjóotal: 'sujjóotal 'Ku bon sujjóotal ku baax; ku soxor ay yaakaar ku jub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 19)
sujjóotalu: Defal boppam 'sujjóotal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sukk: . Lu la sukk may, na la ko joxañ xañ.  . Lu la sutul, du la mana may ker.
sukkalu: Defal boppam 'sukkal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sukkandiku: Defal boppam 'sukkandik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sukkóotu: Defal boppam 'sukkóot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sulli: .	Jalub muus la, ku ko sulli fekk fa dara.  .	Jam sakket du ndann. 'Sagaru nit mooy sulli lu bon, ay waxam sax sawara la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 27)
sulliw: 'sulliw 'Baale tooñ, yokk cofeel; sulliw ay, tas xarit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 9)
suma: . Loo ni suma doon buur, booba xelum buur a nga ca.  . Loo ragal da lay gaañ.
sumb: . Ku soqul, wolul, ba la ngaa laax duggub ruq.  . Ku sori taxa ñaaw, fa nga dëkk, rafetoo fa.  . Ku sumb tooy. (,) 'Nit ay sumb yoonam, Aji Sax ji sottal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 9)
summi: Déeg du buur, wande ku ko bëgga xuus summi say dàll.
summiku: Defal boppam 'summik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sump: .  Y góor yépp ametil jabar, y jigéen yépp ametil jëkkër.  . Ya neex àndul, sump saa nga Mbaakol, dex gaa nga Yàjjin.
sunguf: . Ñu yemul i lor, duñu mëqandoo sunguf. (,,,,) Mëqandoo sunguf koo yemal i lor. (,,)
sungufu: Defal boppam 'sunguf' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
suññeel: . Rëkk rey na suññeel waaye loxo muñu ko.  . Rendi bu ñaaw a gën médd.
sunu: Àddinaa ngi ci sunu kanam. 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
sunuy: Àddina ñetti fan la, démb ñoom baay, tey ñun, ëllëg sunuy doom.
suqaliku: Defal boppam 'suqalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
suqi: Bu la sa caxkaal dugub neexee ba nga néeg koo suqi, bu sekkee du la noppal. (,)
surga: . Ku ñuy dàq ngay daw, di jàppi ween, sa càmmiñ a lay dàq.  . Ku ñuy jàppub jaam ngay seetub surga. 'Woyof mbubb, am benn surga doŋŋ, moo gën réyal turki tey dee ak xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 9)
surgaam: 'surgaam 'Ku am ay yilif ku ñàkk, koo leb di surgaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 7)
surgawu: Defal boppam 'surgaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
sut: .	Kenn bëggul ku la sut ba mu des sa doom ja nga jur.  .	Kenn ci ñoom warul féete sa moroom gannaaw.  .	Kenn du boole say nen yépp ci genn leket. 'Wax ju xelu sut nab dof, jataayu pénc du fa àddoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 7)
sute: . Lu dagg sute xaaxaam ba di ko sekki ?  . Lu damm ndigg ay dóoxaluw taat.
sutul: Dagg, sutul xaaxaam lu mu koy sekkee.
sutura: Bu mag amee sutura moo ko may boppam. 'Kuy wër di sos dangay wuññi sutura, ku jara wóolu dangay am bàmmeelu biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 13)
suturlu: Defal boppam 'suturl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
suub: Du man doõõ, bokkuma caa ko gën.  .	Du xamum nganj, yàgg a suub la.
suuf: Asamaan lu mu taw-taw suuf àttan ko. 'Aji Sax ji xel mu rafet la sose suuf, lale asamaan ag dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 19)
suufam: Bëñ bu weex tàll, te deret ju ñuul kukk lal ko.  Bëñ de na ree, wandey deret anga ca suufam.  Bëñ weex na, nde deret a ko ronu.
suufas: 'suufas 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf, bul aakimoo suufas jirim.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 10)
suufu: Defal boppam 'suuf' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
suufukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'suufu' (Someone who does...).
suukar: Bul diw suukar ci sama yaram, bàyyi maak sànqaleñ yi.
suul: Bu fukk dee gas, fukk di suul, pënd ay bari waaye pax du fa am. (,,,,,,,)
suule: Jëkka laye di tax nga ey.  .	Jël bu kii suule bu ki.
suulu: Defal boppam 'suul' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
suur: Biir du suur, xel ay suur. 'Waaye loo ci góobe, gar ko, say pexe suur la këll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 31)
suure: .	Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) .	Duñu lekkloo nit su suure.
suuroo: . Saxaarus laax yáqul gëti mage yàgg na koo suuroo.
