suuru: Defal boppam 'suur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Diwook suuru day naatal xol; waaye li neex cib xarit, xol la lay digale.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 9)
suurul: . Ngësëm wacce wu ma dama ñor tabbi.  . Ngooxi mbott du tee gaynde naan cib déeg.  . Ngor moo di lekk suurul, mu jóg.
suuruñu: Defal boppam 'suuruñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
suux: . Su ñu nee : “na xob yépp yëngu”, paftan taxul ñuy wax.  . Su picc geddee ab déeg, dafa ñal ag suux. (,) 'Tegtal tumurànke, am réew suux; digle bare, ndam dikk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 14)
suuxat: 'suuxat 'Ku yéwén, woomle; kuy suuxat, suuxu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 25)
suuxatu: Defal boppam 'suuxat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
suuxu: Defal boppam 'suux' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku yéwén, woomle; kuy suuxat, suuxu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 25)
suy: Mburu su amoon gàllaaj gu muy digle suy dem ci taal ba takk ko.  . Mbuus deful lu gën pepp.
suyal: Boo nee laax bi tàng na, mu ne mbott suyal xorom.
taa: Àddina, ndoxum joor la ; buy taa, mu ngay õiis (,)
taaaru: Defal boppam 'taaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taabalu: Defal boppam 'taabal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taabu: Defal boppam 'taab' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taaj: 'taaj 'Mu rendi ag juram, njafaan ay biiñam, xelli, taaj ay ndabam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 2)
taal: Bukki am na gillint, tey àll bi leer.  Bukki am na taal àll, bi leer na.  Su bukki amee làmp, àll bi leer. 'Ku jub day leer nàññ, ab soxor mel ni taal bu fey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 9)
taalatuñu: Defal boppam 'taalatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taale: . Sébbu bu taa tàkk wet gu ne la nu koy taale.  . Sebetum dërëm amul ndéx-ndéxóor.
taalibeem: . Loo doonul ndongoom doo doon ub sëriñam. (,,) Loo nekkul taalibeem doo nekkub sëriñam.
taalifu: Defal boppam 'taalif' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taalu: Defal boppam 'taal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Naqari deret, taalu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 18)
taaluñu: Defal boppam 'taaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taamu: Defal boppam 'taam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taamul: 'taamul 'Wutal xel mu rafet, bàyyi wurus; taamul ag dégg, wacc xaalis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 16)
taar: Àddina li muy yaatu-yaatu, ñaawaay a ëpp wóllare taar. 'Melokaan wu jekk day naxe, taar day wéy, waaye jigéen ju ragal Aji Sax ji, kookoo jara gërëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 30)
taaralkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'taaral' (Someone who does...).
taaram: 'taaram 'Bu ko xemmeme taaram, bumu la fiir aki lamsal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 25)
taaru: Defal boppam 'taar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Taaru jongama ju xel maa gàtt, mooy jaaro wurus ci noppu mbaam-xuux.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 22)
taas: 'taas 'ngir mana xam aw léeb  aku taas ak kàddug boroomi xel yu rafet ak seeni cax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 6)
taasoo: 'taasoo 'ku ko ne: "Yaa tooñ," yaay baaxle, taasoo barke bu yaa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 25)
taat: Bala ngaa xam luw taat di jëriñ, mbate toog jotee. (,) Bala ngay xam li taat di jariñ, toog jot. (,)
taataan: . Taarub kanam taarub xol a ko gën.  . Taataan fa daan taa.
taati: Deel teggi sa loxo bi ci taati kiy dem.
taatu: Defal boppam 'taat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taaw: . Waxi dof, taaw baay gën caat ma. (,) . Waxi mag “waaw” la sant.
taawloo: . Liggéey bu amulug pey, yàgg lay taawloo, caatloo bon. (,)
taawlu: Defal boppam 'taawl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taawu: Defal boppam 'taaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taawub: . Taawub baay, baay la fu baay nekkul. (,) . Tabaski du bés bu nekk.
taaxu: Defal boppam 'taax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taaxum: .	Ginaar, bu doon wàccee ci taaxum-kaw itam, “kes”, rekk la ñu koy dàqe. (,,,)
tabanu: Defal boppam 'taban' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tabax: .	Gan doxat la balaay reyee, dem.  .	Gan du tabax. (,) 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet daa tabax këram, yatt juróom ñaari kenoom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 1)
tabaxaguñu: Defal boppam 'tabaxaguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tabaxe: . Kuy jéem mbànd te mënoo tabax, dangay yàq ban, rekk.  Bàyyileen jéem i mbànd ku mënula tabax doo yàq ban.  Tabaxe su jéemantoo mbànd tojle (de nga ko toj).
tabaxinu: Defal boppam 'tabaxin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tabaxkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tabax' (Someone who does...).
tabaxkatu: Defal boppam 'tabaxkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tabaxlu: Defal boppam 'tabaxl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tabaxu: Defal boppam 'tabax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ndeke lépp a nga saxi dég, fépp fees akum ñax, tabaxu doj ba ko wër màbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 31)
tabaxub: Donn sa tabaxub baay, donn ngërëmam a ko gën.
tabaxukaayu: Defal boppam 'tabaxukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tàbbal: Garab gu dul tàbbal ay doom doo am aw yoon. (,) .	Garab gu la sutul, du la may ker. (,,,,)
tàbbi: Dawug daay tàbbib jëmb. (,) Daw jëmb tàbbi daay. 'Nanu mel ni njaniiw, mëdd kuy dund, mu jekki tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 12)
tàbbiwuñu: Defal boppam 'tàbbiwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tabe: 'tabe 'Nit a ngi tabe, di yokkule; nit di nëŋ-nëŋi, gëna ñàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 24)
tàccu: Defal boppam 'tàcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taf: 'taf 'Takkal foo tollu, taf ci sa xol, fas ko ci sa baat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 21)
tafoo: 'tafoo 'Nawal xel mu rafet, mu darajaal la; tafoo ko, mu teral la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 8)
tag: Boo fa sànnee bàttu mu tag !
tagg: . Ku tagg sa bopp, doo juum. 'Bul tëggu, bàyyil ñu tagg la, muy waxi keneen; yaw, bu ko wax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 2)
tàgg: . Lu juddoo cim tàgg, bu naawul jaaxal i mbokkam. (,,)
taggam: 'taggam 'Xaalis ak wurus sawaraa koy xelli, waaye àtteb nit ca taggam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 21)
tàggam: 'tàggam 'Ku sore fa nga bokk, dangay mel ni picc mu sore tàggam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 8)
tàggatkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tàggat' (Someone who does...).
tàggatu: Defal boppam 'tàggat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tàgge: . Ku dee ca ja ba, yaa tàgge sa bopp. (,,,,,,,) Ku dee cib marse yaa tàgge sa bopp.
tàggoo: Bu guney yéeg, du tàggoo, waaye bu daanoo ñu yëg ko. (,) Gone, bu dee yéeg du taggoo, waaye bés bu daanoo mag am caw yoon.
tàggook: Dëng ànd ak say mbokk a gëna jub tàggook ñoom. 'Waaye déggal ma, dëkke jàmm, tàggook njekkar ak safaan."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 33)
tàggu: Defal boppam 'tàgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
takk: Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,) 'Bu la ngor ak worma dëddu, booleel takk ci sa baat, bind ko ci sa àlluway xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 3)
tàkk: . Kuy xool la ca ginnaaw sox bu tàkk, doo fital.  . Kuy yiit di të doo woccu. 'Ngay mujje onk, desey yax, jeex tàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 11)
tàkk-tàkk: .  Lu cuuj tuut-tuut gàddu njëlam.  .  Lu daay tàkk-tàkk bàyyi fa kuréel. (,)
tàkk-tàkku: Defal boppam 'tàkk-tàkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
takkaayam: .	Jëndle la fas wu yaa-biir te duñ(u) la ko gubleel.  .	Jigéen naka takkaayam day, la jikkoom day.  .	Jigéen ay jur lu ne.
takkaayu: Defal boppam 'takkaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
takkal: ji ñu la takkal, 'Da lay takkal kaala gu jekk, solal la mbaxanam buur." Moytul yoonu ku bon' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 9)
takke: . Tubéy su amul géño, nu la neex takke ko.  . Tuddub dëkk du ko taxa lakk.
takkee: .	Góor bu takkee tubeyam gaynde la, bu ka tekkee xarum tubaa beer la.  .	Góor ca xare baa gën, ñépp dem, nga des fa kër gay fetal i tan.
tàkkee: Bu daay tàkkee, gisoo bàqaar, am na lu ko téye.
takkeesu: Defal boppam 'takkees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
takkinu: Defal boppam 'takkin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
takklu: Defal boppam 'takkl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
takkndeeru: Defal boppam 'takkndeer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
takkoon: . Xeeb sa takkum, mu takk saw say. (,) Xeeb sa takkoon, mu yeew saw say.
takku: Defal boppam 'takk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Diisoo ñàkk, pexe sànku; digle yu takku, pexe àntu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 22)
takkul: 'takkul 'Su yëkk takkul, bey, sàq wéet; mu beye dooleem, meññeef ne gàññ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 4)
tàkkusaan: Kuy jaay sa keppaar, bu tàkkusaan jotee te wàññiwoo sa njëg, ñàkk nga.
tal: Bu sikkim lakkandoo, ku ne sa bos ngay tal.
tala: . Ku ñu nettali sa jëw nga mer la nga def rafetul.  . Ku ñu waccul doo tala njaaloo.
talaayu: Defal boppam 'talaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
talalali: 'talalali 'Ku xelu àddu, xam-xam rafet; ab dof di talalali.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 2)
talaŋu: Defal boppam 'talaŋ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tàll: Bëñ bu weex tàll, te deret ju ñuul kukk lal ko.  Bëñ de na ree, wandey deret anga ca suufam.  Bëñ weex na, nde deret a ko ronu.
tàllal: .	Gone, ban la, feek mi ngi tooy : nu la neex def ko ni.  .	Gone, bu jàqee, tàllal mag ab naqam. (,,) 'Damaa woote, nga gàntal, ma tàllal loxo, faaleesu ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 24)
tàllalu: Defal boppam 'tàllal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taluñu: Defal boppam 'taluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tama: . Ku bindoo ni tama, ñu tëgge la ni tama.
tamaate: . Kuy jaay tamaate doo bëre : boo ca dëggee mu toj. (,,,) Kuy jaay kamaate doo bëré : boo ca dëggee mu toj.
tambaambalu: Defal boppam 'tambaambal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tàmbalee: .	Fa bon jeexe, la tàmbalee (di bon).
tàmbali: . Lépp lu ag muñ tàmbali, ag muñ a koy yeggale.  Lépp lug muñ tàmbali ag muuñ a koy yeggali. 'Ndoortel ay di wal mu tàmbali, luy indib xuloo, bàyyil.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 14)
tàmm: . Loxo du tàmm gudd, gàtt te dogeesu ko.
tàmmul: . Xale bu tàmmul tumuranke du xam àddina.
tan: Bëtub tan jéll na méddum sanqaleñ. 'Kuy xeelu sa baay, di siidee déggal sa ndey, baaxoñ génne ciw xur, luqi sa bët, tan ya lekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 17)
tance: 'tance 'Ku gasal nit am yeer, yaa cay daanu; ku béraŋu doj, ngir tance, yaay tancu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 27)
tancu: Defal boppam 'tanc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku gasal nit am yeer, yaa cay daanu; ku béraŋu doj, ngir tance, yaay tancu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 27)
tane: Lu jarag bon-a-bon, moo tane néegu neen.
taneeguñu: Defal boppam 'taneeguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tàng: Ba nga déggee mbott mën nam ndox, ma ñu baxal taxul ñuy wax.  Mbott mën na ndox, waaye du mu tàng. 'Muñ mer, déggin wu yaa; gaawa tàng, gënatee dof.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 29)
tàngaayu: Defal boppam 'tàngaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tàngoor: . Néegub jargoñ la, du la fegalub sedd, du la fegalu tàngoor.  . Néegub ngor, kenn terewu ko, ku ci duggul ci yow la. (,) . Neenug neen, du rey bukki. (,)
tàngooru: Defal boppam 'tàngoor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ndaw lu wóor day seral xolu njaatigeem, mooy ndox mu sedd ci tàngooru ngóob.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 13)
tàngul: . Ndoxum linjaan tàngul waaye day rey màtt.  . Ndull jeex, surga yooy. (,)
tànk: Benn tànk doxul ug mbokk. 'Seetlul fi ngay teg tànk, ba foo awe, mu wóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 26)
tànki: . Lu téere yàgg yàgg ca wuude ba kay ëw, yàgg lu ko raw ci tànki boroom.  . Lu tëgg dina tas. (,) 'Kàddu gu xelu ci gémmiñug dof, mooy tànki lafañ, amalu ko njariñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 7)
tànku: Defal boppam 'tànk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tànkub: . Xam lépp, wax lépp, baaxul. (,) . Xam nga sa wàll ci tànkub na(g) wi.  . Xam nit, xam jikkoom a ko gën.
tañlaayu: Defal boppam 'tañlaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tànn: 'tànn 'Daa fekk nga baña xam, te ragal Yàlla du loo tànn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 29)
tànnéefu: Defal boppam 'tànnéef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tanqale: 'tanqale 'Naan biiñ ak ñaawle, naan ñoll, tanqale, ku mu nax xeluwoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 1)
tanqamlu: Defal boppam 'tanqaml' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ab dof bu meree, mu gaawa feeñ; ku teey, tanqamlu saaga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 16)
tàntu: Defal boppam 'tànt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tapekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tape' (Someone who does...).
taq: Doomu béy, yóbbe na yaayam taq am xaaxaam. 'Barey àndandoo lor a ngi ci, waaye xarit a ngi gëna taq nit mbokkam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 24)
tàq: . Sëgu bu doon tee tooy taatu garab du sax ñax.  . Sëlamlée ngi tàq ci loxo.
tàqamtikoo: . Ku tàqamtikoo xam li mu saf. 'Seedeb naaféq faalewul yoon, ab soxor lu bon lay tàqamtikoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 28)
tàqamtiku: Defal boppam 'tàqamtik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taqee: . Ndab, bu taqee, doo ca mëna yakk.
tar: 'tar 'Mbugal tar na, ñeel ku wacc yoon; ku bañ waxi artu, dangay dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 10)
tar-taru: Defal boppam 'tar-tar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tari: .	Jàngora du bàyyi xeet topp dëkkaale yiy faat.  .	Jàngul tari fen la. 'Soo mokkalee, ba man koo tari, muy sa mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 18)
tarka: Bañuma ku ma tarka, waaye kenn du ma laab.
tarxiis: . Tarxiis bu dammee baatub mbonaat boroom géléem war naa jaari ca joor ga.
tas: Boo amee xaritub gunóor, bu ko tas cib kekk. 'Barkeb kiy jëfe njekk teral nab dëkk, kàddug ku soxor tas nab dëkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 11)
taseek: Su peccum liir neexee, ndey jaa téye ca wagg ya.  . Pem-pem, mooy taseek pelam. (,) 'Ba muy taxawal asamaan, maa nga fa, ak ba muy rëdd fa asamaan taseek géej,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 27)
taskat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tas' (Someone who does...).
tasul: . Lu tëgg waxtaan, da koo tasul.  . Lu toj bopp ay tuurug yuur.
tata: 'tata 'Alal day aar boroom ni ab tata, ñàkk di lor baadoolo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 15)
tataa: 'tataa 'Jubook mbokk moo tooñ, jéggi tataa ko gëna yomb, mbaa ubbi bunt yu tëje ràpp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 19)
taw: Asamaan lu mu taw-taw suuf àttan ko. 'Buur, na kanam ga leer, sa bakkan mucc, su la baaxee, mu mel ni taw bu toppum nji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 15)
tawat: . Ku teg diw ci naaj, moo ko reyloo.  . Ku tëg sa ndënd nit ni wallisi.  . Ku tey ab jéllam, kenn du ko tawat.
tawee: Bés bu tawee, lay teg ca, lu ñu jiwoon dana sax, ku ko fekke doo né suuy.
tawlu: Defal boppam 'tawl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tawreetu: Defal boppam 'tawreet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tawtee: Baadoolo, ci buntu néegam lay tawtee.
tawu: Bu ndongo sañoon, tawu mburu di am bés bu nekk.
tawub: . Tawub daaw ba mooy bu ren bi.  . Tàyyeel tayul dara.
tax: Aw doj du yàgg géej ba tax mu doon aw jën. 'Moo tax musiba di jekki dal ko, mu jekki yàqu, ba wees paj.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 15)
taxa: Baax du taxa ñàkk i noon. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
taxaaru: Defal boppam 'taxaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taxan: Dara yéesul taxan, di loob matt moo xamul ëllëg ku koy jaaroo : lu ñ(u) taxanati, na ñ(u) ci jaaru.
taxani: .	Ginaar bu toppee ñii taxani dafa gisul ñii bojj.  .	Ginaar dëgg na doom ja, waaye bañu ko. (,)
taxañu: Defal boppam 'taxañ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taxas: . Man suma doonatul baay kenn du ma miraasaale.  . Man, taxas laa, ku ma lonk nga sëgg.
taxaw: Bu sëkk amee, damu taxaw. 'Muy dem ba fa ndaw say taxaw, ca selebe yoon wa, daldi wuti kër ndaw sa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 8)
taxawaalu: Defal boppam 'taxawaal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taxawaalukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'taxawaalu' (Someone who does...).
taxawaay: . Yuqamtiku yokk nab taxawaay, waaye yàgg caa jafe. 'séq daagu, jekk taxawaay; ab sikket, ak buur ci biiri dagam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 31)
taxawaayam: 'taxawaayam 'Ab soxor, taxawaayam du yàgg; kuy jëfe njekk garab la, reen ba ne kekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 3)
taxawaayu: Defal boppam 'taxawaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taxawal: 'taxawal 'Ba muy taxawal asamaan, maa nga fa, ak ba muy rëdd fa asamaan taseek géej,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 27)
taxawee: . Waxi ndee bu taxawee, ndund yaa tax. (,) Bu waxi ndee saxee ndund yaa.
taxawu: Defal boppam 'taxaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Aji Sax ji da koy taxawu, ku ko xañ, mu xañ la bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 23)
taxawul: . Ku taxawul faratay boroomam, taxaw yu moroomam.  . Ku taxul ndeyi kenn a liggéey, sa ndey du liggéey mukk.
taxawuwu: Defal boppam 'taxawuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
taxe: . Laaxub daaw, bu ñ(u) ko dee nettali cafaay laa taxe.  Laaxub daaw, bu ñu koy nettali, cifaay laa tax. (,) Duñuy fàttaliku laaxu daaw/démb, cifaay ba tax.
taxu: . Mbaxalum xeer, du ka jëkka sóor ay jëkka ñorle.  Mbaxalum xeer, jëkk caa taal taxu caa jëkka ñorle.  Mbaxalum xeer njëkka baxle taxula njëkka ñorle. 'Bul ñéebloo yar gone, bantal ko taxu koo dee.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 13)
taxul: Ba nga déggee mbott mën nam ndox, ma ñu baxal taxul ñuy wax.  Mbott mën na ndox, waaye du mu tàng.
taxula: Am nopp yu firéeku, taxula am dég-dég. 'Barkeb Aji Sax jeey maye alal, kër-këri taxula barele.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 22)
taxuñu: Defal boppam 'taxuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tayel: 'tayel 'Ndaw lu tayel ca ka yónnee daa mel ni lu forox ciy gëñ mbaa saxaar ciy gët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 26)
tayle: 'tayle 'Ku gàddul jàmbur bor, jëlal mbubbam; tayle ko, moo dige feyal jàmbur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 16)
taylee: Bu ñuy werante wurus ak similoor, booba taylee jotul.
taylelu: Defal boppam 'taylel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tàyyi: . La ngeen tàyyi toppleen ko, la ngeen sawar bàyyileen ko. (,,,) . La tee nag waa dabi nag ya tee ñeex maa neex. 'Ab yaafus day yeb loxoom ci ndab, tàyyi ko yékkati, sex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 24)
tëb: Cuuj cof mag, mag jooyatul cuuj tëb di jooy.
tëbantu: Defal boppam 'tëbant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tebbiku: Defal boppam 'tebbik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëbëntu: Defal boppam 'tëbënt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëccu: Defal boppam 'tëcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëccu-tëccu: Defal boppam 'tëccu-tëcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tedd: 'tedd 'Ragal Aji Sax ji day rafetal xel; jëkke woyof, mujje tedd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 33)
tëdd: Bëccëg tëdd, weer wa torox la. 'Booy dox mu di la jiite, nga tëdd, mu di la sàmm, nga yewwu, mu di la waxal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 22)
tëddaat: Boroom ndékki, ku ko jëkka yeewu tëddaat. (,,,,,) Boroom-kër, ku ko jëkka jog, dinga tëddaat. (,) Boroom ndéegó, ku ko jëkka yeewu tëddaat.
teddaayu: Defal boppam 'teddaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teddadil: 'teddadil 'Kuy jubal day ragal Aji Sax ji, ku dëng teddadil nga ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 2)
teddadiluñu: Defal boppam 'teddadiluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëddal: . Tëddal, mëtula digal néew.  Tëddal doyul digal néew. (,)
tëdde: . Ndey géléem, baay géléem, bu sëful i ngaax waar i mbokkam.  . Ndey-ji-seex, njaaxaanaay lay tëdde. (,,,,,,,)
tëddee: Def loo man, wax loo xam, boo tëddee nelaw. (,,,,,) 'Soo tëddee doo tiit; say nelaw day neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 24)
tëddeetu: Defal boppam 'tëddeet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tee: Bañ mbey du tee dégg ug dënnu. 'Gone yi, tee ngeena dégg yaru baay, te déglu, ba amug dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 1)
tëë: 'tëë 'Ñaan-yàlla, soo tooñul, du la dal, day mel ni picc muy naaw, tëë toŋ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 2)
teel: Lu nga sopp-sopp doomu jaambur, sa doom gënal la ko.  . Loo teel-teela jóg, yoon jiitu la. (,,) 'Ku bëgg sa doom teel koo yar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 24)
teela: Ak lu nar teela xéy, bu dëgg gontee, jot ko. (,,)
téeméereelu: Defal boppam 'téeméereel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
téeméeri: . Magum téeméeri at ak ndawul téeméeri teen su ñu waxtaanee juboo.  . Malaaka mu ne, am na mallarci. 'Ku amug dégg ngay yedd benn yoon, ab dof téeméeri yar du ko waññi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 10)
teen: Bul ne : “teen bi, duma naan mukk sam ndox”. 'Mébétu jàmbur day teen bu xóot, ku amug dégg a cay root.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 5)
teeñ: . Koo ci ne “nanu dem ca ngénte la”, mu ne la “dëj baa ëpp u nit”.  . Koo gënul doo ko teeñ.
téen: Ku aj a gëna bañ ku téen.  . Ku am jur jaay leen.
téeñ: . Téeñ baa ngoog, yen ba ñëwagul. (,) . Téere, digle cangaay, te du sangu.  . Téf-téflu taxula naaw.
teenu: Defal boppam 'teen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Naanal ci sa mbalkam bopp, ndox ma balle sa teenu bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 15)
teer: Gaal, lu mu fees fees mëna yóbbaale benn bataaxal.  .	Gaalug dof du teer fu neex bokk ya. (,,)
téere: . Lu téere yàgg yàgg ca wuude ba kay ëw, yàgg lu ko raw ci tànki boroom.  . Lu tëgg dina tas. (,)
teertu: Defal boppam 'teert' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teeru: Defal boppam 'teer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tees: Lu waay def, mu tees ci boppam.  . Lu waay def da koo tal.
teew: . Tukki yokkul wërsëg, ña ko lekk a ko fa nekkul.  . Tunguni du teew, ñu di ko nataal. (,) 'Ku rafet xel day xam, ne cell; bu dof noppiwul, yàqule teew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 14)
teewaayu: Defal boppam 'teewaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teewe: . Waxtaan, ñam la, ku ko teewe ca nga. (,,) . Waxtaan, wax dëgg ca la.
teewloo: 'teewloo 'Doom, teewloo ma xel te roy ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 26)
teewlu: Defal boppam 'teewl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Lu ma tee woona dégg ku may digal, tey teewlu sama waxi sëriñ ya?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 13)
teewlul: 'teewlul 'Teewlul xel mu rafet, sam xel di dégg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 2)
teewluleen: 'teewluleen 'Kon nag, samay doom, dégluleen ma, teewluleen samay wax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 24)
teewluwuñu: Defal boppam 'teewluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teewu: Defal boppam 'teew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teewul: . Ñag boo gis dafa wara gëna ñagas la muy ñag, mbaa du ko mëna ñag.  . Ñag bu sore kaw, teewul am picc a ruur. 'soccet, amul buur, teewul ñuy àndandoo, diy gàngoor;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 27)
teey: 'teey 'Ab dof bu meree, mu gaawa feeñ; ku teey, tanqamlu saaga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 16)
teeyadi: 'teeyadi 'Teeyadi baaxul, ku yàkkamti moy saw yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 2)
teeylu: Defal boppam 'teeyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku jub day teeylu tontam; ab soxor, wax ju ñaaw rekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 28)
tef: . Kooy topp dangay xam fa muy jëm.  . Kooyi bukki du njoowaanug tef. (,,,) . Ku aj a gëna bañ ku séenu kaw. (,,,,)
tëf-tëflu: Defal boppam 'tëf-tëfl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tefes: .	Géléem Samba Saar su toppee tefes, dafa ñolaxndiku.  .	Géléem su tëweey naar, jommal i pël.
tefesu: Defal boppam 'tefes' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teg: Bés bu tawee, lay teg ca, lu ñu jiwoon dana sax, ku ko fekke doo né suuy. 'Yoon wu xelu laa la teg, jaarloo la yoonu njub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 11)
tegal: 'tegal 'Tegal gone ciw yoon; ba bu màggee, du ko wacc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 6)
tegatuñu: Defal boppam 'tegatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tege: 'tege 'Wax ju ñor di nataalu wurus wu tege ci xaalis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 11)
tegee: Bu ñam tegee, ku fekke ci nga.
tegeesu: Defal boppam 'tegees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëgg: Bu ñigg dogee weñ, tëgg yaa ca wax. (,) 'Xellil xaalis, tonni lu ca rax, ba ab tëgg man caa am ndab.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 4)
tëggal: Àddina yagadeete la, koo ca gis ngaa ndëndam, mu ko tëggal ; noppam ne ko : yàggleel.
tëgge: .	Fa ñuy tëgge ab xàndoor, deesu fa ñaani njël ; fa ñu koy bey lañu koy ñaane. (,)
teggee: . Kuy tëraan ak ku bëgg ku ko wéttali : “ubal bunt bi” du leen boole.  . Kuy tëru, kuy teggee ca aay. (,,,,,,,,)
teggi: Deel teggi sa loxo bi ci taati kiy dem. 'Bu leen soosu ndaw xiir ci moy, buleen teggi, topp ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 25)
teggiku: Defal boppam 'teggik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teggikuwu: Defal boppam 'teggikuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teggin: Lu la yar ak teggin mayul, leneen du la ko may. (,) Lu bëñ bu weex mayewul, bu xuur du ko maye.  Lu la raay mayul, wokk du la ko may. 'Waxi teggin jekkul cib dof, ay fen ci as gor waxi noppi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 7)
tëgglu: Defal boppam 'tëggl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëggu: Defal boppam 'tëgg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bul tëggu, bàyyil ñu tagg la, muy waxi keneen; yaw, bu ko wax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 2)
teginu: Defal boppam 'tegin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tegley: 'tegley 'Ngay dajjant aka for bët, di tegley loxooka jaaxaan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 10)
tegoo: 'tegoo 'Tegoo bant nit a koy def, dogal ba Aji Sax ji la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 33)
tegoon: 'tegoon 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf te say maam tegoon ko fa démb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 28)
tegtal: 'tegtal 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
tegu: Am joo gis, indee ciy tegu. 'Yoonu ku bon, bu ci tegu; fu ab soxor di jaar, bu fa dox.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 14)
tegukaayu: Defal boppam 'tegukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëj: .	Kàkkatar, garab gu mu yéeg daadi koy muru. (,) .	Kàkkatar lu mu yéex yéex, wërsëgam lay dunde.  .	Kanam du kaso, waaye koo ca tëj mu xam ko. (,) .	Kàngamloo ma gënal ku ma dàq yóbbuma nduluñ. 'Kàddug boroom njekk day jur xel mu rafet, ku wax njekkar ñu tëj sa gémmiñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 31)
tëjagu: Defal boppam 'tëjag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëjaguñu: Defal boppam 'tëjaguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëje: 'tëje 'Jubook mbokk moo tooñ, jéggi tataa ko gëna yomb, mbaa ubbi bunt yu tëje ràpp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 19)
tëjlu: Defal boppam 'tëjl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëjukaayu: Defal boppam 'tëjukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tekk: . Ku ne tekk, tekk, ñu won la yoon.
tekkee: .	Góor bu takkee tubeyam gaynde la, bu ka tekkee xarum tubaa beer la.  .	Góor ca xare baa gën, ñépp dem, nga des fa kër gay fetal i tan.
tekkeedi: 'tekkeedi 'Ku tekkeedi te bon, day wër di fen,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 12)
tekki: . “Maay taawu boroom kër gi”, tekki dara ci kër gee ko gën.  . Macc buy : ay lor.
tekkiwunu: Defal boppam 'tekkiwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tekkiwuñu: Defal boppam 'tekkiwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëkku: Defal boppam 'tëkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku am ay feye alalam, ba mucc; ku amul deesu ko tëkku.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 8)
tële: .	Jéem, tële, bàyyi, gàcce nekku ca.  .	Jëf du fi jóg, nettali du màgget.  .	Jëf ñatt la: Jëf, jëfantu, jëfandoo.  .	Jëf yóbbaale na wax ba noppi.  .	Jege attayakat taxuta jëkka naan.  .	Jege buur, jege xol baa ko gën.  .	Jege te sori, sori te jege.
tëlee: . Mën ko, defoo ko, tëlee ko gën. (,,) . Mën na maa lugg tabandoor.
téll: . Lu ni téll, mu ni damm na.
tem-temu: Defal boppam 'tem-tem' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tendeefal: . Looy ñut-ñuti na sàcc bu ànd ak narkat.  . Looy tendeefal, ne patt bu fori gët.  . Looy yóotu, jotoo ko.
tëñëx: 'tëñëx 'Kuy foog, gisu ay, làqu; ab téxét ne ca tëñëx, loru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 3)
tënk: 'tënk 'Muñ mer, moo gën njàmbaar; tënk sa bakkan moo raw nangub dëkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 32)
tënkoon: . Till a la gëna xam Xaali Majëmb.  . Tinki mbaam, ña ko tënkoon.  . Tojali doom du xeeñ yaay ja.  . Tombe mooy indi aay gaaf.
tënku: Defal boppam 'tënk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tenqo: . Salaan jooyul wéet.  . Sàll laajul tenqo
teqale: .	Duñu teqale ñaari nag yu mbëkkante. (,) .	Ëkk nit la.
teqalikoowuñu: Defal boppam 'teqalikoowuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
téqe: 'téqe 'Ku bon du nelaw te lorewul, du dajjant ba kera muy téqe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 16)
téqtaloo: 'téqtaloo 'Yoonu ku bon ne këruus, du xam lu muy téqtaloo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 19)
téqtalu: Defal boppam 'téqtal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Doo dox ba tërëf, doo daw, téqtalu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 12)
teraanga: Baadoolo, boo ko nee kaay jël sa teraanga, mu bañ, danga koy jox toroxalam. 'Gudd fan, mu joxee ndijoor; càmmoñ ba, alal ak teraanga.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 16)
teraangaa: 'teraangaa 'Alal ak teraangaa ngi fi man, am-am bu sax it ak yoolu njekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 18)
teraangay: . Teraangay góor a ngi ci ténqu loxol jigéen.  . Tëraay sosul kër. 'Teraangay maam, sët ba; sagu doom, baay ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 6)
tëraay: . Teraangay góor a ngi ci ténqu loxol jigéen.  . Tëraay sosul kër. 'Moo yaafus bi, foo àppal tëraay bi?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 9)
tëraayu: Defal boppam 'tëraay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teral: Boo nee nit duma ko topp, booba fa ngeen jëm soriwul.  . Koo teral fu la neex tëral. 'Nawal xel mu rafet, mu darajaal la; tafoo ko, mu teral la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 8)
tëral: Boo nee nit duma ko topp, booba fa ngeen jëm soriwul.  . Koo teral fu la neex tëral. 'Lu ko moy mu naan, ba fàtte lu yoon tëral, xañ néew-ji-doole ju ne àqam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 5)
teralal: 'teralal 'Teralal Aji Sax ji ci sa alal ak loo njëkka meññle,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 9)
teraleesu: Defal boppam 'teralees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëralinu: Defal boppam 'tëralin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tere: Fii, kekk la, golo du fi raweeb xaj. (,,) .	“Fii laa dikkoon” du tere réerle. (,)
terebentu: Defal boppam 'terebent' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
teree: Dar jant du ko teree fenk. (,)
tereetu: Defal boppam 'tereet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tërëf: 'tërëf 'Doo dox ba tërëf, doo daw, téqtalu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 12)
tërëfee: 'tërëfee 'Bu sab noon daanoo, bu ko bànneexoo, bu tërëfee, bu ko bége.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 17)
tërëfu: Defal boppam 'tërëf' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tërëfuñu: Defal boppam 'tërëfuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
terewu: Defal boppam 'terew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
terewul: Coowal mbott, terewul nag naan cib déeg. (,)
tëroo: 'tëroo 'Ma ngay tëroo nib sàcc, góor ñu bare lay fecciloo worma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 28)
tëru: . Kuy tëraan ak ku bëgg ku ko wéttali : “ubal bunt bi” du leen boole.  . Kuy tëru, kuy teggee ca aay. (,,,,,,,,) 'Ab soxor, waxam am tëru la, day reye; kàdduy kiy jubal di musle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 6)
tëruji: 'tëruji 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
tërukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tëru' (Someone who does...).
tëstën: . Ndegam baaraamu dey moo aay, gëntee tëstën.
téstënu: Defal boppam 'téstën' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tëx: .	Gaynde ku tëx dégguli jat.  .	Gaynde waaf na ca déeg ba.
tëx-luu: Defal boppam 'tëx-lu' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
texe: . Sàkk kolloor, wocc folloor.  . Sakkantal du la taxa texe.
téxét: 'téxét 'ndax ab téxét di foog, ndaw li it xam tey xalaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 4)
tey: Àddina ñetti fan la, démb ñoom baay, tey ñun, ëllëg sunuy doom. 'ndax ab téxét di foog, ndaw li it xam tey xalaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 4)
téye: Bu daay tàkkee, gisoo bàqaar, am na lu ko téye. 'ku ko mana yemale, mana téye ngelaw mbaa nga ŋëb ag diw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 16)
téyee: .	Gone bu téyee ci loxoob baayam, ku mu gis defe ne baayam a la mën.  .	Gone, bu yaroo macc tàngal, yëy goney Ngaayam.
téyeel: 'téyeel 'Soo dee ku bëgg lekk, téyeel sa loxo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 2)
tib: . Kon, daanu toggoo jiit, waaye xawma kuy féeteek fett ga.  . Kon loxo dem ci gémmiñ, te du ànd akub tib.
tibbukaayu: Defal boppam 'tibbukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tibukaayu: Defal boppam 'tibukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ticc: 'ticc 'Ku ñuy artu, nga të ticc, dangay jekki yàqu, ba wees am paj.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 1)
tigi: . Taar tigi ci jikko lay ne.  . Taaru, tabee ko gën. 'Maa sopp ku ma sopp, ku ma seet tigi, gis ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 17)
tiim: Lu la sutul manu laa keral. (,) . Lu la tiim weesu na la. 'Surga, bu rafetee xel, tiim doom juy rusloo, séddu ni doom ci alalu sangam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 2)
tiiñ: Bóli gu dog, doktoor amu ca pexe.  Bóli gu dog, tiiñ nab doktoor. (,,) Bóli gu dog tiiñ na ab doktoor.  Bóli gu dog, doktoor mënu ci dara.  Put gu dog tiiñ na doktoor.
tiir: Boroom kol gu weex, day moytu boroom xàndi tiir.
tiis: . Ndegam seq a jommi astamaak cuuj.  . Ndegam tukkee tiis astemaak dee.  . Ndëmm ndey, ngaana baay. 'Doom rafet xel, baay ba bég; doom dof, ndey ja tiis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 1)
tiislu: Defal boppam 'tiisl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ana kuy tiislu, naan: "Wóoy, ngalla man!" Ana kuy xulooka jàmbat, di gaañu ci dara, bët ya xonq curr?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 29)
tiisluwu: Defal boppam 'tiisluw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tiisu: Defal boppam 'tiis' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Tiisu xol, boroom a ko xam; mbégte ma it jàmbur bokku ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 10)
tiit: 'tiit 'Soo tëddee doo tiit; say nelaw day neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 24)
tiitalu: Defal boppam 'tiital' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tiitul: .	Ëkk tiitul ngëléen. 'Tiitul ci njaboot gi sedd bu metti, ndax ñoom ñépp ay tegley yére.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 21)
tiituñu: Defal boppam 'tiituñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tijjiku: Defal boppam 'tijjik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tilim: . Tib bu rëy rey na boroom, te dund la ca (boroom) bëggoon. (,) . Tilim dina dem fu saabu mënula dem. (,,,,)
till: . Till a la gëna xam Xaali Majëmb.  . Tinki mbaam, ña ko tënkoon.  . Tojali doom du xeeñ yaay ja.  . Tombe mooy indi aay gaaf.
tinuji: 'tinuji 'Yaa ngi ci sa loxoy moroom, kon defal nii, doom, ba rëcc: doxal tinuji ko, raamali ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 3)
tinuñu: Defal boppam 'tinuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tinuwunu: Defal boppam 'tinuwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tisli: . Kuy tisli sag yóor di tuuru war ngaa xam ni doo gudd fan.
toftalu: Defal boppam 'toftal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toggal: Ku ko toggal sab goro Boo tóllantee mu dee.
toggkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'togg' (Someone who does...).
togglu: Defal boppam 'toggl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tojal: . Leb yomm-yomm, fey dënit-denit.  . Lebal nga jaboot tojal i guddi.
toje: . Muus mu ne moo xam na muy toje boppu janaxam. (,) Muus mu nekk ak sa tojinu boppu janax.
tojitu: Defal boppam 'tojit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tóllanti: 'tóllanti 'Ku naqari deret, sonal nga sa bopp; ku la xettali, tóllanti ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 19)
tollu: Defal boppam 'toll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Sama doom, saxool xelu akug foog, dee ci xool foo tollu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 21)
tongoo: . Kumpaa ngi day ni ñay.  . Kuppe : tongoo ak awu.
tonni: 'tonni 'Xellil xaalis, tonni lu ca rax, ba ab tëgg man caa am ndab.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 4)
tont: Tont du forox. 'Tont lu neex day giifal, baat bu ñagas di jógal xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 1)
tontam: 'tontam 'Nit bége na tontam lu dal, kàddu gu jib fa mu ñoree neex!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 23)
tontoo: 'tontoo 'ngir xamal la lu wér te dëggu, nga yóbbaale kàdduy dëgg, yoo tontoo ña la yebal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 21)
tontootuñu: Defal boppam 'tontootuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tontu: Defal boppam 'tont' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Tontu te déggagoo, ndof la, ak ñàkk kersa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 13)
tontuwu: Defal boppam 'tontuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tontuwuñu: Defal boppam 'tontuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toog: Baadoolo du ne moroom ma : “jógal, ma toog !”, waaye bu jóge mu toog. 'Daa xumb, të, du toog këram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 11)
toogaanu: Defal boppam 'toogaan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Mbégte ñeel na ki may déglu, di teewlu ca sama bunt bés bu nekk, di ma toogaanu sama bunt kër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 34)
toogaay: . Toog di jàmbat te defoo dara du maye dara.  . Toogaay, ndaa rekk la jig.
toogaayu: Defal boppam 'toogaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toogaguñu: Defal boppam 'toogaguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tooge: . Ku la jëkk ci néeg bi moo lay wax ni ngay tooge.  . Ku la jëkka reer, won law reerin. 'Bul réy-réylu fi kanam buur, bul tooge jataayu boroom daraja,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 6)
toogee: .	Fii mu ne, su ma toogee cib nen sax, du toj !  .	Fii, wund du fi naane ñeex. (,,,) 'Su buur toogee di àtte, day gis, di ràññee mboolem ayib.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 8)
toogu: Defal boppam 'toog' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toogul: . Tànk, bu jàddee yoon, dég jam ko.  . Tànk bu toogul dëgg day.
tooguñu: Defal boppam 'tooguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tóoju: Defal boppam 'tóoj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tóokër: 'tóokër 'Day seetlu ab tool, jënd ko, sàkk ciw ñaqam, jëmbat tóokër.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 16)
tóokëru: Defal boppam 'tóokër' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tóokërub: 'tóokërub 'Toolub ku yaafus laa jaare, ak tóokërub nit ku ñàkk bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 30)
tool: Baroom jur ci sa tool taxul nga yett giir. 'Beyal sab tool, sab dund doy; topp ay caaxaan ñàkk bopp la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 11)
toolu: Defal boppam 'tool' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toolub: 'toolub 'Toolub ku yaafus laa jaare, ak tóokërub nit ku ñàkk bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 30)
tooñ: .	Fan wu gudd, fetalug ñaari ngémmiñ la: mënees na caa tooñ, feyyu ca. (,,,) 'Mbañeel ak ayoo; cofeel ak jéggale bépp tooñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 12)
tooñee: Bu la bukki tooñee dumaal gaynde.
tooñkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tooñ' (Someone who does...).
tooñoo: 'tooñoo 'Ku ne defkatu lu bon: "Yaw, tooñoo," aw nit móolu la, mbooloo ŋàññ la;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 24)
tooñu: Defal boppam 'tooñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bul joteek kenn ci neen, te tooñu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 30)
tooñul: 'tooñul 'Wallul ku ñuy reyi te tooñul, xettalil kuy tërëf, ñu di ko reyi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 11)
tóor: . Lu tóor-tóor jaayoo, na ko gërëme buut.  . Lu waay def, boppam. (,,,,)
tóor-tóor: . Lu tóor-tóor jaayoo, na ko gërëme buut.  . Lu waay def, boppam. (,,,,)
tóor-tóori: . Tóor-tóori garab gi yépp duñu def ay doom. (,,) . Toppandoo, sag maas.
tóor-tóoru: Defal boppam 'tóor-tóor' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tóori: . Tóor-tóori garab gi yépp duñu def ay doom. (,,) . Toppandoo, sag maas.
tooy: Bu tawee, lay teg ca, dina tooy. 'Ndax xel mu rafet miy tàbbi sa xol, nga xam, sa xol tooy,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 10)
tooyaayu: Defal boppam 'tooyaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tooyal: 'tooyal 'Njàqare day jeexal xolu boroom, wax ju neex di tooyal xolam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 25)
tooyalu: Defal boppam 'tooyal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tooylu: Defal boppam 'tooyl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tooyluwuñu: Defal boppam 'tooyluwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
topografikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'topografi' (Someone who does...).
topp: Boo waree fasu mbaax ñu war fasu waññ topp la. 'Waa ja jekki, topp ko, mbete yëkk wu ñuy rendiji, mbaa dof bu ñu jéng, di ko yari.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 22)
toppaat: . Ku dem ba xamatoo foo jëm dangay toppaat say tànk dellu fa nga jógewoon.
toppal: . Tuuti bet a gën toppal sa ndijoor. (,) . Upp baax na ci laax bu tàng. (,,) . Waa jaa ngi, li sàcc di bañ. 'Doom, toppal yaru baay, te bul wacc ndigalu yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 8)
toppantewuñu: Defal boppam 'toppantewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toppatoo: 'toppatoo 'Ku jub day toppatoo ag juram, ab soxor néeg cig juram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 10)
toppatoowuñu: Defal boppam 'toppatoowuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toppe: . Toppe ku mu tere doon kilifa boo toppewul woon itam doo doon kilifa.
toppee: .	Géléem Samba Saar su toppee tefes, dafa ñolaxndiku.  .	Géléem su tëweey naar, jommal i pël.
toppi: 'toppi 'Ku amug dégg sàkku xam-xam, ab dof di toppi caaxaan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 14)
toppkatu: Defal boppam 'toppkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toppleen: . La ngeen tàyyi toppleen ko, la ngeen sawar bàyyileen ko. (,,,) . La tee nag waa dabi nag ya tee ñeex maa neex.
toppu: Defal boppam 'topp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toppukaayu: Defal boppam 'toppukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toppum: 'toppum 'Buur, na kanam ga leer, sa bakkan mucc, su la baaxee, mu mel ni taw bu toppum nji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 15)
toppunu: Defal boppam 'toppun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toppuñu: Defal boppam 'toppuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toq: . Ndeyu maye dee na; ndeyu jënde rekk a des.  . Ndigg toq moo gën taati neen !
torlu: Defal boppam 'torl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
torlukaayu: Defal boppam 'torlukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
torluwaayu: Defal boppam 'torluwaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
torluwunu: Defal boppam 'torluwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
torox: Bëccëg tëdd, weer wa torox la.
toroxal: .	Gor du toroxal ndab. 'ndax ñu ne la: "Yéegal, jegesi fii," moo gën ñu toroxal la ci kanam kilifa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 7)
toroxlu: Defal boppam 'toroxl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kuy ñaawle, moo lay ñaawal, ku toroxlu, mu may law yiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 34)
toroxte: . Njalbéenug toroxte dey neex. (,) . Njàng mu ne am na àllarba. (,) . Njàng mu ne, ci baa lay tàmbalee.  . Njariñ : loo fekke ! 'Mbugal ak toroxte dib añam, te gàcceem du deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 33)
toxal: . Lu nekk mënees na koo toxal, mu mel na mu meloon ba mu des wax. (,) . Lu nga ñàkk-ñàkk xel, xam ne jabaru baay, ndey la. (,) 'Bul toxal màndargam cosaan ci làccu suuf te say maam tegoon ko fa démb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 28)
toxoñu: Defal boppam 'toxoñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toxorooku: Defal boppam 'toxorook' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
toxu: . Ku dul toxu doo xam fu dëkk neexe. (,,)
tubéy: Boroom tubéy, bu jàngoo, sol. (,,) Boroom tubéy saayu jàngoo sol. (,)
tubéyu: Defal boppam 'tubéy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tudd: Aawo, aw la tudd. 'Nu mu tudd ak nu doomam tudd?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 4)
tuddeetu: Defal boppam 'tuddeet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tukkal: Fullaa gën ub taar, waaye dëkk boo dem géléemug tukkal a nga fa, te fa lañ(u) koy weesu wuti jongama.
tukkee: . Ndawul ñetteelu mag, lamb lay bañ, waaye lamb na ba-noppi.  . Ndax àddina, bu tukkee, añ day naaj ?
tukki: .	Jolonker dina këf yàpp, di yóbbu, di lekk.  .	Jom ay tukki, waaye fullaay ñibbisi.
tukkikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tukki' (Someone who does...).
tumurànke: 'tumurànke 'Tegtal tumurànke, am réew suux; digle bare, ndam dikk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 14)
tuñ: . Ku say tuñ dagg doo mën : “wópplëw !”  . Ku sëlmuwul, doo sëlëm i kuti.
tund: . Rombuw xur, di jaluw tund. 'Dikk naa bala tund yu mag yee sampu, lu jiitu tund yu ndaw yi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 25)
tundu: Defal boppam 'tund' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tuñu: . Ku sa tuñu kaw dem, sa fula jeex.
tuñum: . Tuñum géléem lang na, waaye rotul. (,,,,) . Tuurule barca, for barca jafe na.
turam: .	Fu ma war a doone mbubb, duma fa doon jiba.  .	Fu mag newul lu fa yobbu turam. 'Ku jëfe njekk barkeel, saw tur du fey; ab soxor, turam seey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 7)
turki: 'turki 'Woyof mbubb, am benn surga doŋŋ, moo gën réyal turki tey dee ak xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 9)
turu: 'turu 'Turu Aji Sax ji rawtu bu mag la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 10)
tusngalu: Defal boppam 'tusngal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tuub: .	Gannaaw bukki, mbaar. (,,) .	Gannaaw dee ga, tuub wees na.  .	Gannaaw man, manadi. 'Kuy làq say tooñ doo baaxle, ku koy nangu, tuub ko, am yërmandey Yàlla.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 13)
tuubeelu: Defal boppam 'tuubeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tuubu: Defal boppam 'tuub' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tuubuñu: Defal boppam 'tuubuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tuumaal: . Ku tuumaal ñépp, yaa taq. (,) 'Bul tuumaal nit ci neen, te bu ko seedeel ay fen.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 28)
tuumaalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tuumaal' (Someone who does...).
tuur: . Ku sa weeru baay doy, doo xaaraani bay tala fande.  .  Ku sa yaay tuur sam ñeex, nga mëq sa cere. (,)  . Ku sàcc lëf, boroomam daf ko fekkul.
tuurkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'tuur' (Someone who does...).
tuurkatu: Defal boppam 'tuurkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tuuroo: Bu ndox tuuroo, an bàq a des. (,,,)
tuuru: Defal boppam 'tuur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
tuut: Buleen xeeb bataaxal, lu mu tuut tuut wax lay indi. (,) 'Ñeent a ngii, di lu tuut ci kaw suuf, te am xel, yaroo xel:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 24)
tuuti: Deel wax bu tuuti, tey déglu bu bare. 'Tuuti ma yàqu yaxeet fi kanam ñépp!" Yemal ci sa jabar' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 14)
ubbee: . Ku mar taxa naan póotit, bu “robine” ubbee nga rus.  .  Ku mbaanig sag ndaw, kàcc sag mag. (,,,) . Ku mën lu bare te du ca def dara mooy ki yàq.
ubbeekaayu: Defal boppam 'ubbeekaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ubbeeku: Defal boppam 'ubbeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ubbi: . Kuy def bunt boo gis ubbi ko daa mës ubbi tisóoli. 'Jubook mbokk moo tooñ, jéggi tataa ko gëna yomb, mbaa ubbi bunt yu tëje ràpp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 19)
ubbiku: Defal boppam 'ubbik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
ubbil: Bala nga lekk ubbil sa gémmiñ. 'Deel maye, da lay ubbil bunt, di la àggale ci boroom daraja.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 16)
ubu: 'ubu 'Néewle te ragal Aji Sax ji moo gën barele, sa bopp ubu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 16)
ubul: . Yòbbante bu ca xuloo amee, dafa jar. (,) . Yóbbanteb gal-gal ubul làmb. (,) 'Faaydaak jom la làmboo, te ëllëg ubul boppam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 25)
umplewu: Defal boppam 'umplew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
umplewunu: Defal boppam 'umplewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
upp: . Tuuti bet a gën toppal sa ndijoor. (,) . Upp baax na ci laax bu tàng. (,,) . Waa jaa ngi, li sàcc di bañ.
uppu: Bu tëgg demee, lu fa uppu yay def ? (,,)
waa: Àndook waa new, waa dugóor raw la. 'Kon nag aweel mbeddum waa ju baax, toppal yoonu defkatu njekk,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 20)
waaf: .	Gaynde ku tëx dégguli jat.  .	Gaynde waaf na ca déeg ba.
waaj: . Ku xamoon lu ñu lay tontu bala ngaa wax, waaj ko.  . Ku xamul “buur saay na”, xam “buur dee na”. (,,,,)
waaja: .	Golo ci taatu garab : yéeg ba wàcc, walla waaja yéeg.  .	Golo du bey, baabun dunde ! (,)
waajal: 'waajal 'Day jóg te bët setul, di waajal njëlu njabootam, aka sas ay janqam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 15)
waajeesu: Defal boppam 'waajees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waajtaayu: Defal boppam 'waajtaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waajur: Cof say waajur baaxul. 'Déglul, waajur artu la (' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
waajuram: Doom su tékkiwul doomiy waajuram kese la, waaye su tékkee di doomi ñépp. 'Ku jur ab dof, am naqar; ab dof waajuram du bég.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 21)
waame: 'waame 'Ku ñàkk, su jekkoo ab ndóol, du ko bàyyil fepp, day mel ni waame.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 3)
waañ: . Xaj baw na, golo yendoo jaab.  . Xaj bi dina raastu ci wetu waañ.
waar: . Na góor aay biir, wànde bu mu aay làmmiñ. (,) . Na ku ne bay wallam ci waar wi. 'Dangay mel ni kuy gis lu doy waar, sam xel di ràbb lu jekkadi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 33)
waaraam: 'waaraam 'Takkal ci say waaraam, bind ko ci sa àlluway xol.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 3)
waarekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'waare' (Someone who does...).
waaru: Defal boppam 'waar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waat: .  Su lëf defulee dëgg, bul ko waat.  . Su liggéey mettee, setal mpey ma.  . Su loxo yàggee ci pax jàmm la fa fekk.
waatu: Defal boppam 'waat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waaw: Wax na (Yes). 'Lekk lem ju ëpp baaxul, te wut waaw-góor du ngóora.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 27)
waawu: Defal boppam 'waaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waaxu: Defal boppam 'waax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waay: Ayi waay jàmmi waay. 'Lu waay jëf, Aji Sax ji gis, di xool mboolem fu mu jaare.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 21)
waayam: Lu nit nangu, teg ko ko dagan na. (,) . Lu waay ñàkk, waayam a ko amul. (,,) . Lu waay ràbb, rax ca dënk.
waaye: Àddina du cere, waaye dañu koy laalo. (,,,,,,,,) Àddina du cere waaye lu mata laalo la. 'Waaye loo ci góobe, gar ko, say pexe suur la këll.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 31)
waayi: . Na nga bëgg sa waay mel ko, sa waayi moroom a koy mel.
waayu: Defal boppam 'waay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wacc: .	Jabar ak jaam kenn du ko wacc. 'Doom, toppal yaru baay, te bul wacc ndigalu yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 8)
wàcc: Dëkk ba nga juddoo, bu la fa kenn gënul, sa ndey ak sa baay wàcc nañu. 'Ana ku yéegoon asamaan, ba wàcc?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 4)
waccal: . Wacc sa wow, nekk ci wowu jàmbur.  . Wàcc, daanoo ci gëna gaaw. (,,,,) . Waccal xal wu, nexeley magati ko.  . Wàccal, ma fay la sa ngooñ.
wàccal: . Wacc sa wow, nekk ci wowu jàmbur.  . Wàcc, daanoo ci gëna gaaw. (,,,,) . Waccal xal wu, nexeley magati ko.  . Wàccal, ma fay la sa ngooñ.
wacce: . Ngësëm wacce wu ma dama ñor tabbi.  . Ngooxi mbott du tee gaynde naan cib déeg.  . Ngor moo di lekk suurul, mu jóg.
wàcce: .	Jaboot day boot ñépp, te du wàcce kenn. (,,,)
wàccee: .	Ginaar, bu doon wàccee ci taaxum-kaw itam, “kes”, rekk la ñu koy dàqe. (,,,)
wàcceesu: Defal boppam 'wàccees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waccoo: 'waccoo 'Dof day def jëfi dof, dellu ca, mooy xaj, bu waccoo, lekkaat ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 11)
waccu: Defal boppam 'wacc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ndog soo ca lekk, waccu ko, yiw woo ko wax daldi neen.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 8)
waccul: . Ku ñu nettali sa jëw nga mer la nga def rafetul.  . Ku ñu waccul doo tala njaaloo.
waccunu: Defal boppam 'waccun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wadd: .	Gawar gu di dawal fasam, mbaxanaam wadd te jotu ko for ?  .	Gaynde bëggul mbuum, yàpp lay dunde. (,,,)
wagg: .  Peccum liir bu neexee, ndey jaa jàpp ca wagg ya. (,,) Peccum liir bu neexee, ndey jaa téyé ca wagg ya di yëngal.  Peccum liir, bu neexee, ndeyam a téye ca tank ya.
waggi: . “Wacc ma, ma wasin” talula njaaloo.  .  Waggi rammatu du wékk tama.  . Wallu teen, ca pind ba rekk ngay yem.  . Wann per a gën, diñé.
wajj: 'wajj 'Ndaw sa ne ko katam, fóon, ne wajj, ne ko:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 13)
wàkk: Lu guy réy-réy, gif a di ndeyam. (,,) . Lu jarag bon-a-bon, mana wàkk néew. (,)
wàkkirlu: Defal boppam 'wàkkirl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wàkku: Defal boppam 'wàkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wal: 'wal 'say sàq day fees, ne xéew, say mbàndi ndoxi reseñ di wal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 10)
walaakaana: 'walaakaana 'Yaafus, walaakaana; farlu, woomle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 4)
walaatu: Defal boppam 'walaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
walbatiku: Defal boppam 'walbatik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Nit def na jëfi dof, ba sànku, walbatiku mere Aji Sax ji.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 3)
walbatiwul: .	Gone, lawtanu yomb la; boo walbatiwul mu law fu la neexul. (,,,,) .	Gone, lu luppub ndeyam lax-lax, ca lay wuufu. (,,,)
walee: 'walee 'Bu ngëlén walee, ab soxor ne mes; kiy def njekk, sab reen sax ba fàww.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 25)
wali: 'wali 'Ba may dikk, géej amul, ndox ballul bay fees, di wal-wali.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 24)
waliis: Bala ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm dangay xam la mu waliis.  Bala ngay fél gémmiñu sàmm, nga xam lu mu waliis.  Bul fél gémmiñug sàmm te xamoo la muy waliis.
wall: Bu ñépp yemee, am ñu gedd seen wall. '"Keroog nga woo ma wall, duma wuyu, nga seet ma, seet, doo ma gis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 28)
wàll: . Ku la wàll jàngoro jëkk na la ca.  . Ku la xeexe daw.
walla: Bés boo gis, day leb walla muy fey. (,)
wallam: . Na góor aay biir, wànde bu mu aay làmmiñ. (,) . Na ku ne bay wallam ci waar wi.
wàlli: . Làmb, ku ca daanu, rekk na ne : ahan, te yem fa.  . Làmbi bukki, béy du ca wàlli. (,,)
wàlliyaan: . Kuy sëqaat, ku ko ñaani mbël doo fa naaje.  . Kuy summi lu ñu sol, du fa bàyyi lu ñu wékk.  . Kuy tëgg ndëndëk sémmiñ doo bari wàlliyaan.
wallu: Defal boppam 'wall' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bul feyantook ku la tooñ; dénkul ci Aji Sax ji, mu wallu la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 22)
wàllu: Defal boppam 'wàll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Dama laa bindal fanweeri dénkaane, ci wàllu ndigal ak xam-xam,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 20)
wallukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wallu' (Someone who does...).
wallul: 'wallul 'Wallul ku ñuy reyi te tooñul, xettalil kuy tërëf, ñu di ko reyi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 11)
walluwu: Defal boppam 'walluw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
walum: 'walum 'Xolu buur walum ndox la ci loxol Aji Sax ji, fu ko soob mu jëme ko fa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 1)
wañaar: 'wañaar 'Ndax ku ruux soow, am ca dax, ku wañaar bakkan, mu nàcc, te lu jógal xol, indiw ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 33)
wañaaru: Defal boppam 'wañaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wanag: . Naaga mën naa juddoo ci wanag, waaye du fa màgge.  . Naaj wi dina saxloo lu nekk.
wanagu: Defal boppam 'wanag' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wann: . “Wacc ma, ma wasin” talula njaaloo.  .  Waggi rammatu du wékk tama.  . Wallu teen, ca pind ba rekk ngay yem.  . Wann per a gën, diñé.
waññ: Boo waree fasu mbaax ñu war fasu waññ topp la. 'Bare na ku dee, moo ko rey, maneesula waññ ñi mu rey ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 26)
wànneeku: Defal boppam 'wànneek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wàññeeku: Defal boppam 'wàññeek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waññi: . Nopp bu doon jogé ci boroom tukki bu ñëwée boroom yokk mbaa waññi. 'Doom, bul xeeb yaru Aji Sax ji, bul bañ mu waññi la,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 11)
wàññi: Bañ loo mënula wàññi dara, mook bëgg yem. (,) 'Noot néew-ji-doole ngir yokkule, mbaa may boroom alal, loo ci def mu wàññi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 16)
waññiku: Defal boppam 'waññik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wàññiku: Defal boppam 'wàññik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waŋŋeetu: Defal boppam 'waŋŋeet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waõõeetu: Defal boppam 'waõõeet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
war: Bala mu ne mux-mux, ne war-war.  Balaa mu naan nux-nux, ni war-war.
wara: Bés bu nekk ak la cay wara xew.
waral: Coow la ca teen ba, ña amul baag a ko waral. (,,,) Xuloo ba ca teen ba ña amul baaga
waralu: Defal boppam 'waral' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
warangiku: Defal boppam 'warangik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
warangikuwuñu: Defal boppam 'warangikuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waree: Boo waree fasu mbaax ñu war fasu waññ topp la.
wareefu: Defal boppam 'wareef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wareesu: Defal boppam 'warees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waroo: Joxoñ, benn baaraam ; la ca des, tàllal sa loxo la. (,) .	Jubb wu la fal, waroo koo bàyyi muy mar diw. (,) .	Juddu bu rafet doõõ sampul kër.
waroona: . Ña waroona bind mu dee jàngu ñu.
wartéefu: Defal boppam 'wartéef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waru: Bakkan waruw dàll la : fa muy dagge doo ko yëg. (,,) Bakkan waru dàll la, buy dagg boroom du ko yëg.
warugar: . Warugar, wenn waru ca, moroom ma tànku.  . Wat a gën wef. (,)
warugaru: Defal boppam 'warugar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
warul: .	Kenn bëggul ku la sut ba mu des sa doom ja nga jur.  .	Kenn ci ñoom warul féete sa moroom gannaaw.  .	Kenn du boole say nen yépp ci genn leket.
warula: Boo gisee ku def lu mu warula def, bu ko farfarle.
waruloo: . Lu la Yàlla jox, waruloo ko xeeb.  Nit lu ko Yàlla jox waru ko xeeb.
warunu: Defal boppam 'warun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waruñu: Defal boppam 'waruñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waruw: Bakkan waruw dàll la : fa muy dagge doo ko yëg. (,,) Bakkan waru dàll la, buy dagg boroom du ko yëg.
wasaare: 'wasaare 'Xanaa doo wasaare sa bëti ndox ca biti, mu def ay wal ca pénc ya?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 16)
wasin: . Lu la ci saxaar biirale ba nga nar cee wasin wago.  . Lu la mar mayul, màtt du la ko may. (,,,)
wat: Benn nopp, ku ca jëkk wat.
watat: . Kuy jooy ku ko watat, dafa amul ku ko boot. (,,,) . Kuy juutu, sàkkaraa la ko dàq moom mi ko dëkke.  . Kuy kuppeek Yàlla foo làqu të la.
watatu: Defal boppam 'watat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
watee: .	Jikko kawar la, boo ko watee mu délsi.  .	Jikko laago la.
wateefu: Defal boppam 'wateef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
watiiru: Defal boppam 'watiir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
watkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wat' (Someone who does...).
watlu: Defal boppam 'watl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wattu: Defal boppam 'watt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Day wattu ku jub fu mu jaare, di sàmm wóllëreem ciw yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 8)
wattukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wattu' (Someone who does...).
wattukatu: Defal boppam 'wattukat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wattulu: Defal boppam 'wattul' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wattuwu: Defal boppam 'wattuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
watu: Bu joxe doon taxa ñàkk, kon ku watu doo sëq.
watukaayu: Defal boppam 'watukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wax: Ag mbokk, dañu koy dox, mbaa ñu wax ko. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
wax-waxlu: Defal boppam 'wax-waxl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxaalee: 'waxaalee 'Kuy waxaalee ngi naan: "Baaxul de!" Bu nee wërëñ, di damu naan: "Aka jar!"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 14)
waxal: . Ku ñuy jiiñ yakktaan ngay õollib tànk, lu ñu la waxal yow a.  . Ku ñuy yërëm ngay bindlu téeréb gémmiñ. 'Booy dox mu di la jiite, nga tëdd, mu di la sàmm, nga yewwu, mu di la waxal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 22)
waxam: 'waxam 'Ab soxor, waxam am tëru la, day reye; kàdduy kiy jubal di musle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 6)
waxambaane: . Laalo : sàntamànna jëkkër : waxambaane.  . Laalo satamanaa ca gën, jabar joo wonni.  . Laax tooy, sànku.
waxantu: Defal boppam 'waxant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxatuñu: Defal boppam 'waxatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxe: 'waxe 'day piis, di wokkeb tànk, di waxe baaraam,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 13)
waxee: Bés a nga di déwén : boo ko waxee gone, mu foog ne tabaski la.  Xale boo ci ni ba déwén, mu defe ni Tabaskee tax ngay wax. 'Ku rafet xel, say kàddu xelu; soo waxee, yey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 23)
waxeesu: Defal boppam 'waxees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxewunu: Defal boppam 'waxewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxi: . Waxi dof, taaw baay gën caat ma. (,) . Waxi mag “waaw” la sant. 'Nga naan: "Su ma yégoon, sopp ab yar te baña sofental waxi artu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 12)
waxinu: Defal boppam 'waxin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wax' (Someone who does...). 'Làmmiñu waxkat, jam-jami jaasi; kàddu gu xelu, garab la ci.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 18)
waxloo: . Lu yëkkëti mag waxloo ko.  . Lu yëngu am na lu ko yëngal.
waxoon: Won ma sa xarit, ma wax la sa jikko.  . Wax ma sa goro, ma wax la kuy sa doom. (,) . “Waxoon naa koo” gën “xamoon naa ko”. (,)
waxtaan: .	Gajjug xuloo, dëkk bu mu sax, sémmiñu waxtaan a koy gor.  .	Galgal, su ko ngelaw uppee, saymi na.
waxtaane: . Xam-xam ñeent a koy kulóor : di ko bind, di ko jàngale, di ko waxtaane, mbaa di ko jëfe. (,)
waxtu: Defal boppam 'waxt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxu: . Lu defu, waxu, te lu aay di njàmbat.  Lu defu waxu.
waxul: .	Fu jàmm yendu nit a fa xam lu mu waxul. (,,)
waxuma: .	Duma làngandook ñey, waxuma la bëreek moom.  .	Duma lekk ci cere ji, ba noppi xëpp ci suuf.
waxuñu: Defal boppam 'waxuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
waxyu: Defal boppam 'waxy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
way: . Neexum ngont, xam fooy fanaanee ko gën. (,,) . Nég ba jaan dem, nga topp ca watit way dóor. (,,) 'Buur àtte way-ñàkk ci dëgg, ab jalam sax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 14)
way-fippu: Defal boppam 'way-fipp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wayadi-wayadilu: Defal boppam 'wayadi-wayadil' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wecc: . Mbaam ma ñu sang ba mu set wecc anga xalangu ca binit. . Mbaam mu, bu wéqee màtt, def na xeexu baayam. (,)
weccee: Kuy wàlliyaan, seen kër dafa fowul.  . Kuy weccee, sa alal da laa neexul.
wecci: .	Gune du të, te ña ko doon dooñ raxasooguñu. (,) .	Gune gu yàgga dox wecci na mag.
weccikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wecci' (Someone who does...).
wecciku: Defal boppam 'weccik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
weccitu: Defal boppam 'weccit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wecciwu: Defal boppam 'wecciw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
weddi: Cokkeer a dim limb, ku weddi laajal baag. 'Ku njëkk a layoo, ñu ne yaa yey, ba keroog ka nga joteel weddi la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 17)
weddikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'weddi' (Someone who does...).
ween: Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,)
weenam: .	Jigéen yàgg naa xiif te nàmpul yaari weenam.  .	Jiit, jànkalaaray maamam.
weeni: Doom, lu mu fekk ci weeni ndeyam, moom la nàmp.  Doom, lu mu fekk ci weenu ndeyam la nàmp.
weenu: Defal boppam 'ween' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
weer: Bëccëg tëdd, weer wa torox la. 'Mbuusum xaalis la ŋàbb, yóbbu, du ñibbisi ndare weer wi fees dell."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 20)
weeru: Defal boppam 'weer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Màndu, fegu; dëng, weeru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 9)
wéeru: Defal boppam 'wéer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Nanga wóoloo Aji Sax ji sa léppi xol, te bul wéeru ci saw déggin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 5)
wéerukaayu: Defal boppam 'wéerukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wees: Àddina weeru koor la ; feek jant sowul, juubu du wees. (,) Dund gu jeexagul, weeru koor la : juubu weesoogu ca. (,,) Koor gu jant sowagul, juubu weesoogu ca. 'Moo tax musiba di jekki dal ko, mu jekki yàqu, ba wees paj.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 15)
weesoo: . Lu metti yàggul, (ci kaw boo ko weesoo.) 'Bu weesoo mu màtt la ni jaan, ne la càppit ni ñàngóor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 32)
weesu: Defal boppam 'wees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
weesunu: Defal boppam 'weesun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wéet: . Mbëggeel gu mat sëkk, wéet gu mat sëkk, ngor gu mat sëkk du fa nekk.  . Mbejum kanam, boroom a koy fajal boppam. (,) 'Su yëkk takkul, bey, sàq wéet; mu beye dooleem, meññeef ne gàññ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 4)
wéete: Ginaar gu ñu gàddu xamul yooni je bu sore  .	Ginaar wéete wolandoo, gëse benn tànk. (,,)
wéetook: 'wéetook 'Rafet xel, jariñu, kuy kókkalee, wéetook sa añ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 12)
wéetu: Defal boppam 'wéet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
weex: Am soow dina ëppela bare, wande du ëppela weex.
weexalkatu: Defal boppam 'weexalkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wegeel: 'wegeel 'Jëw bu rafet a gën barele, wegeel gën xaalis ak wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 1)
wëgg: Deru sëllu wëgg na ndeyam ci teen.  Deru sëllu wëgg na ndeyam.
wékk: . Ku sag nàkk jeex, nga aj say koog. (,,,,) Ku sag nàkk jeex, nga wékk say koog.
wékklu: Defal boppam 'wékkl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wékku: Defal boppam 'wékk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wëllu: Defal boppam 'wëll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
weñ: Bu ñigg dogee weñ, tëgg yaa ca wax. (,) 'Weñ ay nàmm weñ, nit ay nàmm xelu moroom ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 17)
wëñ: Bàyyi sa teppeeku, yokk sa wëñ. 'Day wut kawari gàtt aki wëñ, di ca liggéeye mbégte.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 13)
wëndeelu: Defal boppam 'wëndeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
weneen: . Ku tëb dal cib taal, dese nga weneen tëbin. (,,) Ku tëb dal ca safara, dese na beneen tëbin.
wenn: Bul xolli gunóor, ndax wenn der la.
wéq: Su la mbaam wéqee, nga wéq ko, yéen ñaar a yem. (,) . Mbaam dafa gàtt, waaye ci jur gi la. (,)
wéqu: . Ku bañ ñu saaga la, doo saagaante.  . Ku baña dee ci nguur doo falu.  . Ku bëgga dee, wéqu. (,,,)
wér: Alal yu bare, yaram wu wér a ko gën. 'sa yaram wér, say cér naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 8)
wër: Dof du wër day jël coñsé. 'Ku tekkeedi te bon, day wër di fen,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 12)
wéradi: . Saxadi, lekkadi, wéradi, tool bu mu am dugub du ca am. (,)
wéral: 'wéral 'Mooy dundloo ku ci jàpp, di wéral jëmmam jépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 22)
werante: Bu ñuy werante wurus ak similoor, booba taylee jotul.
weranteek: . Kuy wékk njoowaan, dangaa yaakaara féexlu. (,) . Kuy weranteek sa xel fooy nëbbu dina la të.
wëree: Picc mu mësula naaw, bu wëree am réew, tas ko.  . Picc muy naaw di reg, bu dalee matula wax.
wëreelu: Defal boppam 'wëreel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wërëñ: 'wërëñ 'Kuy waxaalee ngi naan: "Baaxul de!" Bu nee wërëñ, di damu naan: "Aka jar!"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 14)
wëri: Ku dàqeek sam xel, foo nëbbu të la.  . Kuy wëri njooxee xam fa tool yay nangoo.  . Kuy wokk taatu gaynde day ñeme xët.  . Kuy woor, Yàlla nga ca bëgg.
wërmbalu: Defal boppam 'wërmbal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wërndëlu: Defal boppam 'wërndël' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wërngalu: Defal boppam 'wërngal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'May bége wërngalu àddinaam, di bànneexoo doomi aadama.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 31)
wërngalumërngalu: Defal boppam 'wërngalumërngal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wërngëlu: Defal boppam 'wërngël' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wërsëg: .	Gàtt wërsëg, ne xaj bu jub tabaski dee.
wërsëgam: .	Kàkkatar, garab gu mu yéeg daadi koy muru. (,) .	Kàkkatar lu mu yéex yéex, wërsëgam lay dunde.  .	Kanam du kaso, waaye koo ca tëj mu xam ko. (,) .	Kàngamloo ma gënal ku ma dàq yóbbuma nduluñ.
wërsëgu: Defal boppam 'wërsëg' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wërul: 'wërul 'Ku dul ànd ak sa sago, yaa neexa song ni dëkk bu dara wërul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 28)
wëruñu: Defal boppam 'wëruñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wësin: . Wërsëgu jë, fomp du ko dindi. (,) . Wësin mbaa dem tool.
wet: . Niti téyé, ku ñu dogal tubéy itam, ngemb laa nga ca wet ga di la xaar.  . Njaay mu xajam lamb.
wetam: 'wetam 'man, Xel mu Rafet, maa doon ku xareñ ci wetam, di ko bànneexal bés bu ne, tey bànneexu fi kanamam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 30)
wéttali: . Ku sët di wéttali maam a fa sore.
wéttaliwu: Defal boppam 'wéttaliw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wetu: . Xaj baw na, golo yendoo jaab.  . Xaj bi dina raastu ci wetu waañ.
wewu: Bey, ci sa wewu tànk. (,,) Mbey ci sa wewu tànk. (,) Bey ci say óom.
wex: .	Garab wex na ci làmmiñ waaye faj na ci biir. 'Muj ga mu wex xàtt, di gaañe ni ñawkay saamar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 4)
wextanu: Defal boppam 'wextan' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wéy: Béy wéy na mbuus. (,) 'Moyul, bu fa jaare; mbasal te wéy!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 15)
wéye: . Xaleel poto-poto la, noo ko raaxe rekk lay wéye.  . Xalele bañ na loo mu tàmm. 'Ku bëgga dund, dékku woppi yaram, waaye xol bu jeex maneesu koo wéye.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 14)
wéyee: Bu caaxaan wéyee, dëgg a des.
wéyul: 'wéyul 'ndax alal wéyul fàww, ag pal du ñeel sëtoo sët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 24)
wiccax: . Xaj sax, ku koy xont, saa su la séenee wiccax geen.  . Xaj yaakaar na njël lu dul njëlul baayam.
wiiri: Bukki wiiri-wiiri, jaari Ndaari. (,,,,,) Lu bukki wiiri wiiri, jaari ndaari. (,)
wiiru: Defal boppam 'wiir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wiseesu: Defal boppam 'wisees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wodd: Diggante, sér la, ñaari loxoo koy wodd.
woddoo: . Ku la taati neen némm day, boo woddoo ëpplé.  . Ku la tooñ, bul feyyu.
wokk: Ku dàqeek sam xel, foo nëbbu të la.  . Kuy wëri njooxee xam fa tool yay nangoo.  . Kuy wokk taatu gaynde day ñeme xët.  . Kuy woor, Yàlla nga ca bëgg.
wokkatu: Defal boppam 'wokkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wokkeb: 'wokkeb 'day piis, di wokkeb tànk, di waxe baaraam,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 13)
wol: Cerey puso, ku ko soq, wol ko, mooñ ko du la jaaxal. (,) 'Soo jëloonub dof, yeb ci gënn, booleek pepp, wol, du tax ndof ga deñ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 22)
wolandoo: Ginaar gu ñu gàddu xamul yooni je bu sore  .	Ginaar wéete wolandoo, gëse benn tànk. (,,)
wolatuñu: Defal boppam 'wolatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wolkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wol' (Someone who does...).
wóllëreem: 'wóllëreem 'Day wattu ku jub fu mu jaare, di sàmm wóllëreem ciw yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 8)
wolof: Bu naar sonnee wax i wolof. (,,)
wommat: Aw fas, manees na koo wommat ba cim ndox, waaye naanloo ko te marul, maneesu ko
wommiku: Defal boppam 'wommik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Jikkoy jigéenu moykat a ngii: day lekk, wommiku, te naan: "Defuma dara lu aay!"' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 20)
won: . Ku la jëkk ci néeg bi moo lay wax ni ngay tooge.  . Ku la jëkka reer, won law reerin.
woñaaru: Defal boppam 'woñaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wone: . Ku nu ne infiroo nga ne duma dëmm yaa wone sa bopp.  . Ku nuy feyyikug tëng ci ndàqum ginaar, daa weesu kës.  . Ku ñaan ñàkk, boo jëndee am. (,)
wonewu: Defal boppam 'wonew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wonni: . Ku gémmiñam ni kerr ak i gëñ warula wonni yàbbit. (,) . Ku gën ci kër, moo gën ca àll.
woo: .	Janax du woo loob deram bay bëtt ñag du ñeme ndono la.  .	Janax matul mbuus, te yàq mbuus. '"Keroog nga woo ma wall, duma wuyu, nga seet ma, seet, doo ma gis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 28)
wool: 'wool 'Ngalla wutala dégg, wool dég-dég wall.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 3)
wóoloo: 'wóoloo 'Nanga wóoloo Aji Sax ji sa léppi xol, te bul wéeru ci saw déggin.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 5)
woolu: Defal boppam 'wool' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wóolu: Defal boppam 'wóol' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kuy wër di sos dangay wuññi sutura, ku jara wóolu dangay am bàmmeelu biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 13)
wóoluwu: Defal boppam 'wóoluw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wóom: . Sukk du tee yóbbu say wóom. (,,,,,,,,) . Suma i bët dañoo rembat.
woomle: 'woomle 'Yaafus, walaakaana; farlu, woomle.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 4)
woon: Àddina du lijjantiku. Ca xeexub Badar la lëje woon. 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet nee na: "Aji Sax ji jagoo na ma ca njàlbéen, ma jiitu ca jëfam ya woon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 22)
woona: 'woona 'Lu ma tee woona dégg ku may digal, tey teewlu sama waxi sëriñ ya?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 13)
wóor: Bu ko defati wóorul, dootu ma ko defa wóor. 'Kon sab dox wóor, doo fakkastalu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 23)
wóoral: Buur bu amul ay gaay, nguuram wóoral.
wóorlu: Defal boppam 'wóorl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wóorul: Baax ak bon, loo ca mana nëbb dafa wóorul. (,,)
woosu: Defal boppam 'woos' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
woote: Wakke, bu dajeek ub geestu.  . Wol di mëq du jikko, jamono la.  . Wommat ginaar, gàddu koo ko gën. (,) . Woññ bëñu gaynde, day fekk mu dee.  . Woote Yàllaa gën bu nit. 'Xel mu Rafet woote na' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
wootee: 'wootee 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
wooweesu: Defal boppam 'woowees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
woowu: Defal boppam 'woow' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bul xemmem daraam lu neex, ñam woowu la lay naxe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 3)
wóoy: 'wóoy 'Ana kuy tiislu, naan: "Wóoy, ngalla man!" Ana kuy xulooka jàmbat, di gaañu ci dara, bët ya xonq curr?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 29)
wopp: .	Fu ñuy suuleb néew, kenn du fa jooy ku wopp. (,,) .	Fu sindax di ñaawatee xodd, garab a faa jege.
wopp-wopplu: Defal boppam 'wopp-woppl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
woppam: Bul xeebal ginaar woppam nde moo koy rey.  Bul xeebal ginaar woppam.
woppee: . Kuy reere pann, boo woppee fande. (,,) . Kuy rootaani, seetil boroom goj ak baag.  . Kuy rooteek sendal, doo yóbbum ndox.  . Kuy sàkki ron, ku ko abal kàndaama bañu ko.  . Kuy sàngoo làmmiñ boo noppee rafle.
woppi: . Woppi mag ; féppay metti. 'Ku bëgga dund, dékku woppi yaram, waaye xol bu jeex maneesu koo wéye.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 14)
wor: . Ku wor ku la dul wor, Yàlla wor la. (,) . Ku wuti xànc dinga moytu rat. 'Dàqal wor, mu sore la; kàdduy naxe, na la dànd.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 24)
wore: 'wore 'Seede bu dëggu day jot bakkan, kuy fen day wore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 25)
workat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wor' (Someone who does...). 'Jubalal, sa jëfi njekk musal la; ab workat day bëgge, ba far keppu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 6)
worma: Bu worma jeexul woon, kon ndox du togg jën. 'Ku bon, ñu génne réew mi; kuy fecci worma, ñu buddi, sànni.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 22)
wormaal: 'wormaal 'Doom, ragalal Aji Sax ji, wormaal buur.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 21)
wormaalu: Defal boppam 'wormaal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wormaalunu: Defal boppam 'wormaalun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wormaaluñu: Defal boppam 'wormaaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ag maas a ngi saaga baay, te wormaaluñu ndey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 11)
wottukatu: Defal boppam 'wottukat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wow: .	Garab gu tooy dina mësa wow.  .	Garab, loo fa gàjjee fay jebbi.
woy: Jooy, woy la, boo sonnee noppi ! 'Kuy woy, boroom tiisu xol di dégg, yaa futti mbubbam cib sedd, mbaa nga jonj xorom ci góomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 20)
woyam: 'woyam 'Joxleen ko njukkalu ñaqam,jëfam di woyam ca pénc ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 31)
woykat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'woy' (Someone who does...).
woykatu: Defal boppam 'woykat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
woyof: 'woyof 'Woyof mbubb, am benn surga doŋŋ, moo gën réyal turki tey dee ak xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 9)
woyofal: 'woyofal 'Ku réy-réylu rus; woyofal ndax nga xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 2)
woyoflu: Defal boppam 'woyofl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
woyofu: Defal boppam 'woyof' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
woyu: . Woy wu am yékkati wara am daaneel.  . Woya-mbéntee : guy gu sëqul laalo !  . Woyu biir jafe na awu.
wujju: Defal boppam 'wujj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wullikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wulli' (Someone who does...).
wund: .	Fii mu ne, su ma toogee cib nen sax, du toj !  .	Fii, wund du fi naane ñeex. (,,,)
wundu: Defal boppam 'wund' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wuññi: 'wuññi 'Kuy wër di sos dangay wuññi sutura, ku jara wóolu dangay am bàmmeelu biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 13)
wurujkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'wuruj' (Someone who does...).
wurus: Bu ñuy werante wurus ak similoor, booba taylee jotul. 'Am koo gën am xaalis, te njariñ laa raw wurus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 14)
wurusu: Defal boppam 'wurus' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wut: Bala ngay wut alal, na nga wut nit ñi. 'Sàkkul xel mu rafet ni xaalis, wut ko ni alal ju làqu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 4)
wuta: 'wuta 'Ñu baree ngi wuta neex boroom daraja, ku nekk a bëgga xaritook kuy joxe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 6)
wutal: Bala nga wuti jabar, wutal goro. 'Wutal a wut lu baax, ñu nawloo la; ku sàkku lu bon, yaa koy yenu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 27)
wutala: 'wutala 'Ngalla wutala dégg, wool dég-dég wall.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 3)
wuti: Bala nga wuti jabar, wutal goro. 'Këram day joy wuti dee, ay jaaruwaayam jëm njaniiw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 18)
wutin: 'wutin 'Képp kuy lekk lu lewul, nii lay mujje: wutin wu lewul jël bakkanu boroom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 19)
wutukaayu: Defal boppam 'wutukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wutul: 'wutul 'Ab dof wutul ag dégg, li muy def kay mooy jaay ag muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 2)
wutuñu: Defal boppam 'wutuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wuude: . Lu téere yàgg yàgg ca wuude ba kay ëw, yàgg lu ko raw ci tànki boroom.  . Lu tëgg dina tas. (,)
wuute: Bëgg-bëgg yee wuute, moo tax njaay may jar ca ja ba. (,) 'Aji Sax ji bañ na nattu diisaay yu wuute, njublaŋ ci natti diisaay baaxul.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 23)
wuutewu: Defal boppam 'wuutew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wuutu: Defal boppam 'wuut' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Ku jub mucc ci njàqare, ab soxor wuutu ko ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 8)
wuy: Wuy balaa jëriñ toj. 'Waxi jëwkat di ñam wu neex wuy seey, jàll ca biir-a-biir.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 8)
wuyeesu: Defal boppam 'wuyees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wuyoo: Lu mag def dee, bu dekkee dana ko bàyyi.  . Lu waay di wuyoo da koy niru. (,)
wuyu: Bala nga ne “naam”, ne fa. (,,,,,,) Bala nga wuyu nekk fa. (,) '"Keroog nga woo ma wall, duma wuyu, nga seet ma, seet, doo ma gis.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 28)
wuyuji: . Sikkim buy wuyuji reer, te du yóbbu reer, booba rus na.  . Sikkim la, geestoo ko yóbbaale. (,,) 'Waaye kooka du xam ne waa njaniiw a nga fa, te ku wuyuji, tàbbi biir bàmmeel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 18)
wuyul: . Koo ne “wuyul sa baay” du mer, wànte koo ne “wuyul sa jëkkëri yaay” mu mer.
wuyuwu: Defal boppam 'wuyuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
wuyuwuñu: Defal boppam 'wuyuwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaacoo: 'xaacoo 'Ma nga ca buntu dëkk ba, taxaw; fa nit ñay jaare lay xaacoo naan:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 3)
xaacu: Defal boppam 'xaac' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Xel mu Rafet a ngay woote ca mbedd ma, di xaacu ca pénc ma.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 20)
xaajaatu: Defal boppam 'xaajaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaaju: Defal boppam 'xaaj' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaali: . Till a la gëna xam Xaali Majëmb.  . Tinki mbaam, ña ko tënkoon.  . Tojali doom du xeeñ yaay ja.  . Tombe mooy indi aay gaaf.
xaalis: Dëjub xaalis, boroom a koy jooyal boppam. 'Sàkkul xel mu rafet ni xaalis, wut ko ni alal ju làqu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 4)
xaalisu: Defal boppam 'xaalis' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
