xaalu: Defal boppam 'xaal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaar: .	Goneg mbóoyo gu reew, xaar ko ca taatu ndaa la. (,,,) .	Gont taxani for aw ñey, muur a koy maye. 'Loo deeti xaar ci yewwu?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 9)
xaaral: Balaa ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm, xaaral ba xam la mu waliis.  Balaa ngaa pes gëmmiñu sàmm xam lu mu waliis.
xaaratuñu: Defal boppam 'xaaratuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaaxaam: Dagg, sutul xaaxaam lu mu koy sekkee.
xàbb: 'xàbb 'Ku jub bu dee nangul ku bon, yàqu na, ni seyaan bu nëx mbaa teen bu xàbb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 26)
xabtalu: Defal boppam 'xabtal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàcc: Diggante xàcc ak dóor, yiwu Yàlla xaj na fa. (,) 'Kàddu gu xelu ci gémmiñug dof mooy car aki dégam, màndikat xàcc.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 9)
xacceesu: Defal boppam 'xaccees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xadar: 'xadar 'Ku mer, may ko ci sutura, mu giif; boroom xadar, boqal ko neexal, mu dal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 14)
xadaru: Defal boppam 'xadar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàddamiku: Defal boppam 'xàddamik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaddu: Defal boppam 'xadd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaj: Am xaj moo gën, am nit. 'Dof day def jëfi dof, dellu ca, mooy xaj, bu waccoo, lekkaat ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 11)
xajatuñu: Defal boppam 'xajatuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàjjaleku: Defal boppam 'xàjjalek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàjjaliku: Defal boppam 'xàjjalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàjjiku: Defal boppam 'xàjjik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xajootu: Defal boppam 'xajoot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaju: Bu la sa xaj bawul, xaju keneen bawlë.
xajul: Diggante sooca xajul wax ca lu baax
xal: Bàyyil xal, mu gëmm. 'Ku dox ciy xal it, say tànk ñor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 28)
xalaat: . Saay-saay waxul dëgg, waaye yàq nam xel. (,,,) Saay-saay waxul dëgg, waaye yàq na xol.  Seytaane waxul dëgg waaye yàq nay xalaat. 'ndax ab téxét di foog, ndaw li it xam tey xalaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 4)
xalaatam: 'xalaatam 'Maneesula daj li ci xelu buur, xalaatam daa kawe ni asamaan, xóote ni suuf.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 3)
xalaati: 'xalaati 'Sàmmal a sàmm sab xol, nde xalaati xol ngay jëfe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 23)
xalaatu: Defal boppam 'xalaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xalaatunu: Defal boppam 'xalaatun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xalab: 'xalab 'Xalab waxi yar, fowe sa bopp la; deel déggi artu, yokk sam xel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 32)
xalabu: Defal boppam 'xalab' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xalam: Am bukki yomb na, waaye bukki buy xalam a jafe. (,)
xalambaayu: Defal boppam 'xalambaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xalamkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xalam' (Someone who does...).
xalamu: Defal boppam 'xalam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xalangu: Defal boppam 'xalang' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xale: Bés a nga di déwén : boo ko waxee gone, mu foog ne tabaski la.  Xale boo ci ni ba déwén, mu defe ni Tabaskee tax ngay wax. 'séen ca biir téxét ya, ku ma seetlu ca xale yu góor ya, muy ku ñàkk bopp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 7)
xalele: . Xaleel poto-poto la, noo ko raaxe rekk lay wéye.  . Xalele bañ na loo mu tàmm.
xalelu: Defal boppam 'xalel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàll: Bu ñey dee xàll babal, doom yaa tax. (,,) Bu ñey dee xàll baabal, doom jaa tax.  Bu ñey dee xàll mbabal, doom yaa tax.  Su ñey dee xàll ab àll, doom yaa tax  Bu ñey xàllee babal, doom jaa tax. 'Yoonu yaafus, dégi neen; kuy jubal, saw xàll yaa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 19)
xàllal: 'xàllal 'Loo mébét, bàyyil Yàlla xel, mu xàllal la yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 6)
xàllalu: Defal boppam 'xàllal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàllu: Defal boppam 'xàll' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xam: Àddina ñett a ci gën, am a gën, man a gën, xam a gën. (,,) 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
xam-xam: Dëgg, puso bu réer la : gune man na ko for, mag man na ko for. (,) Dëgg, puso bu réer la : mag dana ko for, ndaw dana ko for.       Xel, puso bu réer la, mag dina ko for, xale dina ko for. (,) Xam-xam, puso bu réer la, mag dina ko for, xale dina ko for.
xam-xamu: Defal boppam 'xam-xam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamadi: Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa rey. (,,,,) Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa gaañ. (,,) Bala ngay xam, xamadi rey la.
xamaguñu: Defal boppam 'xamaguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamal: Bala ngaa mbej Samba, xamal la muy waliis. 'Ma ne, kon ma xellil la samam xel, xamal la samay kàddu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 23)
xamaleesu: Defal boppam 'xamalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamalu: Defal boppam 'xamal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamaluñu: Defal boppam 'xamaluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xambu: Defal boppam 'xamb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Këriñ defi xal, matt xambub taal, ab xulookat di xambu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 21)
xambub: 'xambub 'Këriñ defi xal, matt xambub taal, ab xulookat di xambu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 21)
xame: Àddina, ñett a ci di yóbbal : ab xame, ab taar ak mbuus. (,) 'Boo ñefee ab ñaawlekat, téxét ba jànge ca; nga yedd kuy dégg, mu xame ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 25)
xamee: Cerey wottaj, su ko gan xamee, dëkk yaa ko ko wax.
xameesu: Defal boppam 'xamees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xam' (Someone who does...).
xamlekatu: Defal boppam 'xamlekat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamlewuñu: Defal boppam 'xamlewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmee: .	Goloo la gëna xam kër gu barey xaj. (,,) Golo xàmmee na kër gu am xaj.
xàmmeesu: Defal boppam 'xàmmees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmeetuñu: Defal boppam 'xàmmeetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmeewu: Defal boppam 'xàmmeew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmeewuñu: Defal boppam 'xàmmeewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmewuñu: Defal boppam 'xàmmewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmikaayu: Defal boppam 'xàmmikaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmiku: Defal boppam 'xàmmik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàmmiwuñu: Defal boppam 'xàmmiwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamoo: Bala ngaa toj gémmiñu sàmm dangay xam la mu waliis.  Bala ngay fél gémmiñu sàmm, nga xam lu mu waliis.  Bul fél gémmiñug sàmm te xamoo la muy waliis. 'Bul damoo ëllëg, ndax xamoo luy xew tey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 1)
xamoon: Bu tey xamoon ku nga bokkal bakkan, mu di sa ànd ci àddina.
xamu: . Kuy dund te kenn xamu la, soo deewee du mata wax.  . Kuy gaatngag lakk, dangaa yaakaar ndox. 'Rëddul yoonu dund, daa lajj, te xamu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 6)
xamul: Àddina jigéen la, ju fu mu tollu, mu ngi ëmb te kenn xamul lu muy jur. 'Jéegoy jaam Aji Sax jee ko yor, kenn xamul foo jëm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 24)
xamuma: Fakk na la, moo gën xamuma la.
xamunu: Defal boppam 'xamun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xamuñu: Defal boppam 'xamuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xañ: Bu la ngelaw mayee mbaam, ngelaw a la koy xañ. 'Bul xañ njekk ku ko yelloo, ndegam man nga ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 27)
xanaa: Dara du doy nit, xanaa lu mu amul. 'Dégluwoo samay digle it, xanaa xeeb samay artu yépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 30)
xandeer: 'xandeer 'Kuy wax lu neex, tey mébét lu bon, yaay xaalis bu rax, ñu xoob ca ndabal xandeer.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 23)
xàndi: Boroom kol gu weex, day moytu boroom xàndi tiir.
xàppu: Defal boppam 'xàpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xar: Bakkan jekk na ci xar-kanam, ndaxub gise. 'say xar da lay amal koddaay, bëy yi génneel la njëgu tool.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 26)
xar-kanam: Bakkan jekk na ci xar-kanam, ndaxub gise.
xar-kanamu: Defal boppam 'xar-kanam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xar-xaru: Defal boppam 'xar-xar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xarab: . Ku màgg gërëm sa ndey, mbaa nga xarab ko.  Ku màgg gërëm, mbaa nga xarab.
xarafaleesu: Defal boppam 'xarafalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xarafu: Defal boppam 'xaraf' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xarafuñu: Defal boppam 'xarafuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xarante: 'xarante 'Damaa tollu sama palanteer, séentu ca xarante ya,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 6)
xare: .	Géwal, su reppee cib xare, lu mu jiin xeeb ko. (,,) .	Ginaar ak i nenam yépp, boroom ginaar a moom. (,) Ginaar ak i nenam, lépp boroom a ko moom. (,) 'Pexe, ndigal a koy lal; xare, ay tegtal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 18)
xaree: . Xolub doxandéem, soo ko xaree fekk ca ñibbi.  . Xool, bàyyi, gannaaw loola nga wokk sa pooj.  . Xool nit fa toggkat di xool ginaar. 'tegtal yu xelu lañuy xaree, diisoo bu yaatooy maye ndam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 6)
xareetuñu: Defal boppam 'xareetuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xarekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xare' (Someone who does...).
xareñ: 'xareñ 'man, Xel mu Rafet, maa doon ku xareñ ci wetam, di ko bànneexal bés bu ne, tey bànneexu fi kanamam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 30)
xarit: Nit ku la bëgg (Friend). 'Ku ñàkk, say dëkk sax bañ la; ku barele, barey xarit.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 20)
xaritam: 'xaritam 'Ku dëggu, wax ja yiw, buur di xaritam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 11)
xaritook: .	Gayndeg sibi du xaritook u loo. 'Ñu baree ngi wuta neex boroom daraja, ku nekk a bëgga xaritook kuy joxe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 6)
xaritu: Defal boppam 'xarit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Bul fàtte sab xarit mbaa sa xaritu baay, boo jàqee, bul seeti sa mbokk; dëkkandoo bu jegee gën mbokk mu sore.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 10)
xaritub: Boo amee xaritub gunóor, bu ko tas cib kekk.
xarkanamu: Defal boppam 'xarkanam' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xarnu: Defal boppam 'xarn' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaru: . Ku mana féey du xaru ci ndox. (,) 'Buur mer lool, mel ni gayndee ŋar; boo ko merloo, dangay xaru.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 2)
xarum: .	Góor bu takkee tubeyam gaynde la, bu ka tekkee xarum tubaa beer la.  .	Góor ca xare baa gën, ñépp dem, nga des fa kër gay fetal i tan.
xas: 'xas 'Lal ba, ma xeeñal, mu ne bann, di ndàbb, cuuraay ak xas mu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 17)
xasabu: Defal boppam 'xasab' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xasanoo: . Nag, bu xeeboon béjjanam du ko xasanoo.
xasaw: .	Gémmiñ waccootul, xanaa taat di waccu.  .	Gémmiñu may ma su yàggee xasaw.  .	Genn gaal du yeb moroomam.
xasawu: Defal boppam 'xasaw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xaste: Ana golo aka xastey daar-daar ? (,) Ana goloo ka xastey daar-daar ?  Ana golo aka xaste ay daar-daar ?
xastey: Ana golo aka xastey daar-daar ? (,) Ana goloo ka xastey daar-daar ?  Ana golo aka xaste ay daar-daar ?
xasu: Gayndeg waay, xarum waay.  . Xasu kaf, bañ na sikkas boroom. (,) . Xawala wax, ma xawa xam.
xat: . Loo duuf-duuf bajantu gannaaw xat (waru la)  . Loo faxas mu rot, dafaa dëkkul. 'Ab gànc yeer mu xóot la, jabaru jàmbur di teen bu xat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 27)
xat-xat: . Lu bukki om-a-om, mën naa bëreek béy. (,,) . Lu cin xat-xat, xorom ba xaj ca. (,,,)
xatax: . Wuude, nu mu la gise, la lay ëwale. (,,,,,) . Wuy dana jurub xatax.
xataxu: Defal boppam 'xatax' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xàtt: . Xay doy na garab, gudd na, rëy na, te wex na ba né xàtt.  . Xay du gëna wex xay. 'Muj ga mu wex xàtt, di gaañe ni ñawkay saamar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 4)
xaw: Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa rey. (,,,,) Bala ngaa xam, xamadi xaw laa gaañ. (,,) Bala ngay xam, xamadi rey la.
xawa: Gayndeg waay, xarum waay.  . Xasu kaf, bañ na sikkas boroom. (,) . Xawala wax, ma xawa xam.
xawma: .	Dugal ginaar ci ngunu laa mën, waaye xawma fu geen gay féetee.  .	Dukk-dukk ak yoll-yoll, yépp ci xél yi la, waaye wégét ay seen baay.  .	Duma bëgg lu la neex ba ne la Yàllaa ngi lay nuyu. (,)
xay: . Xay doy na garab, gudd na, rëy na, te wex na ba né xàtt.  . Xay du gëna wex xay.
xebaaru: Defal boppam 'xebaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xëccoo: . Su ma xëccoo suuf, doore fa ma nekk.
xëccu: Defal boppam 'xëcc' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xédd: . Xëbël yar bu njëkk ba day dal.  . Xédd, dug bëgg. (,)
xéddkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xédd' (Someone who does...).
xeeb: Bu doom yàkkamtee génn kër baayam, yaayam a yàkkamti. (,) Ku xeeb sa këru baay, sa ndey a yàkkamti. 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
xeebaate: 'xeebaate 'Réy, xeebaate, yoonu mbon, ak wax ju jekkadi, ma boole bañ.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 13)
xeebaatekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xeebaate' (Someone who does...).
xeebeel: 'xeebeel 'Bu mbon nuyoo, xeebeel topp ca; jëf ju ñaaw, gàcce rekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 3)
xeeblu: Defal boppam 'xeebl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeebu: Defal boppam 'xeeb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeebul: . Ku xeeb sa muur, wàññi nga sa ngor.  . Ku xeebul sa nguur, di buur. (,,,)
xeej: Déggadi ñett la jur : buum ci baat ; — xeej ci koll ; — ak gis ku ne : « Ki diw ma woon am ? »
xeeju: Defal boppam 'xeej' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeeloo: 'xeeloo 'Ag maas a ngi daŋŋiiral; aka ñoo mana xeeloo!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 13)
xeelu: Defal boppam 'xeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kuy xeelu sa baay, di siidee déggal sa ndey, baaxoñ génne ciw xur, luqi sa bët, tan ya lekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 17)
xeeñ: Cin bu naree neex, bu baxee xeeñ. (,,,) Bu cin naree neex, bu baxee xeeñ. (,)
xeeñal: 'xeeñal 'Lal ba, ma xeeñal, mu ne bann, di ndàbb, cuuraay ak xas mu neex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 17)
xeeñlu: Defal boppam 'xeeñl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeeñtu: Defal boppam 'xeeñt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeeñu: Defal boppam 'xeeñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeeñuñu: Defal boppam 'xeeñuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeer: . Mbaxalum xeer, du ka jëkka sóor ay jëkka ñorle.  Mbaxalum xeer, jëkk caa taal taxu caa jëkka ñorle.  Mbaxalum xeer njëkka baxle taxula njëkka ñorle.
xeet: .	Jàngora du bàyyi xeet topp dëkkaale yiy faat.  .	Jàngul tari fen la. 'Àtteb dëgg day teral aw xeet, moy di gàcceel aw askan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 34)
xeetlu: Defal boppam 'xeetl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeetu: Defal boppam 'xeet' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xéew: 'xéew 'say sàq day fees, ne xéew, say mbàndi ndoxi reseñ di wal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 10)
xéewal: Buur warula làmboo nekk njiitu réew ba noppi, gëna bëgg nit ñi koppar yeek xéewal yi. 'Jëkkër ja da koy wóolu, te jëkkër ja day am xéewal, du ko ñàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 11)
xéewalu: Defal boppam 'xéewal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xéewlu: Defal boppam 'xéewl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeex: Ci xeex ba, géwal yee ñemeloo xarekat ya.
xeexe: . Ku la wàll jàngoro jëkk na la ca.  . Ku la xeexe daw.
xeexewunu: Defal boppam 'xeexewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeexkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xeex' (Someone who does...).
xef: . Sama xef yaa ngiy nobante.  . Samba bañ bootaay bay ràkkam. 'Kàdduy dëgg, day sax dàkk; fen, xef-xippi, mu wéy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 19)
xejj: Cérub Ma-xejj, Ma-xojj a koy jël.
xejjoo: 'xejjoo 'Aji Sax ji daa sib ku dëng, xejjoo kuy jubal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 32)
xel: Àddinam xel, gën jamonoy bët. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
xél: .	Dugal ginaar ci ngunu laa mën, waaye xawma fu geen gay féetee.  .	Dukk-dukk ak yoll-yoll, yépp ci xél yi la, waaye wégét ay seen baay.  .	Duma bëgg lu la neex ba ne la Yàllaa ngi lay nuyu. (,)
xelalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xelal' (Someone who does...).
xelam: . Mag, lu dal xelam a koy may yaram. (,) 'Ku xelu àddu, xam-xam law; ab dof amul xelam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 7)
xelli: Bul mere li ci kaas bi, mereel ki ko xelli. 'Mu rendi ag juram, njafaan ay biiñam, xelli, taaj ay ndabam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 2)
xellikaayu: Defal boppam 'xellikaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xellikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xelli' (Someone who does...).
xellil: 'xellil 'Ma ne, kon ma xellil la samam xel, xamal la samay kàddu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 23)
xellilu: Defal boppam 'xellil' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xeloo: .	For nëbb du xeloo jébbalee.  For, ne ndokk, jébbaletil. 'Dëddul jëfi téxét ba dund, di jubal ci yoonu dégg." Kuy xeloo ngii ak kuy ñaawle' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 6)
xelootuñu: Defal boppam 'xelootuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xelu: Nit su xeebul nguuram di buur.  . Ku xelu xelliku. 'Kàddu yu xelu yu Suleymaan buurub Israayil, di doomu Daawuda.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 1)
xélu: Mag, lay dalum xelam, moo koy may yaram.  . Mag mat naa bàyyi cim réew. (,,,,,,,,) . Mag mën na xélu ndaw, waaye bu àkkee saõañ. 'ngir dañuy xélu, nar musiba, di gaawtuy sànk bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 16)
xélukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xélu' (Someone who does...).
xelum: . Loo ni suma doon buur, booba xelum buur a nga ca.  . Loo ragal da lay gaañ. 'Kàddug boroom njekk di ngën-gi-xaalis, xelum coxor amul solo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 20)
xeluwoo: 'xeluwoo 'Naan biiñ ak ñaawle, naan ñoll, tanqale, ku mu nax xeluwoo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 1)
xeluwul: 'xeluwul 'Nit xeluwul, amulug dégg ak pexe, ba manal Aji Sax ji dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 30)
xemmem: 'xemmem 'Aji Sax ji du seetaan kiy def njekk, di xiif, waaye day xañ ab soxor la mu xemmem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 3)
xemmeme: 'xemmeme 'Doom, ana looy xemmeme keneen, bay fowe céri jàmbur?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 20)
xemmemlu: Defal boppam 'xemmeml' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xemmemtéefu: Defal boppam 'xemmemtéef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xëpp: Dëgg, kaani la, ku ñu ko xëpp nga toxoñu. (,,,,) Dëgg kaani la, koo ko tuuf mu toxoñu.
xer: .	Jabar, doonte ne yeena jéllooy sàkket, ab xer damm. (,) .	Jabar-goro.
xërëmkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xërëm' (Someone who does...).
xeremlu: Defal boppam 'xereml' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xërëmtu: Defal boppam 'xërëmt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xët: Ku dàqeek sam xel, foo nëbbu të la.  . Kuy wëri njooxee xam fa tool yay nangoo.  . Kuy wokk taatu gaynde day ñeme xët.  . Kuy woor, Yàlla nga ca bëgg.
xettali: 'xettali 'Ku naqari deret, sonal nga sa bopp; ku la xettali, tóllanti ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 19)
xettalikat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xettali' (Someone who does...).
xettaliku: Defal boppam 'xettalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xettalil: 'xettalil 'Wallul ku ñuy reyi te tooñul, xettalil kuy tërëf, ñu di ko reyi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 11)
xetug: . Ku ne sa cerey yaay daa wex xorom, ba nga gedd ko, danga fande.  . Ku ne sa xetug ngèmb doy na la bandaxndiku.
xew: Bés bu nekk ak la cay wara xew. 'Soxna si, Jigéen ju Dof day xumb, reew, du xam lu xew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 13)
xew-xewu: Defal boppam 'xew-xew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xewwi: . Xew xewwi aayul, ñàkka xew a aay.
xéy: Ak lu nar teela xéy, bu dëgg gontee, jot ko. (,,)
xëy: . Koo xeebal soxlaam, yaa ko rey.  . Koo xëy ci waaram ameel na la añ.
xibaarkatu: Defal boppam 'xibaarkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xibaaru: Defal boppam 'xibaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kanam gu leer day seral xol; xibaaru jàmm, jàmmu yaram.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 30)
xiif: .	Jigéen yàgg naa xiif te nàmpul yaari weenam.  .	Jiit, jànkalaaray maamam. 'Deesul sikk ku sàcc aw ñam, def ci biiram ndax xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 30)
xiifee: 'xiifee 'Bu sab noon xiifee, jox ko mu lekk, bu maree, may ko mu naan,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 21)
xiin: 'xiin 'Kuy dige te doo joxe, yaay xiin wu ngelaw, mu naaxsaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 14)
xiinu: Defal boppam 'xiin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xiir: 'xiir 'Bu leen soosu ndaw xiir ci moy, buleen teggi, topp ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 25)
xiirtal: 'xiirtal 'Doom, bàkkaarkat bu la xiirtal, lànkal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 10)
xiiru: Defal boppam 'xiir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xintewuñu: Defal boppam 'xintewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xippi: Xew xewwi aayul, ñàkka xew a bon.  . Xippi taxula gis. 'Kàdduy dëgg, day sax dàkk; fen, xef-xippi, mu wéy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 12 aaya 19)
xob: Dendaale bu doon jariñ, dugub, xob yaa koy laalo. (,) Su dendale doon jariñ, dugub, xob yaa koy laalo. 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
xobbiku: Defal boppam 'xobbik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xobu: . Kuy aaye xobu màngo, doo ca mayeeb doom. (,) . Kuy bëgg i nelaw, boo deewee mu faju.
xodd: .	Fu ñuy suuleb néew, kenn du fa jooy ku wopp. (,,) .	Fu sindax di ñaawatee xodd, garab a faa jege.
xoggaliku: Defal boppam 'xoggalik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xoggalilukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xoggalilu' (Someone who does...).
xol: Boo bëggee jàmm, féexëlël sa xol. 'Ndax xel mu rafet miy tàbbi sa xol, nga xam, sa xol tooy,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 10)
xolam: 'xolam 'kuy fexe lu bon ci xolam, kuy gaawtuy def lu ñaaw,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 18)
xóll: 'xóll 'Ku amug dégg ne jàkk ci xel mu rafet, ab dof ne xóll, xel ma sore lool.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 24)
xolli: Bul xolli gunóor, ndax wenn der la.
xollitu: Defal boppam 'xollit' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xolu: 'xolu 'Fiiraange day feesal xolu góor, te du ñéeblu buy feyu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 34)
xolub: . Xolub doxandéem, soo ko xaree fekk ca ñibbi.  . Xool, bàyyi, gannaaw loola nga wokk sa pooj.  . Xool nit fa toggkat di xool ginaar.
xonq: 'xonq 'Ana kuy tiislu, naan: "Wóoy, ngalla man!" Ana kuy xulooka jàmbat, di gaañu ci dara, bët ya xonq curr?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 29)
xonqaayam: 'xonqaayam 'Bul xool biiñ ak xonqaayam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 31)
xonqaayu: Defal boppam 'xonqaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xont: . Xaj sax, ku koy xont, saa su la séenee wiccax geen.  . Xaj yaakaar na njël lu dul njëlul baayam.
xontu: Defal boppam 'xont' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xoob: 'xoob 'Kuy wax lu neex, tey mébét lu bon, yaay xaalis bu rax, ñu xoob ca ndabal xandeer.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 23)
xool: Bëtub mbëggeel du xool melo. 'Sama doom, saxool xelu akug foog, dee ci xool foo tollu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 21)
xoolaat: 'xoolaat 'Maa ko gis, di xalaat, xoolaat ko, jànge ca.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 32)
xoolal: 'xoolal 'Yaafus bee, xoolal xorondom, seetal ci moom, ba muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 6)
xoolatu: Defal boppam 'xoolat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xoole: . Xéllëre, ku ca dëkk, réy i gët, mbaa nga mëna xoole.  . Xélu ndaw, mag àttanu ko. 'Doo firib caax, ba jàpp njanaaw luy xoole.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 17)
xooleetunu: Defal boppam 'xooleetun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xoolunu: Defal boppam 'xoolun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xooluñu: Defal boppam 'xooluñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xóot: Bu kenn dee gas, fukk di suul, kan ma dana yeexa xóot. 'Waxi nit ndox mu xóot la, bu bënnee, xelli, ñu di ca xelu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 4)
xóotaayu: Defal boppam 'xóotaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xóote: 'xóote 'Ci xam-xamam la ndoxi xóote ya ne jàyy, ay niir di lay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 20)
xóotey: 'xóotey 'ak ba muy teg niir ya fa kaw, ak ba muy dooleel ndoxi xóotey géej,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 28)
xóotu: Defal boppam 'xóot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xóoy: Bu janax doon xumbal, ñag boo séen muy xóoy.
xorom: Boo nee laax bi tàng na, mu ne mbott suyal xorom. 'Kuy woy, boroom tiisu xol di dégg, yaa futti mbubbam cib sedd, mbaa nga jonj xorom ci góomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 20)
xorondom: 'xorondom 'Yaafus bee, xoolal xorondom, seetal ci moom, ba muus.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 6)
xott: .  Tàgge boo gis, am na jàppal diw. (,) . Taluma ndajem ndetteelu xott laa woddoo.  . Tama ñaari boor.
xotti: Dàll yuy xotti ay tànk, paddaañoo ko gën.
xottiku: Defal boppam 'xottik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xottu: Defal boppam 'xott' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xoyomu: Defal boppam 'xoyom' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xuloo: Bëñ ak làmmiñ ñoo dëkk, bés bu set dañuy xuloo, waaye dañuy jubóowaat. 'Ndoortel ay di wal mu tàmbali, luy indib xuloo, bàyyil.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 14)
xulooka: 'xulooka 'Ana kuy tiislu, naan: "Wóoy, ngalla man!" Ana kuy xulooka jàmbat, di gaañu ci dara, bët ya xonq curr?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 29)
xulookat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'xuloo' (Someone who does...). 'Këriñ defi xal, matt xambub taal, ab xulookat di xambu ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 21)
xulooki: 'xulooki 'Dàqal kuy ñaawle, ay jeex; xulooki saaga dakk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 10)
xultu: Defal boppam 'xult' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xumb: 'xumb 'Ma ngay wootee béreb yu gëna xumb, di dégtaley kàddoom ca buntu dëkk ba.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 21)
xumbal: Bu janax doon xumbal, ñag boo séen muy xóoy.
xuntu: Defal boppam 'xunt' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xur: . Ku jél rongoñ, siim cereem, bu ko ñaan ñeex. (,,) . Ku jëm ci xur wi, na wax ak ña fa jóge. 'Kuy xeelu sa baay, di siidee déggal sa ndey, baaxoñ génne ciw xur, luqi sa bët, tan ya lekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 17)
xuri: . Li la dal, dalul galo, mi am ñeenti jabar, ba noppi di raasi ndéem.  . Li la wokk a ma xuri. (,)
xuru: . Maatay su jotee kenn duma njékk si gat-sa.  . “Maa tey”, xuru gàcce la, ku rus a cay jaar.
xuuf: .	Gam-gamle bukkeek mbaam, bu mu doon ci màndiõ.  .	Gan, dañu koy xuuf
xuufu: Defal boppam 'xuuf' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
xuur: . Lu bëñ bu weex mayewul, bu xuur du ko maye.  . Lu beref fett-fett, dal ca àndam. (,)
xuus: Déeg du buur, wande ku ko bëgga xuus summi say dàll.
xuux: . Mbaam xuux yaa neex deret mu ni sañula bañ la.  . Mbaam-sëf mu te, “Bàyyi” la sant. (,) 'Taaru jongama ju xel maa gàtt, mooy jaaro wurus ci noppu mbaam-xuux.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 22)
yaa: Boo doon góor dangay sol màntó di war naaru góor, di dañal; bi ngay jigéen yaa ngi dog buumi gàcce, di bëgg lu baax, di bañ lu bon. 'Ragal *Aji Sax ji di njàlbéenu xam-xam, te xel mu rafet akub yar, dof yaa ko xeeb.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 7)
yaafus: Bu ñépp melee nib yaafus, tool booy. 'Bul yaafus' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 5)
yaak: . Yaa yées, yaa yéccét, yaa takk sa ngoro gàddu.  . Yaak kam ak Bawal bay xëccoo suuf ? 'Kuy sàggane sa liggéey, yaak kuy yàq a bokk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 9)
yaakaar: Booy aji Màkka, dëkk boo romb am na jàkkaak yilimaan, waaye Màkka la yaakaar ja ne. 'Kiy def njekk day séentu mbégte, gis ko; ab soxor yaakaar, yàkki.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 28)
yaakaara: . Kuy wékk njoowaan, dangaa yaakaara féexlu. (,) . Kuy weranteek sa xel fooy nëbbu dina la të.
yaakaaram: 'yaakaaram 'Ab soxor saay, yaakaaram seey, rawatina yaakaar ju sës ci alal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 7)
yaakaaratunu: Defal boppam 'yaakaaratun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yaakaaroon: 'yaakaaroon 'Ku ñaw mana daan jàmbaari dëkk bu mag, ba màbb tata ja ñu yaakaaroon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 22)
yaakaaru: Defal boppam 'yaakaar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yaakaarunu: Defal boppam 'yaakaarun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yaari: .	Jigéen yàgg naa xiif te nàmpul yaari weenam.  .	Jiit, jànkalaaray maamam.
yaatooy: 'yaatooy 'tegtal yu xelu lañuy xaree, diisoo bu yaatooy maye ndam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 24 aaya 6)
yaatu: Defal boppam 'yaat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yaatuwaayu: Defal boppam 'yaatuwaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yaay: Béy wu ne am nag déem, (te yaay samag déem.)  Bëy wu ne am na ag déem. 'Doom, toppal yaru baay, te bul wacc ndigalu yaay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 8)
yaayam: Bu doom yàkkamtee génn kër baayam, yaayam a yàkkamti. (,) Ku xeeb sa këru baay, sa ndey a yàkkamti.
yaayu: Defal boppam 'yaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yab: Boroom njëg a yab luy jaay.
yàbbi: Danga may sex, mbaa nga yàbbi ma.
yabeelu: Defal boppam 'yabeel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yàccaaral: 'yàccaaral 'Ab yaafus, nelaw yu xóot, te ku yàccaaral xiif.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 15)
yafal: . Ku yar sa mbër, yaw lay jëkka daan. (,,) Ku yafal sa mbër yaw lay jëkka daan.  Ku yar sa kuuy, yaw lay jëkka daan.
yaflu: Defal boppam 'yafl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yàgg: Aw doj du yàgg géej ba tax mu doon aw jën. 'Bu yàgg lañu ma dëj, ca ndoorte la, bala suuf a sosu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 23)
yàgg-yàgg: Bérab bukkeek mbaam yàgg-yàgg mbaam ay dee.  Bérab bukkeek mbaam.
yàgga: .	Gune du të, te ña ko doon dooñ raxasooguñu. (,) .	Gune gu yàgga dox wecci na mag.
yàggal: Du xam nganj, mës a suub la.  Du miin nganj, yàggal suub la.  Lii du xam nganj, mën suub la.
yàggul: . Lu metti yàggul, (ci kaw boo ko weesoo.)
yàkkamtee: Bu doom yàkkamtee génn kër baayam, yaayam a yàkkamti. (,) Ku xeeb sa këru baay, sa ndey a yàkkamti. 'Boroom worma, bare barke; ku yàkkamtee woomle, sa mbugal du jaas.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 20)
yàkkamti: Bu doom yàkkamtee génn kër baayam, yaayam a yàkkamti. (,) Ku xeeb sa këru baay, sa ndey a yàkkamti. 'Teeyadi baaxul, ku yàkkamti moy saw yoon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 2)
yàkki: 'yàkki 'Kiy def njekk day séentu mbégte, gis ko; ab soxor yaakaar, yàkki.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 28)
yal: . Looy bañ ñu xam ko, bu ko def.  . Looy bañ, yal na la ko Yàlla bañle. 'Yal na sa naanukaay barkeel, nga bànneexoo kiy sa jabar ba ngay ndaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 18)
yàlla: Ki sàkk àddina (God). 'Daa fekk nga baña xam, te ragal Yàlla du loo tànn.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 29)
yàlla-yàllalu: Defal boppam 'yàlla-yàllal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yàllaa: Baax alalu Yàllaa : xarit ba la koy jox. 'Kon nga xam luy ragal Aji Sax ji, xam Yàllaa di kan;' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 5)
yàllaam: 'yàllaam 'Day dëddu wóllëreem, ba muy ndaw, fàtte *kóllëreem ak Yàllaam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 17)
yàllantu: Defal boppam 'yàllant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yàllay: Bu la Yàllay tàccoo feccal ba lay bàyyi.
yan: . Yan bi diis, ku ci sàkkal boroom yanu mu war laa gërëm.  . Yàpp, bu ñoree, du jar àbb paaka.
yàndoor: .	Dox sag ndaw aayul, waaye dëkk cee bon.  .	Doxandéem nelawul ba yàndoor.
yànj: 'yànj 'Lal naa saab lal, ba mu jekk, di malaan yu yànj, bawoo Misra.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 16)
yàpp: Bëgg jiba, duma taxa gaar sama dënn. (,,) Bëgg i ween du ma taxa takk i ngegenaay. (,) Bëgg xaritu pël du ma taxa booti sëllu.   Bëggu yàpp, bu mu la taxa lekk médd. 'Njëlu ñetti xob fa ñu la soppe moo dàq yàpp wu duuf fu ñu la bañe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 17)
yàpploo: . Ku la ëpp i sagar ëpp lay teeñ.  . Ku la feesloo, yàpploo na la.
yàppu: Defal boppam 'yàpp' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). '"Tey matal naa la ma digoon Yàlla, yàppu bernde waa nga kër ga, *saraxu cant laa.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 14)
yàq: Benn pombiteer bu nëb yàq na pañe. 'Kuy sàggane sa liggéey, yaak kuy yàq a bokk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 9)
yàqal: Doom danga doon dem mu dab la, mënu laa yàqal saw yoon. Ki la fekk ci saw yoon, bu mu la yàqal saw yoon. 'Kuy yàqal sa baay, di dàq sa ndey, yaay indi gàcceek yeraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 26)
yàqati: . Yàkkamti, muj ga : yàqati.  . Yàkkamti yàqule. (,)
yàqee: . Ku wàcc yoon, yoon dal ci sa kow.  . Ku wannuw yet, yendoo taxaw.  . Ku wara defar, boo yàqee mu ñaaw.
yàqkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yàq' (Someone who does...). 'Ku xañ say waajur seen alal te defe ne tooñoo, yaa neexook saay-saayu yàqkat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 24)
yàqkatu: Defal boppam 'yàqkat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yàqu: Balaa soloo baax, solo yàqu. (,) 'Tuuti ma yàqu yaxeet fi kanam ñépp!" Yemal ci sa jabar' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 14)
yàqule: . Yàgg ci yoon wi moo gën yàqule ci yoon wi.  .  Yàgg du saabu, waaye dana fóot. (,,,) . Yàgg, lu mu dugg, ñaawal ko. 'Ku rafet xel day xam, ne cell; bu dof noppiwul, yàqule teew.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 14)
yàquwu: Defal boppam 'yàquw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yar: Aw naaru-góor lu mu mëna mëna daw ñu bàcc ko ab yar. (,) Fasu naaru-góor, lu mu mën-a-mën daw ñu làbbili ko.  Lu naaru-góor gaaw-gaaw, fàww ñu làbbali ko. 'Li ko taxa jóg di nit ñi am xel mu rafet, am ab yar, ngir xam wax ju lal dég-dég,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 2)
yaral: 'yaral 'Yaral sa doom ba muy teel, waaye bul topp sa xol, ba rey ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 18)
yaram: Alal yu bare, yaram wu wér a ko gën. 'sa yaram wér, say cér naat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 8)
yaramu: Defal boppam 'yaram' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yari: 'yari 'Waa ja jekki, topp ko, mbete yëkk wu ñuy rendiji, mbaa dof bu ñu jéng, di ko yari.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 22)
yarinu: Defal boppam 'yarin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yaroo: Bu gune yaroo lu mu am jombu ko. 'Ñeent a ngii, di lu tuut ci kaw suuf, te am xel, yaroo xel:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 24)
yaru: Bala nga yaraan, jëkkala yaru. 'ngir yaru ci  jëfe xel ak njub ak yoon, di jubal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 3)
yarul: 'yarul 'Waxi neen yarul surga, da lay dégg te du la déggal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 19)
yatt: . Wenn yattay sàmm gétt, waaye nit ña ku nekk ak sa yatt.  . Weñ nga, fu tooy nga dal. 'Soxna si, Xel mu Rafet daa tabax këram, yatt juróom ñaari kenoom.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 1)
yatte: . Lub lawbe rëye kon, na ko mana yatte. (,) . Luy aas dana nen.
yattkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yatt' (Someone who does...).
yattlu: Defal boppam 'yattl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yaw: .	Duma bokk ak yaw jëkkër, te boo ma ca fekkee ma dem ba la ca.  .	Duma jënd jaan ci pax. 'Bul fexeel dëkkandoo bu dëkk ak yaw ci kóolute.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 29)
yax: Cin fuqul bënnul, yax ba ca nekkoon bëgga réer, te ka ko toggoon jógu fa. 'Ngay mujje onk, desey yax, jeex tàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 11)
yaxanal: Ëlleg du añ, du reer, waaye lu mata sédd di leen yaxanal.
yaxeet: 'yaxeet 'Tuuti ma yàqu yaxeet fi kanam ñépp!" Yemal ci sa jabar' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 14)
yaxi: . Ku yëy yaxub bukki, yëy na yaxub yëykatu yax. (,) Ku yëy yaxi bukki, yëy nga yaxi yëykat.
yay: Bu tëgg demee, lu fa uppu yay def ? (,,)
yeb: .	Gémmiñ waccootul, xanaa taat di waccu.  .	Gémmiñu may ma su yàggee xasaw.  .	Genn gaal du yeb moroomam. 'Mboolem alal ju réy, nu jagoo, yeb sunu biir kër, mu fees.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 13)
yebal: .  Sabaaru dugub du ñàkku rusit   . Sàcc ak ki ko yebal, ñépp sàcc lañu.  . Sàcc ba noppi, ànd ca xeñkat ya.  . Sàcc bu dul raw jarula yàq i nelaw. 'ngir xamal la lu wér te dëggu, nga yóbbaale kàdduy dëgg, yoo tontoo ña la yebal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 21)
yebaleesu: Defal boppam 'yebalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yebalu: Defal boppam 'yebal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yebu: Bul yebu ci sama mbojj. 'Déglul, doom, muusal te yebu ci yoonu njub.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 19)
yebuwu: Defal boppam 'yebuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yedd: . Ku sam xel yeddul, nit ñi yedd la. (,) 'Artu kuy ñaawle, feyoo saaga rekk, yedd ab soxor, yooloo loraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 7)
yeddal: 'yeddal 'Bul yedd kuy ñaawle, da lay jéppi; yeddal ku rafet xel, mu naw la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 8)
yedde: 'yedde 'Deel bantal aka yedde, day rafetal xel; gone goo bay-bayal, mu gàcceel ndeyam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 29 aaya 15)
yeddu: Defal boppam 'yedd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéddu: Defal boppam 'yédd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëddu: Defal boppam 'yëdd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëddukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yëddu' (Someone who does...).
yee: Bëgg-bëgg yee wuute, moo tax njaay may jar ca ja ba. (,) 'Dikk naa bala tund yu mag yee sampu, lu jiitu tund yu ndaw yi,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 25)
yéefar: 'yéefar 'Ay sos la yéefar di loree dëkkandoom, waaye kiy jëfe njekk, xam-xam la cay mucce.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 9)
yéefaru: Defal boppam 'yéefar' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéeg: Bu guney yéeg, du tàggoo, waaye bu daanoo ñu yëg ko. (,) Gone, bu dee yéeg du taggoo, waaye bés bu daanoo mag am caw yoon.
yéegaaleesu: Defal boppam 'yéegaalees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéege: . Kuy ñuy diri, doo taamu fu ñu lay jaarale. (,,) . Kuy raam di la wat su yéege fas toogu la.  . Kuy reere mébét bu yaboo falaõi dog.
yéegoon: 'yéegoon 'Ana ku yéegoon asamaan, ba wàcc?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 4)
yeek: Buur warula làmboo nekk njiitu réew ba noppi, gëna bëgg nit ñi koppar yeek xéewal yi. 'Ci samay pexe la njiit di saytoo, ñook kàngam yeek ñiy àtte dëgg ñépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 16)
yeel: Ab yeel bu ëppee ab lupp booba jàngoro rax na ca.
yéem: 'yéem 'Ñett a ngii, yéem na ma, ba ci ñeent yu ma xamul:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 18)
yéemu: Defal boppam 'yéem' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeen: 'yeen '"Yeen mbooloo yi laay woo, doom aadama yi laay joor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 4)
yeena: .	Jabar, doonte ne yeena jéllooy sàkket, ab xer damm. (,) .	Jabar-goro.
yeenay: Yéeg boo bëggee weesu xob ya ci suuf nga jëm.  . Yeenay joxe, Yàllaay fey.
yéene: . Ku la yéene xiif, saa yoo ko rombee, géexal.  . Ku laaxul lekk, doo laax jaay. (,,,)
yéeneem: .	Jaam ak pexeem, Yàllaak dogalam.   Jaam ak yéeneem, Yàlla ak dogalam.
yéenekat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yéene' (Someone who does...).
yéenekatu: Defal boppam 'yéenekat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéenelu: Defal boppam 'yéenel' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeenu: Defal boppam 'yeen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéenu: Defal boppam 'yéen' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeer: 'yeer 'Waxi jigéenu njaalookat am yeer la, ku Aji Sax ji rëbb moo cay tàbbi.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 14)
yeeroo: 'yeeroo 'Ma nga ca mbedd ma, ne ca pénc ya, ruqoo ruq, ma ngay yeeroo.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 12)
yeeru: Defal boppam 'yeer' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeeruji: 'yeeruji 'Dañu la naan: "Dikkal, nu tëruji bakkan, yeeruji jàmbur bu deful dara.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 11)
yeerukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yeeru' (Someone who does...).
yées: Ag roy-dàq a fi yées. 'Dund gu neex jekkul cib dof, surga buy jiite kilifa it moo yées.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 10)
yéeslewuñu: Defal boppam 'yéeslewuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeeslu: Defal boppam 'yeesl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeew: .	Golo ci cank lañu koy yeew. (,,,) Golo ci ndigg lañu koy yeew. (,)
yeewee: . Ku ne dama ne, raw nga say buum. Buñ la yeewee, du kenn yow a  Ku ne dama ni raw nga say buum, boo waxeeg njaaxum yaa yeew sa bopp, kenn yeewu la.
yeeweesu: Defal boppam 'yeewees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeewlu: Defal boppam 'yeewl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeewoo: . Ñàkk a xam, la mu waral bari na. (,,) . Ñàkk a yeewu amul, naajee yeewoo am.
yeewoon: . Ñàkk buubu, ñàkk ceen ga, ñàkk xer ba ñu ko yeewoon.  . Ñàkk dayul ni am.
yeewu: Defal boppam 'yeew' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeex: . Mbaam mu yeex tey yóbbub sëf, moo gën mu gaaw te yóbbuwul dara.  . Mbaam xamul gafaka.
yeexa: Bu kenn dee gas, fukk di suul, kan ma dana yeexa xóot.
yeexantu: Defal boppam 'yeexant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéexantu: Defal boppam 'yéexant' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëf: .  Ñaar a di def aye ci àdduna : Njéemé ak Mbanik.  . Ñaar a di yëf di jàmm ji àddina : ngor ak njullit. (,,)
yëfam: . Ku nobul waay, jox ko yëfam.  . Ku nopp yaay nax doom.
yëfi: . Yëf sa yëf, yëfi jaambur du yëf.  Yëfi jaambur du yëf. 'Taseek gaynde gu ñàkki doomam moo gën taseek dof ak yëfi dofam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 12)
yég: Geenu golo gudd na waaye foo ci laal mu yég ko.  Geenu golo gudd na, waaye lu ci dal boroom yëg ko.
yëg: Bakkan waruw dàll la : fa muy dagge doo ko yëg. (,,) Bakkan waru dàll la, buy dagg boroom du ko yëg.
yég-yégu: Defal boppam 'yég-yég' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yegg: Fa yaw a yegg, du man yeggu fa.
yeggali: . Lépp lu ag muñ tàmbali, ag muñ a koy yeggale.  Lépp lug muñ tàmbali ag muuñ a koy yeggali.
yégleesu: Defal boppam 'yéglees' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéglewunu: Defal boppam 'yéglewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yégoon: 'yégoon 'Nga naan: "Su ma yégoon, sopp ab yar te baña sofental waxi artu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 12)
yégul: . Puju néeg dana xeex ak taw, te boroom néeg yégul ko.  Puju néeg dana xeex ak taw, tey seelu yegul.
yéguma: 'yéguma 'nga naan: "Dañu maa dóor te gaañuwuma, duma ma te yéguma ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 35)
yégunu: Defal boppam 'yégun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yéguñu: Defal boppam 'yéguñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëkk: . Ñaari yëkk yu mat xajuñu ci menn mbalka. (,,) Ñaari yëkk xajuñu ci menn mbalka. 'Waa ja jekki, topp ko, mbete yëkk wu ñuy rendiji, mbaa dof bu ñu jéng, di ko yari.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 22)
yekkal: . Su ñu la séddee ci gaalu xaj itam, nanga fexe ba bu ca lekk.  Mën nañu la yekkal ci gaalu xaj, waaye bu ca lekk.
yékkatee: 'yékkatee 'Soo amul loo ko feyale, ñu yékkatee la sab lal, nangu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 27)
yékkati: . Woy wu am yékkati wara am daaneel.  . Woya-mbéntee : guy gu sëqul laalo !  . Woyu biir jafe na awu. 'Ab yaafus day yeb loxoom ci ndab, tàyyi ko yékkati, sex.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 24)
yékkatiku: Defal boppam 'yékkatik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yékkatiwuñu: Defal boppam 'yékkatiwuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëkkëti: Doomu baay fu mu defe teraanga moroom ma war na ka dimmale def lu ni mel walla lu ko ëpp ngir yëkkëti seen askan.
yëkku: Defal boppam 'yëkk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëlbu: Defal boppam 'yëlb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yelleefu: Defal boppam 'yelleef' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yelloo: 'yelloo 'Bul xañ njekk ku ko yelloo, ndegam man nga ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 27)
yelwaankat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yelwaan' (Someone who does...).
yem: Ay du yem ci boppub boroom. (,,,,) Ay du yem ci boppu boroomam. (,) Musiba du yem ci boppu boroom. 'Boo gisee lem, lekkal lu yem; bu ëppee, nga waccu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 16)
yemal: Àndandoo sag maas, diir koo yemal mbagg. (,) Àndandook say maas, diirook koo yemal i mbagg. 'Tuuti ma yàqu yaxeet fi kanam ñépp!" Yemal ci sa jabar' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 5 aaya 14)
yemale: Baadoolo dafay yemale bëgg-bëggam. 'ku ko mana yemale, mana téye ngelaw mbaa nga ŋëb ag diw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 27 aaya 16)
yemee: Bu ñépp yemee, am ñu gedd seen cër. (,)
yëmmoo: 'yëmmoo 'Kilifa guy soxore néew-ji-doole mook gaynde guy yëmmoo yem, mbaa rab wuy songe.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 15)
yëmmu: Defal boppam 'yëmm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yemukaayu: Defal boppam 'yemukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yemul: Aawo buuru këram ; Ginaar wéete wolandoom ; Gëse benn tànk.  .	Ginaarug jàmbur ku mu yóbbu poliis, danga yemul ci “kes !” 'Nattu diisaay yu yemul ak lu ni mel, Aji Sax ji bañ na ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 20 aaya 10)
yemunu: Defal boppam 'yemun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yemuñu: Defal boppam 'yemuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yen: Am na ku la ne “ma yen la” ; booba, la ca ndab la la bëgga gis. (,) Am na ku la ne ma yen la, tey sa ndab la bëgg séet. 'Ku seedeel sa moroom ay fen, yen nga ko aw njur mbaa saamar mbaa fitt.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 18)
yendoo: . Kerug caxat, bu ca mbooloo yendoo garab ga mu law a tax.  . Kettet buy la jig te buy daanuy toj. 'day yendoo xemmem, te du am; kay jëfe njekk di joxeeka joxewaat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 26)
yendu: Defal boppam 'yend' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëndulu: Defal boppam 'yëndul' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeneen: 'yeneen 'Xanaa kiy naan-naane biiñ, di mosi yeneen njafaan?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 23 aaya 30)
yëngal: . Ku yónni say noon di nga leen yàkkamti.  . Kuddoo ñeme gar ba ñu di ko ràcceeb laax.  . Kuddu gu mag ay yëngal dëxin. 'Ñett a ngii, day yëngal suuf, ba ci ñeent yu suuf àttanul:' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 30 aaya 21)
yëngatu: Defal boppam 'yëngat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëngu: Defal boppam 'yëng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yëngu-yëngu: Defal boppam 'yëngu-yëng' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeni: 'yeni 'day rus ba mel ni koo yeni xal, te Aji Sax jee lay fey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 22)
yenneeku: Defal boppam 'yenneek' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yenni: “Jàppal, ma yenni la”, du sawar laa yenni, waaye bëgga xam la nga yenu la.
yenniku: Defal boppam 'yennik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yenu: Bët du yenu, waaye xam na lu bopp àttan. (,,,,,,,,,) Bët du yenu, waaye xam na lu bopp antan. 'Wutal a wut lu baax, ñu nawloo la; ku sàkku lu bon, yaa koy yenu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 27)
yenukat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yenu' (Someone who does...).
yenul: . Yen bi la Yàlla yenul, bala nga sonn, yow mi ko yenu, ñi lay seetaan ñooy jëkka sonn.
yépp: .	Dugal ginaar ci ngunu laa mën, waaye xawma fu geen gay féetee.  .	Dukk-dukk ak yoll-yoll, yépp ci xél yi la, waaye wégét ay seen baay.  .	Duma bëgg lu la neex ba ne la Yàllaa ngi lay nuyu. (,) 'Dégluwoo samay digle it, xanaa xeeb samay artu yépp.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 30)
yër: Balaa ginaar a duggati ci ngunu, yër ko.
yeraange: 'yeraange 'Ku jub bañ na ay fen, ku soxor di indi gàcceek yeraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 5)
yére: Boroom yére yu weex war naa moytu boroom xàndig tiir. 'Te ku ne sawara cas, tafoo, lakk say yére.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 27)
yëre: Baay, wékkukaayu yëre la, buy dem yëre bi ci gën lay sol.
yéreem: 'yéreem 'Mooy sàkkal boppam ay malaan, ay yéreem mucc ayib te yànj.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 31 aaya 22)
yërëm: . Koo jiitu ca mëninam mën ko.  . Koo jurul doo ko yërëm. 'Ab soxor day namma lore, te du yërëm moroomam.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 21 aaya 10)
yërëmtalu: Defal boppam 'yërëmtal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yërëmu: Defal boppam 'yërëm' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yërëmuñu: Defal boppam 'yërëmuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yérey: . Ku sol yérey yu jafe, léegi anga sol sagar. 'Ndaw si jekki dajeek moom, sol yérey gànc, lal pexeem.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 10)
yërmande: Yenukatu xëddéen dañuy yëgoo.  . Yëréet kësëõ, toq-toq yàgg fi rekk.  . Yërmande day wàññi doole.
yërmandey: 'yërmandey 'Merum buur ni gaynde gu ŋar; yërmandey buur ni lay cig mbooy.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 19 aaya 12)
yërndu: Defal boppam 'yërnd' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yësal: . La àllaaxira di am jàmm yépp, Kumbaak Sàmba fa demul woon.  . La boroom géléem bëgg ci digóorug meer, yësal a ko koy may.  . La jarag am di yuux, su ko néew amoon jël. (,)
yet: Dangay jafandu ci gittax, ba ba ngay am yet.  Jàppal ci gittax gi ba keroog ba ngay am yet. 'Ku ji njubadi, góob fitna, yet wa muy dóore, damm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 8)
yeti: 'yeti 'Ab dof, làmmiñam sooke naw ay, ay waxam di sàkku yeti gannaaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 18 aaya 6)
yett: Baroom jur ci sa tool taxul nga yett giir.
yetu: 'yetu 'Kuy dégg, say wax rafet; te ku ñàkk bopp, yelloo yetu gannaaw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 13)
yéwén: . Yéwén : ci sa alal.  . Yóbbante àq la. 'Ku yéwén, woomle; kuy suuxat, suuxu.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 25)
yéwéne: 'yéwéne 'Kiy leble di tege, ba barele, kay yéwéne néew-ji-doole lay dencal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 8)
yewwi: .	Gan du yewwi bëy. (,,,) Gan du yewwiy béy. (,)
yewwu: Defal boppam 'yeww' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Loo deeti xaar ci yewwu?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 9)
yey: . Man aréen, pepp mënu maa yey, su dul woon man, ceeb du niin.  . Man de, jab laa : sama taat a ma téyé ! 'Ku rafet xel, say kàddu xelu; soo waxee, yey.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 23)
yéy: . Ku naaw ak i sabaar, ni cëppi nuut su nee mana maa yéy deesu ko gëm.  . Ku nara weesu sa bés, sag déwén ñaaw.
yeyee: 'yeyee 'bul gaawa layooji, ana nooy def ëllëg, bu ñu la yeyee?' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 8)
yeyoowu: Defal boppam 'yeyoow' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yeyunu: Defal boppam 'yeyun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yiir: 'yiir 'Day dencalal ndam kiy jubal, di yiir ku mat.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 7)
yiiru: Defal boppam 'yiir' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yilif: Ku nanguwul nit yilif la, jinne doon sa kilifa. (,) . Ku amul mbubb sa biir feeñ. (,) 'Du ku ko yilif mbaa ku koy sas, te jiiteesu ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 7)
yilifatu: Defal boppam 'yilifat' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yit: Bu xulóol dofee yit, jaan, mbokk ma, dofut.
yitte: Gumbaa ngaak yitte yu dul tëb i teen.
yiw: Bàyyil bésub, jekkul ci nit ku yiw. 'Fa muy jaare yiw la, fu mu awe jàmm la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 17)
yiw-yiwlu: Defal boppam 'yiw-yiwl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yiwiku: Defal boppam 'yiwik' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yiwu: Diggante xàcc ak dóor, yiwu Yàlla xaj na fa. (,) 'Te ñay jubal a séq yiwu Yàlla.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 9)
yiy: .	Fa gaynde bóof ak i doomam, fa la mbedd yem.  .	Fa médd ya nekk, fa la tan yiy daje.
yóbbaale: Gaal, lu mu fees fees mëna yóbbaale benn bataaxal.  .	Gaalug dof du teer fu neex bokk ya. (,,) 'Ab soxor day yóbbaale dëkkandoom, jëme ko ci lu bon.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 16 aaya 29)
yóbbaalewunu: Defal boppam 'yóbbaalewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yóbbal: Àddina, ñett a ci di yóbbal : ab xame, ab taar ak mbuus. (,)
yóbbalu: Defal boppam 'yóbbal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yóbbante: Bu la jëgg fenee yóbbante ko. (,) 'Ku yóbbante ab dof kàddu, yaa woo fitna, gor say tànk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 26 aaya 6)
yóbbanteb: . Yòbbante bu ca xuloo amee, dafa jar. (,) . Yóbbanteb gal-gal ubul làmb. (,)
yóbbe: Doomu béy, yóbbe na yaayam taq am xaaxaam. 'Ku yóbbe bàkkaar nit kuy jubal, yeer ma nga gas, yaa cay tàbbi, waaye ku mat di jagoo ngëneel.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 28 aaya 10)
yóbbewunu: Defal boppam 'yóbbewun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yobbu: Defal boppam 'yobb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yóbbu: Defal boppam 'yóbb' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Mbuusum xaalis la ŋàbb, yóbbu, du ñibbisi ndare weer wi fees dell."' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 7 aaya 20)
yóbbul: . Manees na laa takkal jabar, yóbbul la ko ci sa néeg, waaye il ci des, yow rekk a ko mana def. (,)
yóbbuwu: Defal boppam 'yóbbuw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yogg: 'yogg 'Xol bu sedd, kanam gu leer; xol bu tiis, boroom ne yogg.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 15 aaya 13)
yoggoorlu: Defal boppam 'yoggoorl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yokk: Bàyyi sa teppeeku, yokk sa wëñ. 'Na boroom  xel mu rafet déglu, yokk dég-dégam, te kiy ràññee di jariñoo ay tegtal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 5)
yokku: Defal boppam 'yokk' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'jekkadiy xalaat, di mébét lu bon aka yokku ay.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 6 aaya 14)
yokkukaayu: Defal boppam 'yokkukaay' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yokkul: . Tukki yokkul wërsëg, ña ko lekk a ko fa nekkul.  . Tunguni du teew, ñu di ko nataal. (,)
yokkule: . Yóbbu mbir mi fa mbaxane nekke benn.  . Yokkule, sakkanlee ko gën. 'Nit a ngi tabe, di yokkule; nit di nëŋ-nëŋi, gëna ñàkk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 24)
yokkuñu: Defal boppam 'yokkuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yomb: Am bukki yomb na, waaye bukki buy xalam a jafe. (,) 'Ab ñaawlekat day wut xel mu rafet, mu réer ko; ku amug dégg, xam yomb la.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 6)
yonent: Ku demul altiney yonent Yàlla muxamed, dem taalaata Firawna.  Àllarbay Maróota mbaa dibéeri Firawna.
yonent-yonentlu: Defal boppam 'yonent-yonentl' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yonentu: Defal boppam 'yonent' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yónnee: .	Foo ragal, yónnee fa sa alal, boo demee ñeme fa. (,,) .	Fóore, fa nga rawe (,) 'Ndaw lu tayel ca ka yónnee daa mel ni lu forox ciy gëñ mbaa saxaar ciy gët.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 10 aaya 26)
yónnentu: Defal boppam 'yónnent' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yónni: . Ku ñu yónni jëkkër, nga indiw far. 'Xel mu Rafet yónni ay janqam, di wootee fu kawee kawe ca dëkk ba,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 3)
yónniwu: Defal boppam 'yónniw' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yoo: .	Gaynde, bu ko yoo di màtt ci bët muy jooy, booba dafa xamul fu mu koy dóor. 'ngir xamal la lu wér te dëggu, nga yóbbaale kàdduy dëgg, yoo tontoo ña la yebal.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 22 aaya 21)
yóo: . Màggatum pël : nañ màngi i yóo, bu nu màngi i yóo.  . Màggetum dàngin, cuqtaan yóbbuwul ub lancam.  . Màggetum golo kenn du ko jàngal õeleju.
yool: 'yool 'Wax ju rafet yool na boroom, workat fitna la namm.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 13 aaya 2)
yoolam: 'yoolam 'Kuy jëfe njekk, jot yoolam ci kaw suuf, ku soxor keek bàkkaarkat bi it daw raw.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 11 aaya 31)
yooloo: 'yooloo 'Artu kuy ñaawle, feyoo saaga rekk, yedd ab soxor, yooloo loraange.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 9 aaya 7)
yoolu: Defal boppam 'yool' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Alal ak teraangaa ngi fi man, am-am bu sax it ak yoolu njekk.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 8 aaya 18)
yoon: Bu guney yéeg, du tàggoo, waaye bu daanoo ñu yëg ko. (,) Gone, bu dee yéeg du taggoo, waaye bés bu daanoo mag am caw yoon. 'ngir yaru ci  jëfe xel ak njub ak yoon, di jubal,' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 1 aaya 3)
yoonalkat: Ki di def walla ki sàkk 'yoonal' (Someone who does...).
yoonalu: Defal boppam 'yoonal' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yoonam: . Ndox du fàtte yoonam. 'Ab dof, su bàkkaaree, yoonam!' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 14 aaya 9)
yooni: Ginaar gu ñu gàddu xamul yooni je bu sore  .	Ginaar wéete wolandoo, gëse benn tànk. (,,)
yoonu: Defal boppam 'yoon' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Kon nga xam njub ak yoon, xam jubal ak mboolem yoonu mbaax.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 2 aaya 9)
yoor: . Nit ay liggéey alal, waaye alal du liggéey nit.  .  Nit balaa xam li mu yoor mu ñàkk ko.  .  Nit bu ca jom jógee, dara desatu ca. (,)  . Nit dëgg, du fot ci ndab, fotati ca (,)
yoor-yoor: . Yaa fi sësay taxa donn/falu. (,,) . Yaa gàttum xel, ni sàccub yoor-yoor.
yoori: . Ngaram ngaram baayi ngaramoon na baa muy bëgg ngaram.  . Ngasum ñàmbi ku ñu cay yoori goj, daa weesu reen ya. (,)
yóosu: Defal boppam 'yóos' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yoot: . Kuy yoot du sëqat. (,,,) . Kuy yuut a neexa jàngal tëfli.
yóotu: Defal boppam 'yóot' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yooy: Bu sëllu yooy, bu giir deme neen.
yooyu: Defal boppam 'yooy' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self). 'Dëggal ku sikk, daan ku jub, Aji Sax ji sib na yooyu ñaar.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 17 aaya 15)
yoqi: 'yoqi 'Ŋoyal cib yar, bul yoqi, sàmm ko, moo yor sa bakkan.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 4 aaya 13)
yoqiwunu: Defal boppam 'yoqiwun' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yor: Kër-këray yor kër. 'Bul ne say dëkk: "Demal ba beneen, ma jox la," te fekk la yor.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 3 aaya 28)
yorinu: Defal boppam 'yorin' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yorul: Dërëm ak jabar aku jaal laa yemale (: lenn laa ci yorul.)
yótuñu: Defal boppam 'yótuñ' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yoxo: . Yoxooy Kajoor day weesaloo.  Yoxoy Kajoor, dañuy weesaloo.  Loxoy Kajoor dañuy weesaloo. (,) Ay yoxo Kajoor dañuy weesaloo.
yoxoosu: Defal boppam 'yoxoos' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yuda: 'yuda 'Lii it ay kàddu yu xelu la, di yu Suleymaan, ay niti Esekiyas buurub Yuda sotti ko.' (Xam-Xamu Suleymaan Saar 25 aaya 1)
yuur: Ku ni tisoo sa yuur ne këpp, ku ne la dinga gudd fan, nga weddi ko.  . Kuy wàlliyàan, sa kër a tëggul.
yuuru: Defal boppam 'yuur' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yuut: . Kuy yoot du sëqat. Kuy yuut a neexa jàngal tëfli.
yuux: Bu nu demee ba ca cippaa ndaw ja, yuux dina jibe fu ñu ko foogewul.
yuuxu: Defal boppam 'yuux' walla ne ci (Reflexive/Action on self).
yuy: Bopp bu nara barkeel, nopp ya cay sax day dégg um ndigal.  Bopp bu naree am jàmm, yàlla da cay saxal nopp yuy dégg.  Bopp bu am njeriñ, noppi moo ca sax.
